originalText: אַשְׁרֵי־הָאִישׁ אֲשֶׁר לֹא הָלַךְ בַּעֲצַת רְשָׁעִים וּבְדֶרֶךְ חַטָּאִים לֹא עָמָד וּבְמוֹשַׁב לֵצִים לֹא יָשָׁב׃
englishText: HAPPY IS the man that hath not walked in the counsel of the wicked, Nor stood in the way of sinners, nor sat in the seat of the scornful.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי אִם בְּתוֹרַת יְהוָה חֶפְצוֹ וּבְתוֹרָתוֹ יֶהְגֶּה יוֹמָם וָלָיְלָה׃
englishText: But his delight is in the law of the LORD; and in His law doth he meditate day and night.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְהָיָה כְּעֵץ שָׁתוּל עַל־פַּלְגֵי מָיִם אֲשֶׁר פִּרְיוֹ יִתֵּן בְּעִתּוֹ וְעָלֵהוּ לֹא־יִבּוֹל וְכֹל אֲשֶׁר־יַעֲשֶׂה יַצְלִיחַ׃
englishText: And he shall be like a tree planted by streams of water, that bringeth forth its fruit in its season, and whose leaf doth not wither; and in whatsoever he doeth he shall prosper.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא־כֵן הָרְשָׁעִים כִּי אִם־כַּמֹּץ אֲ‍שֶׁר־תִּדְּפֶנּוּ רוּחַ׃
englishText: Not so the wicked; but they are like the chaff which the wind driveth away.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַל־כֵּן לֹא־יָקֻמוּ רְשָׁעִים בַּמִּשְׁפָּט וְחַטָּאִים בַּעֲדַת צַדִּיקִים׃
englishText: Therefore the wicked shall not stand in the judgment, nor sinners in the congregation of the righteous.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־יוֹדֵעַ יְהוָה דֶּרֶךְ צַדִּיקִים וְדֶרֶךְ רְשָׁעִים תֹּאבֵד׃
englishText: For the LORD regardeth the way of the righteous; but the way of the wicked shall perish.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לָמָּה רָגְשׁוּ גוֹיִם וּלְאֻמִּים יֶהְגּוּ־רִיק׃
englishText: Why are the nations in an uproar? And why do the peoples mutter in vain?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִתְיַצְּבוּ מַלְכֵי־אֶרֶץ וְרוֹזְנִים נוֹסְדוּ־יָחַד עַל־יְהוָה וְעַל־מְשִׁיחוֹ׃
englishText: The kings of the earth stand up, And the rulers take counsel together, Against the LORD, and against His anointed:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נְנַתְּקָה אֶת־מוֹסְרוֹתֵימוֹ וְנַשְׁלִיכָה מִמֶּנּוּ עֲבֹתֵימוֹ׃
englishText: 'Let us break their bands asunder, and cast away their cords from us.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יוֹשֵׁב בַּשָּׁמַיִם יִשְׂחָק אֲדֹנָי יִלְעַג־לָמוֹ׃
englishText: He that sitteth in heaven laugheth, the Lord hath them in derision.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָז יְדַבֵּר אֵלֵימוֹ בְאַפּוֹ וּבַחֲרוֹנוֹ יְבַהֲלֵמוֹ׃
englishText: Then will He speak unto them in His wrath, and affright them in His sore displeasure:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַאֲנִי נָסַכְתִּי מַלְכִּי עַל־צִיּוֹן הַר־קָדְשִׁי׃
englishText: 'Truly it is I that have established My king upon Zion, My holy mountain.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲסַפְּרָה אֶל חֹק יְהוָה אָמַר אֵלַי בְּנִי אַתָּה אֲנִי הַיּוֹם יְלִדְתִּיךָ׃
englishText: I will tell of the decree: The LORD said unto me: 'Thou art My son, this day have I begotten thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שְׁאַל מִמֶּנִּי וְאֶתְּנָה גוֹיִם נַחֲלָתֶךָ וַאֲחֻזָּתְךָ אַפְסֵי־אָרֶץ׃
englishText: Ask of Me, and I will give the nations for thine inheritance, and the ends of the earth for thy possession.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תְּרֹעֵם בְּשֵׁבֶט בַּרְזֶל כִּכְלִי יוֹצֵר תְּנַפְּצֵם׃
englishText: Thou shalt break them with a rod of iron; Thou shalt dash them in pieces like a potter's vessel.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְעַתָּה מְלָכִים הַשְׂכִּילוּ הִוָּסְרוּ שֹׁפְטֵי אָרֶץ׃
englishText: Now therefore, O ye kings, be wise; be admonished, ye judges of the earth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עִבְדוּ אֶת־יְהוָה בְּיִרְאָה וְגִילוּ בִּרְעָדָה׃
englishText: Serve the LORD with fear, and rejoice with trembling.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נַשְּׁקוּ־בַר פֶּן־יֶאֱנַף וְתֹאבְדוּ דֶרֶךְ כִּי־יִבְעַר כִּמְעַט אַפּוֹ אַשְׁרֵי כָּל־חוֹסֵי בוֹ׃
englishText: Do homage in purity, lest He be angry, and ye perish in the way, when suddenly His wrath is kindled. Happy are all they that take refuge in Him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִזְמוֹר לְדָוִד בְּבָרְחוֹ מִפְּנֵי אַבְשָׁלוֹם בְּנוֹ׃
englishText: A Psalm of David, when he fled from Absalom his son.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה מָה־רַבּוּ צָרָי רַבִּים קָמִים עָלָי׃
englishText: LORD, how many are mine adversaries become! Many are they that rise up against me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רַבִּים אֹמְרִים לְנַפְשִׁי אֵין יְשׁוּעָתָה לּוֹ בֵאלֹהִים סֶלָה׃
englishText: Many there are that say of my soul: 'There is no salvation for him in God.' Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאַתָּה יְהוָה מָגֵן בַּעֲדִי כְּבוֹדִי וּמֵרִים רֹאשִׁי׃
englishText: But thou, O LORD, art a shield about me; My glory, and the lifter up of my head.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קוֹלִי אֶל־יְהוָה אֶקְרָא וַיַּעֲנֵנִי מֵהַר קָדְשׁוֹ סֶלָה׃
englishText: With my voice I call unto the LORD, and He answereth me out of His holy mountain. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲנִי שָׁכַבְתִּי וָאִישָׁנָה הֱקִיצוֹתִי כִּי יְהוָה יִסְמְכֵנִי׃
englishText: I lay me down, and I sleep; I awake, for the LORD sustaineth me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא־אִירָא מֵרִבְבוֹת עָם אֲשֶׁר סָבִיב שָׁתוּ עָלָי׃
englishText: I am not afraid of ten thousands of people, that have set themselves against me round about.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קוּמָה יְהוָה הוֹשִׁיעֵנִי אֱלֹהַי כִּי־הִכִּיתָ אֶת־כָּל־אֹיְבַי לֶחִי שִׁנֵּי רְשָׁעִים שִׁבַּרְתָּ׃
englishText: Arise, O LORD; save me, O my God; for Thou hast smitten all mine enemies upon the cheek, Thou hast broken the teeth of the wicked.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַיהוָה הַיְשׁוּעָה עַל־עַמְּךָ בִרְכָתֶךָ סֶּלָה׃
englishText: Salvation belongeth unto the LORD; Thy blessing be upon Thy people. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ בִּנְגִינוֹת מִזְמוֹר לְדָוִד׃
englishText: For the Leader; with string-music. A Psalm of David.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּקָרְאִי עֲנֵנִי אֱלֹהֵי צִדְקִי בַּצָּר הִרְחַבְתָּ לִּי חָנֵּנִי וּשְׁמַע תְּפִלָּתִי׃
englishText: Answer me when I call, O God of my righteousness, Thou who didst set me free when I was in distress; be gracious unto me, and hear my prayer.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנֵי אִישׁ עַד־מֶה כְבוֹדִי לִכְלִמָּה תֶּאֱהָבוּן רִיק תְּבַקְשׁוּ כָזָב סֶלָה׃
englishText: O ye sons of men, how long shall my glory be put to shame, in that ye love vanity, and seek after falsehood? Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּדְעוּ כִּי־הִפְלָה יְהוָה חָסִיד לוֹ יְהוָה יִשְׁמַע בְּקָרְאִי אֵלָיו׃
englishText: But know that the LORD hath set apart the godly man as His own; The LORD will hear when I call unto Him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רִגְזוּ וְאַל־תֶּחֱטָאוּ אִמְרוּ בִלְבַבְכֶם עַל־מִשְׁכַּבְכֶם וְדֹמּוּ סֶלָה׃
englishText: Tremble, and sin not; commune with your own heart upon your bed, and be still. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זִבְחוּ זִבְחֵי־צֶדֶק וּבִטְחוּ אֶל־יְהוָה׃
englishText: Offer the sacrifices of righteousness, and put your trust in the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רַבִּים אֹמְרִים מִי־יַרְאֵנוּ טוֹב נְסָה־עָלֵינוּ אוֹר פָּנֶיךָ יְהוָה׃
englishText: Many there are that say: 'Oh that we could see some good!' LORD, lift Thou up the light of Thy countenance upon us.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נָתַתָּה שִׂמְחָה בְלִבִּי מֵעֵת דְּגָנָם וְתִירוֹשָׁם רָבּוּ׃
englishText: Thou hast put gladness in my heart, more than when their corn and their wine increase.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּשָׁלוֹם יַחְדָּו אֶשְׁכְּבָה וְאִישָׁן כִּי־אַתָּה יְהוָה לְבָדָד לָבֶטַח תּוֹשִׁיבֵנִי׃
englishText: In peace will I both lay me down and sleep; for Thou, LORD, makest me dwell alone in safety.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ אֶל־הַנְּחִילוֹת מִזְמוֹר לְדָוִד׃
englishText: For the Leader; upon the Nehiloth. A Psalm of David.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲמָרַי הַאֲזִינָה יְהוָה בִּינָה הֲגִיגִי׃
englishText: Give ear to my words, O LORD, consider my meditation.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַקְשִׁיבָה לְקוֹל שַׁוְעִי מַלְכִּי וֵאלֹהָי כִּי־אֵלֶיךָ אֶתְפַּלָּל׃
englishText: Hearken unto the voice of my cry, my King, and my God; For unto Thee do I pray.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה בֹּקֶר תִּשְׁמַע קוֹלִי בֹּקֶר אֶעֱרָךְ־לְךָ וַאֲצַפֶּה׃
englishText: O LORD, in the morning shalt Thou hear my voice; In the morning will I order my prayer unto Thee, and will look forward.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי לֹא אֵל־חָפֵץ רֶשַׁע אָתָּה לֹא יְגֻרְךָ רָע׃
englishText: For Thou art not a God that hath pleasure in wickedness; Evil shall not sojourn with Thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא־יִתְיַצְּבוּ הוֹלְלִים לְנֶגֶד עֵינֶיךָ שָׂנֵאתָ כָּל־פֹּעֲלֵי אָוֶן׃
englishText: The boasters shall not stand in Thy sight; Thou hatest all workers of iniquity.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תְּאַבֵּד דֹּבְרֵי כָזָב אִישׁ־דָּמִים וּמִרְמָה יְתָעֵב יְהוָה׃
englishText: Thou destroyest them that speak falsehood; The LORD abhorreth the man of blood and of deceit.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַאֲנִי בְּרֹב חַסְדְּךָ אָבוֹא בֵיתֶךָ אֶשְׁתַּחֲוֶה אֶל־הֵיכַל־קָדְשְׁךָ בְּיִרְאָתֶךָ׃
englishText: But as for me, in the abundance of Thy lovingkindness will I come into Thy house; I will bow down toward Thy holy temple in the fear of Thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה נְחֵנִי בְצִדְקָתֶךָ לְמַעַן שׁוֹרְרָי הושר [הַיְשַׁר] לְפָנַי דַּרְכֶּךָ׃
englishText: O LORD, lead me in Thy righteousness because of them that lie in wait for me; Make Thy way straight before my face.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי אֵין בְּפִיהוּ נְכוֹנָה קִרְבָּם הַוּוֹת קֶבֶר־פָּתוּחַ גְּרוֹנָם לְשׁוֹנָם יַחֲלִיקוּן׃
englishText: For there is no sincerity in their mouth; Their inward part is a yawning gulf, Their throat is an open sepulchre; They make smooth their tongue.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַאֲשִׁימֵם אֱ‍לֹהִים יִפְּלוּ מִמֹּעֲצוֹתֵיהֶם בְּרֹב פִּשְׁעֵיהֶם הַדִּיחֵמוֹ כִּי־מָרוּ בָךְ׃
englishText: Hold them guilty, O God, Let them fall by their own counsels; Cast them down in the multitude of their transgressions; For they have rebelled against Thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְיִשְׂמְחוּ כָל־חוֹסֵי בָךְ לְעוֹלָם יְרַנֵּנוּ וְתָסֵךְ עָלֵימוֹ וְיַעְלְצוּ בְךָ אֹהֲבֵי שְׁמֶךָ׃
englishText: So shall all those that take refuge in Thee rejoice, They shall ever shout for joy, And Thou shalt shelter them; Let them also that love Thy name exult in Thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־אַתָּה תְּבָרֵךְ צַדִּיק יְהוָה כַּצִּנָּה רָצוֹן תַּעְטְרֶנּוּ׃
englishText: For Thou dost bless the righteous; O LORD, Thou dost encompass him with favour as with a shield.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ בִּנְגִינוֹת עַל־הַשְּׁמִינִית מִזְמוֹר לְדָוִד׃
englishText: For the Leader; with string-music; on the Sheminith. A Psalm of David.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה אַל־בְּאַפְּךָ תוֹכִיחֵנִי וְאַל־בַּחֲמָתְךָ תְיַסְּרֵנִי׃
englishText: O LORD, rebuke me not in Thine anger, Neither chasten me in Thy wrath.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חָנֵּנִי יְהוָה כִּי אֻמְלַל אָנִי רְפָאֵנִי יְהוָה כִּי נִבְהֲלוּ עֲצָמָי׃
englishText: Be gracious unto me, O LORD, for I languish away; Heal me, O LORD, for my bones are affrighted.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְנַפְשִׁי נִבְהֲלָה מְאֹד ואת [וְאַתָּה] יְהוָה עַד־מָתָי׃
englishText: My soul also is sore affrighted; And Thou, O LORD, how long?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שׁוּבָה יְהוָה חַלְּצָה נַפְשִׁי הוֹשִׁיעֵנִי לְמַעַן חַסְדֶּךָ׃
englishText: Return, O LORD, deliver my soul; Save me for Thy mercy's sake.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי אֵין בַּמָּוֶת זִכְרֶךָ בִּשְׁאוֹל מִי יוֹדֶה־לָּךְ׃
englishText: For in death there is no remembrance of Thee; In the nether-world who will give Thee thanks?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָגַעְתִּי בְּאַנְחָתִי אַשְׂחֶה בְכָל־לַיְלָה מִטָּתִי בְּדִמְעָתִי עַרְשִׂי אַמְסֶה׃
englishText: I am weary with my groaning; Every night make I my bed to swim; I melt away my couch with my tears.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עָשְׁשָׁה מִכַּעַס עֵינִי עָתְקָה בְּכָל־צוֹרְרָי׃
englishText: Mine eye is dimmed because of vexation; It waxeth old because of all mine adversaries.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: סוּרוּ מִמֶּנִּי כָּל־פֹּעֲלֵי אָוֶן כִּי־שָׁמַע יְהוָה קוֹל בִּכְיִי׃
englishText: Depart from me, all ye workers of iniquity; For the LORD hath heard the voice of my weeping.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׁמַע יְהוָה תְּחִנָּתִי יְהוָה תְּפִלָּתִי יִקָּח׃
englishText: The LORD hath heard my supplication; The LORD receiveth my prayer.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יֵבֹשׁוּ וְיִבָּהֲלוּ מְאֹד כָּל־אֹיְבָי יָשֻׁבוּ יֵבֹשׁוּ רָגַע׃
englishText: All mine enemies shall be ashamed and sore affrighted; They shall turn back, they shall be ashamed suddenly.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׁגָּיוֹן לְדָוִד אֲשֶׁר־שָׁר לַיהוָה עַל־דִּבְרֵי־כוּשׁ בֶּן־יְמִינִי׃
englishText: Shiggaion of David, which he sang unto the LORD, concerning Cush a Benjamite.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה אֱלֹהַי בְּךָ חָסִיתִי הוֹשִׁיעֵנִי מִכָּל־רֹדְפַי וְהַצִּילֵנִי׃
englishText: O LORD my God, in Thee have I taken refuge; Save me from all them that pursue me, and deliver me;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פֶּן־יִטְרֹף כְּאַרְיֵה נַפְשִׁי פֹּרֵק וְאֵין מַצִּיל׃
englishText: Lest he tear my soul like a lion, Rending it in pieces, while there is none to deliver.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה אֱלֹהַי אִם־עָשִׂיתִי זֹאת אִם־יֶשׁ־עָוֶל בְּכַפָּי׃
englishText: O LORD my God, if I have done this; If there be iniquity in my hands;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־גָּמַלְתִּי שׁוֹלְמִי רָע וָאֲחַלְּצָה צוֹרְרִי רֵיקָם׃
englishText: If I have requited him that did evil unto me, Or spoiled mine adversary unto emptiness;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִרַדֹּף אוֹיֵב נַפְשִׁי וְיַשֵּׂג וְיִרְמֹס לָאָרֶץ חַיָּי וּכְבוֹדִי לֶעָפָר יַשְׁכֵּן סֶלָה׃
englishText: Let the enemy pursue my soul, and overtake it, And tread my life down to the earth; Yea, let him lay my glory in the dust. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קוּמָה יְהוָה בְּאַפֶּךָ הִנָּשֵׂא בְּעַבְרוֹת צוֹרְרָי וְעוּרָה אֵלַי מִשְׁפָּט צִוִּיתָ׃
englishText: Arise, O LORD, in Thine anger, Lift up Thyself in indignation against mine adversaries; Yea, awake for me at the judgment which Thou hast commanded.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַעֲדַת לְאֻמִּים תְּסוֹבְבֶךָּ וְעָלֶיהָ לַמָּרוֹם שׁוּבָה׃
englishText: And let the congregation of the peoples compass Thee about, And over them return Thou on high.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה יָדִין עַמִּים שָׁפְטֵנִי יְהוָה כְּצִדְקִי וּכְתֻמִּי עָלָי׃
englishText: O LORD, who ministerest judgment to the peoples, Judge me, O LORD, According to my righteousness, and according to mine integrity that is in me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִגְמָר־נָא רַע רְשָׁעִים וּתְכוֹנֵן צַדִּיק וּבֹחֵן לִבּוֹת וּכְלָיוֹת אֱלֹהִים צַדִּיק׃
englishText: Oh that a full measure of evil might come upon the wicked, And that Thou wouldest establish the righteous; For the righteous God trieth the heart and reins.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מָגִנִּי עַל־אֱלֹהִים מוֹשִׁיעַ יִשְׁרֵי־לֵב׃
englishText: My shield is with God, Who saveth the upright in heart.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱלֹהִים שׁוֹפֵט צַדִּיק וְאֵל זֹעֵם בְּכָל־יוֹם׃
englishText: God is a righteous judge, Yea, a God that hath indignation every day:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־לֹא יָשׁוּב חַרְבּוֹ יִלְטוֹשׁ קַשְׁתּוֹ דָרַךְ וַיְכוֹנְנֶהָ׃
englishText: If a man turn not, He will whet His sword, He hath bent His bow, and made it ready;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְלוֹ הֵכִין כְּלֵי־מָוֶת חִצָּיו לְדֹלְקִים יִפְעָל׃
englishText: He hath also prepared for him the weapons of death, Yea, His arrows which He made sharp.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הִנֵּה יְחַבֶּל־אָוֶן וְהָרָה עָמָל וְיָלַד שָׁקֶר׃
englishText: Behold, he travaileth with iniquity; Yea, he conceiveth mischief, and bringeth forth falsehood.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בּוֹר כָּרָה וַיַּחְפְּרֵהוּ וַיִּפֹּל בְּשַׁחַת יִפְעָל׃
englishText: He hath digged a pit, and hollowed it, And is fallen into the ditch which he made.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָשׁוּב עֲמָלוֹ בְרֹאשׁוֹ וְעַל קָדְקֳדוֹ חֲמָסוֹ יֵרֵד׃
englishText: His mischief shall return upon his own head, And his violence shall come down upon his own pate.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אוֹדֶה יְהוָה כְּצִדְקוֹ וַאֲזַמְּרָה שֵׁם־יְהוָה עֶלְיוֹן׃
englishText: I will give thanks unto the LORD according to His righteousness; And will sing praise to the name of the LORD Most High.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ עַל־הַגִּתִּית מִזְמוֹר לְדָוִד׃
englishText: For the Leader; upon the Gittith. A Psalm of David.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה אֲדֹנֵינוּ מָה־אַדִּיר שִׁמְךָ בְּכָל־הָאָרֶץ אֲשֶׁר תְּנָה הוֹדְךָ עַל־הַשָּׁמָיִם׃
englishText: O LORD, our Lord, How glorious is Thy name in all the earth! Whose majesty is rehearsed above the heavens.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִפִּי עוֹלְלִים וְיֹנְקִים יִסַּדְתָּ עֹז לְמַעַן צוֹרְרֶיךָ לְהַשְׁבִּית אוֹיֵב וּמִתְנַקֵּם׃
englishText: Out of the mouth of babes and sucklings hast Thou founded strength, Because of Thine adversaries; That Thou mightest still the enemy and the avenger.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־אֶרְאֶה שָׁמֶיךָ מַעֲשֵׂי אֶצְבְּעֹתֶיךָ יָרֵחַ וְכוֹכָבִים אֲשֶׁר כּוֹנָנְתָּה׃
englishText: When I behold Thy heavens, the work of Thy fingers, The moon and the stars, which Thou hast established;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מָה־אֱנוֹשׁ כִּי־תִזְכְּרֶנּוּ וּבֶן־אָדָם כִּי תִפְקְדֶנּוּ׃
englishText: What is man, that Thou art mindful of him? And the son of man, that Thou thinkest of him?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַתְּחַסְּרֵהוּ מְּעַט מֵאֱלֹהִים וְכָבוֹד וְהָדָר תְּעַטְּרֵהוּ׃
englishText: Yet Thou hast made him but little lower than the angels, And hast crowned him with glory and honour.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תַּמְשִׁילֵהוּ בְּמַעֲשֵׂי יָדֶיךָ כֹּל שַׁתָּה תַחַת־רַגְלָיו׃
englishText: Thou hast made him to have dominion over the works of Thy hands; Thou hast put all things under His feet:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: צֹנֶה וַאֲלָפִים כֻּלָּם וְגַם בַּהֲמוֹת שָׂדָי׃
englishText: Sheep and oxen, all of them, Yea, and the beasts of the field;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: צִפּוֹר שָׁמַיִם וּדְגֵי הַיָּם עֹבֵר אָרְחוֹת יַמִּים׃
englishText: The fowl of the air, and the fish of the sea; Whatsoever passeth through the paths of the seas.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה אֲדֹנֵינוּ מָה־אַדִּיר שִׁמְךָ בְּכָל־הָאָרֶץ׃
englishText: O LORD, our Lord, How glorious is Thy name in all the earth!
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ עַלְמוּת לַבֵּן מִזְמוֹר לְדָוִד׃
englishText: For the Leader; upon Muthlabben. A Psalm of David.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אוֹדֶה יְהוָה בְּכָל־לִבִּי אֲסַפְּרָה כָּל־נִפְלְאוֹתֶיךָ׃
englishText: I will give thanks unto the LORD with my whole heart; I will tell of all Thy marvellous works.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֶשְׂמְחָה וְאֶעֶלְצָה בָךְ אֲזַמְּרָה שִׁמְךָ עֶלְיוֹן׃
englishText: I will be glad and exult in Thee; I will sing praise to Thy name, O Most High:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּשׁוּב־אוֹיְבַי אָחוֹר יִכָּשְׁלוּ וְיֹאבְדוּ מִפָּנֶיךָ׃
englishText: When mine enemies are turned back, They stumble and perish at Thy presence;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־עָשִׂיתָ מִשְׁפָּטִי וְדִינִי יָשַׁבְתָּ לְכִסֵּא שׁוֹפֵט צֶדֶק׃
englishText: For Thou hast maintained my right and my cause; Thou sattest upon the throne as the righteous Judge.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גָּעַרְתָּ גוֹיִם אִבַּדְתָּ רָשָׁע שְׁמָם מָחִיתָ לְעוֹלָם וָעֶד׃
englishText: Thou hast rebuked the nations, Thou hast destroyed the wicked, Thou hast blotted out their name for ever and ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הָאוֹיֵב תַּמּוּ חֳרָבוֹת לָנֶצַח וְעָרִים נָתַשְׁתָּ אָבַד זִכְרָם הֵמָּה׃
englishText: O thou enemy, the waste places are come to an end for ever; And the cities which thou didst uproot, Their very memorial is perished.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיהוָה לְעוֹלָם יֵשֵׁב כּוֹנֵן לַמִּשְׁפָּט כִּסְאוֹ׃
englishText: But the LORD is enthroned for ever; He hath established His throne for judgment.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְהוּא יִשְׁפֹּט־תֵּבֵל בְּצֶדֶק יָדִין לְאֻמִּים בְּמֵישָׁרִים׃
englishText: And He will judge the world in righteousness, He will minister judgment to the peoples with equity.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וִיהִי יְהוָה מִשְׂגָּב לַדָּךְ מִשְׂגָּב לְעִתּוֹת בַּצָּרָה׃
englishText: The LORD also will be a high tower for the oppressed, A high tower in times of trouble;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְיִבְטְחוּ בְךָ יוֹדְעֵי שְׁמֶךָ כִּי לֹא־עָזַבְתָּ דֹרְשֶׁיךָ יְהוָה׃
englishText: And they that know Thy name will put their trust in Thee; For thou, LORD, hast not forsaken them that seek Thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זַמְּרוּ לַיהוָה יֹשֵׁב צִיּוֹן הַגִּידוּ בָעַמִּים עֲלִילוֹתָיו׃
englishText: Sing praises to the LORD, who dwelleth in Zion; Declare among the peoples His doings.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־דֹרֵשׁ דָּמִים אוֹתָם זָכָר לֹא־שָׁכַח צַעֲקַת עניים [עֲנָוִים׃]
englishText: For He that avengeth blood hath remembered them; He hath not forgotten the cry of the humble.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חָנְנֵנִי יְהוָה רְאֵה עָנְיִי מִשֹּׂנְאָי מְרוֹמְמִי מִשַּׁעֲרֵי מָוֶת׃
englishText: Be gracious unto me, O LORD, Behold mine affliction at the hands of them that hate me; Thou that liftest me up from the gates of death;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְמַעַן אֲסַפְּרָה כָּל־תְּהִלָּתֶיךָ בְּשַׁעֲרֵי בַת־צִיּוֹן אָגִילָה בִּישׁוּעָתֶךָ׃
englishText: That I may tell of all Thy praise in the gates of the daughter of Zion, That I may rejoice in Thy salvation.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: טָבְעוּ גוֹיִם בְּשַׁחַת עָשׂוּ בְּרֶשֶׁת־זוּ טָמָנוּ נִלְכְּדָה רַגְלָם׃
englishText: The nations are sunk down in the pit that they made; In the net which they hid is their own foot taken.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נוֹדַע יְהוָה מִשְׁפָּט עָשָׂה בְּפֹעַל כַּפָּיו נוֹקֵשׁ רָשָׁע הִגָּיוֹן סֶלָה׃
englishText: The LORD hath made Himself known, He hath executed judgment, The wicked is snared in the work of his own hands. Higgaion. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָשׁוּבוּ רְשָׁעִים לִשְׁאוֹלָה כָּל־גּוֹיִם שְׁכֵחֵי אֱלֹהִים׃
englishText: The wicked shall return to the nether-world, Even all the nations that forget God.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי לֹא לָנֶצַח יִשָּׁכַח אֶבְיוֹן תִּקְוַת ענוים [עֲנִיִּים] תֹּאבַד לָעַד׃
englishText: For the needy shall not alway be forgotten, Nor the expectation of the poor perish for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קוּמָה יְהוָה אַל־יָעֹז אֱנוֹשׁ יִשָּׁפְטוּ גוֹיִם עַל־פָּנֶיךָ׃
englishText: Arise, O LORD, let not man prevail; Let the nations be judged in Thy sight.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׁיתָה יְהוָה מוֹרָה לָהֶם יֵדְעוּ גוֹיִם אֱנוֹשׁ הֵמָּה סֶּלָה׃
englishText: Set terror over them, O LORD; Let the nations know they are but men. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לָמָה יְהוָה תַּעֲמֹד בְּרָחוֹק תַּעְלִים לְעִתּוֹת בַּצָּרָה׃
englishText: Why standest Thou afar off, O LORD? Why hidest Thou Thyself in times of trouble?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּגַאֲוַת רָשָׁע יִדְלַק עָנִי יִתָּפְשׂוּ בִּמְזִמּוֹת זוּ חָשָׁבוּ׃
englishText: Through the pride of the wicked the poor is hotly pursued, They are taken in the devices that they have imagined.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־הִלֵּל רָשָׁע עַל־תַּאֲוַת נַפְשׁוֹ וּבֹצֵעַ בֵּרֵךְ נִאֵץ יְהוָה׃
englishText: For the wicked boasteth of his heart's desire, And the covetous vaunteth himself, though he contemn the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רָשָׁע כְּגֹבַהּ אַפּוֹ בַּל־יִדְרֹשׁ אֵין אֱלֹהִים כָּל־מְזִמּוֹתָיו׃
englishText: The wicked, in the pride of his countenance [, saith]: 'He will not require'; All his thoughts are: 'There is no God.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָחִילוּ דרכו [דְרָכָיו ] בְּכָל־עֵת מָרוֹם מִשְׁפָּטֶיךָ מִנֶּגְדּוֹ כָּל־צוֹרְרָיו יָפִיחַ בָּהֶם׃
englishText: His ways prosper at all times; Thy judgments are far above out of his sight; As for all his adversaries, he puffeth at them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָמַר בְּלִבּוֹ בַּל־אֶמּוֹט לְדֹר וָדֹר אֲשֶׁר לֹא־בְרָע׃
englishText: He saith in his heart: 'I shall not be moved, I who to all generations shall not be in adversity.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָלָה פִּיהוּ מָלֵא וּמִרְמוֹת וָתֹךְ תַּחַת לְשׁוֹנוֹ עָמָל וָאָוֶן׃
englishText: His mouth is full of cursing and deceit and oppression; Under his tongue is mischief and iniquity.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יֵשֵׁב בְּמַאְרַב חֲצֵרִים בַּמִּסְתָּרִים יַהֲרֹג נָקִי עֵינָיו לְחֵלְכָה יִצְפֹּנוּ׃
englishText: He sitteth in the lurking-places of the villages; In secret places doth he slay the innocent; His eyes are on the watch for the helpless.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יֶאֱרֹב בַּמִּסְתָּר כְּאַרְיֵה בְסֻכֹּה יֶאֱרֹב לַחֲטוֹף עָנִי יַחְטֹף עָנִי בְּמָשְׁכוֹ בְרִשְׁתּוֹ׃
englishText: He lieth in wait in a secret place as a lion in his lair, He lieth in wait to catch the poor; He doth catch the poor, when he draweth him up in his net.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: ודכה [יִדְכֶּה] יָשֹׁחַ וְנָפַל בַּעֲצוּמָיו חלכאים [חֵיל] [כָּאִים׃]
englishText: He croucheth, he boweth down, And the helpless fall into his mighty claws.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָמַר בְּלִבּוֹ שָׁכַח אֵל הִסְתִּיר פָּנָיו בַּל־רָאָה לָנֶצַח׃
englishText: He hath said in his heart: 'God hath forgotten; He hideth His face; He will never see.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קוּמָה יְהוָה אֵל נְשָׂא יָדֶךָ אַל־תִּשְׁכַּח עניים [עֲנָוִים׃]
englishText: Arise, O LORD; O God, lift up Thy hand; Forget not the humble.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַל־מֶה נִאֵץ רָשָׁע אֱלֹהִים אָמַר בְּלִבּוֹ לֹא תִּדְרֹשׁ׃
englishText: Wherefore doth the wicked contemn God, And say in his heart: 'Thou wilt not require'?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רָאִתָה כִּי־אַתָּה עָמָל וָכַעַס תַּבִּיט לָתֵת בְּיָדֶךָ עָלֶיךָ יַעֲזֹב חֵלֶכָה יָתוֹם אַתָּה הָיִיתָ עוֹזֵר׃
englishText: Thou hast seen; for Thou beholdest trouble and vexation, to requite them with Thy hand; Unto Thee the helpless committeth himself; Thou hast been the helper of the fatherless.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שְׁבֹר זְרוֹעַ רָשָׁע וָרָע תִּדְרוֹשׁ־רִשְׁעוֹ בַל־תִּמְצָא׃
englishText: Break Thou the arm of the wicked; And as for the evil man, search out his wickedness, till none be found.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה מֶלֶךְ עוֹלָם וָעֶד אָבְדוּ גוֹיִם מֵאַרְצוֹ׃
englishText: The LORD is King for ever and ever; The nations are perished out of His land.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תַּאֲוַת עֲנָוִים שָׁמַעְתָּ יְהוָה תָּכִין לִבָּם תַּקְשִׁיב אָזְנֶךָ׃
englishText: LORD, Thou hast heard the desire of the humble: Thou wilt direct their heart, Thou wilt cause Thine ear to attend;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לִשְׁפֹּט יָתוֹם וָדָךְ בַּל־יוֹסִיף עוֹד לַעֲרֹץ אֱנוֹשׁ מִן־הָאָרֶץ׃
englishText: To right the fatherless and the oppressed, That man who is of the earth may be terrible no more.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ לְדָוִד בַּיהוָה חָסִיתִי אֵיךְ תֹּאמְרוּ לְנַפְשִׁי נודו [נוּדִי] הַרְכֶם צִפּוֹר׃
englishText: For the Leader. [A Psalm] of David. In the LORD have I taken refuge; how say ye to my soul: 'Flee thou! to your mountain, ye birds'?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי הִנֵּה הָרְשָׁעִים יִדְרְכוּן קֶשֶׁת כּוֹנְנוּ חִצָּם עַל־יֶתֶר לִירוֹת בְּמוֹ־אֹפֶל לְיִשְׁרֵי־לֵב׃
englishText: For, lo, the wicked bend the bow, they have made ready their arrow upon the string, that they may shoot in darkness at the upright in heart.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי הַשָּׁתוֹת יֵהָרֵסוּן צַדִּיק מַה־פָּעָל׃
englishText: When the foundations are destroyed, what hath the righteous wrought?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה בְּהֵיכַל קָדְשׁוֹ יְהוָה בַּשָּׁמַיִם כִּסְאוֹ עֵינָיו יֶחֱזוּ עַפְעַפָּיו יִבְחֲנוּ בְּנֵי אָדָם׃
englishText: The LORD is in His holy temple, the LORD, His throne is in heaven; His eyes behold, His eyelids try, the children of men.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה צַדִּיק יִבְחָן וְרָשָׁע וְאֹהֵב חָמָס שָׂנְאָה נַפְשׁוֹ׃
englishText: The LORD trieth the righteous; but the wicked and him that loveth violence His soul hateth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יַמְטֵר עַל־רְשָׁעִים פַּחִים אֵשׁ וְגָפְרִית וְרוּחַ זִלְעָפוֹת מְנָת כּוֹסָם׃
englishText: Upon the wicked He will cause to rain coals; fire and brimstone and burning wind shall be the portion of their cup.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־צַדִּיק יְהוָה צְדָקוֹת אָהֵב יָשָׁר יֶחֱזוּ פָנֵימוֹ׃
englishText: For the LORD is righteous, He loveth righteousness; the upright shall behold His face.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ עַל־הַשְּׁמִינִית מִזְמוֹר לְדָוִד׃
englishText: For the Leader; on the Sheminith. A Psalm of David.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הוֹשִׁיעָה יְהוָה כִּי־גָמַר חָסִיד כִּי־פַסּוּ אֱמוּנִים מִבְּנֵי אָדָם׃
englishText: Help, LORD; for the godly man ceaseth; For the faithful fail from among the children of men.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׁוְא יְדַבְּרוּ אִישׁ אֶת־רֵעֵהוּ שְׂפַת חֲלָקוֹת בְּלֵב וָלֵב יְדַבֵּרוּ׃
englishText: They speak falsehood every one with his neighbour; With flattering lip, and with a double heart, do they speak.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יַכְרֵת יְהוָה כָּל־שִׂפְתֵי חֲלָקוֹת לָשׁוֹן מְדַבֶּרֶת גְּדֹלוֹת׃
englishText: May the LORD cut off all flattering lips, The tongue that speaketh proud things!
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲשֶׁר אָמְרוּ לִלְשֹׁנֵנוּ נַגְבִּיר שְׂפָתֵינוּ אִתָּנוּ מִי אָדוֹן לָנוּ׃
englishText: Who have said: 'Our tongue will we make mighty; Our lips are with us: who is lord over us?'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִשֹּׁד עֲנִיִּים מֵאַנְקַת אֶבְיוֹנִים עַתָּה אָקוּם יֹאמַר יְהוָה אָשִׁית בְּיֵשַׁע יָפִיחַ לוֹ׃
englishText: 'For the oppression of the poor, for the sighing of the needy, Now will I arise', saith the LORD; 'I will set him in safety at whom they puff.' .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִמֲרוֹת יְהוָה אֲמָרוֹת טְהֹרוֹת כֶּסֶף צָרוּף בַּעֲלִיל לָאָרֶץ מְזֻקָּק שִׁבְעָתָיִם׃
englishText: The words of the LORD are pure words, As silver tried in a crucible on the earth, refined seven times.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַתָּה־יְהוָה תִּשְׁמְרֵם תִּצְּרֶנּוּ מִן־הַדּוֹר זוּ לְעוֹלָם׃
englishText: Thou wilt keep them, O LORD; Thou wilt preserve us from this generation for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: סָבִיב רְשָׁעִים יִתְהַלָּכוּן כְּרֻם זֻלּוּת לִבְנֵי אָדָם׃
englishText: The wicked walk on every side, When vileness is exalted among the sons of men.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ מִזְמוֹר לְדָוִד׃
englishText: For the Leader. A Psalm of David.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַד־אָנָה יְהוָה תִּשְׁכָּחֵנִי נֶצַח עַד־אָנָה תַּסְתִּיר אֶת־פָּנֶיךָ מִמֶּנִּי׃
englishText: How long, O LORD, wilt Thou forget me for ever? How long wilt Thou hide Thy face from me?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַד־אָנָה אָשִׁית עֵצוֹת בְּנַפְשִׁי יָגוֹן בִּלְבָבִי יוֹמָם עַד־אָנָה יָרוּם אֹיְבִי עָלָי׃
englishText: How long shall I take counsel in my soul, having sorrow in my heart by day? How long shall mine enemy be exalted over me?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַבִּיטָה עֲנֵנִי יְהוָה אֱלֹהָי הָאִירָה עֵינַי פֶּן־אִישַׁן הַמָּוֶת׃
englishText: Behold Thou, and answer me, O LORD my God; Lighten mine eyes, lest I sleep the sleep of death;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פֶּן־יֹאמַר אֹיְבִי יְכָלְתִּיו צָרַי יָגִילוּ כִּי אֶמּוֹט׃
englishText: Lest mine enemy say: 'I have prevailed against him'; Lest mine adversaries rejoice when I am moved.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַאֲנִי בְּחַסְדְּךָ בָטַחְתִּי יָגֵל לִבִּי בִּישׁוּעָתֶךָ אָשִׁירָה לַיהוָה כִּי גָמַל עָלָי׃
englishText: But as for me, in Thy mercy do I trust; My heart shall rejoice in Thy salvation. I will sing unto the LORD, Because He hath dealt bountifully with me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ לְדָוִד אָמַר נָבָל בְּלִבּוֹ אֵין אֱלֹהִים הִשְׁחִיתוּ הִתְעִיבוּ עֲלִילָה אֵין עֹשֵׂה־טוֹב׃
englishText: For the Leader. [A Psalm] of David. The fool hath said in his heart: 'There is no God'; they have dealt corruptly, they have done abominably; there is none that doeth good.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה מִשָּׁמַיִם הִשְׁקִיף עַל־בְּנֵי־אָדָם לִרְאוֹת הֲיֵשׁ מַשְׂכִּיל דֹּרֵשׁ אֶת־אֱלֹהִים׃
englishText: The LORD looked forth from heaven upon the children of men, to see if there were any man of understanding, that did seek after God.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַכֹּל סָר יַחְדָּו נֶאֱלָחוּ אֵין עֹשֵׂה־טוֹב אֵין גַּם־אֶחָד׃
englishText: They are all corrupt, they are together become impure; there is none that doeth good, no, not one.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲלֹא יָדְעוּ כָּל־פֹּעֲלֵי אָוֶן אֹכְלֵי עַמִּי אָכְלוּ לֶחֶם יְהוָה לֹא קָרָאוּ׃
englishText: ’Shall not all the workers of iniquity know it, who eat up My people as they eat bread, and call not upon the LORD?'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׁם פָּחֲדוּ פָחַד כִּי־אֱלֹהִים בְּדוֹר צַדִּיק׃
englishText: There are they in great fear; for God is with the righteous generation.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֲצַת־עָנִי תָבִישׁוּ כִּי יְהוָה מַחְסֵהוּ׃
englishText: Ye would put to shame the counsel of the poor, but the LORD is his refuge.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִי יִתֵּן מִצִּיּוֹן יְשׁוּעַת יִשְׂרָאֵל בְּשׁוּב יְהוָה שְׁבוּת עַמּוֹ יָגֵל יַעֲקֹב יִשְׂמַח יִשְׂרָאֵל׃
englishText: Oh that the salvation of Israel were come out of Zion! When the LORD turneth the captivity of His people, let Jacob rejoice, let Israel be glad.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִזְמוֹר לְדָוִד יְהֹוָה מִי־יָגוּר בְּאָהֳלֶךָ מִי־יִשְׁכֹּן בְּהַר קָדְשֶׁךָ׃
englishText: A Psalm of David. LORD, who shall sojourn in Thy tabernacle? Who shall dwell upon Thy holy mountain?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הוֹלֵךְ תָּמִים וּפֹעֵל צֶדֶק וְדֹבֵר אֱמֶת בִּלְבָבוֹ׃
englishText: He that walketh uprightly, and worketh righteousness, And speaketh truth in his heart;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא־רָגַל עַל־לְשֹׁנוֹ לֹא־עָשָׂה לְרֵעֵהוּ רָעָה וְחֶרְפָּה לֹא־נָשָׂא עַל־קְרֹבוֹ׃
englishText: That hath no slander upon his tongue, Nor doeth evil to his fellow, Nor taketh up a reproach against his neighbour;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נִבְזֶה בְּעֵינָיו נִמְאָס וְאֶת־יִרְאֵי יְהוָה יְכַבֵּד נִשְׁבַּע לְהָרַע וְלֹא יָמִר׃
englishText: In whose eyes a vile person is despised, But he honoureth them that fear the LORD; He that sweareth to his own hurt, and changeth not;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כַּסְפּוֹ לֹא־נָתַן בְּנֶשֶׁךְ וְשֹׁחַד עַל־נָקִי לֹא לָקָח עֹשֵׂה־אֵלֶּה לֹא יִמּוֹט לְעוֹלָם׃
englishText: He that putteth not out his money on interest, Nor taketh a bribe against the innocent. He that doeth these things shall never be moved.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִכְתָּם לְדָוִד שָׁמְרֵנִי אֵל כִּי־חָסִיתִי בָךְ׃
englishText: Michtam of David. Keep me, O God; for I have taken refuge in Thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָמַרְתְּ לַיהוָה אֲדֹנָי אָתָּה טוֹבָתִי בַּל־עָלֶיךָ׃
englishText: I have said unto the LORD: 'Thou art my Lord; I have no good but in Thee';
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לִקְדוֹשִׁים אֲשֶׁר־בָּאָרֶץ הֵמָּה וְאַדִּירֵי כָּל־חֶפְצִי־בָם׃
englishText: As for the holy that are in the earth, They are the excellent in whom is all my delight.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִרְבּוּ עַצְּבוֹתָם אַחֵר מָהָרוּ בַּל־אַסִּיךְ נִסְכֵּיהֶם מִדָּם וּבַל־אֶשָּׂא אֶת־שְׁמוֹתָם עַל־שְׂפָתָי׃
englishText: Let the idols of them be multiplied that make suit unto another; Their drink-offerings of blood will I not offer, Nor take their names upon my lips.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה מְנָת־חֶלְקִי וְכוֹסִי אַתָּה תּוֹמִיךְ גּוֹרָלִי׃
englishText: O LORD, the portion of mine inheritance and of my cup, Thou maintainest my lot.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חֲבָלִים נָפְלוּ־לִי בַּנְּעִמִים אַף־נַחֲלָת שָׁפְרָה עָלָי׃
englishText: The lines are fallen unto me in pleasant places; Yea, I have a goodly heritage.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲבָרֵךְ אֶת־יְהוָה אֲשֶׁר יְעָצָנִי אַף־לֵילוֹת יִסְּרוּנִי כִלְיוֹתָי׃
englishText: I will bless the LORD, who hath given me counsel; Yea, in the night seasons my reins instruct me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׁוִּיתִי יְהוָה לְנֶגְדִּי תָמִיד כִּי מִימִינִי בַּל־אֶמּוֹט׃
englishText: I have set the LORD always before me; Surely He is at my right hand, I shall not be moved.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לָכֵן שָׂמַח לִבִּי וַיָּגֶל כְּבוֹדִי אַף־בְּשָׂרִי יִשְׁכֹּן לָבֶטַח׃
englishText: Therefore my heart is glad, and my glory rejoiceth; my flesh also dwelleth in safety;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי לֹא־תַעֲזֹב נַפְשִׁי לִשְׁאוֹל לֹא־תִתֵּן חֲסִידְךָ לִרְאוֹת שָׁחַת׃
englishText: For Thou wilt not abandon my soul to the nether-world; Neither wilt Thou suffer Thy godly one to see the pit.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תּוֹדִיעֵנִי אֹרַח חַיִּים שֹׂבַע שְׂמָחוֹת אֶת־פָּנֶיךָ נְעִמוֹת בִּימִינְךָ נֶצַח׃
englishText: Thou makest me to know the path of life; In Thy presence is fulness of joy, In Thy right hand bliss for evermore.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תְּפִלָּה לְדָוִד שִׁמְעָה יְהוָה צֶדֶק הַקְשִׁיבָה רִנָּתִי הַאֲזִינָה תְפִלָּתִי בְּלֹא שִׂפְתֵי מִרְמָה׃
englishText: A Prayer of David. Hear the right, O LORD, attend unto my cry; Give ear unto my prayer from lips without deceit.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִלְּפָנֶיךָ מִשְׁפָּטִי יֵצֵא עֵינֶיךָ תֶּחֱזֶינָה מֵישָׁרִים׃
englishText: Let my judgment come forth from Thy presence; Let Thine eyes behold equity.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בָּחַנְתָּ לִבִּי פָּקַדְתָּ לַּיְלָה צְרַפְתַּנִי בַל־תִּמְצָא זַמֹּתִי בַּל־יַעֲבָר־פִּי׃
englishText: Thou hast tried my heart, Thou hast visited it in the night; Thou hast tested me, and Thou findest not That I had a thought which should not pass my mouth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לִפְעֻלּוֹת אָדָם בִּדְבַר שְׂפָתֶיךָ אֲנִי שָׁמַרְתִּי אָרְחוֹת פָּרִיץ׃
englishText: As for the doings of men, by the word of Thy lips I have kept me from the ways of the violent.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תָּמֹךְ אֲשֻׁרַי בְּמַעְגְּלוֹתֶיךָ בַּל־נָמוֹטּוּ פְעָמָי׃
englishText: My steps have held fast to Thy paths, My feet have not slipped.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲנִי־קְרָאתִיךָ כִי־תַעֲנֵנִי אֵל הַט־אָזְנְךָ לִי שְׁמַע אִמְרָתִי׃
englishText: As for me, I call upon Thee, for Thou wilt answer me, O God; Incline Thine ear unto me, hear my speech.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַפְלֵה חֲסָדֶיךָ מוֹשִׁיעַ חוֹסִים מִמִּתְקוֹמְמִים בִּימִינֶךָ׃
englishText: Make passing great Thy mercies, O Thou that savest by Thy right hand From assailants them that take refuge in Thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׁמְרֵנִי כְּאִישׁוֹן בַּת־עָיִן בְּצֵל כְּנָפֶיךָ תַּסְתִּירֵנִי׃
englishText: Keep me as the apple of the eye, Hide me in the shadow of Thy wings,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִפְּנֵי רְשָׁעִים זוּ שַׁדּוּנִי אֹיְבַי בְּנֶפֶשׁ יַקִּיפוּ עָלָי׃
englishText: From the wicked that oppress, My deadly enemies, that compass me about.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חֶלְבָּמוֹ סָּגְרוּ פִּימוֹ דִּבְּרוּ בְגֵאוּת׃
englishText: Their gross heart they have shut tight, With their mouth they speak proudly.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַשֻּׁרֵינוּ עַתָּה סבבוני [סְבָבוּנוּ] עֵינֵיהֶם יָשִׁיתוּ לִנְטוֹת בָּאָרֶץ׃
englishText: At our every step they have now encompassed us; They set their eyes to cast us down to the earth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: דִּמְיֹנוֹ כְּאַרְיֵה יִכְסוֹף לִטְרוֹף וְכִכְפִיר יֹשֵׁב בְּמִסְתָּרִים׃
englishText: He is like a lion that is eager to tear in pieces, And like a young lion lurking in secret places.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קוּמָה יְהוָה קַדְּמָה פָנָיו הַכְרִיעֵהוּ פַּלְּטָה נַפְשִׁי מֵרָשָׁע חַרְבֶּךָ׃
englishText: Arise, O LORD, confront him, cast him down; Deliver my soul from the wicked, by Thy sword;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִמְתִים יָדְךָ יְהוָה מִמְתִים מֵחֶלֶד חֶלְקָם בַּחַיִּים וצפינך [וּצְפוּנְךָ] תְּמַלֵּא בִטְנָם יִשְׂבְּעוּ בָנִים וְהִנִּיחוּ יִתְרָם לְעוֹלְלֵיהֶם׃
englishText: From men, by Thy hand, O LORD, From men of the world, whose portion is in this life, And whose belly Thou fillest with Thy treasure; Who have children in plenty, And leave their abundance to their babes.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲנִי בְּצֶדֶק אֶחֱזֶה פָנֶיךָ אֶשְׂבְּעָה בְהָקִיץ תְּמוּנָתֶךָ׃
englishText: As for me, I shall behold Thy face in righteousness; I shall be satisfied, when I awake, with Thy likeness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ לְעֶבֶד יְהוָה לְדָוִד אֲשֶׁר דִּבֶּר לַיהוָה אֶת־דִּבְרֵי הַשִּׁירָה הַזֹּאת בְּיוֹם הִצִּיל־יְהוָה אוֹתוֹ מִכַּף כָּל־אֹיְבָיו וּמִיַּד שָׁאוּל׃
englishText: For the Leader. [A Psalm] of David the servant of the LORD, who spoke unto the LORD the words of this song in the day that the LORD delivered him from the hand of all his enemies, and from the hand of Saul;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיֹּאמַר אֶרְחָמְךָ יְהוָה חִזְקִי׃
englishText: And he said: I love thee, O LORD, my strength.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה סַלְעִי וּמְצוּדָתִי וּמְפַלְטִי אֵלִי צוּרִי אֶחֱסֶה־בּוֹ מָגִנִּי וְקֶרֶן־יִשְׁעִי מִשְׂגַּבִּי׃
englishText: The LORD is my rock, and my fortress, and my deliverer; My God, my rock, in Him I take refuge; my shield, and my horn of salvation, my high tower.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מְהֻלָּל אֶקְרָא יְהוָה וּמִן־אֹיְבַי אִוָּשֵׁעַ׃
englishText: Praised, I cry, is the LORD, and I am saved from mine enemies. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲפָפוּנִי חֶבְלֵי־מָוֶת וְנַחֲלֵי בְלִיַּעַל יְבַעֲתוּנִי׃
englishText: The cords of Death compassed me, and the floods of Belial assailed me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חֶבְלֵי שְׁאוֹל סְבָבוּנִי קִדְּמוּנִי מוֹקְשֵׁי מָוֶת׃
englishText: The cords of Sheol surrounded me; the snares of Death confronted me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בַּצַּר־לִי אֶקְרָא יְהוָה וְאֶל־אֱלֹהַי אֲשַׁוֵּעַ יִשְׁמַע מֵהֵיכָלוֹ קוֹלִי וְשַׁוְעָתִי לְפָנָיו תָּבוֹא בְאָזְנָיו׃
englishText: In my distress I called upon the LORD, and cried unto my God; out of His temple He heard my voice, and my cry came before Him unto His ears.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַתִּגְעַשׁ וַתִּרְעַשׁ הָאָרֶץ וּמוֹסְדֵי הָרִים יִרְגָּזוּ וַיִּתְגָּעֲשׁוּ כִּי־חָרָה לוֹ׃
englishText: Then the earth did shake and quake, the foundations also of the mountains did tremble; they were shaken, because He was wroth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עָלָה עָשָׁן בְּאַפּוֹ וְאֵשׁ־מִפִּיו תֹּאכֵל גֶּחָלִים בָּעֲרוּ מִמֶּנּוּ׃
englishText: Smoke arose up in His nostrils, and fire out of His mouth did devour; coals flamed forth from Him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיֵּט שָׁמַיִם וַיֵּרַד וַעֲרָפֶל תַּחַת רַגְלָיו׃
englishText: He bowed the heavens also, and came down; and thick darkness was under His feet.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּרְכַּב עַל־כְּרוּב וַיָּעֹף וַיֵּדֶא עַל־כַּנְפֵי־רוּחַ׃
englishText: And He rode upon a cherub, and did fly; yea, He did swoop down upon the wings of the wind.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָשֶׁת חֹשֶׁךְ סִתְרוֹ סְבִיבוֹתָיו סֻכָּתוֹ חֶשְׁכַת־מַיִם עָבֵי שְׁחָקִים׃
englishText: He made darkness His hiding-place, His pavilion round about Him; darkness of waters, thick clouds of the skies.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִנֹּגַהּ נֶגְדּוֹ עָבָיו עָבְרוּ בָּרָד וְגַחֲלֵי־אֵשׁ׃
englishText: At the brightness before Him, there passed through His thick clouds Hailstones and coals of fire.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּרְעֵם בַּשָּׁמַיִם יְהוָה וְעֶלְיוֹן יִתֵּן קֹלוֹ בָּרָד וְגַחֲלֵי־אֵשׁ׃
englishText: The LORD also thundered in the heavens, and the Most High gave forth His voice; hailstones and coals of fire.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּשְׁלַח חִצָּיו וַיְפִיצֵם וּבְרָקִים רָב וַיְהֻמֵּם׃
englishText: And He sent out His arrows, and scattered them; and He shot forth lightnings, and discomfited them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיֵּרָאוּ אֲפִיקֵי מַיִם וַיִּגָּלוּ מוֹסְדוֹת תֵּבֵל מִגַּעֲרָתְךָ יְהוָה מִנִּשְׁמַת רוּחַ אַפֶּךָ׃
englishText: And the channels of waters appeared, and the foundations of the world were laid bare, at Thy rebuke, O LORD, at the blast of the breath of Thy nostrils.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִשְׁלַח מִמָּרוֹם יִקָּחֵנִי יַמְשֵׁנִי מִמַּיִם רַבִּים׃
englishText: He sent from on high, He took me; He drew me out of many waters.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יַצִּילֵנִי מֵאֹיְבִי עָז וּמִשֹּׂנְאַי כִּי־אָמְצוּ מִמֶּנִּי׃
englishText: He delivered me from mine enemy most strong, and from them that hated me, for they were too mighty for me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְקַדְּמוּנִי בְיוֹם־אֵידִי וַיְהִי־יְהוָה לְמִשְׁעָן לִי׃
englishText: They confronted me in the day of my calamity; but the LORD was a stay unto me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיּוֹצִיאֵנִי לַמֶּרְחָב יְחַלְּצֵנִי כִּי חָפֵץ בִּי׃
englishText: He brought me forth also into a large place; He delivered me, because He delighted in me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִגְמְלֵנִי יְהוָה כְּצִדְקִי כְּבֹר יָדַי יָשִׁיב לִי׃
englishText: The LORD rewarded me according to my righteousness; according to the cleanness of my hands hath He recompensed me. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־שָׁמַרְתִּי דַּרְכֵי יְהוָה וְלֹא־רָשַׁעְתִּי מֵאֱלֹהָי׃
englishText: For I have kept the ways of the LORD, and have not wickedly departed from my God.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי כָל־מִשְׁפָּטָיו לְנֶגְדִּי וְחֻקֹּתָיו לֹא־אָסִיר מֶנִּי׃
englishText: For all His ordinances were before me, and I put not away His statutes from me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וָאֱהִי תָמִים עִמּוֹ וָאֶשְׁתַּמֵּר מֵעֲוֺנִי׃
englishText: And I was single-hearted with Him, and I kept myself from mine iniquity.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיָּשֶׁב־יְהוָה לִי כְצִדְקִי כְּבֹר יָדַי לְנֶגֶד עֵינָיו׃
englishText: Therefore hath the LORD recompensed me according to my righteousness, according to the cleanness of my hands in His eyes.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עִם־חָסִיד תִּתְחַסָּד עִם־גְּבַר תָּמִים תִּתַּמָּם׃
englishText: With the merciful Thou dost show Thyself merciful, with the upright man Thou dost show Thyself upright;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עִם־נָבָר תִּתְבָּרָר וְעִם־עִקֵּשׁ תִּתְפַּתָּל׃
englishText: With the pure Thou dost show Thyself pure; and with the crooked Thou dost show Thyself subtle.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־אַתָּה עַם־עָנִי תוֹשִׁיעַ וְעֵינַיִם רָמוֹת תַּשְׁפִּיל׃
englishText: For Thou dost save the afflicted people; but the haughty eyes Thou dost humble.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־אַתָּה תָּאִיר נֵרִי יְהוָה אֱלֹהַי יַגִּיהַּ חָשְׁכִּי׃
englishText: For Thou dost light my lamp; the LORD my God doth lighten my darkness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־בְךָ אָרֻץ גְּדוּד וּבֵאלֹהַי אֲדַלֶּג־שׁוּר׃
englishText: For by Thee I run upon a troop; and by my God do I scale a wall.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הָאֵל תָּמִים דַּרְכּוֹ אִמְרַת־יְהוָה צְרוּפָה מָגֵן הוּא לְכֹל הַחֹסִים בּוֹ׃
englishText: As for God, His way is perfect; the word of the LORD is tried; He is a shield unto all them that take refuge in Him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי מִי אֱלוֹהַּ מִבַּלְעֲדֵי יְהוָה וּמִי צוּר זוּלָתִי אֱלֹהֵינוּ׃
englishText: For who is God, save the LORD? And who is a Rock, except our God?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הָאֵל הַמְאַזְּרֵנִי חָיִל וַיִּתֵּן תָּמִים דַּרְכִּי׃
englishText: The God that girdeth me with strength, and maketh my way straight;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מְשַׁוֶּה רַגְלַי כָּאַיָּלוֹת וְעַל בָּמֹתַי יַעֲמִידֵנִי׃
englishText: Who maketh my feet like hinds', and setteth me upon my high places;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מְלַמֵּד יָדַי לַמִּלְחָמָה וְנִחֲתָה קֶשֶׁת־נְחוּשָׁה זְרוֹעֹתָי׃
englishText: Who traineth my hands for war, so that mine arms do bend a bow of brass.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַתִּתֶּן־לִי מָגֵן יִשְׁעֶךָ וִימִינְךָ תִסְעָדֵנִי וְעַנְוַתְךָ תַרְבֵּנִי׃
englishText: Thou hast also given me Thy shield of salvation, and Thy right hand hath holden me up; and Thy condescension hath made me great.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תַּרְחִיב צַעֲדִי תַחְתָּי וְלֹא מָעֲדוּ קַרְסֻלָּי׃
englishText: Thou hast enlarged my steps under me, and my feet have not slipped.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֶרְדּוֹף אוֹיְבַי וְאַשִּׂיגֵם וְלֹא־אָשׁוּב עַד־כַּלּוֹתָם׃
englishText: I have pursued mine enemies, and overtaken them; neither did I turn back till they were consumed.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֶמְחָצֵם וְלֹא־יֻכְלוּ קוּם יִפְּלוּ תַּחַת רַגְלָי׃
englishText: I have smitten them through, so that they are not able to rise; they are fallen under my feet.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַתְּאַזְּרֵנִי חַיִל לַמִּלְחָמָה תַּכְרִיעַ קָמַי תַּחְתָּי׃
englishText: For Thou hast girded me with strength unto the battle; Thou hast subdued under me those that rose up against me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֹיְבַי נָתַתָּה לִּי עֹרֶף וּמְשַׂנְאַי אַצְמִיתֵם׃
englishText: Thou hast also made mine enemies turn their backs unto me, and I did cut off them that hate me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְשַׁוְּעוּ וְאֵין־מוֹשִׁיעַ עַל־יְהוָה וְלֹא עָנָם׃
englishText: They cried, but there was none to save; even unto the LORD, but He answered them not.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֶשְׁחָקֵם כְּעָפָר עַל־פְּנֵי־רוּחַ כְּטִיט חוּצוֹת אֲרִיקֵם׃
englishText: Then did I beat them small as the dust before the wind; I did cast them out as the mire of the streets.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תְּפַלְּטֵנִי מֵרִיבֵי עָם תְּשִׂימֵנִי לְרֹאשׁ גּוֹיִם עַם לֹא־יָדַעְתִּי יַעַבְדוּנִי׃
englishText: Thou hast delivered me from the contentions of the people; Thou hast made me the head of the nations; a people whom I have not known serve me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְשֵׁמַע אֹזֶן יִשָּׁמְעוּ לִי בְּנֵי־נֵכָר יְכַחֲשׁוּ־לִי׃
englishText: As soon as they hear of me, they obey me; The sons of the stranger dwindle away before me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנֵי־נֵכָר יִבֹּלוּ וְיַחְרְגוּ מִמִּסְגְּרוֹתֵיהֶם׃
englishText: The sons of the stranger fade away, and come trembling out of their close places.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חַי־יְהוָה וּבָרוּךְ צוּרִי וְיָרוּם אֱלוֹהֵי יִשְׁעִי׃
englishText: The LORD liveth, and blessed be my Rock; and exalted be the God of my salvation;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הָאֵל הַנּוֹתֵן נְקָמוֹת לִי וַיַּדְבֵּר עַמִּים תַּחְתָּי׃
englishText: Even the God that executeth vengeance for me, and subdueth peoples under me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מְפַלְּטִי מֵאֹיְבָי אַף מִן־קָמַי תְּרוֹמְמֵנִי מֵאִישׁ חָמָס תַּצִּילֵנִי׃
englishText: He delivereth me from mine enemies; yea, Thou liftest me up above them that rise up against me; Thou deliverest me from the violent man.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַל־כֵּן אוֹדְךָ בַגּוֹיִם יְהוָה וּלְשִׁמְךָ אֲזַמֵּרָה׃
englishText: Therefore I will give thanks unto Thee, O LORD, among the nations, and will sing praises unto Thy name.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מגדל [מַגְדִּיל] יְשׁוּעוֹת מַלְכּוֹ וְעֹשֶׂה חֶסֶד לִמְשִׁיחוֹ לְדָוִד וּלְזַרְעוֹ עַד־עוֹלָם׃
englishText: Great salvation giveth He to His king; and showeth mercy to His anointed, To David and to his seed, for evermore.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ מִזְמוֹר לְדָוִד׃
englishText: For the Leader. A Psalm of David.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַשָּׁמַיִם מְסַפְּרִים כְּבוֹד־אֵל וּמַעֲשֵׂה יָדָיו מַגִּיד הָרָקִיעַ׃
englishText: The heavens declare the glory of God, and the firmament showeth His handiwork;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יוֹם לְיוֹם יַבִּיעַ אֹמֶר וְלַיְלָה לְּלַיְלָה יְחַוֶּה־דָּעַת׃
englishText: Day unto day uttereth speech, and night unto night revealeth knowledge;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֵין־אֹמֶר וְאֵין דְּבָרִים בְּלִי נִשְׁמָע קוֹלָם׃
englishText: There is no speech, there are no words, neither is their voice heard.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּכָל־הָאָרֶץ יָצָא קַוָּם וּבִקְצֵה תֵבֵל מִלֵּיהֶם לַשֶּׁמֶשׁ שָׂם־אֹהֶל בָּהֶם׃
englishText: Their line is gone out through all the earth, and their words to the end of the world. In them hath He set a tent for the sun,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְהוּא כְּחָתָן יֹצֵא מֵחֻפָּתוֹ יָשִׂישׂ כְּגִבּוֹר לָרוּץ אֹרַח׃
englishText: Which is as a bridegroom coming out of his chamber, and rejoiceth as a strong man to run his course.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִקְצֵה הַשָּׁמַיִם מוֹצָאוֹ וּתְקוּפָתוֹ עַל־קְצוֹתָם וְאֵין נִסְתָּר מֵחַמָּתוֹ׃
englishText: His going forth is from the end of the heaven, and his circuit unto the ends of it; and there is nothing hid from the heat thereof.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תּוֹרַת יְהוָה תְּמִימָה מְשִׁיבַת נָפֶשׁ עֵדוּת יְהוָה נֶאֱמָנָה מַחְכִּימַת פֶּתִי׃
englishText: The law of the LORD is perfect, restoring the soul; the testimony of the LORD is sure, making wise the simple. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פִּקּוּדֵי יְהוָה יְשָׁרִים מְשַׂמְּחֵי־לֵב מִצְוַת יְהוָה בָּרָה מְאִירַת עֵינָיִם׃
englishText: The precepts of the LORD are right, rejoicing the heart; the commandment of the LORD is pure, enlightening the eyes.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִרְאַת יְהוָה טְהוֹרָה עוֹמֶדֶת לָעַד מִשְׁפְּטֵי־יְהוָה אֱמֶת צָדְקוּ יַחְדָּו׃
englishText: The fear of the LORD is clean, enduring for ever; the ordinances of the LORD are true, they are righteous altogether;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַנֶּחֱמָדִים מִזָּהָב וּמִפַּז רָב וּמְתוּקִים מִדְּבַשׁ וְנֹפֶת צוּפִים׃
englishText: More to be desired are they than gold, yea, than much fine gold; sweeter also than honey and the honeycomb.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גַּם־עַבְדְּךָ נִזְהָר בָּהֶם בְּשָׁמְרָם עֵקֶב רָב׃
englishText: Moreover by them is Thy servant warned; in keeping of them there is great reward.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שְׁגִיאוֹת מִי־יָבִין מִנִּסְתָּרוֹת נַקֵּנִי׃
englishText: Who can discern his errors? Clear Thou me from hidden faults.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גַּם מִזֵּדִים חֲשֹׂךְ עַבְדֶּךָ אַל־יִמְשְׁלוּ־בִי אָז אֵיתָם וְנִקֵּיתִי מִפֶּשַׁע רָב׃
englishText: Keep back Thy servant also from presumptuous sins, that they may not have dominion over me; then shall I be faultless, and I shall be clear from great transgression.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִהְיוּ לְרָצוֹן אִמְרֵי־פִי וְהֶגְיוֹן לִבִּי לְפָנֶיךָ יְהוָה צוּרִי וְגֹאֲלִי׃
englishText: Let the words of my mouth and the meditation of my heart be acceptable before Thee, O LORD, my Rock, and my Redeemer.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ מִזְמוֹר לְדָוִד׃
englishText: For the Leader. A Psalm of David.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יַעַנְךָ יְהוָה בְּיוֹם צָרָה יְשַׂגֶּבְךָ שֵׁם אֱלֹהֵי יַעֲקֹב׃
englishText: The LORD answer thee in the day of trouble; The name of the God of Jacob set thee up on high;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִשְׁלַח־עֶזְרְךָ מִקֹּדֶשׁ וּמִצִּיּוֹן יִסְעָדֶךָּ׃
englishText: Send forth thy help from the sanctuary, And support thee out of Zion;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִזְכֹּר כָּל־מִנְחֹתֶךָ וְעוֹלָתְךָ יְדַשְּׁנֶה סֶלָה׃
englishText: Receive the memorial of all thy meal-offerings, And accept the fat of thy burnt-sacrifice; Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִתֶּן־לְךָ כִלְבָבֶךָ וְכָל־עֲצָתְךָ יְמַלֵּא׃
englishText: Grant thee according to thine own heart, And fulfil all thy counsel.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נְרַנְּנָה בִּישׁוּעָתֶךָ וּבְשֵׁם־אֱלֹהֵינוּ נִדְגֹּל יְמַלֵּא יְהוָה כָּל־מִשְׁאֲלוֹתֶיךָ׃
englishText: We will shout for joy in thy victory, And in the name of our God we will set up our standards; The LORD fulfil all thy petitions.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַתָּה יָדַעְתִּי כִּי הוֹשִׁיעַ יְהוָה מְשִׁיחוֹ יַעֲנֵהוּ מִשְּׁמֵי קָדְשׁוֹ בִּגְבֻרוֹת יֵשַׁע יְמִינוֹ׃
englishText: Now know I that the LORD saveth His anointed; He will answer him from His holy heaven With the mighty acts of His saving right hand.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֵלֶּה בָרֶכֶב וְאֵלֶּה בַסּוּסִים וַאֲנַחְנוּ בְּשֵׁם־יְהוָה אֱלֹהֵינוּ נַזְכִּיר׃
englishText: Some trust in chariots, and some in horses; But we will make mention of the name of the LORD our God.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֵמָּה כָּרְעוּ וְנָפָלוּ וַאֲנַחְנוּ קַּמְנוּ וַנִּתְעוֹדָד׃
englishText: They are bowed down and fallen; But we are risen, and stand upright.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה הוֹשִׁיעָה הַמֶּלֶךְ יַעֲנֵנוּ בְיוֹם־קָרְאֵנוּ׃
englishText: Save, LORD; Let the King answer us in the day that we call.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ מִזְמוֹר לְדָוִד׃
englishText: For the Leader. A Psalm of David.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה בְּעָזְּךָ יִשְׂמַח־מֶלֶךְ וּבִישׁוּעָתְךָ מַה־יגיל [יָּגֶל] מְאֹד׃
englishText: O LORD, in Thy strength the king rejoiceth; and in Thy salvation how greatly doth he exult!
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תַּאֲוַת לִבּוֹ נָתַתָּה לּוֹ וַאֲרֶשֶׁת שְׂפָתָיו בַּל־מָנַעְתָּ סֶּלָה׃
englishText: Thou hast given him his heart's desire, and the request of his lips Thou hast not withholden. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־תְקַדְּמֶנּוּ בִּרְכוֹת טוֹב תָּשִׁית לְרֹאשׁוֹ עֲטֶרֶת פָּז׃
englishText: For Thou meetest him with choicest blessings; Thou settest a crown of fine gold on his head.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חַיִּים שָׁאַל מִמְּךָ נָתַתָּה לּוֹ אֹרֶךְ יָמִים עוֹלָם וָעֶד׃
englishText: He asked life of Thee, Thou gavest it him; even length of days for ever and ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גָּדוֹל כְּבוֹדוֹ בִּישׁוּעָתֶךָ הוֹד וְהָדָר תְּשַׁוֶּה עָלָיו׃
englishText: His glory is great through Thy salvation; Honour and majesty dost Thou lay upon him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־תְשִׁיתֵהוּ בְרָכוֹת לָעַד תְּחַדֵּהוּ בְשִׂמְחָה אֶת־פָּנֶיךָ׃
englishText: For Thou makest him most blessed for ever; Thou makest him glad with joy in Thy presence.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־הַמֶּלֶךְ בֹּטֵחַ בַּיהוָה וּבְחֶסֶד עֶלְיוֹן בַּל־יִמּוֹט׃
englishText: For the king trusteth in the LORD, yea, in the mercy of the Most High; he shall not be moved.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תִּמְצָא יָדְךָ לְכָל־אֹיְבֶיךָ יְמִינְךָ תִּמְצָא שֹׂנְאֶיךָ׃
englishText: Thy hand shall be equal to all thine enemies; Thy right hand shall overtake those that hate thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תְּשִׁיתֵמוֹ כְּתַנּוּר אֵשׁ לְעֵת פָּנֶיךָ יְהוָה בְּאַפּוֹ יְבַלְּעֵם וְתֹאכְלֵם אֵשׁ׃
englishText: Thou shalt make them as a fiery furnace in the time of thine anger; The LORD shall swallow them up in His wrath, and the fire shall devour them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פִּרְיָמוֹ מֵאֶרֶץ תְּאַבֵּד וְזַרְעָם מִבְּנֵי אָדָם׃
englishText: Their fruit shalt thou destroy from the earth, and their seed from among the children of men.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־נָטוּ עָלֶיךָ רָעָה חָשְׁבוּ מְזִמָּה בַּל־יוּכָלוּ׃
englishText: For they intended evil against thee, They imagined a device, wherewith they shall not prevail.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי תְּשִׁיתֵמוֹ שֶׁכֶם בְּמֵיתָרֶיךָ תְּכוֹנֵן עַל־פְּנֵיהֶם׃
englishText: For thou shalt make them turn their back, Thou shalt make ready with thy bowstrings against the face of them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רוּמָה יְהוָה בְּעֻזֶּךָ נָשִׁירָה וּנְזַמְּרָה גְּבוּרָתֶךָ׃
englishText: Be Thou exalted, O LORD, in Thy strength; so will we sing and praise Thy power.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ עַל־אַיֶּלֶת הַשַּׁחַר מִזְמוֹר לְדָוִד׃
englishText: For the Leader; upon Aijeleth ha-Shahar. A Psalm of David.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֵלִי אֵלִי לָמָה עֲזַבְתָּנִי רָחוֹק מִישׁוּעָתִי דִּבְרֵי שַׁאֲגָתִי׃
englishText: My God, my God, why hast Thou forsaken me, and art far from my help at the words of my cry?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱ‍לֹהַי אֶקְרָא יוֹמָם וְלֹא תַעֲנֶה וְלַיְלָה וְלֹא־דוּמִיָּה לִי׃
englishText: O my God, I call by day, but Thou answerest not; and at night, and there is no surcease for me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאַתָּה קָדוֹשׁ יוֹשֵׁב תְּהִלּוֹת יִשְׂרָאֵל׃
englishText: Yet Thou art holy, O Thou that art enthroned upon the praises of Israel.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּךָ בָּטְחוּ אֲבֹתֵינוּ בָּטְחוּ וַתְּפַלְּטֵמוֹ׃
englishText: In Thee did our fathers trust; they trusted, and Thou didst deliver them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֵלֶיךָ זָעֲקוּ וְנִמְלָטוּ בְּךָ בָטְחוּ וְלֹא־בוֹשׁוּ׃
englishText: Unto Thee they cried, and escaped; in Thee did they trust, and were not ashamed.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאָנֹכִי תוֹלַעַת וְלֹא־אִישׁ חֶרְפַּת אָדָם וּבְזוּי עָם׃
englishText: But I am a worm, and no man; a reproach of men, and despised of the people.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כָּל־רֹאַי יַלְעִגוּ לִי יַפְטִירוּ בְשָׂפָה יָנִיעוּ רֹאשׁ׃
englishText: All they that see me laugh me to scorn; they shoot out the lip, they shake the head:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גֹּל אֶל־יְהוָה יְפַלְּטֵהוּ יַצִּילֵהוּ כִּי חָפֵץ בּוֹ׃
englishText: 'Let him commit himself unto the LORD! let Him rescue him; let Him deliver him, seeing He delighteth in him.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־אַתָּה גֹחִי מִבָּטֶן מַבְטִיחִי עַל־שְׁדֵי אִמִּי׃
englishText: For Thou art He that took me out of the womb; Thou madest me trust when I was upon my mother's breasts.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עָלֶיךָ הָשְׁלַכְתִּי מֵרָחֶם מִבֶּטֶן אִמִּי אֵלִי אָתָּה׃
englishText: Upon Thee I have been cast from my birth; Thou art my God from my mother's womb.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תִּרְחַק מִמֶּנִּי כִּי־צָרָה קְרוֹבָה כִּי־אֵין עוֹזֵר׃
englishText: Be not far from me; for trouble is near; for there is none to help.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: סְבָבוּנִי פָּרִים רַבִּים אַבִּירֵי בָשָׁן כִּתְּרוּנִי׃
englishText: Many bulls have encompassed me; strong bulls of Bashan have beset me round.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פָּצוּ עָלַי פִּיהֶם אַרְיֵה טֹרֵף וְשֹׁאֵג׃
englishText: They open wide their mouth against me, as a ravening and a roaring lion.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כַּמַּיִם נִשְׁפַּכְתִּי וְהִתְפָּרְדוּ כָּל־עַצְמוֹתָי הָיָה לִבִּי כַּדּוֹנָג נָמֵס בְּתוֹךְ מֵעָי׃
englishText: I am poured out like water, and all my bones are out of joint; my heart is become like wax; it is melted in mine inmost parts.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָבֵשׁ כַּחֶרֶשׂ כֹּחִי וּלְשׁוֹנִי מֻדְבָּק מַלְקוֹחָי וְלַעֲפַר־מָוֶת תִּשְׁפְּתֵנִי׃
englishText: My strength is dried up like a potsherd; and my tongue cleaveth to my throat; and Thou layest me in the dust of death.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי סְבָבוּנִי כְּלָבִים עֲדַת מְרֵעִים הִקִּיפוּנִי כָּאֲרִי יָדַי וְרַגְלָי׃
englishText: For dogs have encompassed me; a company of evil-doers have inclosed me; like a lion, they are at my hands and my feet.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲסַפֵּר כָּל־עַצְמוֹתָי הֵמָּה יַבִּיטוּ יִרְאוּ־בִי׃
englishText: I may count all my bones; they look and gloat over me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְחַלְּקוּ בְגָדַי לָהֶם וְעַל־לְבוּשִׁי יַפִּילוּ גוֹרָל׃
englishText: They part my garments among them, and for my vesture do they cast lots.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאַתָּה יְהוָה אַל־תִּרְחָק אֱיָלוּתִי לְעֶזְרָתִי חוּשָׁה׃
englishText: But Thou, O LORD, be not far off; O Thou my strength, hasten to help me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַצִּילָה מֵחֶרֶב נַפְשִׁי מִיַּד־כֶּלֶב יְחִידָתִי׃
englishText: Deliver my soul from the sword; mine only one from the power of the dog.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הוֹשִׁיעֵנִי מִפִּי אַרְיֵה וּמִקַּרְנֵי רֵמִים עֲנִיתָנִי׃
englishText: Save me from the lion's mouth; yea, from the horns of the wild-oxen do Thou answer me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲסַפְּרָה שִׁמְךָ לְאֶחָי בְּתוֹךְ קָהָל אֲהַלְלֶךָּ׃
englishText: I will declare Thy name unto my brethren; in the midst of the congregation will I praise Thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִרְאֵי יְהוָה הַלְלוּהוּ כָּל־זֶרַע יַעֲקֹב כַּבְּדוּהוּ וְגוּרוּ מִמֶּנּוּ כָּל־זֶרַע יִשְׂרָאֵל׃
englishText: 'Ye that fear the LORD, praise Him; all ye the seed of Jacob, glorify Him; and stand in awe of Him, all ye the seed of Israel.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי לֹא־בָזָה וְלֹא שִׁקַּץ עֱנוּת עָנִי וְלֹא־הִסְתִּיר פָּנָיו מִמֶּנּוּ וּבְשַׁוְּעוֹ אֵלָיו שָׁמֵעַ׃
englishText: For He hath not despised nor abhorred the lowliness of the poor; neither hath He hid His face from him; but when he cried unto Him, He heard.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מֵאִתְּךָ תְהִלָּתִי בְּקָהָל רָב נְדָרַי אֲשַׁלֵּם נֶגֶד יְרֵאָיו׃
englishText: From Thee cometh my praise in the great congregation; I will pay my vows before them that fear Him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יֹאכְלוּ עֲנָוִים וְיִשְׂבָּעוּ יְהַלְלוּ יְהוָה דֹּרְשָׁיו יְחִי לְבַבְכֶם לָעַד׃
englishText: Let the humble eat and be satisfied; let them praise the LORD that seek after Him; may your heart be quickened for ever!
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִזְכְּרוּ וְיָשֻׁבוּ אֶל־יְהוָה כָּל־אַפְסֵי־אָרֶץ וְיִשְׁתַּחֲווּ לְפָנֶיךָ כָּל־מִשְׁפְּחוֹת גּוֹיִם׃
englishText: All the ends of the earth shall remember and turn unto the LORD; and all the kindreds of the nations shall worship before Thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי לַיהוָה הַמְּלוּכָה וּמֹשֵׁל בַּגּוֹיִם׃
englishText: For the kingdom is the LORD’S; and He is the ruler over the nations.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָכְלוּ וַיִּשְׁתַּחֲוּוּ כָּל־דִּשְׁנֵי־אֶרֶץ לְפָנָיו יִכְרְעוּ כָּל־יוֹרְדֵי עָפָר וְנַפְשׁוֹ לֹא חִיָּה׃
englishText: All the fat ones of the earth shall eat and worship; all they that go down to the dust shall kneel before Him, even he that cannot keep his soul alive.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זֶרַע יַעַבְדֶנּוּ יְסֻפַּר לַאדֹנָי לַדּוֹר׃
englishText: A seed shall serve him; It shall be told of the Lord unto the next generation.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָבֹאוּ וְיַגִּידוּ צִדְקָתוֹ לְעַם נוֹלָד כִּי עָשָׂה׃
englishText: They shall come and shall declare His righteousness Unto a people that shall be born, that He hath done it.
