versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִזְמוֹר לְדָוִד יְהוָה רֹעִי לֹא אֶחְסָר׃
englishText: A Psalm of David. The LORD is my shepherd; I shall not want.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בִּנְאוֹת דֶּשֶׁא יַרְבִּיצֵנִי עַל־מֵי מְנֻחוֹת יְנַהֲלֵנִי׃
englishText: He maketh me to lie down in green pastures; He leadeth me beside the still waters.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נַפְשִׁי יְשׁוֹבֵב יַנְחֵנִי בְמַעְגְּלֵי־צֶדֶק לְמַעַן שְׁמוֹ׃
englishText: He restoreth my soul; He guideth me in straight paths for His name's sake.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גַּם כִּי־אֵלֵךְ בְּגֵיא צַלְמָוֶת לֹא־אִירָא רָע כִּי־אַתָּה עִמָּדִי שִׁבְטְךָ וּמִשְׁעַנְתֶּךָ הֵמָּה יְנַחֲמֻנִי׃
englishText: Yea, though I walk through the valley of the shadow of death, I will fear no evil, for Thou art with me; Thy rod and Thy staff, they comfort me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תַּעֲרֹךְ לְפָנַי שֻׁלְחָן נֶגֶד צֹרְרָי דִּשַּׁנְתָּ בַשֶּׁמֶן רֹאשִׁי כּוֹסִי רְוָיָה׃
englishText: Thou preparest a table before me in the presence of mine enemies; Thou hast anointed my head with oil; my cup runneth over.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַךְ טוֹב וָחֶסֶד יִרְדְּפוּנִי כָּל־יְמֵי חַיָּי וְשַׁבְתִּי בְּבֵית־יְהוָה לְאֹרֶךְ יָמִים׃
englishText: Surely goodness and mercy shall follow me all the days of my life; And I shall dwell in the house of the LORD for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְדָוִד מִזְמוֹר לַיהוָה הָאָרֶץ וּמְלוֹאָהּ תֵּבֵל וְיֹשְׁבֵי בָהּ׃
englishText: A Psalm of David. The earth is the LORD’S, and the fulness thereof; the world, and they that dwell therein.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־הוּא עַל־יַמִּים יְסָדָהּ וְעַל־נְהָרוֹת יְכוֹנְנֶהָ׃
englishText: For He hath founded it upon the seas, and established it upon the floods.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִי־יַעֲלֶה בְהַר־יְהוָה וּמִי־יָקוּם בִּמְקוֹם קָדְשׁוֹ׃
englishText: Who shall ascend into the mountain of the LORD? And who shall stand in His holy place?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נְקִי כַפַּיִם וּבַר־לֵבָב אֲשֶׁר לֹא־נָשָׂא לַשָּׁוְא נַפְשִׁי וְלֹא נִשְׁבַּע לְמִרְמָה׃
englishText: He that hath clean hands, and a pure heart; Who hath not taken My name in vain, and hath not sworn deceitfully.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִשָּׂא בְרָכָה מֵאֵת יְהוָה וּצְדָקָה מֵאֱלֹהֵי יִשְׁעוֹ׃
englishText: He shall receive a blessing from the LORD, and righteousness from the God of his salvation.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זֶה דּוֹר דרשו [דֹּרְשָׁיו] מְבַקְשֵׁי פָנֶיךָ יַעֲקֹב סֶלָה׃
englishText: Such is the generation of them that seek after Him, that seek Thy face, even Jacob. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שְׂאוּ שְׁעָרִים רָאשֵׁיכֶם וְהִנָּשְׂאוּ פִּתְחֵי עוֹלָם וְיָבוֹא מֶלֶךְ הַכָּבוֹד׃
englishText: Lift up your heads, O ye gates, and be ye lifted up, ye everlasting doors; that the King of glory may come in.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִי זֶה מֶלֶךְ הַכָּבוֹד יְהוָה עִזּוּז וְגִבּוֹר יְהוָה גִּבּוֹר מִלְחָמָה׃
englishText: 'Who is the King of glory?' 'The LORD strong and mighty, The LORD mighty in battle.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שְׂאוּ שְׁעָרִים רָאשֵׁיכֶם וּשְׂאוּ פִּתְחֵי עוֹלָם וְיָבֹא מֶלֶךְ הַכָּבוֹד׃
englishText: Lift up your heads, O ye gates, Yea, lift them up, ye everlasting doors; That the King of glory may come in.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִי הוּא זֶה מֶלֶךְ הַכָּבוֹד יְהוָה צְבָאוֹת הוּא מֶלֶךְ הַכָּבוֹד סֶלָה׃
englishText: 'Who then is the King of glory?' 'The LORD of hosts; He is the King of glory.' Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְדָוִד אֵלֶיךָ יְהוָה נַפְשִׁי אֶשָּׂא׃
englishText: [A Psalm] of David. Unto Thee, O LORD, do I lift up my soul.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱ‍לֹהַי בְּךָ בָטַחְתִּי אַל־אֵבוֹשָׁה אַל־יַעַלְצוּ אֹיְבַי לִי׃
englishText: O my God, in Thee have I trusted, let me not be ashamed; Let not mine enemies triumph over me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גַּם כָּל־קֹוֶיךָ לֹא יֵבֹשׁוּ יֵבֹשׁוּ הַבּוֹגְדִים רֵיקָם׃
englishText: Yea, none that wait for Thee shall be ashamed; They shall be ashamed that deal treacherously without cause.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: דְּרָכֶיךָ יְהוָה הוֹדִיעֵנִי אֹרְחוֹתֶיךָ לַמְּדֵנִי׃
englishText: Show me Thy ways, O LORD; teach me Thy paths.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַדְרִיכֵנִי בַאֲמִתֶּךָ וְלַמְּדֵנִי כִּי־אַתָּה אֱלֹהֵי יִשְׁעִי אוֹתְךָ קִוִּיתִי כָּל־הַיּוֹם׃
englishText: Guide me in Thy truth, and teach me; For Thou art the God of my salvation; For Thee do I wait all the day.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זְכֹר־רַחֲמֶיךָ יְהוָה וַחֲסָדֶיךָ כִּי מֵעוֹלָם הֵמָּה׃
englishText: Remember, O LORD, Thy compassions and Thy mercies; For they have been from of old.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חַטֹּאות נְעוּרַי וּפְשָׁעַי אַל־תִּזְכֹּר כְּחַסְדְּךָ זְכָר־לִי־אַתָּה לְמַעַן טוּבְךָ יְהוָה׃
englishText: Remember not the sins of my youth, nor my transgressions; According to Thy mercy remember Thou me, For Thy goodness' sake, O LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: טוֹב־וְיָשָׁר יְהוָה עַל־כֵּן יוֹרֶה חַטָּאִים בַּדָּרֶךְ׃
englishText: Good and upright is the LORD; Therefore doth He instruct sinners in the way.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יַדְרֵךְ עֲנָוִים בַּמִּשְׁפָּט וִילַמֵּד עֲנָוִים דַּרְכּוֹ׃
englishText: He guideth The humble in justice; And He teacheth the humble His way.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כָּל־אָרְחוֹת יְהוָה חֶסֶד וֶאֱמֶת לְנֹצְרֵי בְרִיתוֹ וְעֵדֹתָיו׃
englishText: All the paths of the LORD are mercy and truth Unto such as keep His covenant and His testimonies.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְמַעַן־שִׁמְךָ יְהוָה וְסָלַחְתָּ לַעֲוֺנִי כִּי רַב־הוּא׃
englishText: For Thy name's sake, O LORD, Pardon mine iniquity, for it is great.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִי־זֶה הָאִישׁ יְרֵא יְהוָה יוֹרֶנּוּ בְּדֶרֶךְ יִבְחָר׃
englishText: What man is he that feareth the LORD? Him will He instruct in the way that He should choose.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נַפְשׁוֹ בְּטוֹב תָּלִין וְזַרְעוֹ יִירַשׁ אָרֶץ׃
englishText: His soul shall abide in prosperity; And his seed shall inherit the land.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: סוֹד יְהוָה לִירֵאָיו וּבְרִיתוֹ לְהוֹדִיעָם׃
englishText: The counsel of the LORD is with them that fear Him; And His covenant, to make them know it.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֵינַי תָּמִיד אֶל־יְהוָה כִּי הוּא־יוֹצִיא מֵרֶשֶׁת רַגְלָי׃
englishText: Mine eyes are ever toward the LORD; For He will bring forth my feet out of the net.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פְּנֵה־אֵלַי וְחָנֵּנִי כִּי־יָחִיד וְעָנִי אָנִי׃
englishText: Turn Thee unto me, and be gracious unto me; For I am solitary and afflicted.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: צָרוֹת לְבָבִי הִרְחִיבוּ מִמְּצוּקוֹתַי הוֹצִיאֵנִי׃
englishText: The troubles of my heart are enlarged; O bring Thou me out of my distresses.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רְאֵה עָנְיִי וַעֲמָלִי וְשָׂא לְכָל־חַטֹּאותָי׃
englishText: See mine affliction and my travail; And forgive all my sins.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רְאֵה־אוֹיְבַי כִּי־רָבּוּ וְשִׂנְאַת חָמָס שְׂנֵאוּנִי׃
englishText: Consider how many are mine enemies, And the cruel hatred wherewith they hate me. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׁמְרָה נַפְשִׁי וְהַצִּילֵנִי אַל־אֵבוֹשׁ כִּי־חָסִיתִי בָךְ׃
englishText: O keep my soul, and deliver me; Let me not be ashamed, for I have taken refuge in Thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תֹּם־וָיֹשֶׁר יִצְּרוּנִי כִּי קִוִּיתִיךָ׃
englishText: Let integrity and uprightness preserve me, Because I wait for Thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פְּדֵה אֱלֹהִים אֶת־יִשְׂרָאֵל מִכֹּל צָרוֹתָיו׃
englishText: Redeem Israel, O God, out of all his troubles.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְדָוִד שָׁפְטֵנִי יְהוָה כִּי־אֲנִי בְּתֻמִּי הָלַכְתִּי וּבַיהוָה בָּטַחְתִּי לֹא אֶמְעָד׃
englishText: [A Psalm] of David. Judge me, O LORD, for I have walked in mine integrity, and I have trusted in the LORD without wavering.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּחָנֵנִי יְהוָה וְנַסֵּנִי צרופה [צָרְפָה] כִלְיוֹתַי וְלִבִּי׃
englishText: Examine me, O LORD, and try me; test my reins and my heart.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־חַסְדְּךָ לְנֶגֶד עֵינָי וְהִתְהַלַּכְתִּי בַּאֲמִתֶּךָ׃
englishText: For Thy mercy is before mine eyes; and I have walked in Thy truth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא־יָשַׁבְתִּי עִם־מְתֵי־שָׁוְא וְעִם נַעֲלָמִים לֹא אָבוֹא׃
englishText: I have not sat with men of falsehood; neither will I go in with dissemblers.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׂנֵאתִי קְהַל מְרֵעִים וְעִם־רְשָׁעִים לֹא אֵשֵׁב׃
englishText: I hate the gathering of evil doers, and will not sit with the wicked.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֶרְחַץ בְּנִקָּיוֹן כַּפָּי וַאֲסֹבְבָה אֶת־מִזְבַּחֲךָ יְהוָה׃
englishText: I will wash my hands in innocency; so will I compass Thine altar, O LORD,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַשְׁמִעַ בְּקוֹל תּוֹדָה וּלְסַפֵּר כָּל־נִפְלְאוֹתֶיךָ׃
englishText: That I may make the voice of thanksgiving to be heard, and tell of all Thy wondrous works.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה אָהַבְתִּי מְעוֹן בֵּיתֶךָ וּמְקוֹם מִשְׁכַּן כְּבוֹדֶךָ׃
englishText: LORD, I love the habitation of Thy house, and the place where Thy glory dwelleth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תֶּאֱסֹף עִם־חַטָּאִים נַפְשִׁי וְעִם־אַנְשֵׁי דָמִים חַיָּי׃
englishText: Gather not my soul with sinners, nor my life with men of blood;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲשֶׁר־בִּידֵיהֶם זִמָּה וִימִינָם מָלְאָה שֹּׁחַד׃
englishText: In whose hands is craftiness, and their right hand is full of bribes.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַאֲנִי בְּתֻמִּי אֵלֵךְ פְּדֵנִי וְחָנֵּנִי׃
englishText: But as for me, I will walk in mine integrity; Redeem me, and be gracious unto me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רַגְלִי עָמְדָה בְמִישׁוֹר בְּמַקְהֵלִים אֲבָרֵךְ יְהוָה׃
englishText: My foot standeth in an even place; in the congregations will I bless the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְדָוִד יְהוָה אוֹרִי וְיִשְׁעִי מִמִּי אִירָא יְהוָה מָעוֹז־חַיַּי מִמִּי אֶפְחָד׃
englishText: [A Psalm] of David. The LORD is my light and my salvation; whom shall I fear? The LORD is the stronghold of my life; of whom shall I be afraid?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בִּקְרֹב עָלַי מְרֵעִים לֶאֱכֹל אֶת־בְּשָׂרִי צָרַי וְאֹיְבַי לִי הֵמָּה כָשְׁלוּ וְנָפָלוּ׃
englishText: When evil-doers came upon me to eat up my flesh, Even mine adversaries and my foes, they stumbled and fell.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־תַּחֲנֶה עָלַי מַחֲנֶה לֹא־יִירָא לִבִּי אִם־תָּקוּם עָלַי מִלְחָמָה בְּזֹאת אֲנִי בוֹטֵחַ׃
englishText: Though a host should encamp against me, My heart shall not fear; Though war should rise up against me, Even then will I be confident.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַחַת שָׁאַלְתִּי מֵאֵת־יְהוָה אוֹתָהּ אֲבַקֵּשׁ שִׁבְתִּי בְּבֵית־יְהוָה כָּל־יְמֵי חַיַּי לַחֲזוֹת בְּנֹעַם־יְהוָה וּלְבַקֵּר בְּהֵיכָלוֹ׃
englishText: One thing have I asked of the LORD, that will I seek after: That I may dwell in the house of the LORD all the days of my life, To behold the graciousness of the LORD, and to visit early in His temple.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי יִצְפְּנֵנִי בְּסֻכֹּה בְּיוֹם רָעָה יַסְתִּרֵנִי בְּסֵתֶר אָהֳלוֹ בְּצוּר יְרוֹמְמֵנִי׃
englishText: For He concealeth me in His pavilion in the day of evil; He hideth me in the covert of His tent; He lifteth me up upon a rock. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְעַתָּה יָרוּם רֹאשִׁי עַל אֹיְבַי סְבִיבוֹתַי וְאֶזְבְּחָה בְאָהֳלוֹ זִבְחֵי תְרוּעָה אָשִׁירָה וַאֲזַמְּרָה לַיהוָה׃
englishText: And now shall my head be lifted up above mine enemies round about me; And I will offer in His tabernacle sacrifices with trumpet-sound; I will sing, yea, I will sing praises unto the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שְׁמַע־יְהוָה קוֹלִי אֶקְרָא וְחָנֵּנִי וַעֲנֵנִי׃
englishText: Hear, O LORD, when I call with my voice, And be gracious unto me, and answer me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְךָ אָמַר לִבִּי בַּקְּשׁוּ פָנָי אֶת־פָּנֶיךָ יְהוָה אֲבַקֵּשׁ׃
englishText: In Thy behalf my heart hath said: ‘Seek ye My face'; Thy face, LORD, will I seek.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תַּסְתֵּר פָּנֶיךָ מִמֶּנִּי אַל־תַּט־בְּאַף עַבְדֶּךָ עֶזְרָתִי הָיִיתָ אַל־תִּטְּשֵׁנִי וְאַל־תַּעַזְבֵנִי אֱלֹהֵי יִשְׁעִי׃
englishText: Hide not Thy face far from me; Put not Thy servant away in anger; Thou hast been my help; Cast me not off, neither forsake me, O God of my salvation.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־אָבִי וְאִמִּי עֲזָבוּנִי וַיהוָה יַאַסְפֵנִי׃
englishText: For though my father and my mother have forsaken me, The LORD will take me up.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הוֹרֵנִי יְהוָה דַּרְכֶּךָ וּנְחֵנִי בְּאֹרַח מִישׁוֹר לְמַעַן שׁוֹרְרָי׃
englishText: Teach me Thy way, O LORD; And lead me in an even path, Because of them that lie in wait for me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תִּתְּנֵנִי בְּנֶפֶשׁ צָרָי כִּי קָמוּ־בִי עֵדֵי־שֶׁקֶר וִיפֵחַ חָמָס׃
englishText: Deliver me not over unto the will of mine adversaries; For false witnesses are risen up against me, and such as breathe out violence.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לוּלֵא הֶאֱמַנְתִּי לִרְאוֹת בְּטוּב־יְהוָה בְּאֶרֶץ חַיִּים׃
englishText: If I had not believed to look upon the goodness of the LORD In the land of the living!—
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קַוֵּה אֶל־יְהוָה חֲזַק וְיַאֲמֵץ לִבֶּךָ וְקַוֵּה אֶל־יְהוָה׃
englishText: Wait on the LORD; Be strong, and let thy heart take courage; Yea, wait thou for the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְדָוִד אֵלֶיךָ יְהוָה אֶקְרָא צוּרִי אַל־תֶּחֱרַשׁ מִמֶּנִּי פֶּן־תֶּחֱשֶׁה מִמֶּנִּי וְנִמְשַׁלְתִּי עִם־יוֹרְדֵי בוֹר׃
englishText: [A Psalm] of David. Unto thee, O LORD, do I call; My Rock, be not Thou deaf unto me; Lest, if Thou be silent unto me, I become like them that go down into the pit.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שְׁמַע קוֹל תַּחֲנוּנַי בְּשַׁוְּעִי אֵלֶיךָ בְּנָשְׂאִי יָדַי אֶל־דְּבִיר קָדְשֶׁךָ׃
englishText: Hear the voice of my supplications, when I cry unto Thee, When I lift up my hands toward Thy holy Sanctuary.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תִּמְשְׁכֵנִי עִם־רְשָׁעִים וְעִם־פֹּעֲלֵי אָוֶן דֹּבְרֵי שָׁלוֹם עִם־רֵעֵיהֶם וְרָעָה בִּלְבָבָם׃
englishText: Draw me not away with the wicked, And with the workers of iniquity; Who speak peace with their neighbours, But evil is in their hearts.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תֶּן־לָהֶם כְּפָעֳלָם וּכְרֹעַ מַעַלְלֵיהֶם כְּמַעֲשֵׂה יְדֵיהֶם תֵּן לָהֶם הָשֵׁב גְּמוּלָם לָהֶם׃
englishText: Give them according to their deeds, and according to the evil of their endeavours; Give them after the work of their hands; Render to them their desert.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי לֹא יָבִינוּ אֶל־פְּעֻלֹּת יְהוָה וְאֶל־מַעֲשֵׂה יָדָיו יֶהֶרְסֵם וְלֹא יִבְנֵם׃
englishText: Because they give no heed to the works of the LORD, Nor to the operation of His hands; He will break them down and not build them up.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בָּרוּךְ יְהוָה כִּי־שָׁמַע קוֹל תַּחֲנוּנָי׃
englishText: Blessed be the LORD, Because He hath heard the voice of my supplications.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה עֻזִּי וּמָגִנִּי בּוֹ בָטַח לִבִּי וְנֶעֱזָרְתִּי וַיַּעֲלֹז לִבִּי וּמִשִּׁירִי אֲהוֹדֶנּוּ׃
englishText: The LORD is my strength and my shield, In Him hath my heart trusted, And I am helped; Therefore my heart greatly rejoiceth, And with my song will I praise Him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה עֹז־לָמוֹ וּמָעוֹז יְשׁוּעוֹת מְשִׁיחוֹ הוּא׃
englishText: The LORD is a strength unto them; And He is a stronghold of salvation to His anointed.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הוֹשִׁיעָה אֶת־עַמֶּךָ וּבָרֵךְ אֶת־נַחֲלָתֶךָ וּרְעֵם וְנַשְּׂאֵם עַד־הָעוֹלָם׃
englishText: Save Thy people, and bless Thine inheritance; And tend them, and carry them for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִזְמוֹר לְדָוִד הָבוּ לַיהוָה בְּנֵי אֵלִים הָבוּ לַיהוָה כָּבוֹד וָעֹז׃
englishText: A Psalm of David. Ascribe unto the LORD, O ye sons of might, Ascribe unto the LORD glory and strength.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הָבוּ לַיהוָה כְּבוֹד שְׁמוֹ הִשְׁתַּחֲווּ לַיהוָה בְּהַדְרַת־קֹדֶשׁ׃
englishText: Ascribe unto the LORD the glory due unto His name; Worship the LORD in the beauty of holiness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קוֹל יְהוָה עַל־הַמָּיִם אֵל־הַכָּבוֹד הִרְעִים יְהוָה עַל־מַיִם רַבִּים׃
englishText: The voice of the LORD is upon the waters; The God of glory thundereth, Even the LORD upon many waters.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קוֹל־יְהוָה בַּכֹּחַ קוֹל יְהוָה בֶּהָדָר׃
englishText: The voice of the LORD is powerful; The voice of the LORD is full of majesty.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קוֹל יְהוָה שֹׁבֵר אֲרָזִים וַיְשַׁבֵּר יְהוָה אֶת־אַרְזֵי הַלְּבָנוֹן׃
englishText: The voice of the LORD breaketh the cedars; yea, the LORD breaketh in pieces the cedars of Lebanon.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּרְקִידֵם כְּמוֹ־עֵגֶל לְבָנוֹן וְשִׂרְיֹן כְּמוֹ בֶן־רְאֵמִים׃
englishText: He maketh them also to skip like a calf; Lebanon and Sirion like a young wild-ox.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קוֹל־יְהוָה חֹצֵב לַהֲבוֹת אֵשׁ׃
englishText: The voice of the LORD heweth out flames of fire.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קוֹל יְהוָה יָחִיל מִדְבָּר יָחִיל יְהוָה מִדְבַּר קָדֵשׁ׃
englishText: The voice of the LORD shaketh the wilderness; The LORD shaketh the wilderness of Kadesh.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קוֹל יְהוָה יְחוֹלֵל אַיָּלוֹת וַיֶּחֱשֹׂף יְעָרוֹת וּבְהֵיכָלוֹ כֻּלּוֹ אֹמֵר כָּבוֹד׃
englishText: The voice of the LORD maketh the hinds to calve, And strippeth the forests bare; And in His temple all say: 'Glory.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה לַמַּבּוּל יָשָׁב וַיֵּשֶׁב יְהוָה מֶלֶךְ לְעוֹלָם׃
englishText: The LORD sat enthroned at the flood; Yea, the LORD sitteth as King for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה עֹז לְעַמּוֹ יִתֵּן יְהוָה יְבָרֵךְ אֶת־עַמּוֹ בַשָּׁלוֹם׃
englishText: The LORD will give strength unto His people; The LORD will bless his people with peace.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִזְמוֹר שִׁיר־חֲנֻכַּת הַבַּיִת לְדָוִד׃
englishText: A Psalm; a Song at the Dedication of the House; of David.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲרוֹמִמְךָ יְהוָה כִּי דִלִּיתָנִי וְלֹא־שִׂמַּחְתָּ אֹיְבַי לִי׃
englishText: I will extol thee, O LORD, for Thou hast raised me up, and hast not suffered mine enemies to rejoice over me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה אֱלֹהָי שִׁוַּעְתִּי אֵלֶיךָ וַתִּרְפָּאֵנִי׃
englishText: O LORD my God, I cried unto Thee, and Thou didst heal me;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה הֶעֱלִיתָ מִן־שְׁאוֹל נַפְשִׁי חִיִּיתַנִי מיורדי־[מִיָּרְדִי־] בוֹר׃
englishText: O LORD, Thou broughtest up my soul from the nether-world; Thou didst kept me alive, that I should not go down to the pit.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זַמְּרוּ לַיהוָה חֲסִידָיו וְהוֹדוּ לְזֵכֶר קָדְשׁוֹ׃
englishText: Sing praise unto the LORD, O ye His godly ones, and give thanks to His holy name.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי רֶגַע בְּאַפּוֹ חַיִּים בִּרְצוֹנוֹ בָּעֶרֶב יָלִין בֶּכִי וְלַבֹּקֶר רִנָּה׃
englishText: For His anger is but for a moment, His favour is for a life-time; weeping may tarry for the night, but joy cometh in the morning.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַאֲנִי אָמַרְתִּי בְשַׁלְוִי בַּל־אֶמּוֹט לְעוֹלָם׃
englishText: Now I had said in my security: 'I shall never be moved.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה בִּרְצוֹנְךָ הֶעֱמַדְתָּה לְהַרְרִי עֹז הִסְתַּרְתָּ פָנֶיךָ הָיִיתִי נִבְהָל׃
englishText: Thou hadst established, O LORD, in Thy favour my mountain as a stronghold— Thou didst hide Thy face; I was affrighted.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֵלֶיךָ יְהוָה אֶקְרָא וְאֶל־אֲדֹנָי אֶתְחַנָּן׃
englishText: Unto Thee, O LORD, did I call, And unto the LORD I made supplication:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַה־בֶּצַע בְּדָמִי בְּרִדְתִּי אֶל־שָׁחַת הֲיוֹדְךָ עָפָר הֲיַגִּיד אֲמִתֶּךָ׃
englishText: 'What profit is there in my blood, when I go down to the pit? Shall the dust praise Thee? shall it declare Thy truth?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שְׁמַע־יְהוָה וְחָנֵּנִי יְהוָה הֱ‍יֵה־עֹזֵר לִי׃
englishText: Hear, O LORD, and be gracious unto me; LORD, be Thou my helper.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הָפַכְתָּ מִסְפְּדִי לְמָחוֹל לִי פִּתַּחְתָּ שַׂקִּי וַתְּאַזְּרֵנִי שִׂמְחָה׃
englishText: Thou didst turn for me my mourning into dancing; Thou didst loose my sackcloth, and gird me with gladness;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְמַעַן יְזַמֶּרְךָ כָבוֹד וְלֹא יִדֹּם יְהוָה אֱלֹהַי לְעוֹלָם אוֹדֶךָּ׃
englishText: So that my glory may sing praise to Thee, and not be silent; O LORD my God, I will give thanks unto Thee for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ מִזְמוֹר לְדָוִד׃
englishText: For the Leader. A Psalm of David.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּךָ יְהוָה חָסִיתִי אַל־אֵבוֹשָׁה לְעוֹלָם בְּצִדְקָתְךָ פַלְּטֵנִי׃
englishText: In thee, O LORD, have I taken refuge; let me never be ashamed; Deliver me in Thy righteousness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַטֵּה אֵלַי אָזְנְךָ מְהֵרָה הַצִּילֵנִי הֱיֵה לִי לְצוּר־מָעוֹז לְבֵית מְצוּדוֹת לְהוֹשִׁיעֵנִי׃
englishText: Incline Thine ear unto me, deliver me speedily; Be Thou to me a rock of refuge, even a fortress of defence, to save me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־סַלְעִי וּמְצוּדָתִי אָתָּה וּלְמַעַן שִׁמְךָ תַּנְחֵנִי וּתְנַהֲלֵנִי׃
englishText: For Thou art my rock and my fortress; Therefore for Thy name's sake lead me and guide me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תּוֹצִיאֵנִי מֵרֶשֶׁת זוּ טָמְנוּ לִי כִּי־אַתָּה מָעוּזִּי׃
englishText: Bring me forth out of the net that they have hidden for me; For Thou art my stronghold.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּיָדְךָ אַפְקִיד רוּחִי פָּדִיתָה אוֹתִי יְהוָה אֵל אֱמֶת׃
englishText: Into Thy hand I commit my spirit; Thou hast redeemed me, O LORD, Thou God of truth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׂנֵאתִי הַשֹּׁמְרִים הַבְלֵי־שָׁוְא וַאֲנִי אֶל־יְהוָה בָּטָחְתִּי׃
englishText: I hate them that regard lying vanities; But I trust in the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָגִילָה וְאֶשְׂמְחָה בְּחַסְדֶּךָ אֲשֶׁר רָאִיתָ אֶת־עָנְיִי יָדַעְתָּ בְּצָרוֹת נַפְשִׁי׃
englishText: I will be glad and rejoice in Thy lovingkindness; For Thou hast seen mine affliction, Thou hast taken cognizance of the troubles of my soul,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְלֹא הִסְגַּרְתַּנִי בְּיַד־אוֹיֵב הֶעֱמַדְתָּ בַמֶּרְחָב רַגְלָי׃
englishText: And Thou hast not given me over into the hand of the enemy; Thou hast set my feet in a broad place.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חָנֵּנִי יְהוָה כִּי צַר־לִי עָשְׁשָׁה בְכַעַס עֵינִי נַפְשִׁי וּבִטְנִי׃
englishText: Be gracious unto me, O LORD, for I am in distress; Mine eye wasteth away with vexation, yea, my soul and my body.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי כָלוּ בְיָגוֹן חַיַּי וּשְׁנוֹתַי בַּאֲנָחָה כָּשַׁל בַּעֲוֺנִי כֹחִי וַעֲצָמַי עָשֵׁשׁוּ׃
englishText: For my life is spent in sorrow, and my years in sighing; My strength faileth because of mine iniquity, and my bones are wasted away.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִכָּל־צֹרְרַי הָיִיתִי חֶרְפָּה וְלִשֲׁכֵנַי מְאֹד וּפַחַד לִמְיֻדָּעָי רֹאַי בַּחוּץ נָדְדוּ מִמֶּנִּי׃
englishText: Because of all mine adversaries I am become a reproach, Yea, unto my neighbours exceedingly, and a dread to mine acquaintance; They that see me without flee from me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נִשְׁכַּחְתִּי כְּמֵת מִלֵּב הָיִיתִי כִּכְלִי אֹבֵד׃
englishText: I am forgotten as a dead man out of mind; I am like a useless vessel.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי שָׁמַעְתִּי דִּבַּת רַבִּים מָגוֹר מִסָּבִיב בְּהִוָּסְדָם יַחַד עָלַי לָקַחַת נַפְשִׁי זָמָמוּ׃
englishText: For I have heard the whispering of many, Terror on every side; While they took counsel together against me, They devised to take away my life.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַאֲנִי עָלֶיךָ בָטַחְתִּי יְהוָה אָמַרְתִּי אֱלֹהַי אָתָּה׃
englishText: But as for me, I have trusted in Thee, O LORD; I have said: 'Thou art my God.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּיָדְךָ עִתֹּתָי הַצִּילֵנִי מִיַּד־אוֹיְבַי וּמֵרֹדְפָי׃
englishText: My times are in Thy hand; Deliver me from the hand of mine enemies, and from them that persecute me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הָאִירָה פָנֶיךָ עַל־עַבְדֶּךָ הוֹשִׁיעֵנִי בְחַסְדֶּךָ׃
englishText: Make Thy face to shine upon Thy servant; Save me in Thy lovingkindness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה אַל־אֵבוֹשָׁה כִּי קְרָאתִיךָ יֵבֹשׁוּ רְשָׁעִים יִדְּמוּ לִשְׁאוֹל׃
englishText: O LORD, let me not be ashamed, for I have called upon Thee; Let the wicked be ashamed, let them be put to silence in the nether-world.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תֵּאָלַמְנָה שִׂפְתֵי שָׁקֶר הַדֹּבְרוֹת עַל־צַדִּיק עָתָק בְּגַאֲוָה וָבוּז׃
englishText: Let the lying lips be dumb, Which speak arrogantly against the righteous, With pride and contempt.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מָה רַב־טוּבְךָ אֲשֶׁר־צָפַנְתָּ לִּירֵאֶיךָ פָּעַלְתָּ לַחֹסִים בָּךְ נֶגֶד בְּנֵי אָדָם׃
englishText: Oh how abundant is Thy goodness, which Thou hast laid up for them that fear Thee; Which Thou hast wrought for them that take their refuge in Thee, in the sight of the sons of men!
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תַּסְתִּירֵם בְּסֵתֶר פָּנֶיךָ מֵרֻכְסֵי אִישׁ תִּצְפְּנֵם בְּסֻכָּה מֵרִיב לְשֹׁנוֹת׃
englishText: Thou hidest them in the covert of Thy presence from the plottings of man; Thou concealest them in a pavilion from the strife of tongues.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בָּרוּךְ יְהוָה כִּי הִפְלִיא חַסְדּוֹ לִי בְּעִיר מָצוֹר׃
englishText: Blessed be the LORD; For He hath shown me His wondrous lovingkindness in an entrenched city.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַאֲנִי אָמַרְתִּי בְחָפְזִי נִגְרַזְתִּי מִנֶּגֶד עֵינֶיךָ אָכֵן שָׁמַעְתָּ קוֹל תַּחֲנוּנַי בְּשַׁוְּעִי אֵלֶיךָ׃
englishText: As for me, I said in my haste: 'I am cut off from before Thine eyes'; Nevertheless Thou heardest the voice of my supplications when I cried unto Thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֶהֱבוּ אֶת־יְהוָה כָּל־חֲסִידָיו אֱמוּנִים נֹצֵר יְהוָה וּמְשַׁלֵּם עַל־יֶתֶר עֹשֵׂה גַאֲוָה׃
englishText: O love the LORD, all ye His godly ones; The LORD preserveth the faithful, And plentifully repayeth him that acteth haughtily.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חִזְקוּ וְיַאֲמֵץ לְבַבְכֶם כָּל־הַמְיַחֲלִים לַיהוָה׃
englishText: Be strong, and let your heart take courage, All ye that wait for the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְדָוִד מַשְׂכִּיל אַשְׁרֵי נְשׂוּי־פֶּשַׁע כְּסוּי חֲטָאָה׃
englishText: [A Psalm] of David. Maschil. Happy is he whose transgression is forgiven, whose sin is pardoned.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַשְׁרֵי אָדָם לֹא יַחְשֹׁב יְהוָה לוֹ עָוֺן וְאֵין בְּרוּחוֹ רְמִיָּה׃
englishText: Happy is the man unto whom the LORD counteth not iniquity, And in whose spirit there is no guile.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־הֶחֱרַשְׁתִּי בָּלוּ עֲצָמָי בְּשַׁאֲגָתִי כָּל־הַיּוֹם׃
englishText: When I kept silence, my bones wore away Through my groaning all the day long.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי יוֹמָם וָלַיְלָה תִּכְבַּד עָלַי יָדֶךָ נֶהְפַּךְ לְשַׁדִּי בְּחַרְבֹנֵי קַיִץ סֶלָה׃
englishText: For day and night Thy hand was heavy upon me; My sap was turned as in the droughts of summer. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חַטָּאתִי אוֹדִיעֲךָ וַעֲוֺנִי לֹא־כִסִּיתִי אָמַרְתִּי אוֹדֶה עֲלֵי פְשָׁעַי לַיהוָה וְאַתָּה נָשָׂאתָ עֲוֺן חַטָּאתִי סֶלָה׃
englishText: I acknowledged my sin unto Thee, and mine iniquity have I not hid; I said: 'I will make confession concerning my transgressions unto the LORD' — And Thou, Thou forgavest the iniquity of my sin. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַל־זֹאת יִתְפַּלֵּל כָּל־חָסִיד אֵלֶיךָ לְעֵת מְצֹא רַק לְשֵׁטֶף מַיִם רַבִּים אֵלָיו לֹא יַגִּיעוּ׃
englishText: For this let every one that is godly pray unto Thee in a time when Thou mayest be found; Surely, when the great waters overflow, they will not reach unto him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַתָּה סֵתֶר לִי מִצַּר תִּצְּרֵנִי רָנֵּי פַלֵּט תְּסוֹבְבֵנִי סֶלָה׃
englishText: Thou art my hiding-place; Thou wilt preserve me from the adversary; With songs of deliverance Thou wilt compass me about. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַשְׂכִּילְךָ וְאוֹרְךָ בְּדֶרֶךְ־זוּ תֵלֵךְ אִיעֲצָה עָלֶיךָ עֵינִי׃
englishText: 'I will instruct thee and teach thee in the way which thou shalt go; I will give counsel, Mine eye being upon thee.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תִּהְיוּ כְּסוּס כְּפֶרֶד אֵין הָבִין בְּמֶתֶג־וָרֶסֶן עֶדְיוֹ לִבְלוֹם בַּל קְרֹב אֵלֶיךָ׃
englishText: Be ye not as the horse, or as the mule, which have no understanding; Whose mouth must be held in with bit and bridle, That they come not near unto thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רַבִּים מַכְאוֹבִים לָרָשָׁע וְהַבּוֹטֵחַ בַּיהוָה חֶסֶד יְסוֹבְבֶנּוּ׃
englishText: Many are the sorrows of the wicked; But he that trusteth in the LORD, mercy compasseth him about.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׂמְחוּ בַיהוָה וְגִילוּ צַדִּיקִים וְהַרְנִינוּ כָּל־יִשְׁרֵי־לֵב׃
englishText: Be glad in the LORD, and rejoice, ye righteous; And shout for joy, all ye that are upright in heart.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רַנְּנוּ צַדִּיקִים בַּיהוָה לַיְשָׁרִים נָאוָה תְהִלָּה׃
englishText: Rejoice in the LORD, O ye righteous, Praise is comely for the upright.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הוֹדוּ לַיהוָה בְּכִנּוֹר בְּנֵבֶל עָשׂוֹר זַמְּרוּ־לוֹ׃
englishText: Give thanks unto the LORD with harp, Sing praises unto Him with the psaltery of ten strings.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׁירוּ־לוֹ שִׁיר חָדָשׁ הֵיטִיבוּ נַגֵּן בִּתְרוּעָה׃
englishText: Sing unto Him a new song; Play skilfully amid shouts of joy.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־יָשָׁר דְּבַר־יְהוָה וְכָל־מַעֲשֵׂהוּ בֶּאֱמוּנָה׃
englishText: For the word of the LORD is upright; And all His work is done in faithfulness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֹהֵב צְדָקָה וּמִשְׁפָּט חֶסֶד יְהוָה מָלְאָה הָאָרֶץ׃
englishText: He loveth righteousness and justice; The earth is full of the lovingkindness of the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בִּדְבַר יְהוָה שָׁמַיִם נַעֲשׂוּ וּבְרוּחַ פִּיו כָּל־צְבָאָם׃
englishText: By the word of the LORD were the heavens made; And all the host of them by the breath of His mouth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כֹּנֵס כַּנֵּד מֵי הַיָּם נֹתֵן בְּאֹצָרוֹת תְּהוֹמוֹת׃
englishText: He gathereth the waters of the sea together as a heap; He layeth up the deeps in storehouses.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִירְאוּ מֵיְהוָה כָּל־הָאָרֶץ מִמֶּנּוּ יָגוּרוּ כָּל־יֹשְׁבֵי תֵבֵל׃
englishText: Let all the earth fear the LORD; Let all the inhabitants of the world stand in awe of Him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי הוּא אָמַר וַיֶּהִי הוּא־צִוָּה וַיַּעֲמֹד׃
englishText: For He spoke, and it was; He commanded, and it stood.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה הֵפִיר עֲצַת־גּוֹיִם הֵנִיא מַחְשְׁבוֹת עַמִּים׃
englishText: The LORD bringeth the counsel of the nations to nought; He maketh the thoughts of the peoples to be of no effect.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֲצַת יְהוָה לְעוֹלָם תַּעֲמֹד מַחְשְׁבוֹת לִבּוֹ לְדֹר וָדֹר׃
englishText: The counsel of the LORD standeth for ever, The thoughts of His heart to all generations.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַשְׁרֵי הַגּוֹי אֲשֶׁר־יְהוָה אֱלֹהָיו הָעָם בָּחַר לְנַחֲלָה לוֹ׃
englishText: Happy is the nation whose God is the LORD; The people whom He hath chosen for His own inheritance.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִשָּׁמַיִם הִבִּיט יְהוָה רָאָה אֶת־כָּל־בְּנֵי הָאָדָם׃
englishText: The LORD looketh from heaven; He beholdeth all the sons of men;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִמְּכוֹן־שִׁבְתּוֹ הִשְׁגִּיחַ אֶל כָּל־יֹשְׁבֵי הָאָרֶץ׃
englishText: From the place of His habitation He looketh intently Upon all the inhabitants of the earth;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַיֹּצֵר יַחַד לִבָּם הַמֵּבִין אֶל־כָּל־מַעֲשֵׂיהֶם׃
englishText: He that fashioneth the hearts of them all, That considereth all their doings.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֵין־הַמֶּלֶךְ נוֹשָׁע בְּרָב־חָיִל גִּבּוֹר לֹא־יִנָּצֵל בְּרָב־כֹּחַ׃
englishText: A king is not saved by the multitude of a host; A mighty man is not delivered by great strength.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שֶׁקֶר הַסּוּס לִתְשׁוּעָה וּבְרֹב חֵילוֹ לֹא יְמַלֵּט׃
englishText: A horse is a vain thing for safety; Neither doth it afford escape by its great strength.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הִנֵּה עֵין יְהוָה אֶל־יְרֵאָיו לַמְיַחֲלִים לְחַסְדּוֹ׃
englishText: Behold, the eye of the LORD is toward them that fear Him, Toward them that wait for His mercy;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְהַצִּיל מִמָּוֶת נַפְשָׁם וּלְחַיּוֹתָם בָּרָעָב׃
englishText: To deliver their soul from death, And to keep them alive in famine.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נַפְשֵׁנוּ חִכְּתָה לַיהוָה עֶזְרֵנוּ וּמָגִנֵּנוּ הוּא׃
englishText: Our soul hath waited for the LORD; He is our help and our shield.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־בוֹ יִשְׂמַח לִבֵּנוּ כִּי בְשֵׁם קָדְשׁוֹ בָטָחְנוּ׃
englishText: For in Him doth our heart rejoice, Because we have trusted in His holy name.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהִי־חַסְדְּךָ יְהוָה עָלֵינוּ כַּאֲשֶׁר יִחַלְנוּ לָךְ׃
englishText: Let Thy mercy, O LORD, be upon us, According as we have waited for Thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְדָוִד בְּשַׁנּוֹתוֹ אֶת־טַעְמוֹ לִפְנֵי אֲבִימֶלֶךְ וַיְגָרֲשֵׁהוּ וַיֵּלַךְ׃
englishText: [A Psalm] of David; when he changed his demeanour before Abimelech, who drove him away, and he departed.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲבָרֲכָה אֶת־יְהוָה בְּכָל־עֵת תָּמִיד תְּהִלָּתוֹ בְּפִי׃
englishText: I will bless the LORD at all times; His praise shall continually be in my mouth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בַּיהוָה תִּתְהַלֵּל נַפְשִׁי יִשְׁמְעוּ עֲנָוִים וְיִשְׂמָחוּ׃
englishText: My soul shall glory in the LORD; The humble shall hear thereof, and be glad.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גַּדְּלוּ לַיהוָה אִתִּי וּנְרוֹמְמָה שְׁמוֹ יַחְדָּו׃
englishText: O magnify the LORD with me, And let us exalt His name together.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: דָּרַשְׁתִּי אֶת־יְהוָה וְעָנָנִי וּמִכָּל־מְגוּרוֹתַי הִצִּילָנִי׃
englishText: I sought the LORD, and He answered me, And delivered me from all my fears.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הִבִּיטוּ אֵלָיו וְנָהָרוּ וּפְנֵיהֶם אַל־יֶחְפָּרוּ׃
englishText: They looked unto Him, and were radiant; And their faces shall never be abashed.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זֶה עָנִי קָרָא וַיהוָה שָׁמֵעַ וּמִכָּל־צָרוֹתָיו הוֹשִׁיעוֹ׃
englishText: This poor man cried, and the LORD heard, And saved him out of all his troubles.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חֹנֶה מַלְאַךְ־יְהוָה סָבִיב לִירֵאָיו וַיְחַלְּצֵם׃
englishText: The angel of the LORD encampeth round about them that fear Him, And delivereth them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: טַעֲמוּ וּרְאוּ כִּי־טוֹב יְהוָה אַשְׁרֵי הַגֶּבֶר יֶחֱסֶה־בּוֹ׃
englishText: O consider and see that the LORD is good; Happy is the man that taketh refuge in Him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְראוּ אֶת־יְהוָה קְדֹשָׁיו כִּי־אֵין מַחְסוֹר לִירֵאָיו׃
englishText: O fear the LORD, ye His holy ones; For there is no want to them that fear Him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כְּפִירִים רָשׁוּ וְרָעֵבוּ וְדֹרְשֵׁי יְהוָה לֹא־יַחְסְרוּ כָל־טוֹב׃
englishText: The young lions do lack, and suffer hunger; But they that seek the LORD want not any good thing.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְכוּ־בָנִים שִׁמְעוּ־לִי יִרְאַת יְהוָה אֲלַמֶּדְכֶם׃
englishText: Come, ye children, hearken unto me; I will teach you the fear of the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִי־הָאִישׁ הֶחָפֵץ חַיִּים אֹהֵב יָמִים לִרְאוֹת טוֹב׃
englishText: Who is the man that desireth life, and loveth days, That he may see good therein?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נְצֹר לְשׁוֹנְךָ מֵרָע וּשְׂפָתֶיךָ מִדַּבֵּר מִרְמָה׃
englishText: Keep thy tongue from evil, And thy lips from speaking guile.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: סוּר מֵרָע וַעֲשֵׂה־טוֹב בַּקֵּשׁ שָׁלוֹם וְרָדְפֵהוּ׃
englishText: Depart from evil, and do good; Seek peace, and pursue it.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֵינֵי יְהוָה אֶל־צַדִּיקִים וְאָזְנָיו אֶל־שַׁוְעָתָם׃
englishText: The eyes of the LORD are toward the righteous, And His ears are open unto their cry.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פְּנֵי יְהוָה בְּעֹשֵׂי רָע לְהַכְרִית מֵאֶרֶץ זִכְרָם׃
englishText: The face of the LORD is against them that do evil, To cut off the remembrance of them from the earth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: צָעֲקוּ וַיהוָה שָׁמֵעַ וּמִכָּל־צָרוֹתָם הִצִּילָם׃
englishText: They cried, and the LORD heard, And delivered them out of all their troubles.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קָרוֹב יְהוָה לְנִשְׁבְּרֵי־לֵב וְאֶת־דַּכְּאֵי־רוּחַ יוֹשִׁיעַ׃
englishText: The LORD is nigh unto them that are of a broken heart, And saveth such as are of a contrite spirit.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רַבּוֹת רָעוֹת צַדִּיק וּמִכֻּלָּם יַצִּילֶנּוּ יְהוָה׃
englishText: Many are the ills of the righteous, But the LORD delivereth him out of them all.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שֹׁמֵר כָּל־עַצְמוֹתָיו אַחַת מֵהֵנָּה לֹא נִשְׁבָּרָה׃
englishText: He keepeth all his bones; Not one of them is broken.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תְּמוֹתֵת רָשָׁע רָעָה וְשֹׂנְאֵי צַדִּיק יֶאְשָׁמוּ׃
englishText: Evil shall kill the wicked; And they that hate the righteous shall be held guilty.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פּוֹדֶה יְהוָה נֶפֶשׁ עֲבָדָיו וְלֹא יֶאְשְׁמוּ כָּל־הַחֹסִים בּוֹ׃
englishText: The LORD redeemeth the soul of His servants; And none of them that take refuge in Him shall be desolate.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְדָוִד רִיבָה יְהוָה אֶת־יְרִיבַי לְחַם אֶת־לֹחֲמָי׃
englishText: [A Psalm] of David. Strive, O LORD, with them that strive with me; Fight against them that fight against me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַחֲזֵק מָגֵן וְצִנָּה וְקוּמָה בְּעֶזְרָתִי׃
englishText: Take hold of shield and buckler, And rise up to my help.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְהָרֵק חֲנִית וּסְגֹר לִקְרַאת רֹדְפָי אֱמֹר לְנַפְשִׁי יְשֻׁעָתֵךְ אָנִי׃
englishText: Draw out also the spear, and the battle-axe, against them that pursue me; Say unto my soul: 'I am Thy salvation.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יֵבֹשׁוּ וְיִכָּלְמוּ מְבַקְשֵׁי נַפְשִׁי יִסֹּגוּ אָחוֹר וְיַחְפְּרוּ חֹשְׁבֵי רָעָתִי׃
englishText: Let them be ashamed and brought to confusion that seek after my soul; Let them be turned back and be abashed that devise my hurt.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִהְיוּ כְּמֹץ לִפְנֵי־רוּחַ וּמַלְאַךְ יְהוָה דּוֹחֶה׃
englishText: Let them be as chaff before the wind, The angel of the LORD thrusting them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהִי־דַרְכָּם חֹשֶׁךְ וַחֲלַקְלַקּוֹת וּמַלְאַךְ יְהוָה רֹדְפָם׃
englishText: Let their way be dark and slippery, The angel of the LORD pursuing them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־חִנָּם טָמְנוּ־לִי שַׁחַת רִשְׁתָּם חִנָּם חָפְרוּ לְנַפְשִׁי׃
englishText: For without cause have they hid for me the pit, even their net, Without cause have they digged for my soul. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תְּבוֹאֵהוּ שׁוֹאָה לֹא־יֵדָע וְרִשְׁתּוֹ אֲשֶׁר־טָמַן תִּלְכְּדוֹ בְּשׁוֹאָה יִפָּל־בָּהּ׃
englishText: Let destruction come upon him unawares; And let his net that he hath hid catch himself; With destruction let him fall therein.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְנַפְשִׁי תָּגִיל בַּיהוָה תָּשִׂישׂ בִּישׁוּעָתוֹ׃
englishText: And my soul shall be joyful in the LORD; It shall rejoice in His salvation.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כָּל עַצְמוֹתַי תֹּאמַרְנָה יְהוָה מִי כָמוֹךָ מַצִּיל עָנִי מֵחָזָק מִמֶּנּוּ וְעָנִי וְאֶבְיוֹן מִגֹּזְלוֹ׃
englishText: All my bones shall say: 'LORD, who is like unto Thee, Who deliverest the poor from him that is too strong for him, Yea, the poor and the needy from him that spoileth him?'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְקוּמוּן עֵדֵי חָמָס אֲשֶׁר לֹא־יָדַעְתִּי יִשְׁאָלוּנִי׃
englishText: Unrighteous witnesses rise up; They ask me of things that I know not.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְשַׁלְּמוּנִי רָעָה תַּחַת טוֹבָה שְׁכוֹל לְנַפְשִׁי׃
englishText: They repay me evil for good; Bereavement is come to my soul.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַאֲנִי בַּחֲלוֹתָם לְבוּשִׁי שָׂק עִנֵּיתִי בַצּוֹם נַפְשִׁי וּתְפִלָּתִי עַל־חֵיקִי תָשׁוּב׃
englishText: But as for me, when they were sick, my clothing was sackcloth, I afflicted my soul with fasting; And my prayer, may it return into mine own bosom.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כְּרֵעַ־כְּאָח לִי הִתְהַלָּכְתִּי כַּאֲבֶל־אֵם קֹדֵר שַׁחוֹתִי׃
englishText: I went about as though it had been my friend or my brother; I bowed down mournful, as one that mourneth for his mother.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְצַלְעִי שָׂמְחוּ וְנֶאֱסָפוּ נֶאֶסְפוּ עָלַי נֵכִים וְלֹא יָדַעְתִּי קָרְעוּ וְלֹא־דָמּוּ׃
englishText: But when I halt they rejoice, and gather themselves together; The abjects gather themselves together against me, and those whom I know not; They tear me, and cease not;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּחַנְפֵי לַעֲגֵי מָעוֹג חָרֹק עָלַי שִׁנֵּימוֹ׃
englishText: With the profanest mockeries of backbiting They gnash at me with their teeth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲדֹנָי כַּמָּה תִּרְאֶה הָשִׁיבָה נַפְשִׁי מִשֹּׁאֵיהֶם מִכְּפִירִים יְחִידָתִי׃
englishText: Lord, how long wilt Thou look on? Rescue my soul from their destructions, Mine only one from the lions.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אוֹדְךָ בְּקָהָל רָב בְּעַם עָצוּם אֲהַלְלֶךָּ׃
englishText: I will give Thee thanks in the great congregation; I will praise Thee among a numerous people.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־יִשְׂמְחוּ־לִי אֹיְבַי שֶׁקֶר שֹׂנְאַי חִנָּם יִקְרְצוּ־עָיִן׃
englishText: Let not them that are wrongfully mine enemies rejoice over me; Neither let them wink with the eye that hate me without a cause.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי לֹא שָׁלוֹם יְדַבֵּרוּ וְעַל רִגְעֵי־אֶרֶץ דִּבְרֵי מִרְמוֹת יַחֲשֹׁבוּן׃
englishText: For they speak not peace; But they devise deceitful matters against them that are quiet in the land.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּרְחִיבוּ עָלַי פִּיהֶם אָמְרוּ הֶאָח הֶאָח רָאֲתָה עֵינֵינוּ׃
englishText: Yea, they open their mouth wide against me; They say: 'Aha, aha, our eye hath seen it.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רָאִיתָה יְהוָה אַל־תֶּחֱרַשׁ אֲדֹנָי אֲל־תִּרְחַק מִמֶּנִּי׃
englishText: Thou hast seen, O LORD; keep not silence; O Lord, be not far from me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הָעִירָה וְהָקִיצָה לְמִשְׁפָּטִי אֱלֹהַי וַאדֹנָי לְרִיבִי׃
englishText: Rouse Thee, and awake to my judgment, Even unto my cause, my God and my Lord.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׁפְטֵנִי כְצִדְקְךָ יְהוָה אֱלֹהָי וְאַל־יִשְׂמְחוּ־לִי׃
englishText: Judge me, O LORD my God, according to Thy righteousness; And let them not rejoice over me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־יֹאמְרוּ בְלִבָּם הֶאָח נַפְשֵׁנוּ אַל־יֹאמְרוּ בִּלַּעֲנוּהוּ׃
englishText: Let them not say in their heart: 'Aha, we have our desire'; Let them not say: 'We have swallowed him up.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יֵבֹשׁוּ וְיַחְפְּרוּ יַחְדָּו שְׂמֵחֵי רָעָתִי יִלְבְּשׁוּ־בֹשֶׁת וּכְלִמָּה הַמַּגְדִּילִים עָלָי׃
englishText: Let them be ashamed and abashed together that rejoice at my hurt; Let them be clothed with shame and confusion that magnify themselves against me. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָרֹנּוּ וְיִשְׂמְחוּ חֲפֵצֵי צִדְקִי וְיֹאמְרוּ תָמִיד יִגְדַּל יְהוָה הֶחָפֵץ שְׁלוֹם עַבְדּוֹ׃
englishText: Let them shout for joy, and be glad, that delight in my righteousness; Yea, let them say continually: 'Magnified be the LORD, Who delighteth in the peace of His servant.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּלְשׁוֹנִי תֶּהְגֶּה צִדְקֶךָ כָּל־הַיּוֹם תְּהִלָּתֶךָ׃
englishText: And my tongue shall speak of Thy righteousness, And of Thy praise all the day.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ לְעֶבֶד־יְהוָה לְדָוִד׃
englishText: For the Leader. [A Psalm] of David the servant of the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נְאֻם־פֶּשַׁע לָרָשָׁע בְּקֶרֶב לִבִּי אֵין־פַּחַד אֱלֹהִים לְנֶגֶד עֵינָיו׃
englishText: Transgression speaketh to the wicked, methinks— There is no fear of God before his eyes.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־הֶחֱלִיק אֵלָיו בְּעֵינָיו לִמְצֹא עֲוֺנוֹ לִשְׂנֹא׃
englishText: For it flattereth him in his eyes, Until his iniquity be found, and he be hated.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: דִּבְרֵי־פִיו אָוֶן וּמִרְמָה חָדַל לְהַשְׂכִּיל לְהֵיטִיב׃
englishText: The words of his mouth are iniquity and deceit; He hath left off to be wise, to do good.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָוֶן יַחְשֹׁב עַל־מִשְׁכָּבוֹ יִתְיַצֵּב עַל־דֶּרֶךְ לֹא־טוֹב רָע לֹא יִמְאָס׃
englishText: He deviseth iniquity upon his bed; He setteth himself in a way that is not good; He abhorreth not evil.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה בְּהַשָּׁמַיִם חַסְדֶּךָ אֱמוּנָתְךָ עַד־שְׁחָקִים׃
englishText: Thy lovingkindness, O LORD, is in the heavens; Thy faithfulness reacheth unto the skies.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: צִדְקָתְךָ כְּהַרְרֵי־אֵל מִשְׁפָּטֶךָ תְּהוֹם רַבָּה אָדָם־וּבְהֵמָה תוֹשִׁיעַ יְהוָה׃
englishText: Thy righteousness is like the mighty mountains; Thy judgments are like the great deep; Man and beast Thou preservest, O LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַה־יָּקָר חַסְדְּךָ אֱלֹהִים וּבְנֵי אָדָם בְּצֵל כְּנָפֶיךָ יֶחֱסָיוּן׃
englishText: How precious is Thy lovingkindness, O God! And the children of men take refuge in the shadow of Thy wings.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִרְוְיֻן מִדֶּשֶׁן בֵּיתֶךָ וְנַחַל עֲדָנֶיךָ תַשְׁקֵם׃
englishText: They are abundantly satisfied with the fatness of Thy house; And Thou makest them drink of the river of Thy pleasures.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־עִמְּךָ מְקוֹר חַיִּים בְּאוֹרְךָ נִרְאֶה־אוֹר׃
englishText: For with Thee is the fountain of life; In Thy light do we see light.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מְשֹׁךְ חַסְדְּךָ לְיֹדְעֶיךָ וְצִדְקָתְךָ לְיִשְׁרֵי־לֵב׃
englishText: O continue Thy lovingkindness unto them that know Thee; And Thy righteousness to the upright in heart.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תְּבוֹאֵנִי רֶגֶל גַּאֲוָה וְיַד־רְשָׁעִים אַל־תְּנִדֵנִי׃
englishText: Let not the foot of pride overtake me, And let not the hand of the wicked drive me away.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׁם נָפְלוּ פֹּעֲלֵי אָוֶן דֹּחוּ וְלֹא־יָכְלוּ קוּם׃
englishText: There are the workers of iniquity fallen; They are thrust down, and are not able to rise.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְדָוִד אַל־תִּתְחַר בַּמְּרֵעִים אַל־תְּקַנֵּא בְּעֹשֵׂי עַוְלָה׃
englishText: [A Psalm] of David. Fret not thyself because of evil-doers, neither be thou envious against them that work unrighteousness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי כֶחָצִיר מְהֵרָה יִמָּלוּ וּכְיֶרֶק דֶּשֶׁא יִבּוֹלוּן׃
englishText: For they shall soon wither like the grass, and fade as the green herb.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּטַח בַּיהוָה וַעֲשֵׂה־טוֹב שְׁכָן־אֶרֶץ וּרְעֵה אֱמוּנָה׃
englishText: Trust in the LORD, and do good; dwell in the land, and cherish faithfulness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְהִתְעַנַּג עַל־יְהוָה וְיִתֶּן־לְךָ מִשְׁאֲלֹת לִבֶּךָ׃
englishText: So shalt thou delight thyself in the LORD; and He shall give thee the petitions of thy heart.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גּוֹל עַל־יְהוָה דַּרְכֶּךָ וּבְטַח עָלָיו וְהוּא יַעֲשֶׂה׃
englishText: Commit thy way unto the LORD; trust also in Him, and He will bring it to pass.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְהוֹצִיא כָאוֹר צִדְקֶךָ וּמִשְׁפָּטֶךָ כַּצָּהֳרָיִם׃
englishText: And He will make thy righteousness to go forth as the light, and thy right as the noonday.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: דּוֹם לַיהוָה וְהִתְחוֹלֵל לוֹ אַל־תִּתְחַר בְּמַצְלִיחַ דַּרְכּוֹ בְּאִישׁ עֹשֶׂה מְזִמּוֹת׃
englishText: Resign thyself unto the LORD, and wait patiently for Him; fret not thyself because of him who prospereth in his way, because of the man who bringeth wicked devices to pass.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֶרֶף מֵאַף וַעֲזֹב חֵמָה אַל־תִּתְחַר אַךְ־לְהָרֵעַ׃
englishText: Cease from anger, and forsake wrath; fret not thyself, it tendeth only to evil-doing.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־מְרֵעִים יִכָּרֵתוּן וְקֹוֵי יְהוָה הֵמָּה יִירְשׁוּ־אָרֶץ׃
englishText: For evil-doers shall be cut off; but those that wait for the LORD, they shall inherit the land.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְעוֹד מְעַט וְאֵין רָשָׁע וְהִתְבּוֹנַנְתָּ עַל־מְקוֹמוֹ וְאֵינֶנּוּ׃
englishText: And yet a little while, and the wicked is no more; yea, thou shalt look well at his place, and he is not.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַעֲנָוִים יִירְשׁוּ־אָרֶץ וְהִתְעַנְּגוּ עַל־רֹב שָׁלוֹם׃
englishText: But the humble shall inherit the land, and delight themselves in the abundance of peace.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זֹמֵם רָשָׁע לַצַּדִּיק וְחֹרֵק עָלָיו שִׁנָּיו׃
englishText: The wicked plotteth against the righteous, and gnasheth at him with his teeth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲדֹנָי יִשְׂחַק־לוֹ כִּי־רָאָה כִּי־יָבֹא יוֹמוֹ׃
englishText: The Lord doth laugh at him; for He seeth that his day is coming.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חֶרֶב פָּתְחוּ רְשָׁעִים וְדָרְכוּ קַשְׁתָּם לְהַפִּיל עָנִי וְאֶבְיוֹן לִטְבוֹחַ יִשְׁרֵי־דָרֶךְ׃
englishText: The wicked have drawn out the sword, and have bent their bow; to cast down the poor and needy, to slay such as are upright in the way;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חַרְבָּם תָּבוֹא בְלִבָּם וְקַשְּׁתוֹתָם תִּשָּׁבַרְנָה׃
englishText: Their sword shall enter into their own heart, and their bows shall be broken.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: טוֹב־מְעַט לַצַּדִּיק מֵהֲמוֹן רְשָׁעִים רַבִּים׃
englishText: Better is a little that the righteous hath than the abundance of many wicked.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי זְרוֹעוֹת רְשָׁעִים תִּשָּׁבַרְנָה וְסוֹמֵךְ צַדִּיקִים יְהוָה׃
englishText: For the arms of the wicked shall be broken; but the LORD upholdeth the righteous.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יוֹדֵעַ יְהוָה יְמֵי תְמִימִם וְנַחֲלָתָם לְעוֹלָם תִּהְיֶה׃
englishText: The LORD knoweth the days of them that are wholehearted; and their inheritance shall be for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא־יֵבֹשׁוּ בְּעֵת רָעָה וּבִימֵי רְעָבוֹן יִשְׂבָּעוּ׃
englishText: They shall not be ashamed in the time of evil; and in the days of famine they shall be satisfied.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי רְשָׁעִים יֹאבֵדוּ וְאֹיְבֵי יְהוָה כִּיקַר כָּרִים כָּלוּ בֶעָשָׁן כָּלוּ׃
englishText: For the wicked shall perish, and the enemies of the LORD shall be as the fat of lambs— They shall pass away in smoke, they shall pass away.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹוֶה רָשָׁע וְלֹא יְשַׁלֵּם וְצַדִּיק חוֹנֵן וְנוֹתֵן׃
englishText: The wicked borroweth, and payeth not; but the righteous dealeth graciously, and giveth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי מְבֹרָכָיו יִירְשׁוּ אָרֶץ וּמְקֻלָּלָיו יִכָּרֵתוּ׃
englishText: For such as are blessed of Him shall inherit the land; and they that are cursed of Him shall be cut off.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מֵיְהוָה מִצְעֲדֵי־גֶבֶר כּוֹנָנוּ וְדַרְכּוֹ יֶחְפָּץ׃
englishText: It is of the LORD that a man's goings are established; and He delighted in his way.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־יִפֹּל לֹא־יוּטָל כִּי־יְהוָה סוֹמֵךְ יָדוֹ׃
englishText: Though he fall, he shall not be utterly cast down; for the LORD upholdeth his hand.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נַעַר הָיִיתִי גַּם־זָקַנְתִּי וְלֹא־רָאִיתִי צַדִּיק נֶעֱזָב וְזַרְעוֹ מְבַקֶּשׁ־לָחֶם׃
englishText: I have been young, and now am old; yet have I not seen the righteous forsaken, nor his seed begging bread.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כָּל־הַיּוֹם חוֹנֵן וּמַלְוֶה וְזַרְעוֹ לִבְרָכָה׃
englishText: All the day long he dealeth graciously, and lendeth; and his seed is blessed.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: סוּר מֵרָע וַעֲשֵׂה־טוֹב וּשְׁכֹן לְעוֹלָם׃
englishText: Depart from evil, and do good; and dwell for evermore.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי יְהוָה אֹהֵב מִשְׁפָּט וְלֹא־יַעֲזֹב אֶת־חֲסִידָיו לְעוֹלָם נִשְׁמָרוּ וְזֶרַע רְשָׁעִים נִכְרָת׃
englishText: For the LORD loveth justice, And forsaketh not His saints; they are preserved for ever; but the seed of the wicked shall be cut off.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: צַדִּיקִים יִירְשׁוּ־אָרֶץ וְיִשְׁכְּנוּ לָעַד עָלֶיהָ׃
englishText: The righteous shall inherit the land, and dwell therein for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פִּי־צַדִּיק יֶהְגֶּה חָכְמָה וּלְשׁוֹנוֹ תְּדַבֵּר מִשְׁפָּט׃
englishText: The mouth of the righteous uttereth wisdom, and his tongue speaketh justice.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תּוֹרַת אֱלֹהָיו בְּלִבּוֹ לֹא תִמְעַד אֲשֻׁרָיו׃
englishText: The law of his God is in his heart; none of his steps slide.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: צוֹפֶה רָשָׁע לַצַּדִּיק וּמְבַקֵּשׁ לַהֲמִיתוֹ׃
englishText: The wicked watcheth the righteous, and seeketh to slay him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה לֹא־יַעַזְבֶנּוּ בְיָדוֹ וְלֹא יַרְשִׁיעֶנּוּ בְּהִשָּׁפְטוֹ׃
englishText: The LORD will not leave him in his hand, nor suffer him to be condemned when he is judged.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קַוֵּה אֶל־יְהוָה וּשְׁמֹר דַּרְכּוֹ וִירוֹמִמְךָ לָרֶשֶׁת אָרֶץ בְּהִכָּרֵת רְשָׁעִים תִּרְאֶה׃
englishText: Wait for the LORD, and keep His way, and He will exalt thee to inherit the land; when the wicked are cut off, thou shalt see it.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רָאִיתִי רָשָׁע עָרִיץ וּמִתְעָרֶה כְּאֶזְרָח רַעֲנָן׃
englishText: I have seen the wicked in great power, and spreading himself like a leafy tree in its native soil.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּעֲבֹר וְהִנֵּה אֵינֶנּוּ וָאֲבַקְשֵׁהוּ וְלֹא נִמְצָא׃
englishText: But one passed by, and, lo, he was not; yea, I sought him, but he could not be found.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שְׁמָר־תָּם וּרְאֵה יָשָׁר כִּי־אַחֲרִית לְאִישׁ שָׁלוֹם׃
englishText: Mark the man of integrity, and behold the upright; for there is a future for the man of peace.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּפֹשְׁעִים נִשְׁמְדוּ יַחְדָּו אַחֲרִית רְשָׁעִים נִכְרָתָה׃
englishText: But transgressors shall be destroyed together; the future of the wicked shall be cut off.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּתְשׁוּעַת צַדִּיקִים מֵיְהוָה מָעוּזָּם בְּעֵת צָרָה׃
englishText: But the salvation of the righteous is of the LORD; He is their stronghold in the time of trouble.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּעְזְרֵם יְהוָה וַיְפַלְּטֵם יְפַלְּטֵם מֵרְשָׁעִים וְיוֹשִׁיעֵם כִּי־חָסוּ בוֹ׃
englishText: And the LORD helpeth them, and delivereth them; He delivereth them from the wicked, and saveth them, because they have taken refuge in Him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִזְמוֹר לְדָוִד לְהַזְכִּיר׃
englishText: A Psalm of David, to make memorial.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה אַל־בְּקֶצְפְּךָ תוֹכִיחֵנִי וּבַחֲמָתְךָ תְיַסְּרֵנִי׃
englishText: O LORD, rebuke me not in Thine anger; neither chasten me in Thy wrath.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־חִצֶּיךָ נִחֲתוּ בִי וַתִּנְחַת עָלַי יָדֶךָ׃
englishText: For Thine arrows are gone deep into me, and Thy hand is come down upon me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֵין־מְתֹם בִּבְשָׂרִי מִפְּנֵי זַעְמֶךָ אֵין־שָׁלוֹם בַּעֲצָמַי מִפְּנֵי חַטָּאתִי׃
englishText: There is no soundness in my flesh because of Thine indignation; neither is there any health in my bones because of my sin.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי עֲוֺנֹתַי עָבְרוּ רֹאשִׁי כְּמַשָּׂא כָבֵד יִכְבְּדוּ מִמֶּנִּי׃
englishText: For mine iniquities are gone over my head; as a heavy burden they are too heavy for me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הִבְאִישׁוּ נָמַקּוּ חַבּוּרֹתָי מִפְּנֵי אִוַּלְתִּי׃
englishText: My wounds are noisome, they fester, because of my foolishness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נַעֲוֵיתִי שַׁחֹתִי עַד־מְאֹד כָּל־הַיּוֹם קֹדֵר הִלָּכְתִּי׃
englishText: I am bent and bowed down greatly; I go mourning all the day.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־כְסָלַי מָלְאוּ נִקְלֶה וְאֵין מְתֹם בִּבְשָׂרִי׃
englishText: For my loins are filled with burning; and there is no soundness in my flesh.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נְפוּגוֹתִי וְנִדְכֵּיתִי עַד־מְאֹד שָׁאַגְתִּי מִנַּהֲמַת לִבִּי׃
englishText: I am benumbed and sore crushed; I groan by reason of the moaning of my heart.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲ‍דֹנָי נֶגְדְּךָ כָל־תַּאֲוָתִי וְאַנְחָתִי מִמְּךָ לֹא־נִסְתָּרָה׃
englishText: Lord, all my desire is before Thee; and my sighing is not hid from Thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לִבִּי סְחַרְחַר עֲזָבַנִי כֹחִי וְאוֹר־עֵינַי גַּם־הֵם אֵין אִתִּי׃
englishText: My heart fluttereth, my strength faileth me; as for the light of mine eyes, it also is gone from me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֹהֲבַי וְרֵעַי מִנֶּגֶד נִגְעִי יַעֲמֹדוּ וּקְרוֹבַי מֵרָחֹק עָמָדוּ׃
englishText: My friends and my companions stand aloof from my plague; and my kinsmen stand afar off.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיְנַקְשׁוּ מְבַקְשֵׁי נַפְשִׁי וְדֹרְשֵׁי רָעָתִי דִּבְּרוּ הַוּוֹת וּמִרְמוֹת כָּל־הַיּוֹם יֶהְגּוּ׃
englishText: They also that seek after my life lay snares for me; and they that seek my hurt speak crafty devices, and utter deceits all the day.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַאֲנִי כְחֵרֵשׁ לֹא אֶשְׁמָע וּכְאִלֵּם לֹא יִפְתַּח־פִּיו׃
englishText: But I am as a deaf man, I hear not; and I am as a dumb man that openeth not his mouth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וָאֱהִי כְּאִישׁ אֲשֶׁר לֹא־שֹׁמֵעַ וְאֵין בְּפִיו תּוֹכָחוֹת׃
englishText: Yea, I am become as a man that heareth not, and in whose mouth are no arguments.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־לְךָ יְהוָה הוֹחָלְתִּי אַתָּה תַעֲנֶה אֲדֹנָי אֱלֹהָי׃
englishText: For in Thee, O LORD, do I hope; Thou wilt answer, O Lord my God.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־אָמַרְתִּי פֶּן־יִשְׂמְחוּ־לִי בְּמוֹט רַגְלִי עָלַי הִגְדִּילוּ׃
englishText: For I said: 'Lest they rejoice over me; when my foot slippeth, they magnify themselves against me.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־אֲנִי לְצֶלַע נָכוֹן וּמַכְאוֹבִי נֶגְדִּי תָמִיד׃
englishText: For I am ready to halt, and my pain is continually before me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־עֲוֺנִי אַגִּיד אֶדְאַג מֵחַטָּאתִי׃
englishText: For I do declare mine iniquity; I am full of care because of my sin.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֹיְבַי חַיִּים עָצֵמוּ וְרַבּוּ שֹׂנְאַי שָׁקֶר׃
englishText: But mine enemies are strong in health; and they that hate me wrongfully are multiplied.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמְשַׁלְּמֵי רָעָה תַּחַת טוֹבָה יִשְׂטְנוּנִי תַּחַת רדופי־[רָדְפִי־] טוֹב׃
englishText: They also that repay evil for good are adversaries unto me, because I follow the thing that is good.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תַּעַזְבֵנִי יְהוָה אֱלֹהַי אַל־תִּרְחַק מִמֶּנִּי׃
englishText: Forsake me not, O LORD; O my God, be not far from me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חוּשָׁה לְעֶזְרָתִי אֲדֹנָי תְּשׁוּעָתִי׃
englishText: Make haste to help me, O Lord, my salvation.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ לידיתון [לִידוּתוּן] מִזְמוֹר לְדָוִד׃
englishText: For the Leader, for Jeduthun. A Psalm of David.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָמַרְתִּי אֶשְׁמְרָה דְרָכַי מֵחֲטוֹא בִלְשׁוֹנִי אֶשְׁמְרָה לְפִי מַחְסוֹם בְּעֹד רָשָׁע לְנֶגְדִּי׃
englishText: I said: 'I will take heed to my ways, that I sin not with my tongue; I will keep a curb upon my mouth, while the wicked is before me.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נֶאֱלַמְתִּי דוּמִיָּה הֶחֱשֵׁיתִי מִטּוֹב וּכְאֵבִי נֶעְכָּר׃
englishText: I was dumb with silence; I held my peace, had no comfort; and my pain was held in check.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חַם־לִבִּי בְּקִרְבִּי בַּהֲגִיגִי תִבְעַר־אֵשׁ דִּבַּרְתִּי בִּלְשׁוֹנִי׃
englishText: My heart waxed hot within me; while I was musing, the fire kindled; Then spoke I with my tongue:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הוֹדִיעֵנִי יְהוָה קִצִּי וּמִדַּת יָמַי מַה־הִיא אֵדְעָה מֶה־חָדֵל אָנִי׃
englishText: 'LORD, make me to know mine end, And the measure of my days, what it is; Let me know how short-lived I am.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הִנֵּה טְפָחוֹת נָתַתָּה יָמַי וְחֶלְדִּי כְאַיִן נֶגְדֶּךָ אַךְ כָּל־הֶבֶל כָּל־אָדָם נִצָּב סֶלָה׃
englishText: Behold, Thou hast made my days as hand-breadths; and mine age is as nothing before Thee; surely every man at his best estate is altogether vanity. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַךְ־בְּצֶלֶם יִתְהַלֶּךְ־אִישׁ אַךְ־הֶבֶל יֶהֱמָיוּן יִצְבֹּר וְלֹא־יֵדַע מִי־אֹסְפָם׃
englishText: Surely man walketh as a mere semblance; surely for vanity they are in turmoil; He heapeth up riches, and knoweth not who shall gather them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְעַתָּה מַה־קִּוִּיתִי אֲדֹנָי תּוֹחַלְתִּי לְךָ הִיא׃
englishText: And now, Lord, what wait I for? My hope, it is in Thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִכָּל־פְּשָׁעַי הַצִּילֵנִי חֶרְפַּת נָבָל אַל־תְּשִׂימֵנִי׃
englishText: Deliver me from all my transgressions; make me not the reproach of the base.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נֶאֱלַמְתִּי לֹא אֶפְתַּח־פִּי כִּי אַתָּה עָשִׂיתָ׃
englishText: I am dumb, I open not my mouth; because Thou hast done it.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הָסֵר מֵעָלַי נִגְעֶךָ מִתִּגְרַת יָדְךָ אֲנִי כָלִיתִי׃
englishText: Remove Thy stroke from off me; I am consumed by the blow of Thy hand.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּתוֹכָחוֹת עַל־עָוֺן יִסַּרְתָּ אִישׁ וַתֶּמֶס כָּעָשׁ חֲמוּדוֹ אַךְ הֶבֶל כָּל־אָדָם סֶלָה׃
englishText: With rebukes dost Thou chasten man for iniquity, and like a moth Thou makest his beauty to consume away; surely every man is vanity. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׁמְעָה־תְפִלָּתִי יְהוָה וְשַׁוְעָתִי הַאֲזִינָה אֶל־דִּמְעָתִי אַל־תֶּחֱרַשׁ כִּי גֵר אָנֹכִי עִמָּךְ תּוֹשָׁב כְּכָל־אֲבוֹתָי׃
englishText: Hear my prayer, O LORD, and give ear unto my cry; keep not silence at my tears; for I am a stranger with Thee, a sojourner, as all my fathers were.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הָשַׁע מִמֶּנִּי וְאַבְלִיגָה בְּטֶרֶם אֵלֵךְ וְאֵינֶנִּי׃
englishText: Look away from me, that I may take comfort, before I go hence, and be no more.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ לְדָוִד מִזְמוֹר׃
englishText: For the Leader. A Psalm of David.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קַוֺּה קִוִּיתִי יְהוָה וַיֵּט אֵלַי וַיִּשְׁמַע שַׁוְעָתִי׃
englishText: I waited patiently for the LORD; and He inclined unto me, and heard my cry.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּעֲלֵנִי מִבּוֹר שָׁאוֹן מִטִּיט הַיָּוֵן וַיָּקֶם עַל־סֶלַע רַגְלַי כּוֹנֵן אֲשֻׁרָי׃
englishText: He brought me up also out of the tumultuous pit, out of the miry clay; and He set my feet upon a rock, He established my goings.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּתֵּן בְּפִי שִׁיר חָדָשׁ תְּהִלָּה לֵאלֹהֵינוּ יִרְאוּ רַבִּים וְיִירָאוּ וְיִבְטְחוּ בַּיהוָה׃
englishText: And He hath put a new song in my mouth, even praise unto our God; many shall see, and fear, and shall trust in the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַשְׁרֵי הַגֶּבֶר אֲשֶׁר־שָׂם יְהֹוָה מִבְטַחוֹ וְלֹא־פָנָה אֶל־רְהָבִים וְשָׂטֵי כָזָב׃
englishText: Happy is the man that hath made the LORD his trust, and hath not turned unto the arrogant, nor unto such as fall away treacherously.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רַבּוֹת עָשִׂיתָ אַתָּה יְהוָה אֱלֹהַי נִפְלְאֹתֶיךָ וּמַחְשְׁבֹתֶיךָ אֵלֵינוּ אֵין עֲרֹךְ אֵלֶיךָ אַגִּידָה וַאֲדַבֵּרָה עָצְמוּ מִסַּפֵּר׃
englishText: Many things hast Thou done, O LORD my God, even Thy wonderful works, and Thy thoughts toward us; there is none to be compared unto Thee! If I would declare and speak of them, they are more than can be told.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זֶבַח וּמִנְחָה לֹא־חָפַצְתָּ אָזְנַיִם כָּרִיתָ לִּי עוֹלָה וַחֲטָאָה לֹא שָׁאָלְתָּ׃
englishText: Sacrifice and meal-offering Thou hast no delight in; mine ears hast Thou opened; burnt-offering and sin-offering hast Thou not required.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָז אָמַרְתִּי הִנֵּה־בָאתִי בִּמְגִלַּת־סֵפֶר כָּתוּב עָלָי׃
englishText: Then said I: 'Lo, I am come with the roll of a book which is prescribed for me;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַעֲשׂוֹת־רְצוֹנְךָ אֱלֹהַי חָפָצְתִּי וְתוֹרָתְךָ בְּתוֹךְ מֵעָי׃
englishText: I delight to do Thy will, O my God; yea, Thy law is in my inmost parts.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בִּשַּׂרְתִּי צֶדֶק בְּקָהָל רָב הִנֵּה שְׂפָתַי לֹא אֶכְלָא יְהוָה אַתָּה יָדָעְתָּ׃
englishText: I have preached righteousness in the great congregation, Lo, I did not refrain my lips; O LORD, Thou knowest.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: צִדְקָתְךָ לֹא־כִסִּיתִי בְּתוֹךְ לִבִּי אֱמוּנָתְךָ וּתְשׁוּעָתְךָ אָמָרְתִּי לֹא־כִחַדְתִּי חַסְדְּךָ וַאֲמִתְּךָ לְקָהָל רָב׃
englishText: I have not hid Thy righteousness within my heart; I have declared Thy faithfulness and Thy salvation; I have not concealed Thy mercy and Thy truth from the great congregation.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַתָּה יְהוָה לֹא־תִכְלָא רַחֲמֶיךָ מִמֶּנִּי חַסְדְּךָ וַאֲמִתְּךָ תָּמִיד יִצְּרוּנִי׃
englishText: Thou, O LORD, wilt not withhold Thy compassions from me; let Thy mercy and Thy truth continually preserve me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי אָפְפוּ־עָלַי רָעוֹת עַד־אֵין מִסְפָּר הִשִּׂיגוּנִי עֲוֺנֹתַי וְלֹא־יָכֹלְתִּי לִרְאוֹת עָצְמוּ מִשַּׂעֲרוֹת רֹאשִׁי וְלִבִּי עֲזָבָנִי׃
englishText: For innumerable evils have compassed me about, mine iniquities have overtaken me, so that I am not able to look up; they are more than the hairs of my head, and my heart hath failed me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רְצֵה יְהוָה לְהַצִּילֵנִי יְהוָה לְעֶזְרָתִי חוּשָׁה׃
englishText: Be pleased, O LORD, to deliver me; O LORD, make haste to help me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יֵבֹשׁוּ וְיַחְפְּרוּ יַחַד מְבַקְשֵׁי נַפְשִׁי לִסְפּוֹתָהּ יִסֹּגוּ אָחוֹר וְיִכָּלְמוּ חֲפֵצֵי רָעָתִי׃
englishText: Let them be ashamed and abashed together that seek after my soul to sweep it away; let them be turned backward and brought to confusion that delight in my hurt.
