versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָשֹׁמּוּ עַל־עֵקֶב בָּשְׁתָּם הָאֹמְרִים לִי הֶאָח הֶאָח׃
englishText: Let them be appalled by reason of their shame that say unto me: 'Aha, aha.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָשִׂישׂוּ וְיִשְׂמְחוּ בְּךָ כָּל־מְבַקְשֶׁיךָ יֹאמְרוּ תָמִיד יִגְדַּל יְהוָה אֹהֲבֵי תְּשׁוּעָתֶךָ׃
englishText: Let all those that seek Thee rejoice and be glad in Thee; let such as love Thy salvation say continually: 'The LORD be magnified.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַאֲנִי עָנִי וְאֶבְיוֹן אֲדֹנָי יַחֲשָׁב לִי עֶזְרָתִי וּמְפַלְטִי אַתָּה אֱלֹהַי אַל־תְּאַחַר׃
englishText: But, as for me, that am poor and needy, the Lord will account it unto me; Thou art my help and my deliverer; O my God, tarry not.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ מִזְמוֹר לְדָוִד׃
englishText: For the Leader. A Psalm of David.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַשְׁרֵי מַשְׂכִּיל אֶל־דָּל בְּיוֹם רָעָה יְמַלְּטֵהוּ יְהוָה׃
englishText: Happy is he that considereth the poor; the LORD will deliver him in the day of evil.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה יִשְׁמְרֵהוּ וִיחַיֵּהוּ יאשר [וְאֻשַּׁר] בָּאָרֶץ וְאַל־תִּתְּנֵהוּ בְּנֶפֶשׁ אֹיְבָיו׃
englishText: The LORD preserve him, and keep him alive, let him be called happy in the land; and deliver not Thou him unto the greed of his enemies.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה יִסְעָדֶנּוּ עַל־עֶרֶשׂ דְּוָי כָּל־מִשְׁכָּבוֹ הָפַכְתָּ בְחָלְיוֹ׃
englishText: The LORD support him upon the bed of illness; mayest Thou turn all his lying down in his sickness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲ‍נִי־אָמַרְתִּי יְהוָה חָנֵּנִי רְפָאָה נַפְשִׁי כִּי־חָטָאתִי לָךְ׃
englishText: As for me, I said: 'O LORD, be gracious unto me; heal my soul; for I have sinned against Thee.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אוֹיְבַי יֹאמְרוּ רַע לִי מָתַי יָמוּת וְאָבַד שְׁמוֹ׃
englishText: Mine enemies speak evil of me: 'When shall he die, and his name perish?'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאִם־בָּא לִרְאוֹת שָׁוְא יְדַבֵּר לִבּוֹ יִקְבָּץ־אָוֶן לוֹ יֵצֵא לַחוּץ יְדַבֵּר׃
englishText: And if one come to see me, he speaketh falsehood; His heart gathereth iniquity to itself; when he goeth abroad, he speaketh of it.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יַחַד עָלַי יִתְלַחֲשׁוּ כָּל־שֹׂנְאָי עָלַי יַחְשְׁבוּ רָעָה לִי׃
englishText: All that hate me whisper together against me, against me do they devise my hurt:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: דְּבַר־בְּלִיַּעַל יָצוּק בּוֹ וַאֲשֶׁר שָׁכַב לֹא־יוֹסִיף לָקוּם׃
englishText: 'An evil thing cleaveth fast unto him; and now that he lieth, he shall rise up no more.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גַּם־אִישׁ שְׁלוֹמִי אֲשֶׁר־בָּטַחְתִּי בוֹ אוֹכֵל לַחְמִי הִגְדִּיל עָלַי עָקֵב׃
englishText: Yea, mine own familiar friend, in whom I trusted, who did eat of my bread, Hath lifted up his heel against me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאַתָּה יְהוָה חָנֵּנִי וַהֲקִימֵנִי וַאֲשַׁלְּמָה לָהֶם׃
englishText: But Thou, O LORD, be gracious unto me, and raise me up, that I may requite them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּזֹאת יָדַעְתִּי כִּי־חָפַצְתָּ בִּי כִּי לֹא־יָרִיעַ אֹיְבִי עָלָי׃
englishText: By this I know that Thou delightest in me, that mine enemy doth not triumph over me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַאֲנִי בְּתֻמִּי תָּמַכְתָּ בִּי וַתַּצִּיבֵנִי לְפָנֶיךָ לְעוֹלָם׃
englishText: And as for me, Thou upholdest me because of mine integrity, and settest me before Thy face for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בָּרוּךְ יְהוָה אֱלֹהֵי יִשְׂרָאֵל מֵהָעוֹלָם וְעַד הָעוֹלָם אָמֵן וְאָמֵן׃
englishText: Blessed be the LORD, the God of Israel, from everlasting and to everlasting. Amen, and Amen.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ מַשְׂכִּיל לִבְנֵי־קֹרַח׃
englishText: For the Leader; Maschil of the sons of Korah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כְּאַיָּל תַּעֲרֹג עַל־אֲפִיקֵי־מָיִם כֵּן נַפְשִׁי תַעֲרֹג אֵלֶיךָ אֱלֹהִים׃
englishText: As the hart panteth after the water brooks, so panteth my soul after Thee, O God.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: צָמְאָה נַפְשִׁי לֵאלֹהִים לְאֵל חָי מָתַי אָבוֹא וְאֵרָאֶה פְּנֵי אֱלֹהִים׃
englishText: My soul thirsteth for God, for the living God: 'When shall I come and appear before God?'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הָיְתָה־לִּי דִמְעָתִי לֶחֶם יוֹמָם וָלָיְלָה בֶּאֱמֹר אֵלַי כָּל־הַיּוֹם אַיֵּה אֱלֹהֶיךָ׃
englishText: My tears have been my food day and night, while they say unto me all the day: 'Where is Thy God?'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֵלֶּה אֶזְכְּרָה וְאֶשְׁפְּכָה עָלַי נַפְשִׁי כִּי אֶעֱבֹר בַּסָּךְ אֶדַּדֵּם עַד־בֵּית אֱלֹהִים בְּקוֹל־רִנָּה וְתוֹדָה הָמוֹן חוֹגֵג׃
englishText: These things I remember, and pour out my soul within me, how I passed on with the throng, and led them to the house of God, with the voice of joy and praise, a multitude keeping holyday.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַה־תִּשְׁתּוֹחֲחִי נַפְשִׁי וַתֶּהֱמִי עָלָי הוֹחִילִי לֵאלֹהִים כִּי־עוֹד אוֹדֶנּוּ יְשׁוּעוֹת פָּנָיו׃
englishText: Why art thou cast down, O my soul? And why moanest thou within me? Hope thou in God; for I shall yet praise Him for the salvation of His countenance.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱ‍לֹהַי עָלַי נַפְשִׁי תִשְׁתּוֹחָח עַל־כֵּן אֶזְכָּרְךָ מֵאֶרֶץ יַרְדֵּן וְחֶרְמוֹנִים מֵהַר מִצְעָר׃
englishText: O my God, my soul is cast down within me; therefore do I remember Thee from the land of Jordan, and the Hermons, from the hill Mizar.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תְּהוֹם־אֶל־תְּהוֹם קוֹרֵא לְקוֹל צִנּוֹרֶיךָ כָּל־מִשְׁבָּרֶיךָ וְגַלֶּיךָ עָלַי עָבָרוּ׃
englishText: Deep calleth unto deep at the voice of Thy cataracts; all Thy waves and Thy billows are gone over me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יוֹמָם יְצַוֶּה יְהוָה חַסְדּוֹ וּבַלַּיְלָה שירה [שִׁירוֹ] עִמִּי תְּפִלָּה לְאֵל חַיָּי׃
englishText: By day the LORD will command His lovingkindness, and in the night His song shall be with me, even a prayer unto the God of my life.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אוֹמְרָה לְאֵל סַלְעִי לָמָה שְׁכַחְתָּנִי לָמָּה־קֹדֵר אֵלֵךְ בְּלַחַץ אוֹיֵב׃
englishText: I will say unto God my Rock: 'Why hast Thou forgotten me? Why go I mourning under the oppression of the enemy?'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּרֶצַח בְּעַצְמוֹתַי חֵרְפוּנִי צוֹרְרָי בְּאָמְרָם אֵלַי כָּל־הַיּוֹם אַיֵּה אֱלֹהֶיךָ׃
englishText: As with a crushing in my bones, mine adversaries taunt me; while they say unto me all the day: 'Where is Thy God?'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַה־תִּשְׁתּוֹחֲחִי נַפְשִׁי וּמַה־תֶּהֱמִי עָלָי הוֹחִילִי לֵאלֹהִים כִּי־עוֹד אוֹדֶנּוּ יְשׁוּעֹת פָּנַי וֵאלֹהָי׃
englishText: Why art thou cast down, O my soul? And why moanest thou within me? Hope thou in God; for I shall yet praise Him, the salvation of my countenance, and my God.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׁפְטֵנִי אֱלֹהִים וְרִיבָה רִיבִי מִגּוֹי לֹא־חָסִיד מֵאִישׁ־מִרְמָה וְעַוְלָה תְפַלְּטֵנִי׃
englishText: Be Thou my judge, O God, and plead my cause against an ungodly nation; O deliver me from the deceitful and unjust man.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־אַתָּה אֱלֹהֵי מָעוּזִּי לָמָה זְנַחְתָּנִי לָמָּה־קֹדֵר אֶתְהַלֵּךְ בְּלַחַץ אוֹיֵב׃
englishText: For Thou art the God of my strength; why hast Thou cast me off? Why go I mourning under the oppression of the enemy?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שְׁלַח־אוֹרְךָ וַאֲמִתְּךָ הֵמָּה יַנְחוּנִי יְבִיאוּנִי אֶל־הַר־קָדְשְׁךָ וְאֶל־מִשְׁכְּנוֹתֶיךָ׃
englishText: O send out Thy light and Thy truth; let them lead me; Let them bring me unto Thy holy mountain, and to Thy dwelling-places.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאָבוֹאָה אֶל־מִזְבַּח אֱלֹהִים אֶל־אֵל שִׂמְחַת גִּילִי וְאוֹדְךָ בְכִנּוֹר אֱלֹהִים אֱלֹהָי׃
englishText: Then will I go unto the altar of God, unto God, my exceeding joy; And praise Thee upon the harp, O God, my God.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַה־תִּשְׁתּוֹחֲחִי נַפְשִׁי וּמַה־תֶּהֱמִי עָלָי הוֹחִילִי לֵאלֹהִים כִּי־עוֹד אוֹדֶנּוּ יְשׁוּעֹת פָּנַי וֵאלֹהָי׃
englishText: Why art thou cast down, O my soul? And why moanest thou within me? Hope thou in God; for I shall yet praise Him, The salvation of my countenance, and my God.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ לִבְנֵי־קֹרַח מַשְׂכִּיל׃
englishText: For the Leader; [a Psalm] of the sons of Korah. Maschil.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱלֹהִים בְּאָזְנֵינוּ שָׁמַעְנוּ אֲבוֹתֵינוּ סִפְּרוּ־לָנוּ פֹּעַל פָּעַלְתָּ בִימֵיהֶם בִּימֵי קֶדֶם׃
englishText: O God, we have heard with our ears, our fathers have told us; a work Thou didst in their days, in the days of old.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַתָּה יָדְךָ גּוֹיִם הוֹרַשְׁתָּ וַתִּטָּעֵם תָּרַע לְאֻמִּים וַתְּשַׁלְּחֵם׃
englishText: Thou with Thy hand didst drive out the nations, and didst plant them in; Thou didst break the peoples, and didst spread them abroad.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי לֹא בְחַרְבָּם יָרְשׁוּ אָרֶץ וּזְרוֹעָם לֹא־הוֹשִׁיעָה לָּמוֹ כִּי־יְמִינְךָ וּזְרוֹעֲךָ וְאוֹר פָּנֶיךָ כִּי רְצִיתָם׃
englishText: For not by their own sword did they get the land in possession, Neither did their own arm save them; but Thy right hand, and Thine arm, and the light of Thy countenance, because Thou wast favourable unto them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַתָּה־הוּא מַלְכִּי אֱלֹהִים צַוֵּה יְשׁוּעוֹת יַעֲקֹב׃
englishText: Thou art my King, O God; command the salvation of Jacob.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּךָ צָרֵינוּ נְנַגֵּחַ בְּשִׁמְךָ נָבוּס קָמֵינוּ׃
englishText: Through Thee do we push down our adversaries; through Thy name do we tread them under that rise up against us.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי לֹא בְקַשְׁתִּי אֶבְטָח וְחַרְבִּי לֹא תוֹשִׁיעֵנִי׃
englishText: For I trust not in my bow, neither can my sword save me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי הוֹשַׁעְתָּנוּ מִצָּרֵינוּ וּמְשַׂנְאֵינוּ הֱבִישׁוֹתָ׃
englishText: But Thou hast saved us from our adversaries, and hast put them to shame that hate us.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בֵּאלֹהִים הִלַּלְנוּ כָל־הַיּוֹם וְשִׁמְךָ לְעוֹלָם נוֹדֶה סֶלָה׃
englishText: In God have we gloried all the day, and we will give thanks unto Thy name for ever. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַף־זָנַחְתָּ וַתַּכְלִימֵנוּ וְלֹא־תֵצֵא בְּצִבְאוֹתֵינוּ׃
englishText: Yet Thou hast cast off, and brought us to confusion; and goest not forth with our hosts.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תְּשִׁיבֵנוּ אָחוֹר מִנִּי־צָר וּמְשַׂנְאֵינוּ שָׁסוּ לָמוֹ׃
englishText: Thou makest us to turn back from the adversary; and they that hate us spoil at their will.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תִּתְּנֵנוּ כְּצֹאן מַאֲכָל וּבַגּוֹיִם זֵרִיתָנוּ׃
englishText: Thou hast given us like sheep to be eaten; and hast scattered us among the nations.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תִּמְכֹּר־עַמְּךָ בְלֹא־הוֹן וְלֹא־רִבִּיתָ בִּמְחִירֵיהֶם׃
englishText: Thou sellest Thy people for small gain, and hast not set their prices high.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תְּשִׂימֵנוּ חֶרְפָּה לִשְׁכֵנֵינוּ לַעַג וָקֶלֶס לִסְבִיבוֹתֵינוּ׃
englishText: Thou makest us a taunt to our neighbours, a scorn and a derision to them that are round about us.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תְּשִׂימֵנוּ מָשָׁל בַּגּוֹיִם מְנוֹד־רֹאשׁ בַּל־אֻמִּים׃
englishText: Thou makest us a byword among the nations, a shaking of the head among the peoples.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כָּל־הַיּוֹם כְּלִמָּתִי נֶגְדִּי וּבֹשֶׁת פָּנַי כִּסָּתְנִי׃
englishText: All the day is my confusion before me, and the shame of my face hath covered me,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִקּוֹל מְחָרֵף וּמְגַדֵּף מִפְּנֵי אוֹיֵב וּמִתְנַקֵּם׃
englishText: For the voice of him that taunteth and blasphemeth; by reason of the enemy and the revengeful.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כָּל־זֹאת בָּאַתְנוּ וְלֹא שְׁכַחֲנוּךָ וְלֹא־שִׁקַּרְנוּ בִּבְרִיתֶךָ׃
englishText: All this is come upon us; yet have we not forgotten Thee, neither have we been false to Thy covenant.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא־נָסוֹג אָחוֹר לִבֵּנוּ וַתֵּט אֲשֻׁרֵינוּ מִנִּי אָרְחֶךָ׃
englishText: Our heart is not turned back, neither have our steps declined from Thy path;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי דִכִּיתָנוּ בִּמְקוֹם תַּנִּים וַתְּכַס עָלֵינוּ בְצַלְמָוֶת׃
englishText: Though Thou hast crushed us into a place of jackals, and covered us with the shadow of death.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־שָׁכַחְנוּ שֵׁם אֱלֹהֵינוּ וַנִּפְרֹשׂ כַּפֵּינוּ לְאֵל זָר׃
englishText: If we had forgotten the name of our God, or spread forth our hands to a strange god; .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲלֹא אֱלֹהִים יַחֲקָר־זֹאת כִּי־הוּא יֹדֵעַ תַּעֲלֻמוֹת לֵב׃
englishText: Would not God search this out? For He knoweth the secrets of the heart.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־עָלֶיךָ הֹרַגְנוּ כָל־הַיּוֹם נֶחְשַׁבְנוּ כְּצֹאן טִבְחָה׃
englishText: Nay, but for Thy sake are we killed all the day; we are accounted as sheep for the slaughter.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עוּרָה לָמָּה תִישַׁן אֲדֹנָי הָקִיצָה אַל־תִּזְנַח לָנֶצַח׃
englishText: Awake, why sleepest Thou, O Lord? Arouse Thyself, cast not off for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לָמָּה־פָנֶיךָ תַסְתִּיר תִּשְׁכַּח עָנְיֵנוּ וְלַחֲצֵנוּ׃
englishText: Wherefore hidest Thou Thy face, and forgettest our affliction and our oppression?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי שָׁחָה לֶעָפָר נַפְשֵׁנוּ דָּבְקָה לָאָרֶץ בִּטְנֵנוּ׃
englishText: For our soul is bowed down to the dust; our belly cleaveth unto the earth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קוּמָה עֶזְרָתָה לָּנוּ וּפְדֵנוּ לְמַעַן חַסְדֶּךָ׃
englishText: Arise for our help, and redeem us for Thy mercy's sake.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ עַל־שֹׁשַׁנִּים לִבְנֵי־קֹרַח מַשְׂכִּיל שִׁיר יְדִידֹת׃
englishText: For the Leader; upon Shoshannim; [a Psalm] of the sons of Korah. Maschil. A Song of loves.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רָחַשׁ לִבִּי דָּבָר טוֹב אֹמֵר אָנִי מַעֲשַׂי לְמֶלֶךְ לְשׁוֹנִי עֵט סוֹפֵר מָהִיר׃
englishText: My heart overfloweth with a goodly matter; I say: 'My work is concerning a king'; My tongue is the pen of a ready writer.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָפְיָפִיתָ מִבְּנֵי אָדָם הוּצַק חֵן בְּשְׂפְתוֹתֶיךָ עַל־כֵּן בֵּרַכְךָ אֱלֹהִים לְעוֹלָם׃
englishText: Thou art fairer than the children of men; Grace is poured upon thy lips; Therefore God hath blessed thee for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חֲגוֹר־חַרְבְּךָ עַל־יָרֵךְ גִּבּוֹר הוֹדְךָ וַהֲדָרֶךָ׃
englishText: Gird thy sword upon thy thigh, O mighty one, Thy glory and thy majesty.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַהֲדָרְךָ צְלַח רְכַב עַל־דְּבַר־אֱמֶת וְעַנְוָה־צֶדֶק וְתוֹרְךָ נוֹרָאוֹת יְמִינֶךָ׃
englishText: And in thy majesty prosper, ride on, In behalf of truth and meekness and righteousness; And let thy right hand teach thee tremendous things.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חִצֶּיךָ שְׁנוּנִים עַמִּים תַּחְתֶּיךָ יִפְּלוּ בְּלֵב אוֹיְבֵי הַמֶּלֶךְ׃
englishText: Thine arrows are sharp— The peoples fall under thee— [They sink] into the heart of the king's enemies.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּסְאֲךָ אֱלֹהִים עוֹלָם וָעֶד שֵׁבֶט מִישֹׁר שֵׁבֶט מַלְכוּתֶךָ׃
englishText: Thy throne given of God is for ever and ever; A sceptre of equity is the sceptre of thy kingdom.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָהַבְתָּ צֶּדֶק וַתִּשְׂנָא רֶשַׁע עַל־כֵּן מְשָׁחֲךָ אֱלֹהִים אֱלֹהֶיךָ שֶׁמֶן שָׂשׂוֹן מֵחֲבֵרֶיךָ׃
englishText: Thou hast loved righteousness, and hated wickedness; Therefore God, thy God, hath anointed thee With the oil of gladness above thy fellows.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מֹר־וַאֲהָלוֹת קְצִיעוֹת כָּל־בִּגְדֹתֶיךָ מִן־הֵיכְלֵי שֵׁן מִנִּי שִׂמְּחוּךָ׃
englishText: Myrrh, and aloes, and cassia are all thy garments; Out of ivory palaces stringed instruments have made thee glad.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנוֹת מְלָכִים בְּיִקְּרוֹתֶיךָ נִצְּבָה שֵׁגַל לִימִינְךָ בְּכֶתֶם אוֹפִיר׃
englishText: Kings' daughters are among thy favourites; At thy right hand doth stand the queen in gold of Ophir.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׁמְעִי־בַת וּרְאִי וְהַטִּי אָזְנֵךְ וְשִׁכְחִי עַמֵּךְ וּבֵית אָבִיךְ׃
englishText: 'Hearken, O daughter, and consider, and incline thine ear; Forget also thine own people, and thy father's house;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְיִתְאָו הַמֶּלֶךְ יָפְיֵךְ כִּי־הוּא אֲדֹנַיִךְ וְהִשְׁתַּחֲוִי־לוֹ׃
englishText: So shall the king desire thy beauty; For he is thy lord; and do homage unto him. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבַת־צֹר בְּמִנְחָה פָּנַיִךְ יְחַלּוּ עֲשִׁירֵי עָם׃
englishText: And, O daughter of Tyre, the richest of the people Shall entreat thy favour with a gift.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כָּל־כְּבוּדָּה בַת־מֶלֶךְ פְּנִימָה מִמִּשְׁבְּצוֹת זָהָב לְבוּשָׁהּ׃
englishText: All glorious is the king's daughter within the palace; Her raiment is of chequer work inwrought with gold.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לִרְקָמוֹת תּוּבַל לַמֶּלֶךְ בְּתוּלוֹת אַחֲרֶיהָ רֵעוֹתֶיהָ מוּבָאוֹת לָךְ׃
englishText: She shall be led unto the king on richly woven stuff; The virgins her companions in her train being brought unto thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תּוּבַלְנָה בִּשְׂמָחֹת וָגִיל תְּבֹאֶינָה בְּהֵיכַל מֶלֶךְ׃
englishText: They shall be led with gladness and rejoicing; They shall enter into the king's palace.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תַּחַת אֲבֹתֶיךָ יִהְיוּ בָנֶיךָ תְּשִׁיתֵמוֹ לְשָׂרִים בְּכָל־הָאָרֶץ׃
englishText: Instead of thy fathers shall be thy sons, Whom thou shalt make princes in all the land.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַזְכִּירָה שִׁמְךָ בְּכָל־דֹּר וָדֹר עַל־כֵּן עַמִּים יְהוֹדֻךָ לְעֹלָם וָעֶד׃
englishText: I will make thy name to be remembered in all generations; Therefore shall the peoples praise thee for ever and ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ לִבְנֵי־קֹרַח עַל־עֲלָמוֹת שִׁיר׃
englishText: For the Leader; [a Psalm] of the sons of Korah; upon Alamoth. A Song.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱלֹהִים לָנוּ מַחֲסֶה וָעֹז עֶזְרָה בְצָרוֹת נִמְצָא מְאֹד׃
englishText: God is our refuge and strength, A very present help in trouble.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַל־כֵּן לֹא־נִירָא בְּהָמִיר אָרֶץ וּבְמוֹט הָרִים בְּלֵב יַמִּים׃
englishText: Therefore will we not fear, though the earth do change, And though the mountains be moved into the heart of the seas;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יֶהֱמוּ יֶחְמְרוּ מֵימָיו יִרְעֲשׁוּ־הָרִים בְּגַאֲוָתוֹ סֶלָה׃
englishText: Though the waters thereof roar and foam, Though the mountains shake at the swelling thereof. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נָהָר פְּלָגָיו יְשַׂמְּחוּ עִיר־אֱלֹהִים קְדֹשׁ מִשְׁכְּנֵי עֶלְיוֹן׃
englishText: There is a river, the streams whereof make glad the city of God, The holiest dwelling-place of the Most High.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱלֹהִים בְּקִרְבָּהּ בַּל־תִּמּוֹט יַעְזְרֶהָ אֱלֹהִים לִפְנוֹת בֹּקֶר׃
englishText: God is in the midst of her, she shall not be moved; God shall help her, at the approach of morning.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הָמוּ גוֹיִם מָטוּ מַמְלָכוֹת נָתַן בְּקוֹלוֹ תָּמוּג אָרֶץ׃
englishText: Nations were in tumult, kingdoms were moved; He uttered His voice, the earth melted.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה צְבָאוֹת עִמָּנוּ מִשְׂגָּב־לָנוּ אֱלֹהֵי יַעֲקֹב סֶלָה׃
englishText: The LORD of hosts is with us; The God of Jacob is our high tower. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְכוּ־חֲזוּ מִפְעֲלוֹת יְהוָה אֲשֶׁר־שָׂם שַׁמּוֹת בָּאָרֶץ׃
englishText: Come, behold the works of the LORD, Who hath made desolations in the earth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַשְׁבִּית מִלְחָמוֹת עַד־קְצֵה הָאָרֶץ קֶשֶׁת יְשַׁבֵּר וְקִצֵּץ חֲנִית עֲגָלוֹת יִשְׂרֹף בָּאֵשׁ׃
englishText: He maketh wars to cease unto the end of the earth; He breaketh the bow, and cutteth the spear in sunder; He burneth the chariots in the fire.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַרְפּוּ וּדְעוּ כִּי־אָנֹכִי אֱלֹהִים אָרוּם בַּגּוֹיִם אָרוּם בָּאָרֶץ׃
englishText: 'Let be, and know that I am God; I will be exalted among the nations, I will be exalted in the earth.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה צְבָאוֹת עִמָּנוּ מִשְׂגָּב־לָנוּ אֱלֹהֵי יַעֲקֹב סֶלָה׃
englishText: The LORD of hosts is with us; The God of Jacob is our high tower. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ לִבְנֵי־קֹרַח מִזְמוֹר׃
englishText: For the Leader; a Psalm for the sons of Korah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כָּל־הָעַמִּים תִּקְעוּ־כָף הָרִיעוּ לֵאלֹהִים בְּקוֹל רִנָּה׃
englishText: O clap your hands, all ye peoples; shout unto God with the voice of triumph. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־יְהוָה עֶלְיוֹן נוֹרָא מֶלֶךְ גָּדוֹל עַל־כָּל־הָאָרֶץ׃
englishText: For the LORD is most high, awful; a great King over all the earth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יַדְבֵּר עַמִּים תַּחְתֵּינוּ וּלְאֻמִּים תַּחַת רַגְלֵינוּ׃
englishText: He subdueth peoples under us, and nations under our feet.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִבְחַר־לָנוּ אֶת־נַחֲלָתֵנוּ אֶת גְּאוֹן יַעֲקֹב אֲשֶׁר־אָהֵב סֶלָה׃
englishText: He chooseth our inheritance for us, the pride of Jacob whom He loveth. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עָלָה אֱלֹהִים בִּתְרוּעָה יְהֹוָה בְּקוֹל שׁוֹפָר׃
englishText: God is gone up amidst shouting, the LORD amidst the sound of the horn.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זַמְּרוּ אֱלֹהִים זַמֵּרוּ זַמְּרוּ לְמַלְכֵּנוּ זַמֵּרוּ׃
englishText: Sing praises to God, sing praises; sing praises unto our King, sing praises.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי מֶלֶךְ כָּל־הָאָרֶץ אֱלֹהִים זַמְּרוּ מַשְׂכִּיל׃
englishText: For God is the King of all the earth; sing ye praises in a skilful song.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מָלַךְ אֱלֹהִים עַל־גּוֹיִם אֱלֹהִים יָשַׁב עַל־כִּסֵּא קָדְשׁוֹ׃
englishText: God reigneth over the nations; God sitteth upon His holy throne.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נְדִיבֵי עַמִּים נֶאֱסָפוּ עַם אֱלֹהֵי אַבְרָהָם כִּי לֵאלֹהִים מָגִנֵּי־אֶרֶץ מְאֹד נַעֲלָה׃
englishText: The princes of the peoples are gathered together, the people of the God of Abraham; for unto God belong the shields of the earth; He is greatly exalted.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׁיר מִזְמוֹר לִבְנֵי־קֹרַח׃
englishText: A Song; a Psalm of the sons of Korah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גָּדוֹל יְהוָה וּמְהֻלָּל מְאֹד בְּעִיר אֱלֹהֵינוּ הַר־קָדְשׁוֹ׃
englishText: Great is the LORD, and highly to be praised, In the city of our God, His holy mountain,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְפֵה נוֹף מְשׂוֹשׂ כָּל־הָאָרֶץ הַר־צִיּוֹן יַרְכְּתֵי צָפוֹן קִרְיַת מֶלֶךְ רָב׃
englishText: Fair in situation, the joy of the whole earth; Even mount Zion, the uttermost parts of the north, The city of the great King.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱלֹהִים בְּאַרְמְנוֹתֶיהָ נוֹדַע לְמִשְׂגָּב׃
englishText: God in her palaces Hath made Himself known for a stronghold.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־הִנֵּה הַמְּלָכִים נוֹעֲדוּ עָבְרוּ יַחְדָּו׃
englishText: For, lo, the kings assembled themselves, They came onward together.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֵמָּה רָאוּ כֵּן תָּמָהוּ נִבְהֲלוּ נֶחְפָּזוּ׃
englishText: They saw, straightway they were amazed; They were affrighted, they hasted away.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רְעָדָה אֲחָזָתַם שָׁם חִיל כַּיּוֹלֵדָה׃
englishText: Trembling took hold of them there, Pangs, as of a woman in travail.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּרוּחַ קָדִים תְּשַׁבֵּר אֳנִיּוֹת תַּרְשִׁישׁ׃
englishText: With the east wind Thou breakest the ships of Tarshish.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כַּאֲשֶׁר שָׁמַעְנוּ כֵּן רָאִינוּ בְּעִיר־יְהוָה צְבָאוֹת בְּעִיר אֱלֹהֵינוּ אֱלֹהִים יְכוֹנְנֶהָ עַד־עוֹלָם סֶלָה׃
englishText: As we have heard, so have we seen In the city of the LORD of hosts, in the city of our God— God establish it for ever. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: דִּמִּינוּ אֱלֹהִים חַסְדֶּךָ בְּקֶרֶב הֵיכָלֶךָ׃
englishText: We have thought on Thy lovingkindness, O God, In the midst of Thy temple.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כְּשִׁמְךָ אֱלֹהִים כֵּן תְּהִלָּתְךָ עַל־קַצְוֵי־אֶרֶץ צֶדֶק מָלְאָה יְמִינֶךָ׃
englishText: As is Thy name, O God, So is Thy praise unto the ends of the earth; Thy right hand is full of righteousness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִשְׂמַח הַר־צִיּוֹן תָּגֵלְנָה בְּנוֹת יְהוּדָה לְמַעַן מִשְׁפָּטֶיךָ׃
englishText: Let mount Zion be glad, Let the daughters of Judah rejoice, Because of Thy judgments.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: סֹבּוּ צִיּוֹן וְהַקִּיפוּהָ סִפְרוּ מִגְדָּלֶיהָ׃
englishText: Walk about Zion, and go round about her; Count the towers thereof.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׁיתוּ לִבְּכֶם לְחֵילָה פַּסְּגוּ אַרְמְנוֹתֶיהָ לְמַעַן תְּסַפְּרוּ לְדוֹר אַחֲרוֹן׃
englishText: Mark ye well her ramparts, Traverse her palaces; That ye may tell it to the generation following. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי זֶה אֱלֹהִים אֱלֹהֵינוּ עוֹלָם וָעֶד הוּא יְנַהֲגֵנוּ עַל־מוּת׃
englishText: For such is God, our God, for ever and ever; He will guide us eternally.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ לִבְנֵי־קֹרַח מִזְמוֹר׃
englishText: For the Leader; a Psalm for the sons of Korah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׁמְעוּ־זֹאת כָּל־הָעַמִּים הַאֲזִינוּ כָּל־יֹשְׁבֵי חָלֶד׃
englishText: Hear this, all ye peoples; Give ear, all ye inhabitants of the world,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גַּם־בְּנֵי אָדָם גַּם־בְּנֵי־אִישׁ יַחַד עָשִׁיר וְאֶבְיוֹן׃
englishText: Both low and high, Rich and poor together.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פִּי יְדַבֵּר חָכְמוֹת וְהָגוּת לִבִּי תְבוּנוֹת׃
englishText: My mouth shall speak wisdom, and the meditation of my heart shall be understanding.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַטֶּה לְמָשָׁל אָזְנִי אֶפְתַּח בְּכִנּוֹר חִידָתִי׃
englishText: I will incline mine ear to a parable; I will open my dark saying upon the harp.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לָמָּה אִירָא בִּימֵי רָע עֲוֺן עֲקֵבַי יְסוּבֵּנִי׃
englishText: Wherefore should I fear in the days of evil, when the iniquity of my supplanters compasseth me about,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַבֹּטְחִים עַל־חֵילָם וּבְרֹב עָשְׁרָם יִתְהַלָּלוּ׃
englishText: Of them that trust in their wealth, and boast themselves in the multitude of their riches?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָח לֹא־פָדֹה יִפְדֶּה אִישׁ לֹא־יִתֵּן לֵאלֹהִים כָּפְרוֹ׃
englishText: No man can by any means redeem his brother, nor give to God a ransom for him—
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְיֵקַר פִּדְיוֹן נַפְשָׁם וְחָדַל לְעוֹלָם׃
englishText: For too costly is the redemption of their soul, and must be let alone for ever—
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וִיחִי־עוֹד לָנֶצַח לֹא יִרְאֶה הַשָּׁחַת׃
englishText: That he should still live always, that he should not see the pit.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי יִרְאֶה חֲכָמִים יָמוּתוּ יַחַד כְּסִיל וָבַעַר יֹאבֵדוּ וְעָזְבוּ לַאֲחֵרִים חֵילָם׃
englishText: For he seeth that wise men die, The fool and the brutish together perish, And leave their wealth to others.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קִרְבָּם בָּתֵּימוֹ לְעוֹלָם מִשְׁכְּנֹתָם לְדֹר וָדֹר קָרְאוּ בִשְׁמוֹתָם עֲלֵי אֲדָמוֹת׃
englishText: Their inward thought is, that their houses shall continue for ever, And their dwelling-places to all generations; They call their lands after their own names.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאָדָם בִּיקָר בַּל־יָלִין נִמְשַׁל כַּבְּהֵמוֹת נִדְמוּ׃
englishText: But man abideth not in honour; He is like the beasts that perish.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זֶה דַרְכָּם כֵּסֶל לָמוֹ וְאַחֲרֵיהֶם בְּפִיהֶם יִרְצוּ סֶלָה׃
englishText: This is the way of them that are foolish, and of those who after them approve their sayings. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כַּצֹּאן לִשְׁאוֹל שַׁתּוּ מָוֶת יִרְעֵם וַיִּרְדּוּ בָם יְשָׁרִים לַבֹּקֶר וצירם [וְצוּרָם] לְבַלּוֹת שְׁאוֹל מִזְּבֻל לוֹ׃
englishText: Like sheep they are appointed for the nether-world; death shall be their shepherd; and the upright shall have dominion over them in the morning; And their form shall be for the nether-world to wear away, That there be no habitation for it.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַךְ־אֱלֹהִים יִפְדֶּה נַפְשִׁי מִיַּד־שְׁאוֹל כִּי יִקָּחֵנִי סֶלָה׃
englishText: But God will redeem my soul from the power of the nether-world; For He shall receive me. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תִּירָא כִּי־יַעֲשִׁר אִישׁ כִּי־יִרְבֶּה כְּבוֹד בֵּיתוֹ׃
englishText: Be not thou afraid when one waxeth rich, When the wealth of his house is increased;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי לֹא בְמוֹתוֹ יִקַּח הַכֹּל לֹא־יֵרֵד אַחֲרָיו כְּבוֹדוֹ׃
englishText: For when he dieth he shall carry nothing away; His wealth shall not descend after him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־נַפְשׁוֹ בְּחַיָּיו יְבָרֵךְ וְיוֹדֻךָ כִּי־תֵיטִיב לָךְ׃
englishText: Though while he lived he blessed his soul: 'Men will praise thee, when thou shalt do well to thyself';
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תָּבוֹא עַד־דּוֹר אֲבוֹתָיו עַד־נֵצַח לֹא יִרְאוּ־אוֹר׃
englishText: It shall go to the generation of his fathers; They shall never see the light. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָדָם בִּיקָר וְלֹא יָבִין נִמְשַׁל כַּבְּהֵמוֹת נִדְמוּ׃
englishText: Man that is in honour understandeth not; He is like the beasts that perish.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִזְמוֹר לְאָסָף אֵל אֱ‍לֹהִים יְהוָה דִּבֶּר וַיִּקְרָא־אָרֶץ מִמִּזְרַח־שֶׁמֶשׁ עַד־מְבֹאוֹ׃
englishText: A Psalm of Asaph. God, God, the LORD, hath spoken, and called the earth From the rising of the sun unto the going down thereof.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִצִּיּוֹן מִכְלַל־יֹפִי אֱלֹהִים הוֹפִיעַ׃
englishText: Out of Zion, the perfection of beauty, God hath shined forth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָבֹא אֱלֹהֵינוּ וְאַל־יֶחֱרַשׁ אֵשׁ־לְפָנָיו תֹּאכֵל וּסְבִיבָיו נִשְׂעֲרָה מְאֹד׃
englishText: Our God cometh, and doth not keep silence; a fire devoureth before Him, And round about Him it stormeth mightily.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִקְרָא אֶל־הַשָּׁמַיִם מֵעָל וְאֶל־הָאָרֶץ לָדִין עַמּוֹ׃
englishText: He calleth to the heavens above, and to the earth, that He may judge His people:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִסְפוּ־לִי חֲסִידָי כֹּרְתֵי בְרִיתִי עֲלֵי־זָבַח׃
englishText: 'Gather My saints together unto Me; those that have made a covenant with Me by sacrifice.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּגִּידוּ שָׁמַיִם צִדְקוֹ כִּי־אֱלֹהִים שֹׁפֵט הוּא סֶלָה׃
englishText: And the heavens declare His righteousness; for God, He is judge. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׁמְעָה עַמִּי וַאֲדַבֵּרָה יִשְׂרָאֵל וְאָעִידָה בָּךְ אֱלֹהִים אֱלֹהֶיךָ אָנֹכִי׃
englishText: 'Hear, O My people, and I will speak; O Israel, and I will testify against thee: God, thy God, am I.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא עַל־זְבָחֶיךָ אוֹכִיחֶךָ וְעוֹלֹתֶיךָ לְנֶגְדִּי תָמִיד׃
englishText: I will not reprove thee for thy sacrifices; and thy burnt-offerings are continually before Me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא־אֶקַּח מִבֵּיתְךָ פָר מִמִּכְלְאֹתֶיךָ עַתּוּדִים׃
englishText: I will take no bullock out of thy house, nor he-goats out of thy folds.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־לִי כָל־חַיְתוֹ־יָעַר בְּהֵמוֹת בְּהַרְרֵי־אָלֶף׃
englishText: For every beast of the forest is Mine, and the cattle upon a thousand hills.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָדַעְתִּי כָּל־עוֹף הָרִים וְזִיז שָׂדַי עִמָּדִי׃
englishText: I know all the fowls of the mountains; and the wild beasts of the field are Mine.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־אֶרְעַב לֹא־אֹמַר לָךְ כִּי־לִי תֵבֵל וּמְלֹאָהּ׃
englishText: If I were hungry, I would not tell thee; for the world is Mine, and the fulness thereof.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַאוֹכַל בְּשַׂר אַבִּירִים וְדַם עַתּוּדִים אֶשְׁתֶּה׃
englishText: Do I eat the flesh of bulls, or drink the blood of goats?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זְבַח לֵאלֹהִים תּוֹדָה וְשַׁלֵּם לְעֶלְיוֹן נְדָרֶיךָ׃
englishText: Offer unto God the sacrifice of thanksgiving; and pay thy vows unto the Most High;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּקְרָאֵנִי בְּיוֹם צָרָה אֲחַלֶּצְךָ וּתְכַבְּדֵנִי׃
englishText: And call upon Me in the day of trouble; I will deliver thee, and thou shalt honour Me.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְלָרָשָׁע אָמַר אֱלֹהִים מַה־לְּךָ לְסַפֵּר חֻקָּי וַתִּשָּׂא בְרִיתִי עֲלֵי־פִיךָ׃
englishText: But unto the wicked God saith: 'What hast thou to do to declare My statutes, And that thou hast taken My covenant in thy mouth?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאַתָּה שָׂנֵאתָ מוּסָר וַתַּשְׁלֵךְ דְּבָרַי אַחֲרֶיךָ׃
englishText: Seeing thou hatest instruction, and castest My words behind thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־רָאִיתָ גַנָּב וַתִּרֶץ עִמּוֹ וְעִם מְנָאֲפִים חֶלְקֶךָ׃
englishText: When thou sawest a thief, thou hadst company with him, and with adulterers was thy portion.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פִּיךָ שָׁלַחְתָּ בְרָעָה וּלְשׁוֹנְךָ תַּצְמִיד מִרְמָה׃
englishText: Thou hast let loose thy mouth for evil, and thy tongue frameth deceit. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תֵּשֵׁב בְּאָחִיךָ תְדַבֵּר בְּבֶן־אִמְּךָ תִּתֶּן־דֹּפִי׃
englishText: Thou sittest and speakest against thy brother; Thou slanderest thine own mother's son.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֵלֶּה עָשִׂיתָ וְהֶחֱרַשְׁתִּי דִּמִּיתָ הֱיוֹת־אֶהְיֶה כָמוֹךָ אוֹכִיחֲךָ וְאֶעֶרְכָה לְעֵינֶיךָ׃
englishText: These things hast thou done, and should I have kept silence? Thou hadst thought that I was altogether such a one as thyself; but I will reprove thee, and set the cause before thine eyes.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בִּינוּ־נָא זֹאת שֹׁכְחֵי אֱלוֹהַּ פֶּן־אֶטְרֹף וְאֵין מַצִּיל׃
englishText: Now consider this, ye that forget God, lest I tear in pieces, and there be none to deliver.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זֹבֵחַ תּוֹדָה יְכַבְּדָנְנִי וְשָׂם דֶּרֶךְ אַרְאֶנּוּ בְּיֵשַׁע אֱלֹהִים׃
englishText: Whoso offereth the sacrifice of thanksgiving honoureth Me; and to him that ordereth his way aright Will I show the salvation of God.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ מִזְמוֹר לְדָוִד׃
englishText: For the Leader. A Psalm of David;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּבוֹא־אֵלָיו נָתָן הַנָּבִיא כַּאֲשֶׁר־בָּא אֶל־בַּת־שָׁבַע׃
englishText: when Nathan the prophet came unto him, after he had gone in to Bath-sheba.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חָנֵּנִי אֱלֹהִים כְּחַסְדֶּךָ כְּרֹב רַחֲמֶיךָ מְחֵה פְשָׁעָי׃
englishText: Be gracious unto me, O God, according to Thy mercy; According to the multitude of Thy compassions blot out my transgressions.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הרבה [הֶרֶב] כַּבְּסֵנִי מֵעֲוֺנִי וּמֵחַטָּאתִי טַהֲרֵנִי׃
englishText: Wash me thoroughly from mine iniquity, And cleanse me from my sin.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־פְשָׁעַי אֲנִי אֵדָע וְחַטָּאתִי נֶגְדִּי תָמִיד׃
englishText: For I know my transgressions; And my sin is ever before me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְךָ לְבַדְּךָ חָטָאתִי וְהָרַע בְּעֵינֶיךָ עָשִׂיתִי לְמַעַן תִּצְדַּק בְּדָבְרֶךָ תִּזְכֶּה בְשָׁפְטֶךָ׃
englishText: Against Thee, Thee only, have I sinned, And done that which is evil in Thy sight; That Thou mayest be justified when Thou speakest, And be in the right when Thou judgest.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֵן־בְּעָווֹן חוֹלָלְתִּי וּבְחֵטְא יֶחֱמַתְנִי אִמִּי׃
englishText: Behold, I was brought forth in iniquity, and in sin did my mother conceive me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֵן־אֱמֶת חָפַצְתָּ בַטֻּחוֹת וּבְסָתֻם חָכְמָה תוֹדִיעֵנִי׃
englishText: Behold, Thou desirest truth in the inward parts; make me, therefore, to know wisdom in mine inmost heart.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תְּחַטְּאֵנִי בְאֵזוֹב וְאֶטְהָר תְּכַבְּסֵנִי וּמִשֶּׁלֶג אַלְבִּין׃
englishText: Purge me with hyssop, and I shall be clean; wash me, and I shall be whiter than snow.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תַּשְׁמִיעֵנִי שָׂשׂוֹן וְשִׂמְחָה תָּגֵלְנָה עֲצָמוֹת דִּכִּיתָ׃
englishText: Make me to hear joy and gladness; that the bones which Thou hast crushed may rejoice.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַסְתֵּר פָּנֶיךָ מֵחֲטָאָי וְכָל־עֲוֺנֹתַי מְחֵה׃
englishText: Hide Thy face from my sins, and blot out all mine iniquities.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֵב טָהוֹר בְּרָא־לִי אֱלֹהִים וְרוּחַ נָכוֹן חַדֵּשׁ בְּקִרְבִּי׃
englishText: Create me a clean heart, O God; and renew a stedfast spirit within me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תַּשְׁלִיכֵנִי מִלְּפָנֶיךָ וְרוּחַ קָדְשְׁךָ אַל־תִּקַּח מִמֶּנִּי׃
englishText: Cast me not away from Thy presence; and take not Thy holy spirit from me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הָשִׁיבָה לִּי שְׂשׂוֹן יִשְׁעֶךָ וְרוּחַ נְדִיבָה תִסְמְכֵנִי׃
englishText: Restore unto me the joy of Thy salvation; and let a willing spirit uphold me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲלַמְּדָה פֹשְׁעִים דְּרָכֶיךָ וְחַטָּאִים אֵלֶיךָ יָשׁוּבוּ׃
englishText: Then will I teach transgressors Thy ways; and sinners shall return unto Thee. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַצִּילֵנִי מִדָּמִים אֱ‍לֹהִים אֱלֹהֵי תְּשׁוּעָתִי תְּרַנֵּן לְשׁוֹנִי צִדְקָתֶךָ׃
englishText: Deliver me from bloodguiltiness, O God, Thou God of my salvation; so shall my tongue sing aloud of Thy righteousness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲדֹנָי שְׂפָתַי תִּפְתָּח וּפִי יַגִּיד תְּהִלָּתֶךָ׃
englishText: O Lord, open Thou my lips; and my mouth shall declare Thy praise.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי לֹא־תַחְפֹּץ זֶבַח וְאֶתֵּנָה עוֹלָה לֹא תִרְצֶה׃
englishText: For Thou delightest not in sacrifice, else would I give it; Thou hast no pleasure in burnt-offering.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זִבְחֵי אֱלֹהִים רוּחַ נִשְׁבָּרָה לֵב־נִשְׁבָּר וְנִדְכֶּה אֱלֹהִים לֹא תִבְזֶה׃
englishText: The sacrifices of God are a broken spirit; a broken and a contrite heart, O God, Thou wilt not despise.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֵיטִיבָה בִרְצוֹנְךָ אֶת־צִיּוֹן תִּבְנֶה חוֹמוֹת יְרוּשָׁלִָם׃
englishText: Do good in Thy favour unto Zion; build Thou the walls of Jerusalem.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָז תַּחְפֹּץ זִבְחֵי־צֶדֶק עוֹלָה וְכָלִיל אָז יַעֲלוּ עַל־מִזְבַּחֲךָ פָרִים׃
englishText: Then wilt Thou delight in the sacrifices of righteousness, in burnt-offering and whole offering; Then will they offer bullocks upon Thine altar.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ מַשְׂכִּיל לְדָוִד׃
englishText: For the Leader. Maschil of David;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּבוֹא דּוֹאֵג הָאֲדֹמִי וַיַּגֵּד לְשָׁאוּל וַיֹּאמֶר לוֹ בָּא דָוִד אֶל־בֵּית אֲחִימֶלֶךְ׃
englishText: when Doeg the Edomite came and told Saul, and said unto him: 'David is come to the house of Ahimelech.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַה־תִּתְהַלֵּל בְּרָעָה הַגִּבּוֹר חֶסֶד אֵל כָּל־הַיּוֹם׃
englishText: Why boastest thou thyself of evil, O mighty man? The mercy of God endureth continually.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַוּוֹת תַּחְשֹׁב לְשׁוֹנֶךָ כְּתַעַר מְלֻטָּשׁ עֹשֵׂה רְמִיָּה׃
englishText: Thy tongue deviseth destruction; Like a sharp razor, working deceitfully.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָהַבְתָּ רָּע מִטּוֹב שֶׁקֶר מִדַּבֵּר צֶדֶק סֶלָה׃
englishText: Thou lovest evil more than good; Falsehood rather than speaking righteousness. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָהַבְתָּ כָל־דִּבְרֵי־בָלַע לְשׁוֹן מִרְמָה׃
englishText: Thou lovest all devouring words, The deceitful tongue.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גַּם־אֵל יִתָּצְךָ לָנֶצַח יַחְתְּךָ וְיִסָּחֲךָ מֵאֹהֶל וְשֵׁרֶשְׁךָ מֵאֶרֶץ חַיִּים סֶלָה׃
englishText: God will likewise break thee for ever, He will take thee up, and pluck thee out of thy tent, And root thee out of the land of the living. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְיִרְאוּ צַדִּיקִים וְיִירָאוּ וְעָלָיו יִשְׂחָקוּ׃
englishText: The righteous also shall see, and fear, And shall laugh at him:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הִנֵּה הַגֶּבֶר לֹא יָשִׂים אֱלֹהִים מָעוּזּוֹ וַיִּבְטַח בְּרֹב עָשְׁרוֹ יָעֹז בְּהַוָּתוֹ׃
englishText: 'Lo, this is the man that made not God his stronghold; But trusted in the abundance of his riches, And strengthened himself in his wickedness.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַאֲנִי כְּזַיִת רַעֲנָן בְּבֵית אֱלֹהִים בָּטַחְתִּי בְחֶסֶד־אֱלֹהִים עוֹלָם וָעֶד׃
englishText: But as for me, I am like a leafy olive-tree in the house of God; I trust in the mercy of God for ever and ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אוֹדְךָ לְעוֹלָם כִּי עָשִׂיתָ וַאֲקַוֶּה שִׁמְךָ כִי־טוֹב נֶגֶד חֲסִידֶיךָ׃
englishText: I will give Thee thanks for ever, because Thou hast done it; And I will wait for Thy name, for it is good, in the presence of Thy saints.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ עַל־מָחֲלַת מַשְׂכִּיל לְדָוִד׃
englishText: For the Leader; upon Mahalath. Maschil of David.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָמַר נָבָל בְּלִבּוֹ אֵין אֱלֹהִים הִשְׁחִיתוּ וְהִתְעִיבוּ עָוֶל אֵין עֹשֵׂה־טוֹב׃
englishText: The fool hath said in his heart: 'There is no God'; They have dealt corruptly, and have done abominable iniquity; There is none that doeth good.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱ‍לֹהִים מִשָּׁמַיִם הִשְׁקִיף עַל־בְּנֵי אָדָם לִרְאוֹת הֲיֵשׁ מַשְׂכִּיל דֹּרֵשׁ אֶת־אֱלֹהִים׃
englishText: God looked forth from heaven upon the children of men, To see if there were any man of understanding, that did seek after God.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כֻּלּוֹ סָג יַחְדָּו נֶאֱלָחוּ אֵין עֹשֵׂה־טוֹב אֵין גַּם־אֶחָד׃
englishText: Every one of them is unclean, they are together become impure; There is none that doeth good, no, not one.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲלֹא יָדְעוּ פֹּעֲלֵי אָוֶן אֹכְלֵי עַמִּי אָכְלוּ לֶחֶם אֱלֹהִים לֹא קָרָאוּ׃
englishText: ’Shall not the workers of iniquity know it, Who eat up My people as they eat bread, And call not upon God?'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׁם פָּחֲדוּ־פַחַד לֹא־הָיָה פָחַד כִּי־אֱלֹהִים פִּזַּר עַצְמוֹת חֹנָךְ הֱבִשֹׁתָה כִּי־אֱלֹהִים מְאָסָם׃
englishText: There are they in great fear, where no fear was; For God hath scattered the bones of him that encampeth against thee; Thou hast put them to shame, because God hath rejected them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִי יִתֵּן מִצִּיּוֹן יְשֻׁעוֹת יִשְׂרָאֵל בְּשׁוּב אֱלֹהִים שְׁבוּת עַמּוֹ יָגֵל יַעֲקֹב יִשְׂמַח יִשְׂרָאֵל׃
englishText: Oh that the salvation of Israel were come out of Zion! When God turneth the captivity of His people, Let Jacob rejoice, let Israel be glad.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ בִּנְגִינֹת מַשְׂכִּיל לְדָוִד׃
englishText: For the Leader; with string-music. Maschil of David:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּבוֹא הַזִּיפִים וַיֹּאמְרוּ לְשָׁאוּל הֲלֹא דָוִד מִסְתַּתֵּר עִמָּנוּ׃
englishText: when the Ziphites came and said to Saul: 'Doth not David hide himself with us?'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱלֹהִים בְּשִׁמְךָ הוֹשִׁיעֵנִי וּבִגְבוּרָתְךָ תְדִינֵנִי׃
englishText: O God, save me by Thy name, And right me by Thy might.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱלֹהִים שְׁמַע תְּפִלָּתִי הַאֲזִינָה לְאִמְרֵי־פִי׃
englishText: O God, hear my prayer; give ear to the words of my mouth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי זָרִים קָמוּ עָלַי וְעָרִיצִים בִּקְשׁוּ נַפְשִׁי לֹא שָׂמוּ אֱלֹהִים לְנֶגְדָּם סֶלָה׃
englishText: For strangers are risen up against me, And violent men have sought after my soul; They have not set God before them. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הִנֵּה אֱלֹהִים עֹזֵר לִי אֲדֹנָי בְּסֹמְכֵי נַפְשִׁי׃
englishText: Behold, God is my helper; The Lord is for me as the upholder of my soul.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: ישוב [יָשִׁיב] הָרַע לְשֹׁרְרָי בַּאֲמִתְּךָ הַצְמִיתֵם׃
englishText: He will requite the evil unto them that lie in wait for me; Destroy Thou them in Thy truth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בִּנְדָבָה אֶזְבְּחָה־לָּךְ אוֹדֶה שִּׁמְךָ יְהוָה כִּי־טוֹב׃
englishText: With a freewill-offering will I sacrifice unto Thee; I will give thanks unto Thy name, O LORD, for it is good.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי מִכָּל־צָרָה הִצִּילָנִי וּבְאֹיְבַי רָאֲתָה עֵינִי׃
englishText: For He hath delivered me out of all trouble; And mine eye hath gazed upon mine enemies.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ בִּנְגִינֹת מַשְׂכִּיל לְדָוִד׃
englishText: For the Leader; with string-music. Maschil of David.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַאֲזִינָה אֱלֹהִים תְּפִלָּתִי וְאַל־תִּתְעַלַּם מִתְּחִנָּתִי׃
englishText: Give ear, O God, to my prayer; And hide not Thyself from my supplication.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַקְשִׁיבָה לִּי וַעֲנֵנִי אָרִיד בְּשִׂיחִי וְאָהִימָה׃
englishText: Attend unto me, and hear me; I am distraught in my complaint, and will moan;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִקּוֹל אוֹיֵב מִפְּנֵי עָקַת רָשָׁע כִּי־יָמִיטוּ עָלַי אָוֶן וּבְאַף יִשְׂטְמוּנִי׃
englishText: Because of the voice of the enemy, because of the oppression of the wicked; For they cast mischief upon me, and in anger they persecute me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לִבִּי יָחִיל בְּקִרְבִּי וְאֵימוֹת מָוֶת נָפְלוּ עָלָי׃
englishText: My heart doth writhe within me; and the terrors of death are fallen upon me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִרְאָה וָרַעַד יָבֹא בִי וַתְּכַסֵּנִי פַּלָּצוּת׃
englishText: Fear and trembling come upon me, and horror hath overwhelmed me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וָאֹמַר מִי־יִתֶּן־לִּי אֵבֶר כַּיּוֹנָה אָעוּפָה וְאֶשְׁכֹּנָה׃
englishText: And I said: 'Oh that I had wings like a dove! Then would I fly away, and be at rest.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הִנֵּה אַרְחִיק נְדֹד אָלִין בַּמִּדְבָּר סֶלָה׃
englishText: Lo, then would I wander far off, I would lodge in the wilderness. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָחִישָׁה מִפְלָט לִי מֵרוּחַ סֹעָה מִסָּעַר׃
englishText: I would haste me to a shelter from the stormy wind and tempest.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בַּלַּע אֲדֹנָי פַּלַּג לְשׁוֹנָם כִּי־רָאִיתִי חָמָס וְרִיב בָּעִיר׃
englishText: Destroy, O Lord, and divide their tongue; For I have seen violence and strife in the city.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יוֹמָם וָלַיְלָה יְסוֹבְבֻהָ עַל־חוֹמֹתֶיהָ וְאָוֶן וְעָמָל בְּקִרְבָּהּ׃
englishText: Day and night they go about it upon the walls thereof; iniquity also and mischief are in the midst of it.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַוּוֹת בְּקִרְבָּהּ וְלֹא־יָמִישׁ מֵרְחֹבָהּ תֹּךְ וּמִרְמָה׃
englishText: Wickedness is in the midst thereof; oppression and guile depart not from her broad place.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי לֹא־אוֹיֵב יְחָרְפֵנִי וְאֶשָּׂא לֹא־מְשַׂנְאִי עָלַי הִגְדִּיל וְאֶסָּתֵר מִמֶּנּוּ׃
englishText: For it was not an enemy that taunted me, Then I could have borne it; Neither was it mine adversary that did magnify himself against me, Then I would have hid myself from him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאַתָּה אֱנוֹשׁ כְּעֶרְכִּי אַלּוּפִי וּמְיֻדָּעִי׃
englishText: But it was thou, a man mine equal, My companion, and my familiar friend;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲשֶׁר יַחְדָּו נַמְתִּיק סוֹד בְּבֵית אֱלֹהִים נְהַלֵּךְ בְּרָגֶשׁ׃
englishText: We took sweet counsel together, In the house of God we walked with the throng.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: ישימות [יַשִּׁי] [מָוֶת ] עָלֵימוֹ יֵרְדוּ שְׁאוֹל חַיִּים כִּי־רָעוֹת בִּמְגוּרָם בְּקִרְבָּם׃
englishText: May He incite death against them, Let them go down alive into the nether-world; For evil is in their dwelling, and within them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲנִי אֶל־אֱלֹהִים אֶקְרָא וַיהוָה יוֹשִׁיעֵנִי׃
englishText: As for me, I will call upon God; And the LORD shall save me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֶרֶב וָבֹקֶר וְצָהֳרַיִם אָשִׂיחָה וְאֶהֱמֶה וַיִּשְׁמַע קוֹלִי׃
englishText: Evening, and morning, and at noon, will I complain, and moan; And He hath heard my voice.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פָּדָה בְשָׁלוֹם נַפְשִׁי מִקֲּרָב־לִי כִּי־בְרַבִּים הָיוּ עִמָּדִי׃
englishText: He hath redeemed my soul in peace so that none came nigh me; For they were many that strove with me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִשְׁמַע אֵל וְיַעֲנֵם וְיֹשֵׁב קֶדֶם סֶלָה אֲשֶׁר אֵין חֲלִיפוֹת לָמוֹ וְלֹא יָרְאוּ אֱלֹהִים׃
englishText: God shall hear, and humble them, even He that is enthroned of old, Selah, such as have no changes, and fear not God.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׁלַח יָדָיו בִּשְׁלֹמָיו חִלֵּל בְּרִיתוֹ׃
englishText: He hath put forth his hands against them that were at peace with him; He hath profaned his covenant.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חָלְקוּ מַחְמָאֹת פִּיו וּקֲרָב־לִבּוֹ רַכּוּ דְבָרָיו מִשֶּׁמֶן וְהֵמָּה פְתִחוֹת׃
englishText: Smoother than cream were the speeches of his mouth, But his heart was war; His words were softer than oil, Yet were they keen-edged swords.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַשְׁלֵךְ עַל־יְהוָה יְהָבְךָ וְהוּא יְכַלְכְּלֶךָ לֹא־יִתֵּן לְעוֹלָם מוֹט לַצַּדִּיק׃
englishText: Cast thy burden upon the LORD, and He will sustain thee; He will never suffer the righteous to be moved.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאַתָּה אֱלֹהִים תּוֹרִדֵם לִבְאֵר שַׁחַת אַנְשֵׁי דָמִים וּמִרְמָה לֹא־יֶחֱצוּ יְמֵיהֶם וַאֲנִי אֶבְטַח־בָּךְ׃
englishText: But Thou, O God, wilt bring them down into the nethermost pit; Men of blood and deceit shall not live out half their days; But as for me, I will trust in Thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ עַל־יוֹנַת אֵלֶם רְחֹקִים לְדָוִד מִכְתָּם בֶּאֱחֹז אֹתוֹ פְלִשְׁתִּים בְּגַת׃
englishText: For the Leader; upon Jonath-elem-rehokim. [A Psalm] of David; Michtam; when the Philistines took him in Gath. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חָנֵּנִי אֱלֹהִים כִּי־שְׁאָפַנִי אֱנוֹשׁ כָּל־הַיּוֹם לֹחֵם יִלְחָצֵנִי׃
englishText: Be gracious unto me, O God, for man would swallow me up; All the day he fighting oppresseth me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׁאֲפוּ שׁוֹרְרַי כָּל־הַיּוֹם כִּי־רַבִּים לֹחֲמִים לִי מָרוֹם׃
englishText: They that lie in wait for me would swallow me up all the day; For they are many that fight against me, O Most High,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יוֹם אִירָא אֲנִי אֵלֶיךָ אֶבְטָח׃
englishText: In the day that I am afraid, I will put my trust in Thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בֵּאלֹהִים אֲהַלֵּל דְּבָרוֹ בֵּאלֹהִים בָּטַחְתִּי לֹא אִירָא מַה־יַּעֲשֶׂה בָשָׂר לִי׃
englishText: In God—I will praise His word— In God do I trust, I will not be afraid; What can flesh do unto me?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כָּל־הַיּוֹם דְּבָרַי יְעַצֵּבוּ עָלַי כָּל־מַחְשְׁבֹתָם לָרָע׃
englishText: All the day they trouble mine affairs; All their thoughts are against me for evil.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָגוּרוּ יצפינו [יִצְפּוֹנוּ] הֵמָּה עֲקֵבַי יִשְׁמֹרוּ כַּאֲשֶׁר קִוּוּ נַפְשִׁי׃
englishText: They gather themselves together, they hide themselves, They mark my steps; According as they have waited for my soul.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַל־אָוֶן פַּלֶּט־לָמוֹ בְּאַף עַמִּים הוֹרֵד אֱלֹהִים׃
englishText: Because of iniquity cast them out; In anger bring down the peoples, O God.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נֹדִי סָפַרְתָּה אָתָּה שִׂימָה דִמְעָתִי בְנֹאדֶךָ הֲלֹא בְּסִפְרָתֶךָ׃
englishText: Thou has counted my wanderings; Put Thou my tears into Thy bottle; Are they not in Thy book?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָז יָשׁוּבוּ אוֹיְבַי אָחוֹר בְּיוֹם אֶקְרָא זֶה־יָדַעְתִּי כִּי־אֱלֹהִים לִי׃
englishText: Then shall mine enemies turn back in the day that I call; This I know, that God is for me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בֵּאלֹהִים אֲהַלֵּל דָּבָר בַּיהוָה אֲהַלֵּל דָּבָר׃
englishText: In God—I will praise His word— In the LORD—I will praise His word—
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בֵּאלֹהִים בָּטַחְתִּי לֹא אִירָא מַה־יַּעֲשֶׂה אָדָם לִי׃
englishText: In God do I trust, I will not be afraid; What can man do unto me?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עָלַי אֱלֹהִים נְדָרֶיךָ אֲשַׁלֵּם תּוֹדֹת לָךְ׃
englishText: Thy vows are upon me, O God; I will render thank-offerings unto Thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי הִצַּלְתָּ נַפְשִׁי מִמָּוֶת הֲלֹא רַגְלַי מִדֶּחִי לְהִתְהַלֵּךְ לִפְנֵי אֱלֹהִים בְּאוֹר הַחַיִּים׃
englishText: For thou hast delivered my soul from death; Hast Thou not delivered my feet from stumbling? That I may walk before God in the light of the living?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ אַל־תַּשְׁחֵת לְדָוִד מִכְתָּם בְּבָרְחוֹ מִפְּנֵי־שָׁאוּל בַּמְּעָרָה׃
englishText: For the Leader; Al-tashheth. [A Psalm] of David; Michtam; when he fled from Saul, in the cave.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חָנֵּנִי אֱלֹהִים חָנֵּנִי כִּי בְךָ חָסָיָה נַפְשִׁי וּבְצֵל־כְּנָפֶיךָ אֶחְסֶה עַד יַעֲבֹר הַוּוֹת׃
englishText: Be gracious unto me, O God, be gracious unto me, for in Thee hath my soul taken refuge; yea, in the shadow of Thy wings will I take refuge, until calamities be overpast.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֶקְרָא לֵאלֹהִים עֶלְיוֹן לָאֵל גֹּמֵר עָלָי׃
englishText: I will cry unto God Most high; unto God that accomplisheth it for me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִשְׁלַח מִשָּׁמַיִם וְיוֹשִׁיעֵנִי חֵרֵף שֹׁאֲפִי סֶלָה יִשְׁלַח אֱלֹהִים חַסְדּוֹ וַאֲמִתּוֹ׃
englishText: He will send from heaven, and save me, when he that would swallow me up taunteth, Selah; God shall send forth His mercy and His truth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נַפְשִׁי בְּתוֹךְ לְבָאִם אֶשְׁכְּבָה לֹהֲטִים בְּנֵי־אָדָם שִׁנֵּיהֶם חֲנִית וְחִצִּים וּלְשׁוֹנָם חֶרֶב חַדָּה׃
englishText: My soul is among lions, I do lie down among them that are aflame; Even the sons of men, whose teeth are spears and arrows, And their tongue a sharp sword.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רוּמָה עַל־הַשָּׁמַיִם אֱלֹהִים עַל כָּל־הָאָרֶץ כְּבוֹדֶךָ׃
englishText: Be Thou exalted, O God, above the heavens; Thy glory be above all the earth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רֶשֶׁת הֵכִינוּ לִפְעָמַי כָּפַף נַפְשִׁי כָּרוּ לְפָנַי שִׁיחָה נָפְלוּ בְתוֹכָהּ סֶלָה׃
englishText: They have prepared a net for my steps, My soul is bowed down; They have digged a pit before me, They are fallen into the midst thereof themselves. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נָכוֹן לִבִּי אֱלֹהִים נָכוֹן לִבִּי אָשִׁירָה וַאֲזַמֵּרָה׃
englishText: My heart is stedfast, O God, my heart is stedfast; I will sing, yea, I will sing praises.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עוּרָה כְבוֹדִי עוּרָה הַנֵּבֶל וְכִנּוֹר אָעִירָה שָּׁחַר׃
englishText: Awake, my glory; awake, psaltery and harp; I will awake the dawn.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אוֹדְךָ בָעַמִּים אֲדֹנָי אֲזַמֶּרְךָ בַּל־אֻמִּים׃
englishText: I will give thanks unto Thee, O Lord, among the peoples; I will sing praises unto Thee among the nations.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־גָדֹל עַד־שָׁמַיִם חַסְדֶּךָ וְעַד־שְׁחָקִים אֲמִתֶּךָ׃
englishText: For Thy mercy is great unto the heavens, And Thy truth unto the skies.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רוּמָה עַל־שָׁמַיִם אֱלֹהִים עַל כָּל־הָאָרֶץ כְּבוֹדֶךָ׃
englishText: Be Thou exalted, O God, above the heavens; Thy glory be above all the earth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ אַל־תַּשְׁחֵת לְדָוִד מִכְתָּם׃
englishText: For the Leader; Al-tashheth. [A Psalm] of David; Michtam.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַאֻמְנָם אֵלֶם צֶדֶק תְּדַבֵּרוּן מֵישָׁרִים תִּשְׁפְּטוּ בְּנֵי אָדָם׃
englishText: Do ye indeed speak as a righteous company? Do ye judge with equity the sons of men?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַף־בְּלֵב עוֹלֹת תִּפְעָלוּן בָּאָרֶץ חֲמַס יְדֵיכֶם תְּפַלֵּסוּן׃
englishText: Yea, in heart ye work wickedness; Ye weigh out in the earth the violence of your hands.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זֹרוּ רְשָׁעִים מֵרָחֶם תָּעוּ מִבֶּטֶן דֹּבְרֵי כָזָב׃
englishText: The wicked are estranged from the womb; The speakers of lies go astray as soon as they are born.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חֲמַת־לָמוֹ כִּדְמוּת חֲמַת־נָחָשׁ כְּמוֹ־פֶתֶן חֵרֵשׁ יַאְטֵם אָזְנוֹ׃
englishText: Their venom is like the venom of a serpent; They are like the deaf asp that stoppeth her ear;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲשֶׁר לֹא־יִשְׁמַע לְקוֹל מְלַחֲשִׁים חוֹבֵר חֲבָרִים מְחֻכָּם׃
englishText: Which hearkeneth not to the voice of charmers, Or of the most cunning binder of spells.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱ‍לֹהִים הֲרָס־שִׁנֵּימוֹ בְּפִימוֹ מַלְתְּעוֹת כְּפִירִים נְתֹץ יְהוָה׃
englishText: Break their teeth, O God, in their mouth; Break out the cheek-teeth of the young lions, O LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִמָּאֲסוּ כְמוֹ־מַיִם יִתְהַלְּכוּ־לָמוֹ יִדְרֹךְ חצו [חִצָּיו] כְּמוֹ יִתְמֹלָלוּ׃
englishText: Let them melt away as water that runneth apace; When he aimeth his arrows, let them be as though they were cut off.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כְּמוֹ שַׁבְּלוּל תֶּמֶס יַהֲלֹךְ נֵפֶל אֵשֶׁת בַּל־חָזוּ שָׁמֶשׁ׃
englishText: Let them be as a snail which melteth and passeth away; Like the untimely births of a woman, that have not seen the sun.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּטֶרֶם יָבִינוּ סִּירֹתֵיכֶם אָטָד כְּמוֹ־חַי כְּמוֹ־חָרוֹן יִשְׂעָרֶנּוּ׃
englishText: Before your pots can feel the thorns, He will sweep it away with a whirlwind, the raw and the burning alike.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִשְׂמַח צַדִּיק כִּי־חָזָה נָקָם פְּעָמָיו יִרְחַץ בְּדַם הָרָשָׁע׃
englishText: The righteous shall rejoice when he seeth the vengeance; He shall wash his feet in the blood of the wicked.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְיֹאמַר אָדָם אַךְ־פְּרִי לַצַּדִּיק אַךְ יֵשׁ־אֱלֹהִים שֹׁפְטִים בָּאָרֶץ׃
englishText: And men shall say: 'Verily there is a reward for the righteous; Verily there is a God that judgeth in the earth.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ אַל־תַּשְׁחֵת לְדָוִד מִכְתָּם בִּשְׁלֹחַ שָׁאוּל וַיִּשְׁמְרוּ אֶת־הַבַּיִת לַהֲמִיתוֹ׃
englishText: For the Leader; Al-tashheth. [A Psalm] of David; Michtam; when Saul sent, and they watched the house to kill him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַצִּילֵנִי מֵאֹיְבַי אֱלֹהָי מִּמִתְקוֹמְמַי תְּשַׂגְּבֵנִי׃
englishText: Deliver me from mine enemies, O my God; set me on high from them that rise up against me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַצִּילֵנִי מִפֹּעֲלֵי אָוֶן וּמֵאַנְשֵׁי דָמִים הוֹשִׁיעֵנִי׃
englishText: Deliver me from the workers of iniquity, and save me from the men of blood.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי הִנֵּה אָרְבוּ לְנַפְשִׁי יָגוּרוּ עָלַי עַזִים לֹא־פִשְׁעִי וְלֹא־חַטָּאתִי יְהוָה׃
englishText: For, lo, they lie in wait for my soul; the impudent gather themselves together against me; not for my transgression, nor for my sin, O LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּלִי־עָוֺן יְרוּצוּן וְיִכּוֹנָנוּ עוּרָה לִקְרָאתִי וּרְאֵה׃
englishText: Without my fault, they run and prepare themselves; awake Thou to help me, and behold.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאַתָּה יְהוָה־אֱלֹהִים צְבָאוֹת אֱלֹהֵי יִשְׂרָאֵל הָקִיצָה לִפְקֹד כָּל־הַגּוֹיִם אַל־תָּחֹן כָּל־בֹּגְדֵי אָוֶן סֶלָה׃
englishText: Thou therefore, O LORD God of hosts, the God of Israel, arouse Thyself to punish all the nations; show no mercy to any iniquitous traitors. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָשׁוּבוּ לָעֶרֶב יֶהֱמוּ כַכָּלֶב וִיסוֹבְבוּ עִיר׃
englishText: They return at evening, they howl like a dog, and go round about the city.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הִנֵּה יַבִּיעוּן בְּפִיהֶם חֲרָבוֹת בְּשִׂפְתוֹתֵיהֶם כִּי־מִי שֹׁמֵעַ׃
englishText: Behold, they belch out with their mouth; swords are in their lips: 'For who doth hear?'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאַתָּה יְהוָה תִּשְׂחַק־לָמוֹ תִּלְעַג לְכָל־גּוֹיִם׃
englishText: But Thou, O LORD, shalt laugh at them; Thou shalt have all the nations in derision.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֻזּוֹ אֵלֶיךָ אֶשְׁמֹרָה כִּי־אֱלֹהִים מִשְׂגַּבִּי׃
englishText: Because of his strength, I will wait for Thee; for God is my high tower.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱלֹהֵי חסדו [חַסְדִּי] יְקַדְּמֵנִי אֱלֹהִים יַרְאֵנִי בְשֹׁרְרָי׃
englishText: The God of my mercy will come to meet me; God will let me gaze upon mine adversaries.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תַּהַרְגֵם פֶּן־יִשְׁכְּחוּ עַמִּי הֲנִיעֵמוֹ בְחֵילְךָ וְהוֹרִידֵמוֹ מָגִנֵּנוּ אֲדֹנָי׃
englishText: Slay them not, lest my people forget, make them wander to and fro by Thy power, and bring them down, O Lord our shield.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חַטַּאת־פִּימוֹ דְּבַר־שְׂפָתֵימוֹ וְיִלָּכְדוּ בִגְאוֹנָם וּמֵאָלָה וּמִכַּחַשׁ יְסַפֵּרוּ׃
englishText: For the sin of their mouth, and the words of their lips, let them even be taken in their pride, and for cursing and lying which they speak.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כַּלֵּה בְחֵמָה כַּלֵּה וְאֵינֵמוֹ וְיֵדְעוּ כִּי־אֱלֹהִים מֹשֵׁל בְּיַעֲקֹב לְאַפְסֵי הָאָרֶץ סֶלָה׃
englishText: Consume them in wrath, consume them, that they be no more; and let them know that God ruleth in Jacob, unto the ends of the earth. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְיָשׁוּבוּ לָעֶרֶב יֶהֱמוּ כַכָּלֶב וִיסוֹבְבוּ עִיר׃
englishText: And they return at evening, they howl like a dog, and go round about the city;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֵמָּה ינועון [יְנִיעוּן] לֶאֱכֹל אִם־לֹא יִשְׂבְּעוּ וַיָּלִינוּ׃
englishText: They wander up and down to devour, and tarry all night if they have not their fill.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַאֲנִי אָשִׁיר עֻזֶּךָ וַאֲרַנֵּן לַבֹּקֶר חַסְדֶּךָ כִּי־הָיִיתָ מִשְׂגָּב לִי וּמָנוֹס בְּיוֹם צַר־לִי׃
englishText: But as for me, I will sing of Thy strength; yea, I will sing aloud of Thy mercy in the morning; for Thou hast been my high tower, and a refuge in the day of my distress.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֻזִּי אֵלֶיךָ אֲזַמֵּרָה כִּי־אֱלֹהִים מִשְׂגַּבִּי אֱלֹהֵי חַסְדִּי׃
englishText: O my strength, unto Thee will I sing praises; for God is my high tower, the God of my mercy.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ עַל־שׁוּשַׁן עֵדוּת מִכְתָּם לְדָוִד לְלַמֵּד׃
englishText: For the Leader; upon Shushan Eduth; Michtam of David, to teach;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּהַצּוֹתוֹ אֶת אֲרַם נַהֲרַיִם וְאֶת־אֲרַם צוֹבָה וַיָּשָׁב יוֹאָב וַיַּךְ אֶת־אֱדוֹם בְּגֵיא־מֶלַח שְׁנֵים עָשָׂר אָלֶף׃
englishText: when he strove with Aram-naharaim and with Aram-zobah, and Joab returned, and smote of Edom in the Valley of Salt twelve thousand.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱלֹהִים זְנַחְתָּנוּ פְרַצְתָּנוּ אָנַפְתָּ תְּשׁוֹבֵב לָנוּ׃
englishText: O God, Thou hast cast us off, Thou hast broken us down; Thou hast been angry; O restore us.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הִרְעַשְׁתָּה אֶרֶץ פְּצַמְתָּהּ רְפָה שְׁבָרֶיהָ כִי־מָטָה׃
englishText: Thou hast made the land to shake, Thou hast cleft it; Heal the breaches thereof; for it tottereth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הִרְאִיתָה עַמְּךָ קָשָׁה הִשְׁקִיתָנוּ יַיִן תַּרְעֵלָה׃
englishText: Thou hast made Thy people to see hard things; Thou hast made us to drink the wine of staggering.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נָתַתָּה לִּירֵאֶיךָ נֵּס לְהִתְנוֹסֵס מִפְּנֵי קֹשֶׁט סֶלָה׃
englishText: Thou hast given a banner to them that fear Thee, That it may be displayed because of the truth. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְמַעַן יֵחָלְצוּן יְדִידֶיךָ הוֹשִׁיעָה יְמִינְךָ ועננו [וַעֲנֵנִי׃]
englishText: That Thy beloved may be delivered, Save with Thy right hand, and answer me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱלֹהִים דִּבֶּר בְּקָדְשׁוֹ אֶעְלֹזָה אֲחַלְּקָה שְׁכֶם וְעֵמֶק סֻכּוֹת אֲמַדֵּד׃
englishText: God spoke in His holiness, that I would exult; That I would divide Shechem, and mete out the valley of Succoth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לִי גִלְעָד וְלִי מְנַשֶּׁה וְאֶפְרַיִם מָעוֹז רֹאשִׁי יְהוּדָה מְחֹקְקִי׃
englishText: Gilead is mine, and Manasseh is mine; Ephraim also is the defence of my head; Judah is my sceptre.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מוֹאָב סִיר רַחְצִי עַל־אֱדוֹם אַשְׁלִיךְ נַעֲלִי עָלַי פְּלֶשֶׁת הִתְרֹעָעִי׃
englishText: Moab is my washpot; Upon Edom do I cast my shoe; Philistia, cry aloud because of me!
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִי יֹבִלֵנִי עִיר מָצוֹר מִי נָחַנִי עַד־אֱדוֹם׃
englishText: Who will bring me into the fortified city? Who will lead me unto Edom?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲלֹא־אַתָּה אֱלֹהִים זְנַחְתָּנוּ וְלֹא־תֵצֵא אֱלֹהִים בְּצִבְאוֹתֵינוּ׃
englishText: Hast not Thou, O God, cast us off? And Thou goest not forth, O God, with our hosts.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הָבָה־לָּנוּ עֶזְרָת מִצָּר וְשָׁוְא תְּשׁוּעַת אָדָם׃
englishText: Give us help against the adversary; For vain is the help of man.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בֵּאלֹהִים נַעֲשֶׂה־חָיִל וְהוּא יָבוּס צָרֵינוּ׃
englishText: Through God we shall do valiantly; For He it is that will tread down our adversaries.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ עַל־נְגִינַת לְדָוִד׃
englishText: For the Leader; with string-music. [A Psalm] of David.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׁמְעָה אֱלֹהִים רִנָּתִי הַקְשִׁיבָה תְּפִלָּתִי׃
englishText: Hear my cry, O God; Attend unto my prayer.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִקְצֵה הָאָרֶץ אֵלֶיךָ אֶקְרָא בַּעֲטֹף לִבִּי בְּצוּר־יָרוּם מִמֶּנִּי תַנְחֵנִי׃
englishText: From the end of the earth will I call unto Thee, when my heart fainteth; Lead me to a rock that is too high for me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־הָיִיתָ מַחְסֶה לִי מִגְדַּל־עֹז מִפְּנֵי אוֹיֵב׃
englishText: For Thou hast been a refuge for me, A tower of strength in the face of the enemy.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָגוּרָה בְאָהָלְךָ עוֹלָמִים אֶחֱסֶה בְסֵתֶר כְּנָפֶיךָ סֶּלָה׃
englishText: I will dwell in Thy Tent for ever; I will take refuge in the covert of Thy wings. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־אַתָּה אֱלֹהִים שָׁמַעְתָּ לִנְדָרָי נָתַתָּ יְרֻשַּׁת יִרְאֵי שְׁמֶךָ׃
englishText: For Thou, O God, hast heard my vows; Thou hast granted the heritage of those that fear Thy name. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָמִים עַל־יְמֵי־מֶלֶךְ תּוֹסִיף שְׁנוֹתָיו כְּמוֹ־דֹר וָדֹר׃
englishText: Mayest Thou add days unto the king's days! May his years be as many generations!
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יֵשֵׁב עוֹלָם לִפְנֵי אֱלֹהִים חֶסֶד וֶאֱמֶת מַן יִנְצְרֻהוּ׃
englishText: May he be enthroned before God for ever! Appoint mercy and truth, that they may preserve him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כֵּן אֲזַמְּרָה שִׁמְךָ לָעַד לְשַׁלְּמִי נְדָרַי יוֹם יוֹם׃
englishText: So will I sing praise unto Thy name for ever, That I may daily perform my vows.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ עַל־יְדוּתוּן מִזְמוֹר לְדָוִד׃
