englishText: For the Leader; for Jeduthun. A Psalm of David.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַךְ אֶל־אֱלֹהִים דּוּמִיָּה נַפְשִׁי מִמֶּנּוּ יְשׁוּעָתִי׃
englishText: Only for God doth my soul wait in stillness; From Him cometh my salvation.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַךְ־הוּא צוּרִי וִישׁוּעָתִי מִשְׂגַּבִּי לֹא־אֶמּוֹט רַבָּה׃
englishText: He only is my rock and my salvation, My high tower, I shall not be greatly moved.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַד־אָנָה תְּהוֹתְתוּ עַל אִישׁ תְּרָצְּחוּ כֻלְּכֶם כְּקִיר נָטוּי גָּדֵר הַדְּחוּיָה׃
englishText: How long will ye set upon a man, That ye may slay him, all of you, As a leaning wall, a tottering fence?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַךְ מִשְּׂאֵתוֹ יָעֲצוּ לְהַדִּיחַ יִרְצוּ כָזָב בְּפִיו יְבָרֵכוּ וּבְקִרְבָּם יְקַלְלוּ־סֶלָה׃
englishText: They only devise to thrust him down from his height, delighting in lies; They bless with their mouth, but they curse inwardly. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַךְ לֵאלֹהִים דּוֹמִּי נַפְשִׁי כִּי־מִמֶּנּוּ תִּקְוָתִי׃
englishText: Only for God wait thou in stillness, my soul; For from Him cometh my hope.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַךְ־הוּא צוּרִי וִישׁוּעָתִי מִשְׂגַּבִּי לֹא אֶמּוֹט׃
englishText: He only is my rock and my salvation, My high tower, I shall not be moved.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַל־אֱלֹהִים יִשְׁעִי וּכְבוֹדִי צוּר־עֻזִּי מַחְסִי בֵּאלֹהִים׃
englishText: Upon God resteth my salvation and my glory; The rock of my strength, and my refuge, is in God.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בִּטְחוּ בוֹ בְכָל־עֵת עָם שִׁפְכוּ־לְפָנָיו לְבַבְכֶם אֱלֹהִים מַחֲסֶה־לָּנוּ סֶלָה׃
englishText: Trust in Him at all times, ye people; Pour out your heart before Him; God is a refuge for us. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַךְ הֶבֶל בְּנֵי־אָדָם כָּזָב בְּנֵי אִישׁ בְּמֹאזְנַיִם לַעֲלוֹת הֵמָּה מֵהֶבֶל יָחַד׃
englishText: Men of low degree are vanity, and men of high degree are a lie; If they be laid in the balances, they are together lighter than vanity.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תִּבְטְחוּ בְעֹשֶׁק וּבְגָזֵל אַל־תֶּהְבָּלוּ חַיִל כִּי־יָנוּב אַל־תָּשִׁיתוּ לֵב׃
englishText: Trust not in oppression, And put not vain hope in robbery; If riches increase, set not your heart thereon.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַחַת דִּבֶּר אֱלֹהִים שְׁתַּיִם־זוּ שָׁמָעְתִּי כִּי עֹז לֵאלֹהִים׃
englishText: God hath spoken once, Twice have I heard this: That strength belongeth unto God;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּלְךָ־אֲדֹנָי חָסֶד כִּי־אַתָּה תְשַׁלֵּם לְאִישׁ כְּמַעֲשֵׂהוּ׃
englishText: Also unto Thee, O Lord, belongeth mercy; For Thou renderest to every man according to his work.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִזְמוֹר לְדָוִד בִּהְיוֹתוֹ בְּמִדְבַּר יְהוּדָה׃
englishText: A Psalm of David, when he was in the wilderness of Judah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱלֹהִים אֵלִי אַתָּה אֲ‍שַׁחֲרֶךָּ צָמְאָה לְךָ נַפְשִׁי כָּמַהּ לְךָ בְשָׂרִי בְּאֶרֶץ־צִיָּה וְעָיֵף בְּלִי־מָיִם׃
englishText: O God, Thou art my God, earnestly will I seek Thee; My soul thirsteth for Thee, my flesh longeth for Thee, In a dry and weary land, where no water is.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כֵּן בַּקֹּדֶשׁ חֲזִיתִיךָ לִרְאוֹת עֻזְּךָ וּכְבוֹדֶךָ׃
englishText: So have I looked for Thee in the sanctuary, To see Thy power and Thy glory. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־טוֹב חַסְדְּךָ מֵחַיִּים שְׂפָתַי יְשַׁבְּחוּנְךָ׃
englishText: For Thy lovingkindness is better than life; My lips shall praise Thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כֵּן אֲבָרֶכְךָ בְחַיָּי בְּשִׁמְךָ אֶשָּׂא כַפָּי׃
englishText: So will I bless Thee as long as I live; In Thy name will I lift up my hands.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כְּמוֹ חֵלֶב וָדֶשֶׁן תִּשְׂבַּע נַפְשִׁי וְשִׂפְתֵי רְנָנוֹת יְהַלֶּל־פִּי׃
englishText: My soul is satisfied as with marrow and fatness; And my mouth doth praise Thee with joyful lips;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־זְכַרְתִּיךָ עַל־יְצוּעָי בְּאַשְׁמֻרוֹת אֶהְגֶּה־בָּךְ׃
englishText: When I remember Thee upon my couch, And meditate on Thee in the night-watches.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־הָיִיתָ עֶזְרָתָה לִּי וּבְצֵל כְּנָפֶיךָ אֲרַנֵּן׃
englishText: For Thou hast been my help, And in the shadow of Thy wings do I rejoice.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: דָּבְקָה נַפְשִׁי אַחֲרֶיךָ בִּי תָּמְכָה יְמִינֶךָ׃
englishText: My soul cleaveth unto Thee; Thy right hand holdeth me fast.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְהֵמָּה לְשׁוֹאָה יְבַקְשׁוּ נַפְשִׁי יָבֹאוּ בְּתַחְתִּיּוֹת הָאָרֶץ׃
englishText: But those that seek my soul, to destroy it, Shall go into the nethermost parts of the earth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יַגִּירֻהוּ עַל־יְדֵי־חָרֶב מְנָת שֻׁעָלִים יִהְיוּ׃
englishText: They shall be hurled to the power of the sword; They shall be a portion for foxes.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְהַמֶּלֶךְ יִשְׂמַח בֵּאלֹהִים יִתְהַלֵּל כָּל־הַנִּשְׁבָּע בּוֹ כִּי יִסָּכֵר פִּי דוֹבְרֵי־שָׁקֶר׃
englishText: But the king shall rejoice in God; Every one that sweareth by Him shall glory; For the mouth of them that speak lies shall be stopped.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ מִזְמוֹר לְדָוִד׃
englishText: For the Leader. A Psalm of David.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שְׁמַע־אֱלֹהִים קוֹלִי בְשִׂיחִי מִפַּחַד אוֹיֵב תִּצֹּר חַיָּי׃
englishText: Hear my voice, O God, in my complaint; preserve my life from the terror of the enemy.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תַּסְתִּירֵנִי מִסּוֹד מְרֵעִים מֵרִגְשַׁת פֹּעֲלֵי אָוֶן׃
englishText: Hide me from the council of evil-doers; from the tumult of the workers of iniquity;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲשֶׁר שָׁנְנוּ כַחֶרֶב לְשׁוֹנָם דָּרְכוּ חִצָּם דָּבָר מָר׃
englishText: Who have whet their tongue like a sword, and have aimed their arrow, a poisoned word;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לִירוֹת בַּמִּסְתָּרִים תָּם פִּתְאֹם יֹרֻהוּ וְלֹא יִירָאוּ׃
englishText: That they may shoot in secret places at the blameless; suddenly do they shoot at him, and fear not.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְחַזְּקוּ־לָמוֹ דָּבָר רָע יְסַפְּרוּ לִטְמוֹן מוֹקְשִׁים אָמְרוּ מִי יִרְאֶה־לָּמוֹ׃
englishText: They encourage one another in an evil matter; they converse of laying snares secretly; they ask, who would see them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יַחְפְּשׂוּ־עוֹלֹת תַּמְנוּ חֵפֶשׂ מְחֻפָּשׂ וְקֶרֶב אִישׁ וְלֵב עָמֹק׃
englishText: They search out iniquities, they have accomplished a diligent search; even in the inward thought of every one, and the deep heart.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיֹּרֵם אֱלֹהִים חֵץ פִּתְאוֹם הָיוּ מַכּוֹתָם׃
englishText: But God doth shoot at them with an arrow suddenly; thence are their wounds.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּכְשִׁילוּהוּ עָלֵימוֹ לְשׁוֹנָם יִתְנֹדֲדוּ כָּל־רֹאֵה בָם׃
englishText: So they make their own tongue a stumbling unto themselves; all that see them shake the head.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּירְאוּ כָּל־אָדָם וַיַּגִּידוּ פֹּעַל אֱלֹהִים וּמַעֲשֵׂהוּ הִשְׂכִּילוּ׃
englishText: And all men fear; and they declare the work of God, and understand His doing.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִשְׂמַח צַדִּיק בַּיהוָה וְחָסָה בוֹ וְיִתְהַלְלוּ כָּל־יִשְׁרֵי־לֵב׃
englishText: The righteous shall be glad in the LORD, and shall take refuge in Him; and all the upright in heart shall glory.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ מִזְמוֹר לְדָוִד שִׁיר׃
englishText: For the Leader. A Psalm. A Song of David.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְךָ דֻמִיָּה תְהִלָּה אֱלֹהִים בְּצִיּוֹן וּלְךָ יְשֻׁלַּם־נֶדֶר׃
englishText: Praise waiteth for Thee, O God, in Zion; and unto Thee the vow is performed.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שֹׁמֵעַ תְּפִלָּה עָדֶיךָ כָּל־בָּשָׂר יָבֹאוּ׃
englishText: O Thou that hearest prayer, unto Thee doth all flesh come.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: דִּבְרֵי עֲוֺנֹת גָּבְרוּ מֶנִּי פְּשָׁעֵינוּ אַתָּה תְכַפְּרֵם׃
englishText: The tale of iniquities is too heavy for me; as for our transgressions, Thou wilt pardon them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַשְׁרֵי תִּבְחַר וּתְקָרֵב יִשְׁכֹּן חֲצֵרֶיךָ נִשְׂבְּעָה בְּטוּב בֵּיתֶךָ קְדֹשׁ הֵיכָלֶךָ׃
englishText: Happy is the man whom Thou choosest, and bringest near, that he may dwell in Thy courts; may we be satisfied with the goodness of Thy house, the holy place of Thy temple!
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נוֹרָאוֹת בְּצֶדֶק תַּעֲנֵנוּ אֱלֹהֵי יִשְׁעֵנוּ מִבְטָח כָּל־קַצְוֵי־אֶרֶץ וְיָם רְחֹקִים׃
englishText: With wondrous works dost Thou answer us in righteousness, O God of our salvation; Thou the confidence of all the ends of the earth, and of the far distant seas;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מֵכִין הָרִים בְּכֹחוֹ נֶאְזָר בִּגְבוּרָה׃
englishText: Who by Thy strength settest fast the mountains, who art girded about with might;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַשְׁבִּיחַ שְׁאוֹן יַמִּים שְׁאוֹן גַּלֵּיהֶם וַהֲמוֹן לְאֻמִּים׃
englishText: Who stillest the roaring of the seas, the roaring of their waves, and the tumult of the peoples;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּירְאוּ יֹשְׁבֵי קְצָוֺת מֵאוֹתֹתֶיךָ מוֹצָאֵי־בֹקֶר וָעֶרֶב תַּרְנִין׃
englishText: So that they that dwell in the uttermost parts stand in awe of Thy signs; Thou makest the outgoings of the morning and evening to rejoice.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פָּקַדְתָּ הָאָרֶץ וַתְּשֹׁקְקֶהָ רַבַּת תַּעְשְׁרֶנָּה פֶּלֶג אֱלֹהִים מָלֵא מָיִם תָּכִין דְּגָנָם כִּי־כֵן תְּכִינֶהָ׃
englishText: Thou hast remembered the earth, and watered her, greatly enriching her, with the river of God that is full of water; Thou preparest them corn, for so preparest Thou her.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תְּלָמֶיהָ רַוֵּה נַחֵת גְּדוּדֶיהָ בִּרְבִיבִים תְּמֹגְגֶנָּה צִמְחָהּ תְּבָרֵךְ׃
englishText: Watering her ridges abundantly, settling down the furrows thereof, Thou makest her soft with showers; Thou blessest the growth thereof.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עִטַּרְתָּ שְׁנַת טוֹבָתֶךָ וּמַעְגָּלֶיךָ יִרְעֲפוּן דָּשֶׁן׃
englishText: Thou crownest the year with Thy goodness; and Thy paths drop fatness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִרְעֲפוּ נְאוֹת מִדְבָּר וְגִיל גְּבָעוֹת תַּחְגֹּרְנָה׃
englishText: The pastures of the wilderness do drop; and the hills are girded with joy.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לָבְשׁוּ כָרִים הַצֹּאן וַעֲמָקִים יַעַטְפוּ־בָר יִתְרוֹעֲעוּ אַף־יָשִׁירוּ׃
englishText: The meadows are clothed with flocks; the valleys also are covered over with corn; they shout for joy, yea, they sing.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ שִׁיר מִזְמוֹר הָרִיעוּ לֵאלֹהִים כָּל־הָאָרֶץ׃
englishText: For the Leader. A Song, a Psalm. Shout unto God, all the earth;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זַמְּרוּ כְבוֹד־שְׁמוֹ שִׂימוּ כָבוֹד תְּהִלָּתוֹ׃
englishText: Sing praises unto the glory of His name; Make His praise glorious.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִמְרוּ לֵאלֹהִים מַה־נּוֹרָא מַעֲשֶׂיךָ בְּרֹב עֻזְּךָ יְכַחֲשׁוּ לְךָ אֹיְבֶיךָ׃
englishText: Say unto God: 'How tremendous is Thy work! Through the greatness of Thy power shall Thine enemies dwindle away before Thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כָּל־הָאָרֶץ יִשְׁתַּחֲווּ לְךָ וִיזַמְּרוּ־לָךְ יְזַמְּרוּ שִׁמְךָ סֶלָה׃
englishText: All the earth shall worship Thee, And shall sing praises unto Thee; They shall sing praises to Thy name.' Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְכוּ וּרְאוּ מִפְעֲלוֹת אֱלֹהִים נוֹרָא עֲלִילָה עַל־בְּנֵי אָדָם׃
englishText: Come, and see the works of God; He is terrible in His doing toward the children of men.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הָפַךְ יָם לְיַבָּשָׁה בַּנָּהָר יַעַבְרוּ בְרָגֶל שָׁם נִשְׂמְחָה־בּוֹ׃
englishText: He turned the sea into dry land; They went through the river on foot; There let us rejoice in Him!
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מֹשֵׁל בִּגְבוּרָתוֹ עוֹלָם עֵינָיו בַּגּוֹיִם תִּצְפֶּינָה הַסּוֹרְרִים אַל־ירימו [יָרוּמוּ] לָמוֹ סֶלָה׃
englishText: Who ruleth by His might for ever; His eyes keep watch upon the nations; Let not the rebellious exalt themselves. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בָּרְכוּ עַמִּים אֱלֹהֵינוּ וְהַשְׁמִיעוּ קוֹל תְּהִלָּתוֹ׃
englishText: Bless our God, ye peoples, And make the voice of His praise to be heard;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַשָּׂם נַפְשֵׁנוּ בַּחַיִּים וְלֹא־נָתַן לַמּוֹט רַגְלֵנוּ׃
englishText: Who hath set our soul in life, And suffered not our foot to be moved,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־בְחַנְתָּנוּ אֱלֹהִים צְרַפְתָּנוּ כִּצְרָף־כָּסֶף׃
englishText: For Thou, O God, hast tried us; Thou hast refined us, as silver is refined.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲבֵאתָנוּ בַמְּצוּדָה שַׂמְתָּ מוּעָקָה בְמָתְנֵינוּ׃
englishText: Thou didst bring us into the hold; Thou didst lay constraint upon our loins.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הִרְכַּבְתָּ אֱנוֹשׁ לְרֹאשֵׁנוּ בָּאנוּ־בָאֵשׁ וּבַמַּיִם וַתּוֹצִיאֵנוּ לָרְוָיָה׃
englishText: Thou hast caused men to ride over our heads; We went through fire and through water; But Thou didst bring us out unto abundance.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָבוֹא בֵיתְךָ בְעוֹלוֹת אֲשַׁלֵּם לְךָ נְדָרָי׃
englishText: I will come into Thy house with burnt-offerings, I will perform unto Thee my vows,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲשֶׁר־פָּצוּ שְׂפָתָי וְדִבֶּר־פִּי בַּצַּר־לִי׃
englishText: Which my lips have uttered, And my mouth hath spoken, when I was in distress.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֹלוֹת מֵחִים אַעֲלֶה־לָּךְ עִם־קְטֹרֶת אֵילִים אֶעֱשֶׂה בָקָר עִם־עַתּוּדִים סֶלָה׃
englishText: I will offer unto Thee burnt-offerings of fatlings, With the sweet smoke of rams; I will offer bullocks with goats. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְכוּ־שִׁמְעוּ וַאֲסַפְּרָה כָּל־יִרְאֵי אֱלֹהִים אֲשֶׁר עָשָׂה לְנַפְשִׁי׃
englishText: Come, and hearken, all ye that fear God, And I will declare what He hath done for my soul.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֵלָיו פִּי־קָרָאתִי וְרוֹמַם תַּחַת לְשׁוֹנִי׃
englishText: I cried unto Him with my mouth, And He was extolled with my tongue.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָוֶן אִם־רָאִיתִי בְלִבִּי לֹא יִשְׁמַע אֲדֹנָי׃
englishText: If I had regarded iniquity in my heart, The Lord would not hear;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָכֵן שָׁמַע אֱלֹהִים הִקְשִׁיב בְּקוֹל תְּפִלָּתִי׃
englishText: But verily God hath heard; He hath attended to the voice of my prayer.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בָּרוּךְ אֱלֹהִים אֲשֶׁר לֹא־הֵסִיר תְּפִלָּתִי וְחַסְדּוֹ מֵאִתִּי׃
englishText: Blessed be God, Who hath not turned away my prayer, nor His mercy from me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּח בִּנְגִינֹת מִזְמוֹר שִׁיר׃
englishText: For the Leader; with string-music. A Psalm, a Song.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱלֹהִים יְחָנֵּנוּ וִיבָרְכֵנוּ יָאֵר פָּנָיו אִתָּנוּ סֶלָה׃
englishText: God be gracious unto us, and bless us; May He cause His face to shine toward us; Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לָדַעַת בָּאָרֶץ דַּרְכֶּךָ בְּכָל־גּוֹיִם יְשׁוּעָתֶךָ׃
englishText: That Thy way may be known upon earth, Thy salvation among all nations.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יוֹדוּךָ עַמִּים אֱלֹהִים יוֹדוּךָ עַמִּים כֻּלָּם׃
englishText: Let the peoples give thanks unto Thee, O God; Let the peoples give thanks unto Thee, all of them. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִשְׂמְחוּ וִירַנְּנוּ לְאֻמִּים כִּי־תִשְׁפֹּט עַמִּים מִישׁוֹר וּלְאֻמִּים בָּאָרֶץ תַּנְחֵם סֶלָה׃
englishText: O let the nations be glad and sing for joy; For Thou wilt judge the peoples with equity, And lead the nations upon earth. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יוֹדוּךָ עַמִּים אֱלֹהִים יוֹדוּךָ עַמִּים כֻּלָּם׃
englishText: Let the peoples give thanks unto Thee, O God; Let the peoples give thanks unto Thee, all of them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֶרֶץ נָתְנָה יְבוּלָהּ יְבָרְכֵנוּ אֱלֹהִים אֱלֹהֵינוּ׃
englishText: The earth hath yielded her increase; May God, our own God, bless us.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְבָרְכֵנוּ אֱלֹהִים וְיִירְאוּ אֹתוֹ כָּל־אַפְסֵי־אָרֶץ׃
englishText: May God bless us; And let all the ends of the earth fear Him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ לְדָוִד מִזְמוֹר שִׁיר׃
englishText: For the Leader. A Psalm of David, a Song.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָקוּם אֱלֹהִים יָפוּצוּ אוֹיְבָיו וְיָנוּסוּ מְשַׂנְאָיו מִפָּנָיו׃
englishText: Let God arise, let His enemies be scattered; And let them that hate Him flee before Him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כְּהִנְדֹּף עָשָׁן תִּנְדֹּף כְּהִמֵּס דּוֹנַג מִפְּנֵי־אֵשׁ יֹאבְדוּ רְשָׁעִים מִפְּנֵי אֱלֹהִים׃
englishText: As smoke is driven away, so drive them away; As wax melteth before the fire, So let the wicked perish at the presence of God.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְצַדִּיקִים יִשְׂמְחוּ יַעַלְצוּ לִפְנֵי אֱלֹהִים וְיָשִׂישׂוּ בְשִׂמְחָה׃
englishText: But let the righteous be glad, let them exult before God; Yea, let them rejoice with gladness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׁירוּ לֵאלֹהִים זַמְּרוּ שְׁמוֹ סֹלּוּ לָרֹכֵב בָּעֲרָבוֹת בְּיָהּ שְׁמוֹ וְעִלְזוּ לְפָנָיו׃
englishText: Sing unto God, sing praises to His name; Extol Him that rideth upon the skies, whose name is the LORD; And exult ye before Him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲבִי יְתוֹמִים וְדַיַּן אַלְמָנוֹת אֱלֹהִים בִּמְעוֹן קָדְשׁוֹ׃
englishText: A father of the fatherless, and a judge of the widows, Is God in His holy habitation.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱלֹהִים מוֹשִׁיב יְחִידִים בַּיְתָה מוֹצִיא אֲסִירִים בַּכּוֹשָׁרוֹת אַךְ סוֹרֲרִים שָׁכְנוּ צְחִיחָה׃
englishText: God maketh the solitary to dwell in a house; He bringeth out the prisoners into prosperity; The rebellious dwell but in a parched land.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱ‍לֹהִים בְּצֵאתְךָ לִפְנֵי עַמֶּךָ בְּצַעְדְּךָ בִישִׁימוֹן סֶלָה׃
englishText: O God, when Thou wentest forth before Thy people, When Thou didst march through the wilderness; Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֶרֶץ רָעָשָׁה אַף־שָׁמַיִם נָטְפוּ מִפְּנֵי אֱלֹהִים זֶה סִינַי מִפְּנֵי אֱלֹהִים אֱלֹהֵי יִשְׂרָאֵל׃
englishText: The earth trembled, the heavens also dropped at the presence of God; Even yon Sinai trembled at the presence of God, the God of Israel.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גֶּשֶׁם נְדָבוֹת תָּנִיף אֱלֹהִים נַחֲלָתְךָ וְנִלְאָה אַתָּה כוֹנַנְתָּהּ׃
englishText: A bounteous rain didst Thou pour down, O God; When Thine inheritance was weary, Thou didst confirm it.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חַיָּתְךָ יָשְׁבוּ־בָהּ תָּכִין בְּטוֹבָתְךָ לֶעָנִי אֱלֹהִים׃
englishText: Thy flock settled therein; Thou didst prepare in Thy goodness for the poor, O God.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲדֹנָי יִתֶּן־אֹמֶר הַמְבַשְּׂרוֹת צָבָא רָב׃
englishText: The Lord giveth the word; The women that proclaim the tidings are a great host.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַלְכֵי צְבָאוֹת יִדֹּדוּן יִדֹּדוּן וּנְוַת בַּיִת תְּחַלֵּק שָׁלָל׃
englishText: Kings of armies flee, they flee; And she that tarrieth at home divideth the spoil.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־תִּשְׁכְּבוּן בֵּין שְׁפַתָּיִם כַּנְפֵי יוֹנָה נֶחְפָּה בַכֶּסֶף וְאֶבְרוֹתֶיהָ בִּירַקְרַק חָרוּץ׃
englishText: When ye lie among the sheepfolds, The wings of the dove are covered with silver, And her pinions with the shimmer of gold. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּפָרֵשׂ שַׁדַּי מְלָכִים בָּהּ תַּשְׁלֵג בְּצַלְמוֹן׃
englishText: When the Almighty scattereth kings therein, It snoweth in Zalmon.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַר־אֱלֹהִים הַר־בָּשָׁן הַר גַּבְנֻנִּים הַר־בָּשָׁן׃
englishText: A mountain of God is the mountain of Bashan; A mountain of peaks is the mountain of Bashan.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לָמָּה תְּרַצְּדוּן הָרִים גַּבְנֻנִּים הָהָר חָמַד אֱלֹהִים לְשִׁבְתּוֹ אַף־יְהוָה יִשְׁכֹּן לָנֶצַח׃
englishText: Why look ye askance, ye mountains of peaks, At the mountain which God hath desired for His abode? Yea, the LORD will dwell therein for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רֶכֶב אֱלֹהִים רִבֹּתַיִם אַלְפֵי שִׁנְאָן אֲדֹנָי בָם סִינַי בַּקֹּדֶשׁ׃
englishText: The chariots of God are myriads, even thousands upon thousands; The Lord is among them, as in Sinai, in holiness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עָלִיתָ לַמָּרוֹם שָׁבִיתָ שֶּׁבִי לָקַחְתָּ מַתָּנוֹת בָּאָדָם וְאַף סוֹרְרִים לִשְׁכֹּן יָהּ אֱלֹהִים׃
englishText: Thou hast ascended on high, Thou hast led captivity captive; Thou hast received gifts among men, Yea, among the rebellious also, that the LORD God might dwell there.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בָּרוּךְ אֲדֹנָי יוֹם יוֹם יַעֲמָס־לָנוּ הָאֵל יְשׁוּעָתֵנוּ סֶלָה׃
englishText: Blessed be the Lord, day by day He beareth our burden, Even the God who is our salvation. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הָאֵל לָנוּ אֵל לְמוֹשָׁעוֹת וְלֵיהוִה אֲדֹנָי לַמָּוֶת תּוֹצָאוֹת׃
englishText: God is unto us a God of deliverances; And unto GOD the Lord belong the issues of death.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַךְ־אֱלֹהִים יִמְחַץ רֹאשׁ אֹיְבָיו קָדְקֹד שֵׂעָר מִתְהַלֵּךְ בַּאֲשָׁמָיו׃
englishText: Surely God will smite through the head of His enemies, The hairy scalp of him that goeth about in his guiltiness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָמַר אֲדֹנָי מִבָּשָׁן אָשִׁיב אָשִׁיב מִמְּצֻלוֹת יָם׃
englishText: The Lord said: 'I will bring back from Bashan, I will bring them back from the depths of the sea;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְמַעַן תִּמְחַץ רַגְלְךָ בְּדָם לְשׁוֹן כְּלָבֶיךָ מֵאֹיְבִים מִנֵּהוּ׃
englishText: That thy foot may wade through blood, That the tongue of thy dogs may have its portion from thine enemies.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רָאוּ הֲלִיכוֹתֶיךָ אֱלֹהִים הֲלִיכוֹת אֵלִי מַלְכִּי בַקֹּדֶשׁ׃
englishText: They see Thy goings, O God, Even the goings of my God, my King, in holiness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קִדְּמוּ שָׁרִים אַחַר נֹגְנִים בְּתוֹךְ עֲלָמוֹת תּוֹפֵפוֹת׃
englishText: The singers go before, the minstrels follow after, In the midst of damsels playing upon timbrels.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּמַקְהֵלוֹת בָּרְכוּ אֱלֹהִים יְהוָה מִמְּקוֹר יִשְׂרָאֵל׃
englishText: 'Bless ye God in full assemblies, Even the Lord, ye that are from the fountain of Israel.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׁם בִּנְיָמִן צָעִיר רֹדֵם שָׂרֵי יְהוּדָה רִגְמָתָם שָׂרֵי זְבֻלוּן שָׂרֵי נַפְתָּלִי׃
englishText: There is Benjamin, the youngest, ruling them, The princes of Judah their council, The princes of Zebulun, the princes of Naphtali.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: צִוָּה אֱלֹהֶיךָ עֻזֶּךָ עוּזָּה אֱלֹהִים זוּ פָּעַלְתָּ לָּנוּ׃
englishText: Thy God hath commanded thy strength; Be strong, O God, Thou that hast wrought for us
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מֵהֵיכָלֶךָ עַל־יְרוּשָׁלִָם לְךָ יוֹבִילוּ מְלָכִים שָׁי׃
englishText: Out of Thy temple at Jerusalem, Whither kings shall bring presents unto Thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גְּעַר חַיַּת קָנֶה עֲדַת אַבִּירִים בְּעֶגְלֵי עַמִּים מִתְרַפֵּס בְּרַצֵּי־כָסֶף בִּזַּר עַמִּים קְרָבוֹת יֶחְפָּצוּ׃
englishText: Rebuke the wild beast of the reeds, The multitude of the bulls, with the calves of the peoples, Every one submitting himself with pieces of silver; He hath scattered the peoples that delight in war!
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יֶאֱתָיוּ חַשְׁמַנִּים מִנִּי מִצְרָיִם כּוּשׁ תָּרִיץ יָדָיו לֵאלֹהִים׃
englishText: Nobles shall come out of Egypt; Ethiopia shall hasten to stretch out her hands unto God.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַמְלְכוֹת הָאָרֶץ שִׁירוּ לֵאלֹהִים זַמְּרוּ אֲדֹנָי סֶלָה׃
englishText: Sing unto God, ye kingdoms of the earth; O sing praises unto the Lord; Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לָרֹכֵב בִּשְׁמֵי שְׁמֵי־קֶדֶם הֵן יִתֵּן בְּקוֹלוֹ קוֹל עֹז׃
englishText: To Him that rideth upon the heavens of heavens, which are of old; Lo, He uttereth His voice, a mighty voice.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תְּנוּ עֹז לֵאלֹהִים עַל־יִשְׂרָאֵל גַּאֲוָתוֹ וְעֻזּוֹ בַּשְּׁחָקִים׃
englishText: Ascribe ye strength unto God; His majesty is over Israel, And His strength is in the skies.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נוֹרָא אֱלֹהִים מִמִּקְדָּשֶׁיךָ אֵל יִשְׂרָאֵל הוּא נֹתֵן עֹז וְתַעֲצֻמוֹת לָעָם בָּרוּךְ אֱלֹהִים׃
englishText: Awful is God out of thy holy places; The God of Israel, He giveth strength and power unto the people; Blessed be God.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ עַל־שׁוֹשַׁנִּים לְדָוִד׃
englishText: For the Leader; upon Shoshannim. [A Psalm] of David.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הוֹשִׁיעֵנִי אֱלֹהִים כִּי בָאוּ מַיִם עַד־נָפֶשׁ׃
englishText: Save me, O God; For the waters are come in even unto the soul.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: טָבַעְתִּי בִּיוֵן מְצוּלָה וְאֵין מָעֳמָד בָּאתִי בְמַעֲמַקֵּי־מַיִם וְשִׁבֹּלֶת שְׁטָפָתְנִי׃
englishText: I am sunk in deep mire, where there is no standing; I am come into deep waters, and the flood overwhelmeth me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָגַעְתִּי בְקָרְאִי נִחַר גְּרוֹנִי כָּלוּ עֵינַי מְיַחֵל לֵאלֹהָי׃
englishText: I am weary of my crying; my throat is dried; Mine eyes fail while I wait for my God.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רַבּוּ מִשַּׂעֲרוֹת רֹאשִׁי שֹׂנְאַי חִנָּם עָצְמוּ מַצְמִיתַי אֹיְבַי שֶׁקֶר אֲשֶׁר לֹא־גָזַלְתִּי אָז אָשִׁיב׃
englishText: They that hate me without a cause are more than the hairs of my head; They that would cut me off, being mine enemies wrongfully, are many; Should I restore that which I took not away?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱ‍לֹהִים אַתָּה יָדַעְתָּ לְאִוַּלְתִּי וְאַשְׁמוֹתַי מִמְּךָ לֹא־נִכְחָדוּ׃
englishText: O God, Thou knowest my folly; And my trespasses are not hid from Thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־יֵבֹשׁוּ בִי קֹוֶיךָ אֲדֹנָי יְהוִה צְבָאוֹת אַל־יִכָּלְמוּ בִי מְבַקְשֶׁיךָ אֱלֹהֵי יִשְׂרָאֵל׃
englishText: Let not them that wait for Thee be ashamed through me, O Lord GOD of hosts; Let not those that seek Thee be brought to confusion through me, O God of Israel.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־עָלֶיךָ נָשָׂאתִי חֶרְפָּה כִּסְּתָה כְלִמָּה פָנָי׃
englishText: Because for Thy sake I have borne reproach; Confusion hath covered my face.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מוּזָר הָיִיתִי לְאֶחָי וְנָכְרִי לִבְנֵי אִמִּי׃
englishText: I am become a stranger unto my brethren, And an alien unto my mother's children.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־קִנְאַת בֵּיתְךָ אֲכָלָתְנִי וְחֶרְפּוֹת חוֹרְפֶיךָ נָפְלוּ עָלָי׃
englishText: Because zeal for Thy house hath eaten me up, And the reproaches of them that reproach Thee are fallen upon me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וָאֶבְכֶּה בַצּוֹם נַפְשִׁי וַתְּהִי לַחֲרָפוֹת לִי׃
englishText: And I wept with my soul with fasting, And that became unto me a reproach.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וָאֶתְּנָה לְבוּשִׁי שָׂק וָאֱהִי לָהֶם לְמָשָׁל׃
englishText: I made sackcloth also my garment, And I became a byword unto them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָשִׂיחוּ בִי יֹשְׁבֵי שָׁעַר וּנְגִינוֹת שׁוֹתֵי שֵׁכָר׃
englishText: They that sit in the gate talk of me; And I am the song of the drunkards. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַאֲנִי תְפִלָּתִי־לְךָ יְהוָה עֵת רָצוֹן אֱלֹהִים בְּרָב־חַסְדֶּךָ עֲנֵנִי בֶּאֱמֶת יִשְׁעֶךָ׃
englishText: But as for me, let my prayer be unto Thee, O LORD, in an acceptable time; O God, in the abundance of Thy mercy, Answer me with the truth of Thy salvation.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַצִּילֵנִי מִטִּיט וְאַל־אֶטְבָּעָה אִנָּצְלָה מִשֹּׂנְאַי וּמִמַּעֲמַקֵּי־מָיִם׃
englishText: Deliver me out of the mire, and let me not sink; Let me be delivered from them that hate me, and out of the deep waters.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תִּשְׁטְפֵנִי שִׁבֹּלֶת מַיִם וְאַל־תִּבְלָעֵנִי מְצוּלָה וְאַל־תֶּאְטַר־עָלַי בְּאֵר פִּיהָ׃
englishText: Let not the waterflood overwhelm me, Neither let the deep swallow me up; And let not the pit shut her mouth upon me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֲנֵנִי יְהוָה כִּי־טוֹב חַסְדֶּךָ כְּרֹב רַחֲמֶיךָ פְּנֵה אֵלָי׃
englishText: Answer me, O LORD, for Thy mercy is good; According to the multitude of Thy compassions turn Thou unto me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאַל־תַּסְתֵּר פָּנֶיךָ מֵעַבְדֶּךָ כִּי־צַר־לִי מַהֵר עֲנֵנִי׃
englishText: And hide not Thy face from Thy servant; For I am in distress; answer me speedily.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קָרְבָה אֶל־נַפְשִׁי גְאָלָהּ לְמַעַן אֹיְבַי פְּדֵנִי׃
englishText: Draw nigh unto my soul, and redeem it; Ransom me because of mine enemies.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַתָּה יָדַעְתָּ חֶרְפָּתִי וּבָשְׁתִּי וּכְלִמָּתִי נֶגְדְּךָ כָּל־צוֹרְרָי׃
englishText: Thou knowest my reproach, and my shame, and my confusion; Mine adversaries are all before Thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חֶרְפָּה שָׁבְרָה לִבִּי וָאָנוּשָׁה וָאֲקַוֶּה לָנוּד וָאַיִן וְלַמְנַחֲמִים וְלֹא מָצָאתִי׃
englishText: Reproach hath broken my heart; and I am sore sick; And I looked for some to show compassion, but there was none; And for comforters, but I found none.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּתְּנוּ בְּבָרוּתִי רֹאשׁ וְלִצְמָאִי יַשְׁקוּנִי חֹמֶץ׃
englishText: Yea, they put poison into my food; And in my thirst they gave me vinegar to drink.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהִי־שֻׁלְחָנָם לִפְנֵיהֶם לְפָח וְלִשְׁלוֹמִים לְמוֹקֵשׁ׃
englishText: Let their table before them become a snare; And when they are in peace, let it become a trap.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תֶּחְשַׁכְנָה עֵינֵיהֶם מֵרְאוֹת וּמָתְנֵיהֶם תָּמִיד הַמְעַד׃
englishText: Let their eyes be darkened, that they see not; And make their loins continually to totter.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שְׁפָךְ־עֲלֵיהֶם זַעְמֶךָ וַחֲרוֹן אַפְּךָ יַשִּׂיגֵם׃
englishText: Pour out Thine indignation upon them, And let the fierceness of Thine anger overtake them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תְּהִי־טִירָתָם נְשַׁמָּה בְּאָהֳלֵיהֶם אַל־יְהִי יֹשֵׁב׃
englishText: Let their encampment be desolate; Let none dwell in their tents.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־אַתָּה אֲשֶׁר־הִכִּיתָ רָדָפוּ וְאֶל־מַכְאוֹב חֲלָלֶיךָ יְסַפֵּרוּ׃
englishText: For they persecute him whom Thou hast smitten; And they tell of the pain of those whom Thou hast wounded.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תְּנָה־עָוֺן עַל־עֲוֺנָם וְאַל־יָבֹאוּ בְּצִדְקָתֶךָ׃
englishText: Add iniquity unto their iniquity; And let them not come into Thy righteousness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִמָּחוּ מִסֵּפֶר חַיִּים וְעִם צַדִּיקִים אַל־יִכָּתֵבוּ׃
englishText: Let them be blotted out of the book of the living, And not be written with the righteous.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַאֲנִי עָנִי וְכוֹאֵב יְשׁוּעָתְךָ אֱלֹהִים תְּשַׂגְּבֵנִי׃
englishText: But I am afflicted and in pain; Let Thy salvation, O God, set me up on high.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲהַלְלָה שֵׁם־אֱלֹהִים בְּשִׁיר וַאֲגַדְּלֶנּוּ בְתוֹדָה׃
englishText: I will praise the name of God with a song, And will magnify Him with thanksgiving. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְתִיטַב לַיהוָה מִשּׁוֹר פָּר מַקְרִן מַפְרִיס׃
englishText: And it shall please the LORD better than a bullock That hath horns and hoofs.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רָאוּ עֲנָוִים יִשְׂמָחוּ דֹּרְשֵׁי אֱלֹהִים וִיחִי לְבַבְכֶם׃
englishText: The humble shall see it, and be glad; Ye that seek after God, let your heart revive.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־שֹׁמֵעַ אֶל־אֶבְיוֹנִים יְהוָה וְאֶת־אֲסִירָיו לֹא בָזָה׃
englishText: For the LORD hearkeneth unto the needy, And despiseth not His prisoners.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהַלְלוּהוּ שָׁמַיִם וָאָרֶץ יַמִּים וְכָל־רֹמֵשׂ בָּם׃
englishText: Let heaven and earth praise Him, The seas, and every thing that moveth therein.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי אֱלֹהִים יוֹשִׁיעַ צִיּוֹן וְיִבְנֶה עָרֵי יְהוּדָה וְיָשְׁבוּ שָׁם וִירֵשׁוּהָ׃
englishText: For God will save Zion, and build the cities of Judah; And they shall abide there, and have it in possession.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְזֶרַע עֲבָדָיו יִנְחָלוּהָ וְאֹהֲבֵי שְׁמוֹ יִשְׁכְּנוּ־בָהּ׃
englishText: The seed also of His servants shall inherit it; And they that love His name shall dwell therein.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ לְדָוִד לְהַזְכִּיר׃
englishText: For the Leader. [A Psalm] of David; to make memorial.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱלֹהִים לְהַצִּילֵנִי יְהוָה לְעֶזְרָתִי חוּשָׁה׃
englishText: O God, to deliver me, O LORD, to help me, make haste.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יֵבֹשׁוּ וְיַחְפְּרוּ מְבַקְשֵׁי נַפְשִׁי יִסֹּגוּ אָחוֹר וְיִכָּלְמוּ חֲפֵצֵי רָעָתִי׃
englishText: Let them be ashamed and abashed That seek after my soul; Let them be turned backward and brought to confusion That delight in my hurt.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָשׁוּבוּ עַל־עֵקֶב בָּשְׁתָּם הָאֹמְרִים הֶאָח הֶאָח׃
englishText: Let them be turned back by reason of their shame That say: 'Aha, aha.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָשִׂישׂוּ וְיִשְׂמְחוּ בְּךָ כָּל־מְבַקְשֶׁיךָ וְיֹאמְרוּ תָמִיד יִגְדַּל אֱלֹהִים אֹהֲבֵי יְשׁוּעָתֶךָ׃
englishText: Let all those that seek Thee rejoice and be glad in Thee; And let such as love Thy salvation say continually: 'Let God be magnified.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַאֲנִי עָנִי וְאֶבְיוֹן אֱלֹהִים חוּשָׁה־לִּי עֶזְרִי וּמְפַלְטִי אַתָּה יְהוָה אַל־תְּאַחַר׃
englishText: But I am poor and needy; O God, make haste unto me; Thou art my help and my deliverer; O LORD, tarry not.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּךָ־יְהוָה חָסִיתִי אַל־אֵבוֹשָׁה לְעוֹלָם׃
englishText: In Thee, O LORD, have I taken refuge; Let me never be ashamed.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּצִדְקָתְךָ תַּצִּילֵנִי וּתְפַלְּטֵנִי הַטֵּה־אֵלַי אָזְנְךָ וְהוֹשִׁיעֵנִי׃
englishText: Deliver me in Thy righteousness, and rescue me; Incline Thine ear unto me, and save me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֱיֵה לִי לְצוּר מָעוֹן לָבוֹא תָּמִיד צִוִּיתָ לְהוֹשִׁיעֵנִי כִּי־סַלְעִי וּמְצוּדָתִי אָתָּה׃
englishText: Be Thou to me a sheltering rock, whereunto I may continually resort, Which Thou hast appointed to save me; For Thou art my rock and my fortress.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱ‍לֹהַי פַּלְּטֵנִי מִיַּד רָשָׁע מִכַּף מְעַוֵּל וְחוֹמֵץ׃
englishText: O my God, rescue me out of the hand of the wicked, Out of the grasp of the unrighteous and ruthless man.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־אַתָּה תִקְוָתִי אֲדֹנָי יְהוִה מִבְטַחִי מִנְּעוּרָי׃
englishText: For Thou art my hope; O Lord GOD, my trust from my youth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עָלֶיךָ נִסְמַכְתִּי מִבֶּטֶן מִמְּעֵי אִמִּי אַתָּה גוֹזִי בְּךָ תְהִלָּתִי תָמִיד׃
englishText: Upon Thee have I stayed myself from birth; Thou art he that took me out of my mother's womb; My praise is continually of Thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כְּמוֹפֵת הָיִיתִי לְרַבִּים וְאַתָּה מַחֲסִי־עֹז׃
englishText: I am as a wonder unto many; But Thou art my strong refuge.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִמָּלֵא פִי תְּהִלָּתֶךָ כָּל־הַיּוֹם תִּפְאַרְתֶּךָ׃
englishText: My mouth shall be filled with Thy praise, And with Thy glory all the day. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תַּשְׁלִיכֵנִי לְעֵת זִקְנָה כִּכְלוֹת כֹּחִי אַל־תַּעַזְבֵנִי׃
englishText: Cast me not off in the time of old age; When my strength faileth, forsake me not.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־אָמְרוּ אוֹיְבַי לִי וְשֹׁמְרֵי נַפְשִׁי נוֹעֲצוּ יַחְדָּו׃
englishText: For mine enemies speak concerning me, And they that watch for my soul take counsel together,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֵאמֹר אֱלֹהִים עֲזָבוֹ רִדְפוּ וְתִפְשׂוּהוּ כִּי־אֵין מַצִּיל׃
englishText: Saying: 'God hath forsaken him; Pursue and take him; for there is none to deliver.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱלֹהִים אַל־תִּרְחַק מִמֶּנִּי אֱלֹהַי לְעֶזְרָתִי חישה [חוּשָׁה׃]
englishText: O God, be not far from me; O my God, make haste to help me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יֵבֹשׁוּ יִכְלוּ שֹׂטְנֵי נַפְשִׁי יַעֲטוּ חֶרְפָּה וּכְלִמָּה מְבַקְשֵׁי רָעָתִי׃
englishText: Let them be ashamed and consumed that are adversaries to my soul; Let them be covered with reproach and confusion that seek my hurt.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַאֲנִי תָּמִיד אֲיַחֵל וְהוֹסַפְתִּי עַל־כָּל־תְּהִלָּתֶךָ׃
englishText: But as for me, I will hope continually, And will praise Thee yet more and more.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פִּי יְסַפֵּר צִדְקָתֶךָ כָּל־הַיּוֹם תְּשׁוּעָתֶךָ כִּי לֹא יָדַעְתִּי סְפֹרוֹת׃
englishText: My mouth shall tell of Thy righteousness, And of Thy salvation all the day; For I know not the numbers thereof.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָבוֹא בִּגְבֻרוֹת אֲדֹנָי יְהוִה אַזְכִּיר צִדְקָתְךָ לְבַדֶּךָ׃
englishText: I will come with Thy mighty acts, O Lord GOD; I will make mention of Thy righteousness, even of Thine only.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱ‍לֹהִים לִמַּדְתַּנִי מִנְּעוּרָי וְעַד־הֵנָּה אַגִּיד נִפְלְאוֹתֶיךָ׃
englishText: O God, Thou hast taught me from my youth; And until now do I declare Thy wondrous works.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְגַם עַד־זִקְנָה וְשֵׂיבָה אֱלֹהִים אַל־תַּעַזְבֵנִי עַד־אַגִּיד זְרוֹעֲךָ לְדוֹר לְכָל־יָבוֹא גְּבוּרָתֶךָ׃
englishText: And even unto old age and hoary hairs, O God, forsake me not; Until I have declared Thy strength unto the next generation, Thy might to every one that is to come.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְצִדְקָתְךָ אֱלֹהִים עַד־מָרוֹם אֲשֶׁר־עָשִׂיתָ גְדֹלוֹת אֱלֹהִים מִי כָמוֹךָ׃
englishText: Thy righteousness also, O God, which reacheth unto high heaven; Thou who hast done great things, O God, who is like unto Thee?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲשֶׁר הראיתנו [הִרְאִיתַנִי ] צָרוֹת רַבּוֹת וְרָעוֹת תָּשׁוּב תחיינו [תְּחַיֵּינִי] וּמִתְּהֹמוֹת הָאָרֶץ תָּשׁוּב תַּעֲלֵנִי׃
englishText: Thou, who hast made me to see many and sore troubles, Wilt quicken me again, and bring me up again from the depths of the earth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תֶּרֶב גְּדֻלָּתִי וְתִסֹּב תְּנַחֲמֵנִי׃
englishText: Thou wilt increase my greatness, And turn and comfort me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גַּם־אֲנִי אוֹדְךָ בִכְלִי־נֶבֶל אֲמִתְּךָ אֱלֹהָי אֲזַמְּרָה לְךָ בְכִנּוֹר קְדוֹשׁ יִשְׂרָאֵל׃
englishText: I also will give thanks unto Thee with the psaltery, Even unto Thy truth, O my God; I will sing praises unto Thee with the harp, O Thou Holy One of Israel.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תְּרַנֵּנָּה שְׂפָתַי כִּי אֲזַמְּרָה־לָּךְ וְנַפְשִׁי אֲשֶׁר פָּדִיתָ׃
englishText: My lips shall greatly rejoice when I sing praises unto Thee; And my soul, which Thou hast redeemed.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גַּם־לְשׁוֹנִי כָּל־הַיּוֹם תֶּהְגֶּה צִדְקָתֶךָ כִּי־בֹשׁוּ כִי־חָפְרוּ מְבַקְשֵׁי רָעָתִי׃
englishText: My tongue also shall tell of Thy righteousness all the day; For they are ashamed, for they are abashed, that seek my hurt.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לִשְׁלֹמֹה אֱ‍לֹהִים מִשְׁפָּטֶיךָ לְמֶלֶךְ תֵּן וְצִדְקָתְךָ לְבֶן־מֶלֶךְ׃
englishText: [A Psalm] of Solomon. Give the king Thy judgments, O God, and Thy righteousness unto the king's son;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָדִין עַמְּךָ בְצֶדֶק וַעֲנִיֶּיךָ בְמִשְׁפָּט׃
englishText: That he may judge Thy people with righteousness, and Thy poor with justice.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִשְׂאוּ הָרִים שָׁלוֹם לָעָם וּגְבָעוֹת בִּצְדָקָה׃
englishText: Let the mountains bear peace to the people, and the hills, through righteousness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִשְׁפֹּט עֲ‍נִיֵּי־עָם יוֹשִׁיעַ לִבְנֵי אֶבְיוֹן וִידַכֵּא עוֹשֵׁק׃
englishText: May he judge the poor of the people, and save the children of the needy, And crush the oppressor.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִירָאוּךָ עִם־שָׁמֶשׁ וְלִפְנֵי יָרֵחַ דּוֹר דּוֹרִים׃
englishText: They shall fear Thee while the sun endureth, and so long as the moon, throughout all generations.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יֵרֵד כְּמָטָר עַל־גֵּז כִּרְבִיבִים זַרְזִיף אָרֶץ׃
englishText: May he come down like rain upon the mown grass, as showers that water the earth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִפְרַח־בְּיָמָיו צַדִּיק וְרֹב שָׁלוֹם עַד־בְּלִי יָרֵחַ׃
englishText: In his days let the righteous flourish, and abundance of peace, till the moon be no more.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְיֵרְדְּ מִיָּם עַד־יָם וּמִנָּהָר עַד־אַפְסֵי־אָרֶץ׃
englishText: May he have dominion also from sea to sea, and from the River unto the ends of the earth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְפָנָיו יִכְרְעוּ צִיִּים וְאֹיְבָיו עָפָר יְלַחֵכוּ׃
englishText: Let them that dwell in the wilderness bow before him; and his enemies lick the dust.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַלְכֵי תַרְשִׁישׁ וְאִיִּים מִנְחָה יָשִׁיבוּ מַלְכֵי שְׁבָא וּסְבָא אֶשְׁכָּר יַקְרִיבוּ׃
englishText: The kings of Tarshish and of the isles shall render tribute; the kings of Sheba and Seba shall offer gifts.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְיִשְׁתַּחֲווּ־לוֹ כָל־מְלָכִים כָּל־גּוֹיִם יַעַבְדוּהוּ׃
englishText: Yea, all kings shall prostrate themselves before him; All nations shall serve him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־יַצִּיל אֶבְיוֹן מְשַׁוֵּעַ וְעָנִי וְאֵין־עֹזֵר לוֹ׃
englishText: For he will deliver the needy when he crieth; the poor also, and him that hath no helper.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָחֹס עַל־דַּל וְאֶבְיוֹן וְנַפְשׁוֹת אֶבְיוֹנִים יוֹשִׁיעַ׃
englishText: He will have pity on the poor and needy, And the souls of the needy he will save.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִתּוֹךְ וּמֵחָמָס יִגְאַל נַפְשָׁם וְיֵיקַר דָּמָם בְּעֵינָיו׃
englishText: He will redeem their soul from oppression and violence, And precious will their blood be in his sight.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וִיחִי וְיִתֶּן־לוֹ מִזְּהַב שְׁבָא וְיִתְפַּלֵּל בַּעֲדוֹ תָמִיד כָּל־הַיּוֹם יְבָרֲכֶנְהוּ׃
englishText: That they may live, and that he may give them of the gold of Sheba, That they may pray for him continually, Yea, bless him all the day.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהִי פִסַּת־בַּר בָּאָרֶץ בְּרֹאשׁ הָרִים יִרְעַשׁ כַּלְּבָנוֹן פִּרְיוֹ וְיָצִיצוּ מֵעִיר כְּעֵשֶׂב הָאָרֶץ׃
englishText: May he be as a rich cornfield in the land upon the top of the mountains; May his fruit rustle like Lebanon; And may they blossom out of the city like grass of the earth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהִי שְׁמוֹ לְעוֹלָם לִפְנֵי־שֶׁמֶשׁ ינין [יִנּוֹן] שְׁמוֹ וְיִתְבָּרְכוּ בוֹ כָּל־גּוֹיִם יְאַשְּׁרוּהוּ׃
englishText: May his name endure for ever; May his name be continued as long as the sun; May men also bless themselves by him; May all nations call him happy.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בָּרוּךְ יְהוָה אֱלֹהִים אֱלֹהֵי יִשְׂרָאֵל עֹשֵׂה נִפְלָאוֹת לְבַדּוֹ׃
englishText: Blessed be the LORD God, the God of Israel, Who only doeth wondrous things;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבָרוּךְ שֵׁם כְּבוֹדוֹ לְעוֹלָם וְיִמָּלֵא כְבוֹדוֹ אֶת־כֹּל הָאָרֶץ אָמֵן וְאָמֵן׃
englishText: And blessed be His glorious name for ever; And let the whole earth be filled with His glory. Amen, and Amen.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כָּלּוּ תְפִלּוֹת דָּוִד בֶּן־יִשָׁי׃
englishText: The prayers of David the son of Jesse are ended.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִזְמוֹר לְאָסָף אַךְ טוֹב לְיִשְׂרָאֵל אֱלֹהִים לְבָרֵי לֵבָב׃
englishText: A Psalm of Asaph. Surely God is good to Israel, even to such as are pure in heart.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַאֲנִי כִּמְעַט נטוי [נָטָיוּ] רַגְלָי כְּאַיִן שפכה [שֻׁפְּכוּ] אֲשֻׁרָי׃
englishText: But as for me, my feet were almost gone; my steps had well nigh slipped.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־קִנֵּאתִי בַּהוֹלְלִים שְׁלוֹם רְשָׁעִים אֶרְאֶה׃
englishText: For I was envious at the arrogant, when I saw the prosperity of the wicked.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי אֵין חַרְצֻבּוֹת לְמוֹתָם וּבָרִיא אוּלָם׃
englishText: For there are no pangs at their death, and their body is sound.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בַּעֲמַל אֱנוֹשׁ אֵינֵמוֹ וְעִם־אָדָם לֹא יְנֻגָּעוּ׃
englishText: In the trouble of man they are not; neither are they plagued like men.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לָכֵן עֲנָקַתְמוֹ גַאֲוָה יַעֲטָף־שִׁית חָמָס לָמוֹ׃
englishText: Therefore pride is as a chain about their neck; violence covereth them as a garment.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָצָא מֵחֵלֶב עֵינֵמוֹ עָבְרוּ מַשְׂכִּיּוֹת לֵבָב׃
englishText: Their eyes stand forth from fatness; they are gone beyond the imaginations of their heart.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָמִיקוּ וִידַבְּרוּ בְרָע עֹשֶׁק מִמָּרוֹם יְדַבֵּרוּ׃
englishText: They scoff, and in wickedness utter oppression; they speak as if there were none on high.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שַׁתּוּ בַשָּׁמַיִם פִּיהֶם וּלְשׁוֹנָם תִּהֲלַךְ בָּאָרֶץ׃
englishText: They have set their mouth against the heavens, And their tongue walketh through the earth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לָכֵן ישיב [יָשׁוּב] עַמּוֹ הֲלֹם וּמֵי מָלֵא יִמָּצוּ לָמוֹ׃
englishText: Therefore His people return hither; And waters of fullness are drained out by them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאָמְרוּ אֵיכָה יָדַע־אֵל וְיֵשׁ דֵּעָה בְעֶלְיוֹן׃
englishText: And they say: 'How doth God know? And is there knowledge in the Most High?'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הִנֵּה־אֵלֶּה רְשָׁעִים וְשַׁלְוֵי עוֹלָם הִשְׂגּוּ־חָיִל׃
englishText: Behold, such are the wicked; And they that are always at ease increase riches.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַךְ־רִיק זִכִּיתִי לְבָבִי וָאֶרְחַץ בְּנִקָּיוֹן כַּפָּי׃
englishText: Surely in vain have I cleansed my heart, And washed my hands in innocency;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וָאֱהִי נָגוּעַ כָּל־הַיּוֹם וְתוֹכַחְתִּי לַבְּקָרִים׃
englishText: For all the day have I been plagued, And my chastisement came every morning.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־אָמַרְתִּי אֲסַפְּרָה כְמוֹ הִנֵּה דוֹר בָּנֶיךָ בָגָדְתִּי׃
englishText: If I had said: 'I will speak thus', Behold, I had been faithless to the generation of Thy children.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וָאֲחַשְּׁבָה לָדַעַת זֹאת עָמָל היא [הוּא] בְעֵינָי׃
englishText: And when I pondered how I might know this, It was wearisome in mine eyes;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַד־אָבוֹא אֶל־מִקְדְּשֵׁי־אֵל אָבִינָה לְאַחֲרִיתָם׃
englishText: Until I entered into the sanctuary of God, And considered their end.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַךְ בַּחֲלָקוֹת תָּשִׁית לָמוֹ הִפַּלְתָּם לְמַשּׁוּאוֹת׃
englishText: Surely Thou settest them in slippery places; Thou hurlest them down to utter ruin.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֵיךְ הָיוּ לְשַׁמָּה כְרָגַע סָפוּ תַמּוּ מִן־בַּלָּהוֹת׃
englishText: How are they become a desolation in a moment! They are wholly consumed by terrors.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כַּחֲלוֹם מֵהָקִיץ אֲדֹנָי בָּעִיר צַלְמָם תִּבְזֶה׃
englishText: As a dream when one awaketh, So, O Lord, when Thou arousest Thyself, Thou wilt despise their semblance.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי יִתְחַמֵּץ לְבָבִי וְכִלְיוֹתַי אֶשְׁתּוֹנָן׃
englishText: For my heart was in a ferment, And I was pricked in my reins. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַאֲנִי־בַעַר וְלֹא אֵדָע בְּהֵמוֹת הָיִיתִי עִמָּךְ׃
englishText: But I was brutish, and ignorant; I was as a beast before Thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַאֲנִי תָמִיד עִמָּךְ אָחַזְתָּ בְּיַד־יְמִינִי׃
englishText: Nevertheless I am continually with Thee; Thou holdest my right hand.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בַּעֲצָתְךָ תַנְחֵנִי וְאַחַר כָּבוֹד תִּקָּחֵנִי׃
englishText: Thou wilt guide me with Thy counsel, And afterward receive me with glory.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִי־לִי בַשָּׁמָיִם וְעִמְּךָ לֹא־חָפַצְתִּי בָאָרֶץ׃
englishText: Whom have I in heaven but Thee? And beside Thee I desire none upon earth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כָּלָה שְׁאֵרִי וּלְבָבִי צוּר־לְבָבִי וְחֶלְקִי אֱלֹהִים לְעוֹלָם׃
englishText: My flesh and my heart faileth; But God is the rock of my heart and my portion for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־הִנֵּה רְחֵקֶיךָ יֹאבֵדוּ הִצְמַתָּה כָּל־זוֹנֶה מִמֶּךָּ׃
englishText: For, lo, they that go far from Thee shall perish; Thou dost destroy all them that go astray from Thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַאֲנִי קִרֲבַת אֱלֹהִים לִי־טוֹב שַׁתִּי בַּאדֹנָי יְהֹוִה מַחְסִי לְסַפֵּר כָּל־מַלְאֲכוֹתֶיךָ׃
englishText: But as for me, the nearness of God is my good; I have made the Lord GOD my refuge, That I may tell of all Thy works.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַשְׂכִּיל לְאָסָף לָמָה אֱלֹהִים זָנַחְתָּ לָנֶצַח יֶעְשַׁן אַפְּךָ בְּצֹאן מַרְעִיתֶךָ׃
englishText: Maschil of Asaph. Why, O God, hast Thou cast us off for ever? Why doth Thine anger smoke against the flock of Thy pasture?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זְכֹר עֲדָתְךָ קָנִיתָ קֶּדֶם גָּאַלְתָּ שֵׁבֶט נַחֲלָתֶךָ הַר־צִיּוֹן זֶה שָׁכַנְתָּ בּוֹ׃
englishText: Remember Thy congregation, which Thou hast gotten of old, Which Thou hast redeemed to be the tribe of Thine inheritance; And mount Zion, wherein Thou hast dwelt.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הָרִימָה פְעָמֶיךָ לְמַשֻּׁאוֹת נֶצַח כָּל־הֵרַע אוֹיֵב בַּקֹּדֶשׁ׃
englishText: Lift up Thy steps because of the perpetual ruins, Even all the evil that the enemy hath done in the sanctuary.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׁאֲגוּ צֹרְרֶיךָ בְּקֶרֶב מוֹעֲדֶךָ שָׂמוּ אוֹתֹתָם אֹתוֹת׃
englishText: Thine adversaries have roared in the midst of Thy meeting-place; They have set up their own signs for signs.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִוָּדַע כְּמֵבִיא לְמָעְלָה בִּסֲבָךְ־עֵץ קַרְדֻּמּוֹת׃
englishText: It seemed as when men wield upwards Axes in a thicket of trees.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: ועת [וְעַתָּה] פִּתּוּחֶיהָ יָּחַד בְּכַשִּׁיל וְכֵילַפֹּת יַהֲלֹמוּן׃
englishText: And now all the carved work thereof together They strike down with hatchet and hammers.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׁלְחוּ בָאֵשׁ מִקְדָּשֶׁךָ לָאָרֶץ חִלְּלוּ מִשְׁכַּן־שְׁמֶךָ׃
englishText: They have set Thy sanctuary on fire; They have profaned the dwelling-place of Thy name even to the ground.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָמְרוּ בְלִבָּם נִינָם יָחַד שָׂרְפוּ כָל־מוֹעֲדֵי־אֵל בָּאָרֶץ׃
englishText: They said in their heart: 'Let us make havoc of them altogether'; They have burned up all the meeting-places of God in the land.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אוֹתֹתֵינוּ לֹא רָאִינוּ אֵין־עוֹד נָבִיא וְלֹא־אִתָּנוּ יֹדֵעַ עַד־מָה׃
englishText: We see not our signs; There is no more any prophet; Neither is there among us any that knoweth how long.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַד־מָתַי אֱלֹהִים יְחָרֶף צָר יְנָאֵץ אוֹיֵב שִׁמְךָ לָנֶצַח׃
englishText: How long, O God, shall the adversary reproach? Shall the enemy blaspheme Thy name for ever?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לָמָּה תָשִׁיב יָדְךָ וִימִינֶךָ מִקֶּרֶב חוקך [חֵיקְךָ] כַלֵּה׃
englishText: Why withdrawest Thou Thy hand, even Thy right hand? Draw it out of Thy bosom and consume them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וֵאלֹהִים מַלְכִּי מִקֶּדֶם פֹּעֵל יְשׁוּעוֹת בְּקֶרֶב הָאָרֶץ׃
englishText: Yet God is my King of old, Working salvation in the midst of the earth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַתָּה פוֹרַרְתָּ בְעָזְּךָ יָם שִׁבַּרְתָּ רָאשֵׁי תַנִּינִים עַל־הַמָּיִם׃
englishText: Thou didst break the sea in pieces by Thy strength; Thou didst shatter the heads of the sea-monsters in the waters.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַתָּה רִצַּצְתָּ רָאשֵׁי לִוְיָתָן תִּתְּנֶנּוּ מַאֲכָל לְעָם לְצִיִּים׃
englishText: Thou didst crush the heads of leviathan, Thou gavest him to be food to the folk inhabiting the wilderness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַתָּה בָקַעְתָּ מַעְיָן וָנָחַל אַתָּה הוֹבַשְׁתָּ נַהֲרוֹת אֵיתָן׃
englishText: Thou didst cleave fountain and brook; Thou driedst up ever-flowing rivers.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְךָ יוֹם אַף־לְךָ לָיְלָה אַתָּה הֲכִינוֹתָ מָאוֹר וָשָׁמֶשׁ׃
englishText: Thine is the day, Thine also the night; Thou hast established luminary and sun.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַתָּה הִצַּבְתָּ כָּל־גְּבוּלוֹת אָרֶץ קַיִץ וָחֹרֶף אַתָּה יְצַרְתָּם׃
englishText: Thou hast set all the borders of the earth; Thou hast made summer and winter.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זְכָר־זֹאת אוֹיֵב חֵרֵף יְהוָה וְעַם נָבָל נִאֲצוּ שְׁמֶךָ׃
englishText: Remember this, how the enemy hath reproached the LORD, And how a base people have blasphemed Thy name.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תִּתֵּן לְחַיַּת נֶפֶשׁ תּוֹרֶךָ חַיַּת עֲנִיֶּיךָ אַל־תִּשְׁכַּח לָנֶצַח׃
englishText: O deliver not the soul of Thy turtle-dove unto the wild beast; Forget not the life of Thy poor for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַבֵּט לַבְּרִית כִּי מָלְאוּ מַחֲשַׁכֵּי־אֶרֶץ נְאוֹת חָמָס׃
englishText: Look upon the covenant; For the dark places of the land are full of the habitations of violence.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־יָשֹׁב דַּךְ נִכְלָם עָנִי וְאֶבְיוֹן יְהַלְלוּ שְׁמֶךָ׃
englishText: O let not the oppressed turn back in confusion; Let the poor and needy praise Thy name.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קוּמָה אֱלֹהִים רִיבָה רִיבֶךָ זְכֹר חֶרְפָּתְךָ מִנִּי־נָבָל כָּל־הַיּוֹם׃
englishText: Arise, O God, plead Thine own cause; Remember Thy reproach all the day at the hand of the base man.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תִּשְׁכַּח קוֹל צֹרְרֶיךָ שְׁאוֹן קָמֶיךָ עֹלֶה תָמִיד׃
englishText: Forget not the voice of Thine adversaries, The tumult of those that rise up against Thee which ascendeth continually.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ אַל־תַּשְׁחֵת מִזְמוֹר לְאָסָף שִׁיר׃
englishText: For the Leader; Al-tashheth. A Psalm of Asaph, a Song.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הוֹדִינוּ לְּךָ אֱ‍לֹהִים הוֹדִינוּ וְקָרוֹב שְׁמֶךָ סִפְּרוּ נִפְלְאוֹתֶיךָ׃
englishText: We give thanks unto Thee, O God, We give thanks, and Thy name is near; Men tell of Thy wondrous works.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי אֶקַּח מוֹעֵד אֲנִי מֵישָׁרִים אֶשְׁפֹּט׃
englishText: 'When I take the appointed time, I Myself will judge with equity.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נְמֹגִים אֶרֶץ וְכָל־יֹשְׁבֶיהָ אָנֹכִי תִכַּנְתִּי עַמּוּדֶיהָ סֶּלָה׃
englishText: When the earth and all the inhabitants thereof are dissolved, I Myself establish the pillars of it.' Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָמַרְתִּי לַהוֹלְלִים אַל־תָּהֹלּוּ וְלָרְשָׁעִים אַל־תָּרִימוּ קָרֶן׃
englishText: I say unto the arrogant 'Deal not arrogantly'; And to the wicked 'Lift not up the horn.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תָּרִימוּ לַמָּרוֹם קַרְנְכֶם תְּדַבְּרוּ בְצַוָּאר עָתָק׃
englishText: Lift not up your horn on high; Speak not insolence with a haughty neck.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי לֹא מִמּוֹצָא וּמִמַּעֲרָב וְלֹא מִמִּדְבַּר הָרִים׃
englishText: For neither from the east, nor from the west, Nor yet from the wilderness, cometh lifting up.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־אֱלֹהִים שֹׁפֵט זֶה יַשְׁפִּיל וְזֶה יָרִים׃
englishText: For God is judge; He putteth down one, and lifteth up another.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי כוֹס בְּיַד־יְהוָה וְיַיִן חָמַר מָלֵא מֶסֶךְ וַיַּגֵּר מִזֶּה אַךְ־שְׁמָרֶיהָ יִמְצוּ יִשְׁתּוּ כֹּל רִשְׁעֵי־אָרֶץ׃
englishText: For in the hand of the LORD there is a cup, with foaming wine, full of mixture, And He poureth out of the same; Surely the dregs thereof, all the wicked of the earth shall drain them, and drink them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַאֲנִי אַגִּיד לְעֹלָם אֲזַמְּרָה לֵאלֹהֵי יַעֲקֹב׃
englishText: But as for me, I will declare for ever, I will sing praises to the God of Jacob.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְכָל־קַרְנֵי רְשָׁעִים אֲגַדֵּעַ תְּרוֹמַמְנָה קַרְנוֹת צַדִּיק׃
englishText: All the horns of the wicked also will I cut off; But the horns of the righteous shall be lifted up.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ בִּנְגִינֹת מִזְמוֹר לְאָסָף שִׁיר׃
englishText: For the Leader; with string-music. A Psalm of Asaph, a Song.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נוֹדָע בִּיהוּדָה אֱלֹהִים בְּיִשְׂרָאֵל גָּדוֹל שְׁמוֹ׃
englishText: In Judah is God known; His name is great in Israel.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיְהִי בְשָׁלֵם סֻכּוֹ וּמְעוֹנָתוֹ בְצִיּוֹן׃
englishText: In Salem also is set His tabernacle, And His dwelling-place in Zion.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׁמָּה שִׁבַּר רִשְׁפֵי־קָשֶׁת מָגֵן וְחֶרֶב וּמִלְחָמָה סֶלָה׃
englishText: There He broke the fiery shafts of the bow; The shield, and the sword, and the battle. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נָאוֹר אַתָּה אַדִּיר מֵהַרְרֵי־טָרֶף׃
englishText: Glorious art Thou and excellent, coming down from the mountains of prey.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֶשְׁתּוֹלְלוּ אַבִּירֵי לֵב נָמוּ שְׁנָתָם וְלֹא־מָצְאוּ כָל־אַנְשֵׁי־חַיִל יְדֵיהֶם׃
englishText: The stout-hearted are bereft of sense, they sleep their sleep; And none of the men of might have found their hands.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִגַּעֲרָתְךָ אֱלֹהֵי יַעֲקֹב נִרְדָּם וְרֶכֶב וָסוּס׃
englishText: At Thy rebuke, O God of Jacob, They are cast into a dead sleep, the riders also and the horses.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַתָּה נוֹרָא אַתָּה וּמִי־יַעֲמֹד לְפָנֶיךָ מֵאָז אַפֶּךָ׃
englishText: Thou, even Thou, art terrible; And who may stand in Thy sight when once Thou art angry?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִשָּׁמַיִם הִשְׁמַעְתָּ דִּין אֶרֶץ יָרְאָה וְשָׁקָטָה׃
englishText: Thou didst cause sentence to be heard from heaven; The earth feared, and was still,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּקוּם־לַמִּשְׁפָּט אֱלֹהִים לְהוֹשִׁיעַ כָּל־עַנְוֵי־אֶרֶץ סֶלָה׃
englishText: When God arose to judgment, To save all the humble of the earth. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־חֲמַת אָדָם תּוֹדֶךָּ שְׁאֵרִית חֵמֹת תַּחְגֹּר׃
englishText: Surely the wrath of man shall praise Thee; The residue of wrath shalt Thou gird upon Thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נִדֲרוּ וְשַׁלְּמוּ לַיהוָה אֱ‍לֹהֵיכֶם כָּל־סְבִיבָיו יוֹבִילוּ שַׁי לַמּוֹרָא׃
englishText: Vow, and pay unto the LORD your God; Let all that are round about Him bring presents unto Him that is to be feared;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִבְצֹר רוּחַ נְגִידִים נוֹרָא לְמַלְכֵי־אָרֶץ׃
englishText: He minisheth the spirit of princes; He is terrible to the kings of the earth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ עַל־ידיתון [יְדוּתוּן] לְאָסָף מִזְמוֹר׃
englishText: For the Leader; for Jeduthun. A Psalm of Asaph.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קוֹלִי אֶל־אֱלֹהִים וְאֶצְעָקָה קוֹלִי אֶל־אֱלֹהִים וְהַאֲזִין אֵלָי׃
englishText: I will lift up my voice unto God, an cry; I will lift up my voice unto God, that He may give ear unto me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּיוֹם צָרָתִי אֲדֹנָי דָּרָשְׁתִּי יָדִי לַיְלָה נִגְּרָה וְלֹא תָפוּג מֵאֲנָה הִנָּחֵם נַפְשִׁי׃
englishText: In the day of my trouble I seek the Lord; With my hand uplifted, [mine eye] streameth in the night without ceasing; My soul refuseth to be comforted.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֶזְכְּרָה אֱלֹהִים וְאֶהֱמָיָה אָשִׂיחָה וְתִתְעַטֵּף רוּחִי סֶלָה׃
englishText: When I think thereon, O God, I must moan; When I muse thereon, my spirit fainteth. Selah .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָחַזְתָּ שְׁמֻרוֹת עֵינָי נִפְעַמְתִּי וְלֹא אֲדַבֵּר׃
englishText: Thou holdest fast the lids of mine eyes; I am troubled, and cannot speak.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חִשַּׁבְתִּי יָמִים מִקֶּדֶם שְׁנוֹת עוֹלָמִים׃
englishText: I have pondered the days of old, the years of ancient times.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֶזְכְּרָה נְגִינָתִי בַּלָּיְלָה עִם־לְבָבִי אָשִׂיחָה וַיְחַפֵּשׂ רוּחִי׃
englishText: In the night I will call to remembrance my song; I will commune with mine own heart; And my spirit maketh diligent search
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַלְעוֹלָמִים יִזְנַח אֲדֹנָי וְלֹא־יֹסִיף לִרְצוֹת עוֹד׃
englishText: 'Will the Lord cast off for ever? And will He be favourable no more?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֶאָפֵס לָנֶצַח חַסְדּוֹ גָּמַר אֹמֶר לְדֹר וָדֹר׃
englishText: Is His mercy clean gone for ever? Is His promise come to an end for evermore?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲשָׁכַח חַנּוֹת אֵל אִם־קָפַץ בְּאַף רַחֲמָיו סֶלָה׃
englishText: Hath God forgotten to be gracious? Hath He in anger shut up his compassions?' Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וָאֹמַר חַלּוֹתִי הִיא שְׁנוֹת יְמִין עֶלְיוֹן׃
englishText: And I say 'This is my weakness, That the right hand of the Most High could change.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אזכיר [אֶזְכּוֹר] מַעַלְלֵי־יָהּ כִּי־אֶזְכְּרָה מִקֶּדֶם פִּלְאֶךָ׃
englishText: I will make mention of the deeds of the LORD; Yea, I will remember Thy wonders of old.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְהָגִיתִי בְכָל־פָּעֳלֶךָ וּבַעֲלִילוֹתֶיךָ אָשִׂיחָה׃
englishText: I will meditate also upon all Thy work, And muse on Thy doings.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱלֹהִים בַּקֹּדֶשׁ דַּרְכֶּךָ מִי־אֵל גָּדוֹל כֵּאלֹהִים׃
englishText: O God, Thy way is in holiness; Who is a great god like unto God?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַתָּה הָאֵל עֹשֵׂה פֶלֶא הוֹדַעְתָּ בָעַמִּים עֻזֶּךָ׃
englishText: Thou art the God that doest wonders; Thou hast made known Thy strength among the peoples.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גָּאַלְתָּ בִּזְרוֹעַ עַמֶּךָ בְּנֵי־יַעֲקֹב וְיוֹסֵף סֶלָה׃
englishText: Thou hast with Thine arm redeemed Thy people, The sons of Jacob and Joseph. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רָאוּךָ מַּיִם אֱ‍לֹהִים רָאוּךָ מַּיִם יָחִילוּ אַף יִרְגְּזוּ תְהֹמוֹת׃
englishText: The waters saw Thee, O God; The waters saw Thee, they were in pain; The depths also trembled.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זֹרְמוּ מַיִם עָבוֹת קוֹל נָתְנוּ שְׁחָקִים אַף־חֲצָצֶיךָ יִתְהַלָּכוּ׃
englishText: The clouds flooded forth waters; The skies sent out a sound; Thine arrows also went abroad.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קוֹל רַעַמְךָ בַּגַּלְגַּל הֵאִירוּ בְרָקִים תֵּבֵל רָגְזָה וַתִּרְעַשׁ הָאָרֶץ׃
englishText: The voice of Thy thunder was in the whirlwind; The lightnings lighted up the world; The earth trembled and shook.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בַּיָּם דַּרְכֶּךָ ושביליך [וּשְׁבִילְךָ] בְּמַיִם רַבִּים וְעִקְּבוֹתֶיךָ לֹא נֹדָעוּ׃
englishText: Thy way was in the sea, And Thy path in the great waters, And Thy footsteps were not known.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נָחִיתָ כַצֹּאן עַמֶּךָ בְּיַד־מֹשֶׁה וְאַהֲרֹן׃
englishText: Thou didst lead Thy people like a flock, By the hand of Moses and Aaron.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַשְׂכִּיל לְאָסָף הַאֲזִינָה עַמִּי תּוֹרָתִי הַטּוּ אָזְנְכֶם לְאִמְרֵי־פִי׃
englishText: Maschil of Asaph. Give ear, O my people, to my teaching; Incline your ears to the words of my mouth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֶפְתְּחָה בְמָשָׁל פִּי אַבִּיעָה חִידוֹת מִנִּי־קֶדֶם׃
englishText: I will open my mouth with a parable; I will utter dark sayings concerning days of old;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲשֶׁר שָׁמַעְנוּ וַנֵּדָעֵם וַאֲבוֹתֵינוּ סִפְּרוּ־לָנוּ׃
englishText: That which we have heard and known, And our fathers have told us,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא נְכַחֵד מִבְּנֵיהֶם לְדוֹר אַחֲרוֹן מְסַפְּרִים תְּהִלּוֹת יְהוָה וֶעֱזוּזוֹ וְנִפְלְאוֹתָיו אֲשֶׁר עָשָׂה׃
englishText: We will not hide from their children, Telling to the generation to come the praises of the LORD, And His strength, and His wondrous works that He hath done. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיָּקֶם עֵדוּת בְּיַעֲקֹב וְתוֹרָה שָׂם בְּיִשְׂרָאֵל אֲשֶׁר צִוָּה אֶת־אֲבוֹתֵינוּ לְהוֹדִיעָם לִבְנֵיהֶם׃
englishText: For He established a testimony in Jacob, And appointed a law in Israel, Which He commanded our fathers, That they should make them known to their children;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְמַעַן יֵדְעוּ דּוֹר אַחֲרוֹן בָּנִים יִוָּלֵדוּ יָקֻמוּ וִיסַפְּרוּ לִבְנֵיהֶם׃
englishText: That the generation to come might know them, even the children that should be born; Who should arise and tell them to their children,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְיָשִׂימוּ בֵאלֹהִים כִּסְלָם וְלֹא יִשְׁכְּחוּ מַעַלְלֵי־אֵל וּמִצְוֺתָיו יִנְצֹרוּ׃
englishText: That they might put their confidence in God, And not forget the works of God, But keep His commandments;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְלֹא יִהְיוּ כַּאֲבוֹתָם דּוֹר סוֹרֵר וּמֹרֶה דּוֹר לֹא־הֵכִין לִבּוֹ וְלֹא־נֶאֶמְנָה אֶת־אֵל רוּחוֹ׃
englishText: And might not be as their fathers, A stubborn and rebellious generation; A generation that set not their heart aright, And whose spirit was not stedfast with God.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנֵי־אֶפְרַיִם נוֹשְׁקֵי רוֹמֵי־קָשֶׁת הָפְכוּ בְּיוֹם קְרָב׃
englishText: The children of Ephraim were as archers handling the bow, That turned back in the day of battle.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא שָׁמְרוּ בְּרִית אֱלֹהִים וּבְתוֹרָתוֹ מֵאֲנוּ לָלֶכֶת׃
englishText: They kept not the covenant of God, And refused to walk in His law;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּשְׁכְּחוּ עֲלִילוֹתָיו וְנִפְלְאוֹתָיו אֲשֶׁר הֶרְאָם׃
englishText: And they forgot His doings, And His wondrous works that He had shown them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נֶגֶד אֲבוֹתָם עָשָׂה פֶלֶא בְּאֶרֶץ מִצְרַיִם שְׂדֵה־צֹעַן׃
englishText: Marvellous things did He in the sight of their fathers, In the land of Egypt, in the field of Zoan.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בָּקַע יָם וַיַּעֲבִירֵם וַיַּצֶּב־מַיִם כְּמוֹ־נֵד׃
englishText: He cleaved the sea, and caused them to pass through; And He made the waters to stand as a heap.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּנְחֵם בֶּעָנָן יוֹמָם וְכָל־הַלַּיְלָה בְּאוֹר אֵשׁ׃
englishText: By day also He led them with a cloud, And all the night with a light of fire.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְבַקַּע צֻרִים בַּמִּדְבָּר וַיַּשְׁקְ כִּתְהֹמוֹת רַבָּה׃
englishText: He cleaved rocks in the wilderness, And gave them drink abundantly as out of the great deep.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיּוֹצִא נוֹזְלִים מִסָּלַע וַיּוֹרֶד כַּנְּהָרוֹת מָיִם׃
englishText: He brought streams also out of the rock, And caused waters to run down like rivers.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיּוֹסִיפוּ עוֹד לַחֲטֹא־לוֹ לַמְרוֹת עֶלְיוֹן בַּצִּיָּה׃
englishText: Yet went they on still to sin against Him, To rebel against the Most High in the desert.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיְנַסּוּ־אֵל בִּלְבָבָם לִשְׁאָל־אֹכֶל לְנַפְשָׁם׃
englishText: And they tried God in their heart By asking food for their craving.
