versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיְדַבְּרוּ בֵּאלֹהִים אָמְרוּ הֲיוּכַל אֵל לַעֲרֹךְ שֻׁלְחָן בַּמִּדְבָּר׃
englishText: Yea, they spoke against God; They said 'Can God prepare a table in the wilderness?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֵן הִכָּה־צוּר וַיָּזוּבוּ מַיִם וּנְחָלִים יִשְׁטֹפוּ הֲגַם־לֶחֶם יוּכַל תֵּת אִם־יָכִין שְׁאֵר לְעַמּוֹ׃
englishText: Behold, He smote the rock, that waters gushed out, And streams overflowed; Can He give bread also? Or will He provide flesh for His people?'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לָכֵן שָׁמַע יְהוָה וַיִּתְעַבָּר וְאֵשׁ נִשְּׂקָה בְיַעֲקֹב וְגַם־אַף עָלָה בְיִשְׂרָאֵל׃
englishText: Therefore the LORD heard, and was wroth; And a fire was kindled against Jacob, And anger also went up against Israel;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי לֹא הֶאֱמִינוּ בֵּאלֹהִים וְלֹא בָטְחוּ בִּישׁוּעָתוֹ׃
englishText: Because they believed not in God, And trusted not in His salvation.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיְצַו שְׁחָקִים מִמָּעַל וְדַלְתֵי שָׁמַיִם פָּתָח׃
englishText: And He commanded the skies above, And opened the doors of heaven;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּמְטֵר עֲלֵיהֶם מָן לֶאֱכֹל וּדְגַן־שָׁמַיִם נָתַן לָמוֹ׃
englishText: And He caused manna to rain upon them for food, And gave them of the corn of heaven.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֶחֶם אַבִּירִים אָכַל אִישׁ צֵידָה שָׁלַח לָהֶם לָשֹׂבַע׃
englishText: Man did eat the bread of the mighty; He sent them provisions to the full.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יַסַּע קָדִים בַּשָּׁמָיִם וַיְנַהֵג בְּעֻזּוֹ תֵימָן׃
englishText: He caused the east wind to set forth in heaven; And by His power He brought on the south wind.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּמְטֵר עֲלֵיהֶם כֶּעָפָר שְׁאֵר וּכְחוֹל יַמִּים עוֹף כָּנָף׃
englishText: He caused flesh also to rain upon them as the dust, And winged fowl as the sand of the seas;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּפֵּל בְּקֶרֶב מַחֲנֵהוּ סָבִיב לְמִשְׁכְּנֹתָיו׃
englishText: And He let it fall in the midst of their camp, Round about their dwellings.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיֹּאכְלוּ וַיִּשְׂבְּעוּ מְאֹד וְתַאֲוָתָם יָבִא לָהֶם׃
englishText: So they did eat, and were well filled; And He gave them that which they craved.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא־זָרוּ מִתַּאֲוָתָם עוֹד אָכְלָם בְּפִיהֶם׃
englishText: They were not estranged from their craving, Their food was yet in their mouths,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאַף אֱלֹהִים עָלָה בָהֶם וַיַּהֲרֹג בְּמִשְׁמַנֵּיהֶם וּבַחוּרֵי יִשְׂרָאֵל הִכְרִיעַ׃
englishText: When the anger of God went up against them, And slew of the lustieth among them, And smote down the young men of Israel.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּכָל־זֹאת חָטְאוּ־עוֹד וְלֹא־הֶאֱמִינוּ בְּנִפְלְאוֹתָיו׃
englishText: For all this they sinned still, And believed not in His wondrous works.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיְכַל־בַּהֶבֶל יְמֵיהֶם וּשְׁנוֹתָם בַּבֶּהָלָה׃
englishText: Therefore He ended their days as a breath, And their years in terror.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־הֲרָגָם וּדְרָשׁוּהוּ וְשָׁבוּ וְשִׁחֲרוּ־אֵל׃
englishText: When He slew them, then they would inquire after Him, And turn back and seek God earnestly.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּזְכְּרוּ כִּי־אֱלֹהִים צוּרָם וְאֵל עֶלְיוֹן גֹּאֲלָם׃
englishText: And they remembered that God was their Rock, And the Most High God their redeemer.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיְפַתּוּהוּ בְּפִיהֶם וּבִלְשׁוֹנָם יְכַזְּבוּ־לוֹ׃
englishText: But they beguiled Him with their mouth, And lied unto Him with their tongue.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְלִבָּם לֹא־נָכוֹן עִמּוֹ וְלֹא נֶאֶמְנוּ בִּבְרִיתוֹ׃
englishText: For their heart was not stedfast with Him, Neither were they faithful in His covenant.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְהוּא רַחוּם יְכַפֵּר עָוֺן וְלֹא־יַשְׁחִית וְהִרְבָּה לְהָשִׁיב אַפּוֹ וְלֹא־יָעִיר כָּל־חֲמָתוֹ׃
englishText: But He, being full of compassion, forgiveth iniquity, and destroyeth not; Yea, many a time doth He turn His anger away, And doth not stir up all His wrath.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּזְכֹּר כִּי־בָשָׂר הֵמָּה רוּחַ הוֹלֵךְ וְלֹא יָשׁוּב׃
englishText: So He remembered that they were but flesh, A wind that passeth away, and cometh not again.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כַּמָּה יַמְרוּהוּ בַמִּדְבָּר יַעֲצִיבוּהוּ בִּישִׁימוֹן׃
englishText: How oft did they rebel against Him in the wilderness, And grieve Him in the desert!
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיָּשׁוּבוּ וַיְנַסּוּ אֵל וּקְדוֹשׁ יִשְׂרָאֵל הִתְווּ׃
englishText: And still again they tried God, And set bounds to the Holy One of Israel.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא־זָכְרוּ אֶת־יָדוֹ יוֹם אֲ‍שֶׁר־פָּדָם מִנִּי־צָר׃
englishText: They remembered not His hand, Nor the day when He redeemed them from the adversary.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲשֶׁר־שָׂם בְּמִצְרַיִם אֹתוֹתָיו וּמוֹפְתָיו בִּשְׂדֵה־צֹעַן׃
englishText: How He set His signs in Egypt, And His wonders in the field of Zoan; .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּהֲפֹךְ לְדָם יְאֹרֵיהֶם וְנֹזְלֵיהֶם בַּל־יִשְׁתָּיוּן׃
englishText: And turned their rivers into blood, So that they could not drink their streams.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְשַׁלַּח בָּהֶם עָרֹב וַיֹּאכְלֵם וּצְפַרְדֵּעַ וַתַּשְׁחִיתֵם׃
englishText: He sent among them swarms of flies, which devoured them; And frogs, which destroyed them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּתֵּן לֶחָסִיל יְבוּלָם וִיגִיעָם לָאַרְבֶּה׃
englishText: He gave also their increase unto the caterpillar, And their labour unto the locust.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יַהֲרֹג בַּבָּרָד גַּפְנָם וְשִׁקְמוֹתָם בַּחֲנָמַל׃
englishText: He destroyed their vines with hail, And their sycamore-trees with frost.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּסְגֵּר לַבָּרָד בְּעִירָם וּמִקְנֵיהֶם לָרְשָׁפִים׃
englishText: He gave over their cattle also to the hail, And their flocks to fiery bolts.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְשַׁלַּח־בָּם חֲרוֹן אַפּוֹ עֶבְרָה וָזַעַם וְצָרָה מִשְׁלַחַת מַלְאֲכֵי רָעִים׃
englishText: He sent forth upon them the fierceness of His anger, Wrath, and indignation, and trouble, A sending of messengers of evil.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְפַלֵּס נָתִיב לְאַפּוֹ לֹא־חָשַׂךְ מִמָּוֶת נַפְשָׁם וְחַיָּתָם לַדֶּבֶר הִסְגִּיר׃
englishText: He levelled a path for His anger; He spared not their soul from death, But gave their life over to the pestilence;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּךְ כָּל־בְּכוֹר בְּמִצְרָיִם רֵאשִׁית אוֹנִים בְּאָהֳלֵי־חָם׃
englishText: And smote all the first-born in Egypt, The first-fruits of their strength in the tents of Ham;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּסַּע כַּצֹּאן עַמּוֹ וַיְנַהֲגֵם כַּעֵדֶר בַּמִּדְבָּר׃
englishText: But He made His own people to go forth like sheep, And guided them in the wilderness like a flock.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּנְחֵם לָבֶטַח וְלֹא פָחָדוּ וְאֶת־אוֹיְבֵיהֶם כִּסָּה הַיָּם׃
englishText: And He led them safely, and they feared not; But the sea overwhelmed their enemies.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיְבִיאֵם אֶל־גְּבוּל קָדְשׁוֹ הַר־זֶה קָנְתָה יְמִינוֹ׃
englishText: And He brought them to His holy border, To the mountain, which His right hand had gotten.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיְגָרֶשׁ מִפְּנֵיהֶם גּוֹיִם וַיַּפִּילֵם בְּחֶבֶל נַחֲלָה וַיַּשְׁכֵּן בְּאָהֳלֵיהֶם שִׁבְטֵי יִשְׂרָאֵל׃
englishText: He drove out the nations also before them, And allotted them for an inheritance by line, And made the tribes of Israel to dwell in their tents.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיְנַסּוּ וַיַּמְרוּ אֶת־אֱלֹהִים עֶלְיוֹן וְעֵדוֹתָיו לֹא שָׁמָרוּ׃
englishText: Yet they tried and provoked God, the Most High, And kept not His testimonies;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּסֹּגוּ וַיִּבְגְּדוּ כַּאֲבוֹתָם נֶהְפְּכוּ כְּקֶשֶׁת רְמִיָּה׃
englishText: But turned back, and dealt treacherously like their fathers; They were turned aside like a deceitful bow.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּכְעִיסוּהוּ בְּבָמוֹתָם וּבִפְסִילֵיהֶם יַקְנִיאוּהוּ׃
englishText: For they provoked Him with their high places, And moved Him to jealousy with their graven images.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׁמַע אֱלֹהִים וַיִּתְעַבָּר וַיִּמְאַס מְאֹד בְּיִשְׂרָאֵל׃
englishText: God heard, and was wroth, And He greatly abhorred Israel;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּטֹּשׁ מִשְׁכַּן שִׁלוֹ אֹהֶל שִׁכֵּן בָּאָדָם׃
englishText: And He forsook the tabernacle of Shiloh, The tent which He had made to dwell among men;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּתֵּן לַשְּׁבִי עֻזּוֹ וְתִפְאַרְתּוֹ בְיַד־צָר׃
englishText: And delivered His strength into captivity, And His glory into the adversary's hand.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּסְגֵּר לַחֶרֶב עַמּוֹ וּבְנַחֲלָתוֹ הִתְעַבָּר׃
englishText: He gave His people over also unto the sword; And was wroth with His inheritance.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בַּחוּרָיו אָכְלָה־אֵשׁ וּבְתוּלֹתָיו לֹא הוּלָּלוּ׃
englishText: Fire devoured their young men; And their virgins had no marriage-song.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כֹּהֲנָיו בַּחֶרֶב נָפָלוּ וְאַלְמְנֹתָיו לֹא תִבְכֶּינָה׃
englishText: Their priests fell by the sword; And their widows made no lamentation. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּקַץ כְּיָשֵׁן אֲדֹנָי כְּגִבּוֹר מִתְרוֹנֵן מִיָּיִן׃
englishText: Then the Lord awaked as one asleep, Like a mighty man recovering from wine.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּךְ־צָרָיו אָחוֹר חֶרְפַּת עוֹלָם נָתַן לָמוֹ׃
englishText: And He smote His adversaries backward; He put upon them a perpetual reproach.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּמְאַס בְּאֹהֶל יוֹסֵף וּבְשֵׁבֶט אֶפְרַיִם לֹא בָחָר׃
englishText: Moreover He abhorred the tent of Joseph, And chose not the tribe of Ephraim;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּבְחַר אֶת־שֵׁבֶט יְהוּדָה אֶת־הַר צִיּוֹן אֲשֶׁר אָהֵב׃
englishText: But chose the tribe of Judah, The mount Zion which He loved.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּבֶן כְּמוֹ־רָמִים מִקְדָּשׁוֹ כְּאֶרֶץ יְסָדָהּ לְעוֹלָם׃
englishText: And He built His sanctuary like the heights, Like the earth which He hath founded for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּבְחַר בְּדָוִד עַבְדּוֹ וַיִּקָּחֵהוּ מִמִּכְלְאֹת צֹאן׃
englishText: He chose David also His servant, And took him from the sheepfolds;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מֵאַחַר עָלוֹת הֱבִיאוֹ לִרְעוֹת בְּיַעֲקֹב עַמּוֹ וּבְיִשְׂרָאֵל נַחֲלָתוֹ׃
englishText: From following the ewes that give suck He brought him, To be shepherd over Jacob His people, and Israel His inheritance.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּרְעֵם כְּתֹם לְבָבוֹ וּבִתְבוּנוֹת כַּפָּיו יַנְחֵם׃
englishText: So he shepherded them according to the integrity of his heart; And lead them by the skilfulness of his hands.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִזְמוֹר לְאָסָף אֱ‍לֹהִים בָּאוּ גוֹיִם בְּנַחֲלָתֶךָ טִמְּאוּ אֶת־הֵיכַל קָדְשֶׁךָ שָׂמוּ אֶת־יְרוּשָׁלִַם לְעִיִּים׃
englishText: A Psalm of Asaph. O God, the heathen are come into Thine inheritance; They have defiled Thy holy temple; They have made Jerusalem into heaps.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נָתְנוּ אֶת־נִבְלַת עֲבָדֶיךָ מַאֲכָל לְעוֹף הַשָּׁמָיִם בְּשַׂר חֲסִידֶיךָ לְחַיְתוֹ־אָרֶץ׃
englishText: They have given the dead bodies of Thy servants to be food unto the fowls of the heaven, The flesh of Thy saints unto the beasts of the earth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׁפְכוּ דָמָם כַּמַּיִם סְבִיבוֹת יְרוּשָׁלִָם וְאֵין קוֹבֵר׃
englishText: They have shed their blood like water Round about Jerusalem, with none to bury them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הָיִינוּ חֶרְפָּה לִשְׁכֵנֵינוּ לַעַג וָקֶלֶס לִסְבִיבוֹתֵינוּ׃
englishText: We are become a taunt to our neighbours, A scorn and derision to them that are round about us.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַד־מָה יְהוָה תֶּאֱנַף לָנֶצַח תִּבְעַר כְּמוֹ־אֵשׁ קִנְאָתֶךָ׃
englishText: How long, O LORD, wilt Thou be angry for ever? How long will Thy jealousy burn like fire?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שְׁפֹךְ חֲמָתְךָ אֶל־הַגּוֹיִם אֲשֶׁר לֹא־יְדָעוּךָ וְעַל מַמְלָכוֹת אֲשֶׁר בְּשִׁמְךָ לֹא קָרָאוּ׃
englishText: Pour out Thy wrath upon the nations that know Thee not, And upon the kingdoms that call not upon Thy name.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי אָכַל אֶת־יַעֲקֹב וְאֶת־נָוֵהוּ הֵשַׁמּוּ׃
englishText: For they have devoured Jacob, And laid waste his habitation.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תִּזְכָּר־לָנוּ עֲוֺנֹת רִאשֹׁנִים מַהֵר יְקַדְּמוּנוּ רַחֲמֶיךָ כִּי דַלּוֹנוּ מְאֹד׃
englishText: Remember not against us the iniquities of our forefathers; Let Thy compassions speedily come to meet us; For we are brought very low.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עָזְרֵנוּ אֱלֹהֵי יִשְׁעֵנוּ עַל־דְּבַר כְּבוֹד־שְׁמֶךָ וְהַצִּילֵנוּ וְכַפֵּר עַל־חַטֹּאתֵינוּ לְמַעַן שְׁמֶךָ׃
englishText: Help us, O God of our salvation, for the sake of the glory of Thy name; And deliver us, and forgive our sins, for Thy name's sake.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לָמָּה יֹאמְרוּ הַגּוֹיִם אַיֵּה אֱ‍לֹהֵיהֶם יִוָּדַע בגיים [בַּגּוֹיִם] לְעֵינֵינוּ נִקְמַת דַּם־עֲבָדֶיךָ הַשָּׁפוּךְ׃
englishText: Wherefore should the nations say: 'Where is their God?' Let the avenging of Thy servants' blood that is shed Be made known among the nations in our sight. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תָּבוֹא לְפָנֶיךָ אֶנְקַת אָסִיר כְּגֹדֶל זְרוֹעֲךָ הוֹתֵר בְּנֵי תְמוּתָה׃
englishText: Let the groaning of the prisoner come before Thee; According to the greatness of Thy power set free those that are appointed to death;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְהָשֵׁב לִשְׁכֵנֵינוּ שִׁבְעָתַיִם אֶל־חֵיקָם חֶרְפָּתָם אֲשֶׁר חֵרְפוּךָ אֲדֹנָי׃
englishText: And render unto our neighbours sevenfold into their bosom Their reproach, wherewith they have reproached Thee, O Lord.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַאֲנַחְנוּ עַמְּךָ וְצֹאן מַרְעִיתֶךָ נוֹדֶה לְּךָ לְעוֹלָם לְדֹר וָדֹר נְסַפֵּר תְּהִלָּתֶךָ׃
englishText: So we that are Thy people and the flock of Thy pasture Will give Thee thanks for ever; We will tell of Thy praise to all generations.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ אֶל־שֹׁשַׁנִּים עֵדוּת לְאָסָף מִזְמוֹר׃
englishText: For the Leader; upon Shoshannim. A testimony. A Psalm of Asaph.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רֹעֵה יִשְׂרָאֵל הַאֲזִינָה נֹהֵג כַּצֹּאן יוֹסֵף יֹשֵׁב הַכְּרוּבִים הוֹפִיעָה׃
englishText: Give ear, O Shepherd of Israel, Thou that leadest Joseph like a flock; Thou that art enthroned upon the cherubim, shine forth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לִפְנֵי אֶפְרַיִם וּבִנְיָמִן וּמְנַשֶּׁה עוֹרְרָה אֶת־גְּבוּרָתֶךָ וּלְכָה לִישֻׁעָתָה לָּנוּ׃
englishText: Before Ephraim and Benjamin and Manasseh, stir up Thy might, And come to save us.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱלֹהִים הֲשִׁיבֵנוּ וְהָאֵר פָּנֶיךָ וְנִוָּשֵׁעָה׃
englishText: O God, restore us; And cause Thy face to shine, and we shall be saved.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה אֱלֹהִים צְבָאוֹת עַד־מָתַי עָשַׁנְתָּ בִּתְפִלַּת עַמֶּךָ׃
englishText: O LORD God of hosts, How long wilt Thou be angry against the prayer of Thy people?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֶאֱכַלְתָּם לֶחֶם דִּמְעָה וַתַּשְׁקֵמוֹ בִּדְמָעוֹת שָׁלִישׁ׃
englishText: Thou hast fed them with the bread of tears, And given them tears to drink in large measure.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תְּשִׂימֵנוּ מָדוֹן לִשְׁכֵנֵינוּ וְאֹיְבֵינוּ יִלְעֲגוּ־לָמוֹ׃
englishText: Thou makest us a strife unto our neighbours; And our enemies mock as they please.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱלֹהִים צְבָאוֹת הֲשִׁיבֵנוּ וְהָאֵר פָּנֶיךָ וְנִוָּשֵׁעָה׃
englishText: O God of hosts, restore us; And cause Thy face to shine, and we shall be saved.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גֶּפֶן מִמִּצְרַיִם תַּסִּיעַ תְּגָרֵשׁ גּוֹיִם וַתִּטָּעֶהָ׃
englishText: Thou didst pluck up a vine out of Egypt; Thou didst drive out the nations, and didst plant it.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פִּנִּיתָ לְפָנֶיהָ וַתַּשְׁרֵשׁ שָׁרָשֶׁיהָ וַתְּמַלֵּא־אָרֶץ׃
englishText: Thou didst clear a place before it, And it took deep root, and filled the land.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כָּסּוּ הָרִים צִלָּהּ וַעֲנָפֶיהָ אַרְזֵי־אֵל׃
englishText: The mountains were covered with the shadow of it, And the mighty cedars with the boughs thereof.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תְּשַׁלַּח קְצִירֶהָ עַד־יָם וְאֶל־נָהָר יוֹנְקוֹתֶיהָ׃
englishText: She sent out her branches unto the sea, And her shoots unto the River.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לָמָּה פָּרַצְתָּ גְדֵרֶיהָ וְאָרוּהָ כָּל־עֹבְרֵי דָרֶךְ׃
englishText: Why hast Thou broken down her fences, So that all they that pass by the way do pluck her?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְכַרְסְמֶנָּה חֲזִיר מִיָּעַר וְזִיז שָׂדַי יִרְעֶנָּה׃
englishText: The boar out of the wood doth ravage it, That which moveth in the field feedeth on it.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱלֹהִים צְבָאוֹת שׁוּב־נָא הַבֵּט מִשָּׁמַיִם וּרְאֵה וּפְקֹד גֶּפֶן זֹאת׃
englishText: O God of hosts, return, we beseech Thee; Look from heaven, and behold, and be mindful of this vine,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְכַנָּה אֲשֶׁר־נָטְעָה יְמִינֶךָ וְעַל־בֵּן אִמַּצְתָּה לָּךְ׃
englishText: And of the stock which Thy right hand hath planted, And the branch that Thou madest strong for Thyself. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שְׂרֻפָה בָאֵשׁ כְּסוּחָה מִגַּעֲרַת פָּנֶיךָ יֹאבֵדוּ׃
englishText: It is burned with fire, it is cut down; They perish at the rebuke of Thy countenance.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תְּהִי־יָדְךָ עַל־אִישׁ יְמִינֶךָ עַל־בֶּן־אָדָם אִמַּצְתָּ לָּךְ׃
englishText: Let Thy hand be upon the man of Thy right hand, Upon the son of man whom Thou madest strong for Thyself.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְלֹא־נָסוֹג מִמֶּךָּ תְּחַיֵּנוּ וּבְשִׁמְךָ נִקְרָא׃
englishText: So shall we not turn back from Thee; Quicken Thou us, and we will call upon Thy name.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה אֱלֹהִים צְבָאוֹת הֲשִׁיבֵנוּ הָאֵר פָּנֶיךָ וְנִוָּשֵׁעָה׃
englishText: O LORD God of hosts, restore us; Cause Thy face to shine, and we shall be saved.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ עַל־הַגִּתִּית לְאָסָף׃
englishText: For the Leader; upon the Gittith. [A Psalm] of Asaph.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַרְנִינוּ לֵאלֹהִים עוּזֵּנוּ הָרִיעוּ לֵאלֹהֵי יַעֲקֹב׃
englishText: Sing aloud unto God our strength; shout unto the God of Jacob.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שְׂאוּ־זִמְרָה וּתְנוּ־תֹף כִּנּוֹר נָעִים עִם־נָבֶל׃
englishText: Take up the melody, and sound the timbrel, the sweet harp with the psaltery.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תִּקְעוּ בַחֹדֶשׁ שׁוֹפָר בַּכֵּסֶה לְיוֹם חַגֵּנוּ׃
englishText: Blow the horn at the new moon, at the full moon for our feast-day.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי חֹק לְיִשְׂרָאֵל הוּא מִשְׁפָּט לֵאלֹהֵי יַעֲקֹב׃
englishText: For it is a statute for Israel, an ordinance of the God of Jacob.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֵדוּת בִּיהוֹסֵף שָׂמוֹ בְּצֵאתוֹ עַל־אֶרֶץ מִצְרָיִם שְׂפַת לֹא־יָדַעְתִּי אֶשְׁמָע׃
englishText: He appointed it in Joseph for a testimony, when He went forth against the land of Egypt. The speech of one that I knew not did I hear:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲסִירוֹתִי מִסֵּבֶל שִׁכְמוֹ כַּפָּיו מִדּוּד תַּעֲבֹרְנָה׃
englishText: 'I removed his shoulder from the burden; His hands were freed from the basket.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בַּצָּרָה קָרָאתָ וָאֲחַלְּצֶךָּ אֶעֶנְךָ בְּסֵתֶר רַעַם אֶבְחָנְךָ עַל־מֵי מְרִיבָה סֶלָה׃
englishText: Thou didst call in trouble, and I rescued thee; I answered thee in the secret place of thunder; I proved thee at the waters of Meribah. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שְׁמַע עַמִּי וְאָעִידָה בָּךְ יִשְׂרָאֵל אִם־תִּשְׁמַע־לִי׃
englishText: Hear, O My people, and I will admonish thee: O Israel, if thou wouldest hearken unto Me!
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא־יִהְיֶה בְךָ אֵל זָר וְלֹא תִשְׁתַּחֲוֶה לְאֵל נֵכָר׃
englishText: There shall no strange god be in thee; neither shalt thou worship any foreign god.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָנֹכִי יְהוָה אֱלֹהֶיךָ הַמַּעַלְךָ מֵאֶרֶץ מִצְרָיִם הַרְחֶב־פִּיךָ וַאֲמַלְאֵהוּ׃
englishText: I am the LORD thy God, who brought thee up out of the land of Egypt; open thy mouth wide, and I will fill it.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְלֹא־שָׁמַע עַמִּי לְקוֹלִי וְיִשְׂרָאֵל לֹא־אָבָה לִי׃
englishText: But My people hearkened not to My voice; And Israel would none of Me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וָאֲשַׁלְּחֵהוּ בִּשְׁרִירוּת לִבָּם יֵלְכוּ בְּמוֹעֲצוֹתֵיהֶם׃
englishText: So I let them go after the stubbornness of their heart, That they might walk in their own counsels.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לוּ עַמִּי שֹׁמֵעַ לִי יִשְׂרָאֵל בִּדְרָכַי יְהַלֵּכוּ׃
englishText: Oh that My people would hearken unto Me, That Israel would walk in My ways!
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּמְעַט אוֹיְבֵיהֶם אַכְנִיעַ וְעַל צָרֵיהֶם אָשִׁיב יָדִי׃
englishText: I would soon subdue their enemies, And turn My hand against their adversaries.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מְשַׂנְאֵי יְהוָה יְכַחֲשׁוּ־לוֹ וִיהִי עִתָּם לְעוֹלָם׃
englishText: The haters of the LORD should dwindle away before Him; And their punishment should endure for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּאֲכִילֵהוּ מֵחֵלֶב חִטָּה וּמִצּוּר דְּבַשׁ אַשְׂבִּיעֶךָ׃
englishText: They should also be fed with the fat of wheat; and with honey out of the rock would I satisfy thee.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִזְמוֹר לְאָסָף אֱ‍לֹהִים נִצָּב בַּעֲדַת־אֵל בְּקֶרֶב אֱלֹהִים יִשְׁפֹּט׃
englishText: A Psalm of Asaph. God standeth in the congregation of God; in the midst of the judges He judgeth:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַד־מָתַי תִּשְׁפְּטוּ־עָוֶל וּפְנֵי רְשָׁעִים תִּשְׂאוּ־סֶלָה׃
englishText: 'How long will ye judge unjustly, and respect the persons of the wicked? Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׁפְטוּ־דַל וְיָתוֹם עָנִי וָרָשׁ הַצְדִּיקוּ׃
englishText: Judge the poor and fatherless; do justice to the afflicted and destitute.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פַּלְּטוּ־דַל וְאֶבְיוֹן מִיַּד רְשָׁעִים הַצִּילוּ׃
englishText: Rescue the poor and needy; deliver them out of the hand of the wicked.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא יָדְעוּ וְלֹא יָבִינוּ בַּחֲשֵׁכָה יִתְהַלָּכוּ יִמּוֹטוּ כָּל־מוֹסְדֵי אָרֶץ׃
englishText: They know not, neither do they understand; they go about in darkness; all the foundations of the earth are moved.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲ‍נִי־אָמַרְתִּי אֱלֹהִים אַתֶּם וּבְנֵי עֶלְיוֹן כֻּלְּכֶם׃
englishText: I said: Ye are godlike beings, and all of you sons of the Most High.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָכֵן כְּאָדָם תְּמוּתוּן וּכְאַחַד הַשָּׂרִים תִּפֹּלוּ׃
englishText: Nevertheless ye shall die like men, and fall like one of the princes.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קוּמָה אֱלֹהִים שָׁפְטָה הָאָרֶץ כִּי־אַתָּה תִנְחַל בְּכָל־הַגּוֹיִם׃
englishText: Arise, O God, judge the earth; for Thou shalt possess all the nations.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׁיר מִזְמוֹר לְאָסָף׃
englishText: A Song, a Psalm of Asaph.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱלֹהִים אַל־דֳּמִי־לָךְ אַל־תֶּחֱרַשׁ וְאַל־תִּשְׁקֹט אֵל׃
englishText: O God, keep not Thou silence; Hold not Thy peace, and be not still, O God.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־הִנֵּה אוֹיְבֶיךָ יֶהֱמָיוּן וּמְשַׂנְאֶיךָ נָשְׂאוּ רֹאשׁ׃
englishText: For, lo, Thine enemies are in an uproar; And they that hate Thee have lifted up the head.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַל־עַמְּךָ יַעֲרִימוּ סוֹד וְיִתְיָעֲצוּ עַל־צְפוּנֶיךָ׃
englishText: They hold crafty converse against Thy people, And take counsel against Thy treasured ones.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָמְרוּ לְכוּ וְנַכְחִידֵם מִגּוֹי וְלֹא־יִזָּכֵר שֵׁם־יִשְׂרָאֵל עוֹד׃
englishText: They have said: 'Come, and let us cut them off from being a nation; That the name of Israel may be no more in remembrance.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי נוֹעֲצוּ לֵב יַחְדָּו עָלֶיךָ בְּרִית יִכְרֹתוּ׃
englishText: For they have consulted together with one consent; Against Thee do they make a covenant;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָהֳלֵי אֱדוֹם וְיִשְׁמְעֵאלִים מוֹאָב וְהַגְרִים׃
englishText: The tents of Edom and the Ishmaelites; Moab, and the Hagrites;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גְּבָל וְעַמּוֹן וַעֲמָלֵק פְּלֶשֶׁת עִם־יֹשְׁבֵי צוֹר׃
englishText: Gebal, and Ammon, and Amalek; Philistia with the inhabitants of Tyre;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גַּם־אַשּׁוּר נִלְוָה עִמָּם הָיוּ זְרוֹעַ לִבְנֵי־לוֹט סֶלָה׃
englishText: Assyria also is joined with them; They have been an arm to the children of Lot. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֲשֵׂה־לָהֶם כְּמִדְיָן כְּסִיסְרָא כְיָבִין בְּנַחַל קִישׁוֹן׃
englishText: Do Thou unto them as unto Midian; As to Sisera, as to Jabin, at the brook Kishon;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נִשְׁמְדוּ בְעֵין־דֹּאר הָיוּ דֹּמֶן לָאֲדָמָה׃
englishText: Who were destroyed at En-dor; They became as dung for the earth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׁיתֵמוֹ נְדִיבֵמוֹ כְּעֹרֵב וְכִזְאֵב וּכְזֶבַח וּכְצַלְמֻנָּע כָּל־נְסִיכֵמוֹ׃
englishText: Make their nobles like Oreb and Zeeb, And like Zebah and Zalmunna all their princes;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲשֶׁר אָמְרוּ נִירֲשָׁה לָּנוּ אֵת נְאוֹת אֱלֹהִים׃
englishText: Who said: 'Let us take to ourselves in possession The habitations of God.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱ‍לֹהַי שִׁיתֵמוֹ כַגַּלְגַּל כְּקַשׁ לִפְנֵי־רוּחַ׃
englishText: O my God, make them like the whirling dust; As stubble before the wind.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כְּאֵשׁ תִּבְעַר־יָעַר וּכְלֶהָבָה תְּלַהֵט הָרִים׃
englishText: As the fire that burneth the forest, And as the flame that setteth the mountains ablaze;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כֵּן תִּרְדְּפֵם בְּסַעֲרֶךָ וּבְסוּפָתְךָ תְבַהֲלֵם׃
englishText: So pursue them with Thy tempest, And affright them with Thy storm.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַלֵּא פְנֵיהֶם קָלוֹן וִיבַקְשׁוּ שִׁמְךָ יְהוָה׃
englishText: Fill their faces with shame; That they may seek Thy name, O LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יֵבֹשׁוּ וְיִבָּהֲלוּ עֲדֵי־עַד וְיַחְפְּרוּ וְיֹאבֵדוּ׃
englishText: Let them be ashamed and affrighted for ever; Yea, let them be abashed and perish;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְיֵדְעוּ כִּי־אַתָּה שִׁמְךָ יְהוָה לְבַדֶּךָ עֶלְיוֹן עַל־כָּל־הָאָרֶץ׃
englishText: That they may know that it is Thou alone whose name is the LORD, The Most High over all the earth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ עַל־הַגִּתִּית לִבְנֵי־קֹרַח מִזְמוֹר׃
englishText: For the Leader; upon the Gittith. A Psalm of the sons of Korah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַה־יְּדִידוֹת מִשְׁכְּנוֹתֶיךָ יְהוָה צְבָאוֹת׃
englishText: How lovely are Thy tabernacles, O LORD of hosts!
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נִכְסְפָה וְגַם־כָּלְתָה נַפְשִׁי לְחַצְרוֹת יְהוָה לִבִּי וּבְשָׂרִי יְרַנְּנוּ אֶל אֵל־חָי׃
englishText: My soul yearneth, yea, even pineth for the courts of the LORD; my heart and my flesh sing for joy unto the living God.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גַּם־צִפּוֹר מָצְאָה בַיִת וּדְרוֹר קֵן לָהּ אֲשֶׁר־שָׁתָה אֶפְרֹחֶיהָ אֶת־מִזְבְּחוֹתֶיךָ יְהוָה צְבָאוֹת מַלְכִּי וֵאלֹהָי׃
englishText: Yea, the sparrow hath found a house, and the swallow a nest for herself, Where she may lay her young; Thine altars, O LORD of hosts, My King, and my God—
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַשְׁרֵי יוֹשְׁבֵי בֵיתֶךָ עוֹד יְהַלְלוּךָ סֶּלָה׃
englishText: Happy are they that dwell in Thy house, they are ever praising Thee. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַשְׁרֵי אָדָם עוֹז־לוֹ בָךְ מְסִלּוֹת בִּלְבָבָם׃
englishText: Happy is the man whose strength is in Thee; in whose heart are the highways.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֹבְרֵי בְּעֵמֶק הַבָּכָא מַעְיָן יְשִׁיתוּהוּ גַּם־בְּרָכוֹת יַעְטֶה מוֹרֶה׃
englishText: Passing through the valley of Baca they make it a place of springs; yea, the early rain clotheth it with blessings.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יֵלְכוּ מֵחַיִל אֶל־חָיִל יֵרָאֶה אֶל־אֱלֹהִים בְּצִיּוֹן׃
englishText: They go from strength to strength, every one of them appeareth before God in Zion.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה אֱלֹהִים צְבָאוֹת שִׁמְעָה תְפִלָּתִי הַאֲזִינָה אֱלֹהֵי יַעֲקֹב סֶלָה׃
englishText: O LORD God of hosts, hear my prayer; give ear, O God of Jacob. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מָגִנֵּנוּ רְאֵה אֱלֹהִים וְהַבֵּט פְּנֵי מְשִׁיחֶךָ׃
englishText: Behold, O God our shield, and look upon the face of Thine anointed.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי טוֹב־יוֹם בַּחֲצֵרֶיךָ מֵאָלֶף בָּחַרְתִּי הִסְתּוֹפֵף בְּבֵית אֱלֹהַי מִדּוּר בְּאָהֳלֵי־רֶשַׁע׃
englishText: For a day in Thy courts is better than a thousand; I had rather stand at the threshold of the house of my God, than to dwell in the tents of wickedness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי שֶׁמֶשׁ וּמָגֵן יְהוָה אֱלֹהִים חֵן וְכָבוֹד יִתֵּן יְהוָה לֹא יִמְנַע־טוֹב לַהֹלְכִים בְּתָמִים׃
englishText: For the LORD God is a sun and a shield; the LORD giveth grace and glory; No good thing will He withhold from them that walk uprightly.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה צְבָאוֹת אַשְׁרֵי אָדָם בֹּטֵחַ בָּךְ׃
englishText: O LORD of hosts, happy is the man that trusteth in Thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ לִבְנֵי־קֹרַח מִזְמוֹר׃
englishText: For the Leader. A Psalm of the sons of Korah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רָצִיתָ יְהוָה אַרְצֶךָ שַׁבְתָּ שבות [שְׁבִית] יַעֲקֹב׃
englishText: LORD, Thou hast been favourable unto Thy land, Thou hast turned the captivity of Jacob.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נָשָׂאתָ עֲוֺן עַמֶּךָ כִּסִּיתָ כָל־חַטָּאתָם סֶלָה׃
englishText: Thou hast forgiven the iniquity of Thy people, Thou hast pardoned all their sin. Selah .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָסַפְתָּ כָל־עֶבְרָתֶךָ הֱשִׁיבוֹתָ מֵחֲרוֹן אַפֶּךָ׃
englishText: Thou hast withdrawn all Thy wrath; Thou hast turned from the fierceness of Thine anger.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שׁוּבֵנוּ אֱלֹהֵי יִשְׁעֵנוּ וְהָפֵר כַּעַסְךָ עִמָּנוּ׃
englishText: Restore us, O God of our salvation, And cause Thine indignation toward us to cease.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַלְעוֹלָם תֶּאֱנַף־בָּנוּ תִּמְשֹׁךְ אַפְּךָ לְדֹר וָדֹר׃
englishText: Wilt Thou be angry with us for ever? Wilt Thou draw out Thine anger to all generations?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲלֹא־אַתָּה תָּשׁוּב תְּחַיֵּנוּ וְעַמְּךָ יִשְׂמְחוּ־בָךְ׃
englishText: Wilt Thou not quicken us again, That Thy people may rejoice in Thee?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַרְאֵנוּ יְהוָה חַסְדֶּךָ וְיֶשְׁעֲךָ תִּתֶּן־לָנוּ׃
englishText: Show us Thy mercy, O LORD, And grant us Thy salvation.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֶשְׁמְעָה מַה־יְדַבֵּר הָאֵל יְהוָה כִּי יְדַבֵּר שָׁלוֹם אֶל־עַמּוֹ וְאֶל־חֲסִידָיו וְאַל־יָשׁוּבוּ לְכִסְלָה׃
englishText: I will hear what God the LORD will speak; For He will speak peace unto His people, and to His saints; But let them not turn back to folly.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַךְ קָרוֹב לִירֵאָיו יִשְׁעוֹ לִשְׁכֹּן כָּבוֹד בְּאַרְצֵנוּ׃
englishText: Surely His salvation is nigh them that fear Him; That glory may dwell in our land.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חֶסֶד־וֶאֱמֶת נִפְגָּשׁוּ צֶדֶק וְשָׁלוֹם נָשָׁקוּ׃
englishText: Mercy and truth are met together; Righteousness and peace have kissed each other.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱמֶת מֵאֶרֶץ תִּצְמָח וְצֶדֶק מִשָּׁמַיִם נִשְׁקָף׃
englishText: Truth springeth out of the earth; And righteousness hath looked down from heaven.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גַּם־יְהוָה יִתֵּן הַטּוֹב וְאַרְצֵנוּ תִּתֵּן יְבוּלָהּ׃
englishText: Yea, the LORD will give that which is good; And our land shall yield her produce.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: צֶדֶק לְפָנָיו יְהַלֵּךְ וְיָשֵׂם לְדֶרֶךְ פְּעָמָיו׃
englishText: Righteousness shall go before Him, And shall make His footsteps a way.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תְּפִלָּה לְדָוִד הַטֵּה־יְהוָה אָזְנְךָ עֲנֵנִי כִּי־עָנִי וְאֶבְיוֹן אָנִי׃
englishText: A Prayer of David. Incline Thine ear, O LORD, and answer me; For I am poor and needy.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׁמְרָה נַפְשִׁי כִּי־חָסִיד אָנִי הוֹשַׁע עַבְדְּךָ אַתָּה אֱלֹהַי הַבּוֹטֵחַ אֵלֶיךָ׃
englishText: Keep my soul, for I am godly; O Thou my God, save Thy servant that trusteth in Thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חָנֵּנִי אֲדֹנָי כִּי אֵלֶיךָ אֶקְרָא כָּל־הַיּוֹם׃
englishText: Be gracious unto me, O Lord; For unto Thee do I cry all the day.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שַׂמֵּחַ נֶפֶשׁ עַבְדֶּךָ כִּי אֵלֶיךָ אֲדֹנָי נַפְשִׁי אֶשָּׂא׃
englishText: Rejoice the soul of Thy servant; For unto Thee, O Lord, do I lift up my soul.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־אַתָּה אֲדֹנָי טוֹב וְסַלָּח וְרַב־חֶסֶד לְכָל־קֹרְאֶיךָ׃
englishText: For Thou, Lord, art good, and ready to pardon, And plenteous in mercy unto all them that call upon Thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַאֲזִינָה יְהוָה תְּפִלָּתִי וְהַקְשִׁיבָה בְּקוֹל תַּחֲנוּנוֹתָי׃
englishText: Give ear, O LORD, unto my prayer; And attend unto the voice of my supplications.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּיוֹם צָרָתִי אֶקְרָאֶךָּ כִּי תַעֲנֵנִי׃
englishText: In the day of my trouble I call upon Thee; For Thou wilt answer me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֵין־כָּמוֹךָ בָאֱלֹהִים אֲדֹנָי וְאֵין כְּמַעֲשֶׂיךָ׃
englishText: There is none like unto Thee among the gods, O Lord, And there are no works like Thine.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כָּל־גּוֹיִם אֲשֶׁר עָשִׂיתָ יָבוֹאוּ וְיִשְׁתַּחֲווּ לְפָנֶיךָ אֲדֹנָי וִיכַבְּדוּ לִשְׁמֶךָ׃
englishText: All nations whom Thou hast made shall come and prostrate themselves before Thee, O Lord; And they shall glorify Thy name.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־גָדוֹל אַתָּה וְעֹשֵׂה נִפְלָאוֹת אַתָּה אֱלֹהִים לְבַדֶּךָ׃
englishText: For Thou art great, and doest wondrous things; Thou art God alone.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הוֹרֵנִי יְהוָה דַּרְכֶּךָ אֲהַלֵּךְ בַּאֲמִתֶּךָ יַחֵד לְבָבִי לְיִרְאָה שְׁמֶךָ׃
englishText: Teach me, O LORD, Thy way, that I may walk in Thy truth; Make one my heart to fear Thy name. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אוֹדְךָ אֲדֹנָי אֱלֹהַי בְּכָל־לְבָבִי וַאֲכַבְּדָה שִׁמְךָ לְעוֹלָם׃
englishText: I will thank Thee, O Lord my God, with my whole heart; And I will glorify Thy name for evermore.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־חַסְדְּךָ גָּדוֹל עָלָי וְהִצַּלְתָּ נַפְשִׁי מִשְּׁאוֹל תַּחְתִּיָּה׃
englishText: For great is Thy mercy toward me; And Thou hast delivered my soul from the lowest nether-world.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱלֹהִים זֵדִים קָמוּ־עָלַי וַעֲדַת עָרִיצִים בִּקְשׁוּ נַפְשִׁי וְלֹא שָׂמוּךָ לְנֶגְדָּם׃
englishText: O God, the proud are risen up against me, And the company of violent men have sought after my soul, And have not set Thee before them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאַתָּה אֲדֹנָי אֵל־רַחוּם וְחַנּוּן אֶרֶךְ אַפַּיִם וְרַב־חֶסֶד וֶאֱמֶת׃
englishText: But Thou, O Lord, art a God full of compassion and gracious, Slow to anger, and plenteous in mercy and truth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פְּנֵה אֵלַי וְחָנֵּנִי תְּנָה־עֻזְּךָ לְעַבְדֶּךָ וְהוֹשִׁיעָה לְבֶן־אֲמָתֶךָ׃
englishText: O turn unto me, and be gracious unto me; Give Thy strength unto Thy servant, And save the son of Thy handmaid.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֲשֵׂה־עִמִּי אוֹת לְטוֹבָה וְיִרְאוּ שֹׂנְאַי וְיֵבֹשׁוּ כִּי־אַתָּה יְהוָה עֲזַרְתַּנִי וְנִחַמְתָּנִי׃
englishText: Work in my behalf a sign for good; That they that hate me may see it, and be put to shame, Because Thou, LORD, hast helped me, and comforted me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לִבְנֵי־קֹרַח מִזְמוֹר שִׁיר יְסוּדָתוֹ בְּהַרְרֵי־קֹדֶשׁ׃
englishText: A Psalm of the sons of Korah; a Song. His foundation is in the holy mountains.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֹהֵב יְהוָה שַׁעֲרֵי צִיּוֹן מִכֹּל מִשְׁכְּנוֹת יַעֲקֹב׃
englishText: The LORD loveth the gates of Zion more than all the dwellings of Jacob.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נִכְבָּדוֹת מְדֻבָּר בָּךְ עִיר הָאֱלֹהִים סֶלָה׃
englishText: Glorious things are spoken of Thee, O city of God. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַזְכִּיר רַהַב וּבָבֶל לְיֹדְעָי הִנֵּה פְלֶשֶׁת וְצוֹר עִם־כּוּשׁ זֶה יֻלַּד־שָׁם׃
englishText: 'I will make mention of Rahab and Babylon as among them that know Me; behold Philistia, and Tyre, with Ethiopia; this one was born there.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּלֲצִיּוֹן יֵאָמַר אִישׁ וְאִישׁ יֻלַּד־בָּהּ וְהוּא יְכוֹנְנֶהָ עֶלְיוֹן׃
englishText: But of Zion it shall be said: 'This man and that was born in her; And the Most High Himself doth establish her.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה יִסְפֹּר בִּכְתוֹב עַמִּים זֶה יֻלַּד־שָׁם סֶלָה׃
englishText: The LORD shall count in the register of the peoples: 'This one was born there.' Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְשָׁרִים כְּחֹלְלִים כָּל־מַעְיָנַי בָּךְ׃
englishText: And whether they sing or dance, all my thoughts are in Thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׁיר מִזְמוֹר לִבְנֵי קֹרַח לַמְנַצֵּחַ עַל־מָחֲלַת לְעַנּוֹת מַשְׂכִּיל לְהֵימָן הָאֶזְרָחִי׃
englishText: A Song, a Psalm of the sons of Korah; for the Leader; upon Mahalath Leannoth. Maschil of Heman the Ezrahite.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה אֱלֹהֵי יְשׁוּעָתִי יוֹם־צָעַקְתִּי בַלַּיְלָה נֶגְדֶּךָ׃
englishText: O LORD, God of my salvation, What time I cry in the night before Thee,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תָּבוֹא לְפָנֶיךָ תְּפִלָּתִי הַטֵּה־אָזְנְךָ לְרִנָּתִי׃
englishText: Let my prayer come before Thee, Incline Thine ear unto my cry.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־שָׂבְעָה בְרָעוֹת נַפְשִׁי וְחַיַּי לִשְׁאוֹל הִגִּיעוּ׃
englishText: For my soul is sated with troubles, And my life draweth nigh unto the grave.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נֶחְשַׁבְתִּי עִם־יוֹרְדֵי בוֹר הָיִיתִי כְּגֶבֶר אֵין־אֱיָל׃
englishText: I am counted with them that go down into the pit; I am become as a man that hath no help;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בַּמֵּתִים חָפְשִׁי כְּמוֹ חֲלָלִים שֹׁכְבֵי קֶבֶר אֲשֶׁר לֹא זְכַרְתָּם עוֹד וְהֵמָּה מִיָּדְךָ נִגְזָרוּ׃
englishText: Set apart among the dead, Like the slain that lie in the grave, Whom Thou rememberest no more; And they are cut off from Thy hand. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שַׁתַּנִי בְּבוֹר תַּחְתִּיּוֹת בְּמַחֲשַׁכִּים בִּמְצֹלוֹת׃
englishText: Thou hast laid me in the nether-most pit, In dark places, in the deeps.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עָלַי סָמְכָה חֲמָתֶךָ וְכָל־מִשְׁבָּרֶיךָ עִנִּיתָ סֶּלָה׃
englishText: Thy wrath lieth hard upon me, And all Thy waves Thou pressest down. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הִרְחַקְתָּ מְיֻדָּעַי מִמֶּנִּי שַׁתַּנִי תוֹעֵבוֹת לָמוֹ כָּלֻא וְלֹא אֵצֵא׃
englishText: Thou hast put mine acquaintance far from me; Thou hast made me an abomination unto them; I am shut up, and I cannot come forth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֵינִי דָאֲבָה מִנִּי עֹנִי קְרָאתִיךָ יְהוָה בְּכָל־יוֹם שִׁטַּחְתִּי אֵלֶיךָ כַפָּי׃
englishText: Mine eye languisheth by reason of affliction; I have called upon Thee, O LORD, every day, I have spread forth my hands unto Thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲלַמֵּתִים תַּעֲשֶׂה־פֶּלֶא אִם־רְפָאִים יָקוּמוּ יוֹדוּךָ סֶּלָה׃
englishText: Wilt Thou work wonders for the dead? Or shall the shades arise and give Thee thanks? Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַיְסֻפַּר בַּקֶּבֶר חַסְדֶּךָ אֱמוּנָתְךָ בָּאֲבַדּוֹן׃
englishText: Shall Thy mercy be declared in the grave? Or Thy faithfulness in destruction?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲיִוָּדַע בַּחֹשֶׁךְ פִּלְאֶךָ וְצִדְקָתְךָ בְּאֶרֶץ נְשִׁיָּה׃
englishText: Shall Thy wonders be known in the dark? And Thy righteousness in the land of forgetfulness?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַאֲנִי אֵלֶיךָ יְהוָה שִׁוַּעְתִּי וּבַבֹּקֶר תְּפִלָּתִי תְקַדְּמֶךָּ׃
englishText: But as for me, unto Thee, O LORD, do I cry, And in the morning doth my prayer come to meet Thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לָמָה יְהוָה תִּזְנַח נַפְשִׁי תַּסְתִּיר פָּנֶיךָ מִמֶּנִּי׃
englishText: LORD, why castest Thou off my soul? Why hidest Thou Thy face from me?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עָנִי אֲנִי וְגֹוֵעַ מִנֹּעַר נָשָׂאתִי אֵמֶיךָ אָפוּנָה׃
englishText: I am afflicted and at the point of death from my youth up; I have borne Thy terrors, I am distracted.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עָלַי עָבְרוּ חֲרוֹנֶיךָ בִּעוּתֶיךָ צִמְּתוּתֻנִי׃
englishText: Thy fierce wrath is gone over me; Thy terrors have cut me off.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: סַבּוּנִי כַמַּיִם כָּל־הַיּוֹם הִקִּיפוּ עָלַי יָחַד׃
englishText: They came round about me like water all the day; They compassed me about together.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הִרְחַקְתָּ מִמֶּנִּי אֹהֵב וָרֵעַ מְיֻדָּעַי מַחְשָׁךְ׃
englishText: Friend and companion hast Thou put far from me, And mine acquaintance into darkness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַשְׂכִּיל לְאֵיתָן הָאֶזְרָחִי׃
englishText: Maschil of Ethan the Ezrahite.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חַסְדֵי יְהוָה עוֹלָם אָשִׁירָה לְדֹר וָדֹר אוֹדִיעַ אֱמוּנָתְךָ בְּפִי׃
englishText: I will sing of the mercies of the LORD for ever; To all generations will I make known Thy faithfulness with my mouth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־אָמַרְתִּי עוֹלָם חֶסֶד יִבָּנֶה שָׁמַיִם תָּכִן אֱמוּנָתְךָ בָהֶם׃
englishText: For I have said: 'For ever is mercy built; In the very heavens Thou dost establish Thy faithfulness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כָּרַתִּי בְרִית לִבְחִירִי נִשְׁבַּעְתִּי לְדָוִד עַבְדִּי׃
englishText: I have made a covenant with My chosen, I have sworn unto David My servant:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַד־עוֹלָם אָכִין זַרְעֶךָ וּבָנִיתִי לְדֹר־וָדוֹר כִּסְאֲךָ סֶלָה׃
englishText: For ever will I establish thy seed, And build up thy throne to all generations.' Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְיוֹדוּ שָׁמַיִם פִּלְאֲךָ יְהוָה אַף־אֱמוּנָתְךָ בִּקְהַל קְדֹשִׁים׃
englishText: So shall the heavens praise Thy wonders, O LORD, Thy faithfulness also in the assembly of the holy ones.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי מִי בַשַּׁחַק יַעֲרֹךְ לַיהוָה יִדְמֶה לַיהוָה בִּבְנֵי אֵלִים׃
englishText: For who in the skies can be compared unto the LORD, Who among the sons of might can be likened unto the LORD,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֵל נַעֲרָץ בְּסוֹד־קְדֹשִׁים רַבָּה וְנוֹרָא עַל־כָּל־סְבִיבָיו׃
englishText: A God dreaded in the great council of the holy ones, And feared of all them that are about Him?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה אֱלֹהֵי צְבָאוֹת מִי־כָמוֹךָ חֲסִין יָהּ וֶאֱמוּנָתְךָ סְבִיבוֹתֶיךָ׃
englishText: O LORD God of hosts, Who is a mighty one, like unto Thee, O LORD? And Thy faithfulness is round about Thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַתָּה מוֹשֵׁל בְּגֵאוּת הַיָּם בְּשׂוֹא גַלָּיו אַתָּה תְשַׁבְּחֵם׃
englishText: Thou rulest the proud swelling of the sea; When the waves thereof arise, Thou stillest them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַתָּה דִכִּאתָ כֶחָלָל רָהַב בִּזְרוֹעַ עֻזְּךָ פִּזַּרְתָּ אוֹיְבֶיךָ׃
englishText: Thou didst crush Rahab, as one that is slain; Thou didst scattered Thine enemies with the arm of Thy strength.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְךָ שָׁמַיִם אַף־לְךָ אָרֶץ תֵּבֵל וּמְלֹאָהּ אַתָּה יְסַדְתָּם׃
englishText: Thine are the heavens, Thine also the earth; The world and the fulness thereof, Thou hast founded them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: צָפוֹן וְיָמִין אַתָּה בְרָאתָם תָּבוֹר וְחֶרְמוֹן בְּשִׁמְךָ יְרַנֵּנוּ׃
englishText: The north and the south, Thou hast created them; Tabor and Hermon rejoice in Thy name.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְךָ זְרוֹעַ עִם־גְּבוּרָה תָּעֹז יָדְךָ תָּרוּם יְמִינֶךָ׃
englishText: Thine is an arm with might; Strong is Thy hand, and exalted is Thy right hand.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: צֶדֶק וּמִשְׁפָּט מְכוֹן כִּסְאֶךָ חֶסֶד וֶאֱמֶת יְקַדְּמוּ פָנֶיךָ׃
englishText: Righteousness and justice are the foundation of Thy throne; Mercy and truth go before Thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַשְׁרֵי הָעָם יוֹדְעֵי תְרוּעָה יְהוָה בְּאוֹר־פָּנֶיךָ יְהַלֵּכוּן׃
englishText: Happy is the people that know the joyful shout; They walk, O LORD, in the light of Thy countenance.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּשִׁמְךָ יְגִילוּן כָּל־הַיּוֹם וּבְצִדְקָתְךָ יָרוּמוּ׃
englishText: In Thy name do they rejoice all the day; And through Thy righteousness are they exalted.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־תִפְאֶרֶת עֻזָּמוֹ אָתָּה וּבִרְצֹנְךָ תרים [תָּרוּם] קַרְנֵנוּ׃
englishText: For Thou art the glory of their strength; And in Thy favour our horn is exalted.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי לַיהוָה מָגִנֵּנוּ וְלִקְדוֹשׁ יִשְׂרָאֵל מַלְכֵּנוּ׃
englishText: For of the LORD is our shield; And the Holy One of Israel is our king.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָז דִּבַּרְתָּ־בְחָזוֹן לַחֲסִידֶיךָ וַתֹּאמֶר שִׁוִּיתִי עֵזֶר עַל־גִּבּוֹר הֲרִימוֹתִי בָחוּר מֵעָם׃
englishText: Then Thou spokest in vision to Thy godly ones, And saidst: 'I have laid help upon one that is mighty; I have exalted one chosen out of the people.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מָצָאתִי דָּוִד עַבְדִּי בְּשֶׁמֶן קָדְשִׁי מְשַׁחְתִּיו׃
englishText: I have found David My servant; With My holy oil have I anointed him;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲשֶׁר יָדִי תִּכּוֹן עִמּוֹ אַף־זְרוֹעִי תְאַמְּצֶנּוּ׃
englishText: With whom My hand shall be established; Mine arm also shall strengthen him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא־יַשִּׁא אוֹיֵב בּוֹ וּבֶן־עַוְלָה לֹא יְעַנֶּנּוּ׃
englishText: The enemy shall not exact from him; Nor the son of wickedness afflict him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְכַתּוֹתִי מִפָּנָיו צָרָיו וּמְשַׂנְאָיו אֶגּוֹף׃
englishText: And I will beat to pieces his adversaries before him, And smite them that hate him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וֶאֶמוּנָתִי וְחַסְדִּי עִמּוֹ וּבִשְׁמִי תָּרוּם קַרְנוֹ׃
englishText: But My faithfulness and My mercy shall be with him; And through My name shall his horn be exalted.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְשַׂמְתִּי בַיָּם יָדוֹ וּבַנְּהָרוֹת יְמִינוֹ׃
englishText: I will set his hand also on the sea, And his right hand on the rivers.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הוּא יִקְרָאֵנִי אָבִי אָתָּה אֵלִי וְצוּר יְשׁוּעָתִי׃
englishText: He shall call unto Me: Thou art my Father, My God, and the rock of my salvation. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַף־אָנִי בְּכוֹר אֶתְּנֵהוּ עֶלְיוֹן לְמַלְכֵי־אָרֶץ׃
englishText: I also will appoint him first-born, The highest of the kings of the earth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְעוֹלָם אשמור־[אֶשְׁמָר־] לוֹ חַסְדִּי וּבְרִיתִי נֶאֱמֶנֶת לוֹ׃
englishText: For ever will I keep for him My mercy, And My covenant shall stand fast with him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְשַׂמְתִּי לָעַד זַרְעוֹ וְכִסְאוֹ כִּימֵי שָׁמָיִם׃
englishText: His seed also will I make to endure for ever, And his throne as the days of heaven.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־יַעַזְבוּ בָנָיו תּוֹרָתִי וּבְמִשְׁפָּטַי לֹא יֵלֵכוּן׃
englishText: If his children forsake My law, And walk not in Mine ordinances; :
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־חֻקֹּתַי יְחַלֵּלוּ וּמִצְוֺתַי לֹא יִשְׁמֹרוּ׃
englishText: If they profane My statutes, And keep not My commandments;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּפָקַדְתִּי בְשֵׁבֶט פִּשְׁעָם וּבִנְגָעִים עֲוֺנָם׃
englishText: Then will I visit their transgression with the rod, And their iniquity with strokes.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְחַסְדִּי לֹא־אָפִיר מֵעִמּוֹ וְלֹא־אֲשַׁקֵּר בֶּאֱמוּנָתִי׃
englishText: But My mercy will I not break off from him, Nor will I be false to My faithfulness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא־אֲחַלֵּל בְּרִיתִי וּמוֹצָא שְׂפָתַי לֹא אֲשַׁנֶּה׃
englishText: My covenant will I not profane, Nor alter that which is gone out of My lips.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַחַת נִשְׁבַּעְתִּי בְקָדְשִׁי אִם־לְדָוִד אֲכַזֵּב׃
englishText: Once have I sworn by My holiness: Surely I will not be false unto David;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זַרְעוֹ לְעוֹלָם יִהְיֶה וְכִסְאוֹ כַשֶּׁמֶשׁ נֶגְדִּי׃
englishText: His seed shall endure for ever, And his throne as the sun before Me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כְּיָרֵחַ יִכּוֹן עוֹלָם וְעֵד בַּשַּׁחַק נֶאֱמָן סֶלָה׃
englishText: It shall be established for ever as the moon; And be stedfast as the witness in sky.' Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאַתָּה זָנַחְתָּ וַתִּמְאָס הִתְעַבַּרְתָּ עִם־מְשִׁיחֶךָ׃
englishText: But Thou hast cast off and rejected, Thou hast been wroth with Thine anointed.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נֵאַרְתָּה בְּרִית עַבְדֶּךָ חִלַּלְתָּ לָאָרֶץ נִזְרוֹ׃
englishText: Thou hast abhorred the covenant of Thy servant; Thou hast profaned his crown even to the ground.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פָּרַצְתָּ כָל־גְּדֵרֹתָיו שַׂמְתָּ מִבְצָרָיו מְחִתָּה׃
englishText: Thou hast broken down all his fences; Thou hast brought his strongholds to ruin.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שַׁסֻּהוּ כָּל־עֹבְרֵי דָרֶךְ הָיָה חֶרְפָּה לִשְׁכֵנָיו׃
englishText: All that pass by the way spoil him; He is become a taunt to his neighbours.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲרִימוֹתָ יְמִין צָרָיו הִשְׂמַחְתָּ כָּל־אוֹיְבָיו׃
englishText: Thou hast exalted the right hand of his adversaries; Thou hast made all his enemies to rejoice.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַף־תָּשִׁיב צוּר חַרְבּוֹ וְלֹא הֲקֵימֹתוֹ בַּמִּלְחָמָה׃
englishText: Yea, Thou turnest back the edge of his sword, And hast not made him to stand in the battle.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הִשְׁבַּתָּ מִטְּהָרוֹ וְכִסְאוֹ לָאָרֶץ מִגַּרְתָּה׃
englishText: Thou hast made his brightness to cease, And cast his throne down to the ground.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הִקְצַרְתָּ יְמֵי עֲלוּמָיו הֶעֱטִיתָ עָלָיו בּוּשָׁה סֶלָה׃
englishText: The days of his youth hast Thou shortened; Thou hast covered him with shame. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַד־מָה יְהוָה תִּסָּתֵר לָנֶצַח תִּבְעַר כְּמוֹ־אֵשׁ חֲמָתֶךָ׃
englishText: How long, O LORD, wilt Thou hide Thyself for ever? How long shall Thy wrath burn like fire?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זְכָר־אֲנִי מֶה־חָלֶד עַל־מַה־שָּׁוְא בָּרָאתָ כָל־בְּנֵי־אָדָם׃
englishText: O remember how short my time is; For what vanity hast Thou created all the children of men!
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִי גֶבֶר יִחְיֶה וְלֹא יִרְאֶה־מָּוֶת יְמַלֵּט נַפְשׁוֹ מִיַּד־שְׁאוֹל סֶלָה׃
englishText: What man is he that liveth and shall not see death, That shall deliver his soul from the power of the grave? Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַיֵּה חֲסָדֶיךָ הָרִאשֹׁנִים אֲדֹנָי נִשְׁבַּעְתָּ לְדָוִד בֶּאֱמוּנָתֶךָ׃
englishText: Where are Thy former mercies, O Lord, Which Thou didst swear unto David in Thy faithfulness?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זְכֹר אֲדֹנָי חֶרְפַּת עֲבָדֶיךָ שְׂאֵתִי בְחֵיקִי כָּל־רַבִּים עַמִּים׃
englishText: Remember, Lord, the taunt of Thy servants; How I do bear in my bosom [the taunt of] so many peoples;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲשֶׁר חֵרְפוּ אוֹיְבֶיךָ יְהוָה אֲשֶׁר חֵרְפוּ עִקְּבוֹת מְשִׁיחֶךָ׃
englishText: Wherewith Thine enemies have taunted, O LORD, Wherewith they have taunted the footsteps of Thine anointed.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בָּרוּךְ יְהוָה לְעוֹלָם אָמֵן וְאָמֵן׃
englishText: Blessed be the LORD for evermore. Amen, and Amen.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תְּפִלָּה לְמֹשֶׁה אִישׁ־הָאֱלֹהִים אֲ‍דֹנָי מָעוֹן אַתָּה הָיִיתָ לָּנוּ בְּדֹר וָדֹר׃
englishText: A Prayer of Moses the man of God. Lord, Thou hast been our dwelling-place in all generations.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּטֶרֶם הָרִים יֻלָּדוּ וַתְּחוֹלֵל אֶרֶץ וְתֵבֵל וּמֵעוֹלָם עַד־עוֹלָם אַתָּה אֵל׃
englishText: Before the mountains were brought forth, Or ever Thou hadst formed the earth and the world, Even from everlasting to everlasting, Thou art God.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תָּשֵׁב אֱנוֹשׁ עַד־דַּכָּא וַתֹּאמֶר שׁוּבוּ בְנֵי־אָדָם׃
englishText: Thou turnest man to contrition; And sayest: 'Return, ye children of men.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי אֶלֶף שָׁנִים בְּעֵינֶיךָ כְּיוֹם אֶתְמוֹל כִּי יַעֲבֹר וְאַשְׁמוּרָה בַלָּיְלָה׃
englishText: For a thousand years in Thy sight Are but as yesterday when it is past, And as a watch in the night.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זְרַמְתָּם שֵׁנָה יִהְיוּ בַּבֹּקֶר כֶּחָצִיר יַחֲלֹף׃
englishText: Thou carriest them away as with a flood; they are as a sleep; In the morning they are like grass which groweth up.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בַּבֹּקֶר יָצִיץ וְחָלָף לָעֶרֶב יְמוֹלֵל וְיָבֵשׁ׃
englishText: In the morning it flourisheth, and groweth up; In the evening it is cut down, and withereth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־כָלִינוּ בְאַפֶּךָ וּבַחֲמָתְךָ נִבְהָלְנוּ׃
englishText: For we are consumed in Thine anger, And by Thy wrath are we hurried away.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שת [שַׁתָּה] עֲוֺנֹתֵינוּ לְנֶגְדֶּךָ עֲלֻמֵנוּ לִמְאוֹר פָּנֶיךָ׃
englishText: Thou hast set our iniquities before Thee, Our secret sins in the light of Thy countenance.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי כָל־יָמֵינוּ פָּנוּ בְעֶבְרָתֶךָ כִּלִּינוּ שָׁנֵינוּ כְמוֹ־הֶגֶה׃
englishText: For all our days are passed away in Thy wrath; We bring our years to an end as a tale that is told.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְמֵי־שְׁנוֹתֵינוּ בָהֶם שִׁבְעִים שָׁנָה וְאִם בִּגְבוּרֹת שְׁמוֹנִים שָׁנָה וְרָהְבָּם עָמָל וָאָוֶן כִּי־גָז חִישׁ וַנָּעֻפָה׃
englishText: The days of our years are threescore years and ten, Or even by reason of strength fourscore years; Yet is their pride but travail and vanity; For it is speedily gone, and we fly away.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִי־יוֹדֵעַ עֹז אַפֶּךָ וּכְיִרְאָתְךָ עֶבְרָתֶךָ׃
englishText: Who knoweth the power of Thine anger, And Thy wrath according to the fear that is due unto Thee?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לִמְנוֹת יָמֵינוּ כֵּן הוֹדַע וְנָבִא לְבַב חָכְמָה׃
englishText: So teach us to number our days, That we may get us a heart of wisdom.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שׁוּבָה יְהוָה עַד־מָתָי וְהִנָּחֵם עַל־עֲבָדֶיךָ׃
englishText: Return, O LORD; how long? And let it repent Thee concerning Thy servants.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שַׂבְּעֵנוּ בַבֹּקֶר חַסְדֶּךָ וּנְרַנְּנָה וְנִשְׂמְחָה בְּכָל־יָמֵינוּ׃
englishText: O satisfy us in the morning with Thy mercy; That we may rejoice and be glad all our days.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שַׂמְּחֵנוּ כִּימוֹת עִנִּיתָנוּ שְׁנוֹת רָאִינוּ רָעָה׃
englishText: Make us glad according to the days wherein Thou hast afflicted us, According to the years wherein we have seen evil.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יֵרָאֶה אֶל־עֲבָדֶיךָ פָעֳלֶךָ וַהֲדָרְךָ עַל־בְּנֵיהֶם׃
englishText: Let Thy work appear unto Thy servants, And Thy glory upon their children.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וִיהִי נֹעַם אֲדֹנָי אֱלֹהֵינוּ עָלֵינוּ וּמַעֲשֵׂה יָדֵינוּ כּוֹנְנָה עָלֵינוּ וּמַעֲשֵׂה יָדֵינוּ כּוֹנְנֵהוּ׃
englishText: And let the graciousness of the Lord our God be upon us; Establish Thou also upon us the work of our hands; Yea, the work of our hands establish Thou it.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יֹשֵׁב בְּסֵתֶר עֶלְיוֹן בְּצֵל שַׁדַּי יִתְלוֹנָן׃
englishText: O thou that dwellest in the covert of the Most High, And abidest in the shadow of the Almighty;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֹמַר לַיהוָה מַחְסִי וּמְצוּדָתִי אֱלֹהַי אֶבְטַח־בּוֹ׃
englishText: I will say of the LORD, who is my refuge and my fortress, My God, in whom I trust,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי הוּא יַצִּילְךָ מִפַּח יָקוּשׁ מִדֶּבֶר הַוּוֹת׃
englishText: That He will deliver thee from the snare of the fowler, And from the noisome pestilence.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּאֶבְרָתוֹ יָסֶךְ לָךְ וְתַחַת־כְּנָפָיו תֶּחְסֶה צִנָּה וְסֹחֵרָה אֲמִתּוֹ׃
englishText: He will cover thee with His pinions, And under His wings shalt thou take refuge; His truth is a shield and a buckler.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא־תִירָא מִפַּחַד לָיְלָה מֵחֵץ יָעוּף יוֹמָם׃
englishText: Thou shalt not be afraid of the terror by night, Nor of the arrow that flieth by day;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִדֶּבֶר בָּאֹפֶל יַהֲלֹךְ מִקֶּטֶב יָשׁוּד צָהֳרָיִם׃
englishText: Of the pestilence that walketh in darkness, Nor of the destruction that wasteth at noonday.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִפֹּל מִצִּדְּךָ אֶלֶף וּרְבָבָה מִימִינֶךָ אֵלֶיךָ לֹא יִגָּשׁ׃
englishText: A thousand may fall at Thy side, And ten thousand at Thy right hand; It shall not come nigh thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רַק בְּעֵינֶיךָ תַבִּיט וְשִׁלֻּמַת רְשָׁעִים תִּרְאֶה׃
englishText: Only with thine eyes shalt thou behold, And see the recompense of the wicked.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־אַתָּה יְהוָה מַחְסִי עֶלְיוֹן שַׂמְתָּ מְעוֹנֶךָ׃
englishText: For thou hast made the LORD who is my refuge, Even the Most High, thy habitation.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא־תְאֻנֶּה אֵלֶיךָ רָעָה וְנֶגַע לֹא־יִקְרַב בְּאָהֳלֶךָ׃
englishText: There shall no evil befall thee, Neither shall any plague come nigh thy tent.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי מַלְאָכָיו יְצַוֶּה־לָּךְ לִשְׁמָרְךָ בְּכָל־דְּרָכֶיךָ׃
englishText: For He will give His angels charge over thee, To keep thee in all thy ways.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַל־כַּפַּיִם יִשָּׂאוּנְךָ פֶּן־תִּגֹּף בָּאֶבֶן רַגְלֶךָ׃
englishText: They shall bear thee upon their hands, Lest thou dash thy foot against a stone.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַל־שַׁחַל וָפֶתֶן תִּדְרֹךְ תִּרְמֹס כְּפִיר וְתַנִּין׃
englishText: Thou shalt tread upon the lion and asp; The young lion and the serpent shalt thou trample under feet.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי בִי חָשַׁק וַאֲפַלְּטֵהוּ אֲשַׂגְּבֵהוּ כִּי־יָדַע שְׁמִי׃
englishText: 'Because he hath set his love upon Me, therefore will I deliver him; I will set him on high, because he hath known My name.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִקְרָאֵנִי וְאֶעֱנֵהוּ עִמּוֹ־אָנֹכִי בְצָרָה אֲחַלְּצֵהוּ וַאֲכַבְּדֵהוּ׃
englishText: He shall call upon Me, and I will answer him; I will be with him in trouble; I will rescue him, and bring him to honour.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֹרֶךְ יָמִים אַשְׂבִּיעֵהוּ וְאַרְאֵהוּ בִּישׁוּעָתִי׃
englishText: With long life will I satisfy him, And make Him to behold My salvation.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִזְמוֹר שִׁיר לְיוֹם הַשַּׁבָּת׃
englishText: A Psalm, a Song. For the sabbath day.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: טוֹב לְהֹדוֹת לַיהוָה וּלְזַמֵּר לְשִׁמְךָ עֶלְיוֹן׃
englishText: It is a good thing to give thanks unto the LORD, And to sing praises unto Thy name, O Most High;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְהַגִּיד בַּבֹּקֶר חַסְדֶּךָ וֶאֱמוּנָתְךָ בַּלֵּילוֹת׃
englishText: To declare Thy lovingkindness in the morning, And Thy faithfulness in the night seasons,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֲ‍לֵי־עָשׂוֹר וַעֲלֵי־נָבֶל עֲלֵי הִגָּיוֹן בְּכִנּוֹר׃
englishText: With an instrument of ten strings, and with the psaltery; With a solemn sound upon the harp.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי שִׂמַּחְתַּנִי יְהוָה בְּפָעֳלֶךָ בְּמַעֲשֵׂי יָדֶיךָ אֲרַנֵּן׃
englishText: For Thou, LORD, hast made me glad through Thy work; I will exult in the works of Thy hands.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַה־גָּדְלוּ מַעֲשֶׂיךָ יְהוָה מְאֹד עָמְקוּ מַחְשְׁבֹתֶיךָ׃
englishText: How great are Thy works, O LORD! Thy thoughts are very deep.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִישׁ־בַּעַר לֹא יֵדָע וּכְסִיל לֹא־יָבִין אֶת־זֹאת׃
englishText: A brutish man knoweth not, Neither doth a fool understand this.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בִּפְרֹחַ רְשָׁעִים כְּמוֹ עֵשֶׂב וַיָּצִיצוּ כָּל־פֹּעֲלֵי אָוֶן לְהִשָּׁמְדָם עֲדֵי־עַד׃
englishText: When the wicked spring up as the grass, And when all the workers of iniquity do flourish; It is that they may be destroyed for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאַתָּה מָרוֹם לְעֹלָם יְהוָה׃
englishText: But Thou, O LORD, art on high for evermore.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי הִנֵּה אֹיְבֶיךָ יְהוָה כִּי־הִנֵּה אֹיְבֶיךָ יֹאבֵדוּ יִתְפָּרְדוּ כָּל־פֹּעֲלֵי אָוֶן׃
englishText: For, lo, Thine enemies, O LORD, For, lo, Thine enemies shall perish: All the workers of iniquity shall be scattered.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַתָּרֶם כִּרְאֵים קַרְנִי בַּלֹּתִי בְּשֶׁמֶן רַעֲנָן׃
englishText: But my horn hast Thou exalted like the horn of the wild-ox; I am anointed with rich oil.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַתַּבֵּט עֵינִי בְּשׁוּרָי בַּקָּמִים עָלַי מְרֵעִים תִּשְׁמַעְנָה אָזְנָי׃
englishText: Mine eye also hath gazed on them that lie in wait for me, Mine ears have heard my desire of the evil-doers that rise up against me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: צַדִּיק כַּתָּמָר יִפְרָח כְּאֶרֶז בַּלְּבָנוֹן יִשְׂגֶּה׃
englishText: The righteous shall flourish like the palm-tree; He shall grow like a cedar in Lebanon.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שְׁתוּלִים בְּבֵית יְהוָה בְּחַצְרוֹת אֱלֹהֵינוּ יַפְרִיחוּ׃
englishText: Planted in the house of the LORD, They shall flourish in the courts of our God.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עוֹד יְנוּבוּן בְּשֵׂיבָה דְּשֵׁנִים וְרַעֲנַנִּים יִהְיוּ׃
englishText: They shall still bring forth fruit in old age; They shall be full of sap and richness;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְהַגִּיד כִּי־יָשָׁר יְהוָה צוּרִי וְלֹא־עלתה [עַוְלָתָה] בּוֹ׃
englishText: To declare that the LORD is upright, My Rock, in whom there is no unrighteousness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה מָלָךְ גֵּאוּת לָבֵשׁ לָבֵשׁ יְהוָה עֹז הִתְאַזָּר אַף־תִּכּוֹן תֵּבֵל בַּל־תִּמּוֹט׃
englishText: The LORD reigneth; He is clothed in majesty; The LORD is clothed, He hath girded Himself with strength; Yea, the world is established, that it cannot be moved.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נָכוֹן כִּסְאֲךָ מֵאָז מֵעוֹלָם אָתָּה׃
englishText: Thy throne is established of old; Thou art from everlasting.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נָשְׂאוּ נְהָרוֹת יְהוָה נָשְׂאוּ נְהָרוֹת קוֹלָם יִשְׂאוּ נְהָרוֹת דָּכְיָם׃
englishText: The floods have lifted up, O LORD, The floods have lifted up their voice; The floods lift up their roaring.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִקֹּלוֹת מַיִם רַבִּים אַדִּירִים מִשְׁבְּרֵי־יָם אַדִּיר בַּמָּרוֹם יְהוָה׃
englishText: Above the voices of many waters, The mighty breakers of the sea, The LORD on high is mighty.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֵדֹתֶיךָ נֶאֶמְנוּ מְאֹד לְבֵיתְךָ נַאֲוָה־קֹדֶשׁ יְהוָה לְאֹרֶךְ יָמִים׃
englishText: Thy testimonies are very sure, Holiness becometh Thy house, O LORD, for evermore.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֵל־נְקָמוֹת יְהוָה אֵל נְקָמוֹת הוֹפִיַע׃
englishText: O LORD, Thou God to whom vengeance belongeth, Thou God to whom vengeance belongeth, shine forth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הִנָּשֵׂא שֹׁפֵט הָאָרֶץ הָשֵׁב גְּמוּל עַל־גֵּאִים׃
englishText: Lift up Thyself, Thou Judge of the earth; Render to the proud their recompense.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַד־מָתַי רְשָׁעִים יְהוָה עַד־מָתַי רְשָׁעִים יַעֲלֹזוּ׃
englishText: LORD, how long shall the wicked, How long shall the wicked exult?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יַבִּיעוּ יְדַבְּרוּ עָתָק יִתְאַמְּרוּ כָּל־פֹּעֲלֵי אָוֶן׃
englishText: They gush out, they speak arrogancy; All the workers of iniquity bear themselves loftily.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַמְּךָ יְהוָה יְדַכְּאוּ וְנַחֲלָתְךָ יְעַנּוּ׃
englishText: They crush Thy people, O LORD, And afflict Thy heritage.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַלְמָנָה וְגֵר יַהֲרֹגוּ וִיתוֹמִים יְרַצֵּחוּ׃
englishText: They slay the widow and the stranger, And murder the fatherless.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיֹּאמְרוּ לֹא יִרְאֶה־יָּהּ וְלֹא־יָבִין אֱלֹהֵי יַעֲקֹב׃
englishText: And they say: 'The LORD will not see, Neither will the God of Jacob give heed.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בִּינוּ בֹּעֲרִים בָּעָם וּכְסִילִים מָתַי תַּשְׂכִּילוּ׃
englishText: Consider, ye brutish among the people; And ye fools, when will ye understand?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲנֹטַע אֹזֶן הֲלֹא יִשְׁמָע אִם־יֹצֵר עַיִן הֲלֹא יַבִּיט׃
englishText: He that planted the ear, shall He not hear? He that formed the eye, shall He not see?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲיֹסֵר גּוֹיִם הֲלֹא יוֹכִיחַ הַמְלַמֵּד אָדָם דָּעַת׃
englishText: He that instructeth nations, shall not He correct? Even He that teacheth man knowledge?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה יֹדֵעַ מַחְשְׁבוֹת אָדָם כִּי־הֵמָּה הָבֶל׃
englishText: The LORD knoweth the thoughts of man, That they are vanity.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַשְׁרֵי הַגֶּבֶר אֲשֶׁר־תְּיַסְּרֶנּוּ יָּהּ וּמִתּוֹרָתְךָ תְלַמְּדֶנּוּ׃
englishText: Happy is the man whom Thou instructest, O LORD, And teachest out of Thy law;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְהַשְׁקִיט לוֹ מִימֵי רָע עַד יִכָּרֶה לָרָשָׁע שָׁחַת׃
englishText: That Thou mayest give him rest from the days of evil, Until the pit be digged for the wicked.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי לֹא־יִטֹּשׁ יְהוָה עַמּוֹ וְנַחֲלָתוֹ לֹא יַעֲזֹב׃
englishText: For the LORD will not cast off His people, Neither will He forsake His inheritance.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־עַד־צֶדֶק יָשׁוּב מִשְׁפָּט וְאַחֲרָיו כָּל־יִשְׁרֵי־לֵב׃
englishText: For right shall return unto justice, And all the upright in heart shall follow it.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִי־יָקוּם לִי עִם־מְרֵעִים מִי־יִתְיַצֵּב לִי עִם־פֹּעֲלֵי אָוֶן׃
englishText: Who will rise up for me against the evil-doers? Who will stand up for me against the workers of iniquity?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)
