originalText: לוּלֵי יְהוָה עֶזְרָתָה לִּי כִּמְעַט שָׁכְנָה דוּמָה נַפְשִׁי׃
englishText: Unless the LORD had been my help, My soul had soon dwelt in silence.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־אָמַרְתִּי מָטָה רַגְלִי חַסְדְּךָ יְהוָה יִסְעָדֵנִי׃
englishText: If I say: 'My foot slippeth', Thy mercy, O LORD, holdeth me up.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּרֹב שַׂרְעַפַּי בְּקִרְבִּי תַּנְחוּמֶיךָ יְשַׁעַשְׁעוּ נַפְשִׁי׃
englishText: When my cares are many within me, Thy comforts delight my soul.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַיְחָבְרְךָ כִּסֵּא הַוּוֹת יֹצֵר עָמָל עֲלֵי־חֹק׃
englishText: Shall the seat of wickedness have fellowship with Thee, Which frameth mischief by statute?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָגוֹדּוּ עַל־נֶפֶשׁ צַדִּיק וְדָם נָקִי יַרְשִׁיעוּ׃
englishText: They gather themselves together against the soul of the righteous, And condemn innocent blood.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיְהִי יְהוָה לִי לְמִשְׂגָּב וֵאלֹהַי לְצוּר מַחְסִי׃
englishText: But the LORD hath been my high tower, And my God the rock of my refuge.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיָּשֶׁב עֲלֵיהֶם אֶת־אוֹנָם וּבְרָעָתָם יַצְמִיתֵם יַצְמִיתֵם יְהוָה אֱלֹהֵינוּ׃
englishText: And He hath brought upon them their own iniquity, And will cut them off in their own evil; The LORD our God will cut them off.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְכוּ נְרַנְּנָה לַיהוָה נָרִיעָה לְצוּר יִשְׁעֵנוּ׃
englishText: O come, let us sing unto the LORD; Let us shout for joy to the Rock of our salvation.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נְקַדְּמָה פָנָיו בְּתוֹדָה בִּזְמִרוֹת נָרִיעַ לוֹ׃
englishText: Let us come before His presence with thanksgiving, Let us shout for joy unto Him with psalms.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי אֵל גָּדוֹל יְהוָה וּמֶלֶךְ גָּדוֹל עַל־כָּל־אֱלֹהִים׃
englishText: For the LORD is a great God, And a great King above all gods;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲשֶׁר בְּיָדוֹ מֶחְקְרֵי־אָרֶץ וְתוֹעֲפוֹת הָרִים לוֹ׃
englishText: In whose hand are the depths of the earth; The heights of the mountains are His also.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲשֶׁר־לוֹ הַיָּם וְהוּא עָשָׂהוּ וְיַבֶּשֶׁת יָדָיו יָצָרוּ׃
englishText: The sea is His, and He made it; And His hands formed the dry land.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בֹּאוּ נִשְׁתַּחֲוֶה וְנִכְרָעָה נִבְרְכָה לִפְנֵי־יְהוָה עֹשֵׂנוּ׃
englishText: O come, let us bow down and bend the knee; Let us kneel before the LORD our Maker;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי הוּא אֱלֹהֵינוּ וַאֲנַחְנוּ עַם מַרְעִיתוֹ וְצֹאן יָדוֹ הַיּוֹם אִם־בְּקֹלוֹ תִשְׁמָעוּ׃
englishText: For He is our God, And we are the people of His pasture, and the flock of His hand. To-day, if ye would but hearken to His voice!
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תַּקְשׁוּ לְבַבְכֶם כִּמְרִיבָה כְּיוֹם מַסָּה בַּמִּדְבָּר׃
englishText: 'Harden not your heart, as at Meribah, As in the day of Massah in the wilderness;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲשֶׁר נִסּוּנִי אֲבוֹתֵיכֶם בְּחָנוּנִי גַּם־רָאוּ פָעֳלִי׃
englishText: When your fathers tried Me, Proved Me, even though they saw My work.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַרְבָּעִים שָׁנָה אָקוּט בְּדוֹר וָאֹמַר עַם תֹּעֵי לֵבָב הֵם וְהֵם לֹא־יָדְעוּ דְרָכָי׃
englishText: For forty years was I wearied with that generation, And said: It is a people that do err in their heart, And they have not known My ways;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲשֶׁר־נִשְׁבַּעְתִּי בְאַפִּי אִם־יְבֹאוּן אֶל־מְנוּחָתִי׃
englishText: Wherefore I swore in My wrath, That they should not enter into My rest.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׁירוּ לַיהוָה שִׁיר חָדָשׁ שִׁירוּ לַיהוָה כָּל־הָאָרֶץ׃
englishText: O sing unto the LORD a new song; Sing unto the LORD, all the earth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׁירוּ לַיהוָה בָּרֲכוּ שְׁמוֹ בַּשְּׂרוּ מִיּוֹם־לְיוֹם יְשׁוּעָתוֹ׃
englishText: Sing unto the LORD, bless His name; Proclaim His salvation from day to day.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: סַפְּרוּ בַגּוֹיִם כְּבוֹדוֹ בְּכָל־הָעַמִּים נִפְלְאוֹתָיו׃
englishText: Declare His glory among the nations, His marvellous works among all the peoples.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי גָדוֹל יְהוָה וּמְהֻלָּל מְאֹד נוֹרָא הוּא עַל־כָּל־אֱלֹהִים׃
englishText: For great is the LORD, and highly to be praised; He is to be feared above all gods. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי כָּל־אֱלֹהֵי הָעַמִּים אֱלִילִים וַיהוָה שָׁמַיִם עָשָׂה׃
englishText: For all the gods of the peoples are things of nought; But the LORD made the heavens.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הוֹד־וְהָדָר לְפָנָיו עֹז וְתִפְאֶרֶת בְּמִקְדָּשׁוֹ׃
englishText: Honour and majesty are before Him; Strength and beauty are in His sanctuary.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הָבוּ לַיהוָה מִשְׁפְּחוֹת עַמִּים הָבוּ לַיהוָה כָּבוֹד וָעֹז׃
englishText: Ascribe unto the LORD, ye kindreds of the peoples, Ascribe unto the LORD glory and strength.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הָבוּ לַיהוָה כְּבוֹד שְׁמוֹ שְׂאוּ־מִנְחָה וּבֹאוּ לְחַצְרוֹתָיו׃
englishText: Ascribe unto the LORD the glory due unto His name; Bring an offering, and come into His courts.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הִשְׁתַּחֲווּ לַיהוָה בְּהַדְרַת־קֹדֶשׁ חִילוּ מִפָּנָיו כָּל־הָאָרֶץ׃
englishText: O worship the LORD in the beauty of holiness; Tremble before Him, all the earth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִמְרוּ בַגּוֹיִם יְהוָה מָלָךְ אַף־תִּכּוֹן תֵּבֵל בַּל־תִּמּוֹט יָדִין עַמִּים בְּמֵישָׁרִים׃
englishText: Say among the nations: 'The LORD reigneth.' The world also is established that it cannot be moved; He will judge the peoples with equity.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִשְׂמְחוּ הַשָּׁמַיִם וְתָגֵל הָאָרֶץ יִרְעַם הַיָּם וּמְלֹאוֹ׃
englishText: Let the heavens be glad, and let the earth rejoice; Let the sea roar, and the fulness thereof;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יַעֲלֹז שָׂדַי וְכָל־אֲשֶׁר־בּוֹ אָז יְרַנְּנוּ כָּל־עֲצֵי־יָעַר׃
englishText: Let the field exult; and all that is therein; Then shall all the trees of the wood sing for joy;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לִפְנֵי יְהוָה כִּי בָא כִּי בָא לִשְׁפֹּט הָאָרֶץ יִשְׁפֹּט־תֵּבֵל בְּצֶדֶק וְעַמִּים בֶּאֱמוּנָתוֹ׃
englishText: Before the LORD, for He is come; For He is come to judge the earth; He will judge the world with righteousness, And the peoples in His faithfulness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה מָלָךְ תָּגֵל הָאָרֶץ יִשְׂמְחוּ אִיִּים רַבִּים׃
englishText: The LORD reigneth; let the earth rejoice; Let the multitude of isles be glad.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עָנָן וַעֲרָפֶל סְבִיבָיו צֶדֶק וּמִשְׁפָּט מְכוֹן כִּסְאוֹ׃
englishText: Clouds and darkness are round about Him; Righteousness and justice are the foundation of His throne.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֵשׁ לְפָנָיו תֵּלֵךְ וּתְלַהֵט סָבִיב צָרָיו׃
englishText: A fire goeth before Him, And burneth up His adversaries round about.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֵאִירוּ בְרָקָיו תֵּבֵל רָאֲתָה וַתָּחֵל הָאָרֶץ׃
englishText: His lightnings lighted up the world; The earth saw, and trembled.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הָרִים כַּדּוֹנַג נָמַסּוּ מִלִּפְנֵי יְהוָה מִלִּפְנֵי אֲדוֹן כָּל־הָאָרֶץ׃
englishText: The mountains melted like wax at the presence of the LORD, At the presence of the Lord of the whole earth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הִגִּידוּ הַשָּׁמַיִם צִדְקוֹ וְרָאוּ כָל־הָעַמִּים כְּבוֹדוֹ׃
englishText: The heavens declared His righteousness, And all the peoples saw His glory.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יֵבֹשׁוּ כָּל־עֹבְדֵי פֶסֶל הַמִּתְהַלְלִים בָּאֱלִילִים הִשְׁתַּחֲווּ־לוֹ כָּל־אֱלֹהִים׃
englishText: Ashamed be all they that serve graven images, That boast themselves of things of nought; Bow down to Him, all ye gods.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׁמְעָה וַתִּשְׂמַח צִיּוֹן וַתָּגֵלְנָה בְּנוֹת יְהוּדָה לְמַעַן מִשְׁפָּטֶיךָ יְהוָה׃
englishText: Zion heard and was glad, And the daughters of Judah rejoiced; Because of Thy judgments, O LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־אַתָּה יְהוָה עֶלְיוֹן עַל־כָּל־הָאָרֶץ מְאֹד נַעֲלֵיתָ עַל־כָּל־אֱלֹהִים׃
englishText: For Thou, LORD, art most high above all the earth; Thou art exalted far above all gods.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֹהֲבֵי יְהוָה שִׂנְאוּ רָע שֹׁמֵר נַפְשׁוֹת חֲסִידָיו מִיַּד רְשָׁעִים יַצִּילֵם׃
englishText: O ye that love the LORD, hate evil; He preserveth the souls of His saints; He delivered them out of the hand of the wicked.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אוֹר זָרֻעַ לַצַּדִּיק וּלְיִשְׁרֵי־לֵב שִׂמְחָה׃
englishText: Light is sown for the righteous, And gladness for the upright in heart.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׂמְחוּ צַדִּיקִים בַּיהוָה וְהוֹדוּ לְזֵכֶר קָדְשׁוֹ׃
englishText: Be glad in the LORD, ye righteous; And give thanks to His holy name.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִזְמוֹר שִׁירוּ לַיהוָה שִׁיר חָדָשׁ כִּי־נִפְלָאוֹת עָשָׂה הוֹשִׁיעָה־לּוֹ יְמִינוֹ וּזְרוֹעַ קָדְשׁוֹ׃
englishText: A Psalm. O sing unto the LORD a new song; For He hath done marvellous things; His right hand, and His holy arm, hath wrought salvation for Him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הוֹדִיעַ יְהוָה יְשׁוּעָתוֹ לְעֵינֵי הַגּוֹיִם גִּלָּה צִדְקָתוֹ׃
englishText: The LORD hath made known His salvation; His righteousness hath He revealed in the sight of the nations.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זָכַר חַסְדּוֹ וֶאֱמוּנָתוֹ לְבֵית יִשְׂרָאֵל רָאוּ כָל־אַפְסֵי־אָרֶץ אֵת יְשׁוּעַת אֱלֹהֵינוּ׃
englishText: He hath remembered His mercy and His faithfulness toward the house of Israel; All the ends of the earth have seen the salvation of our God.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הָרִיעוּ לַיהוָה כָּל־הָאָרֶץ פִּצְחוּ וְרַנְּנוּ וְזַמֵּרוּ׃
englishText: Shout unto the LORD, all the earth; Break forth and sing for joy, yea, sing praises.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זַמְּרוּ לַיהוָה בְּכִנּוֹר בְּכִנּוֹר וְקוֹל זִמְרָה׃
englishText: Sing praises unto the LORD with the harp; With the harp and the voice of melody.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בַּחֲצֹצְרוֹת וְקוֹל שׁוֹפָר הָרִיעוּ לִפְנֵי הַמֶּלֶךְ יְהוָה׃
englishText: With trumpets and sound of the horn Shout ye before the King, the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִרְעַם הַיָּם וּמְלֹאוֹ תֵּבֵל וְיֹשְׁבֵי בָהּ׃
englishText: Let the sea roar, and the fulness thereof; The world, and they that dwell therein;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נְהָרוֹת יִמְחֲאוּ־כָף יַחַד הָרִים יְרַנֵּנוּ׃
englishText: Let the floods clap their hands; Let the mountains sing for joy together;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לִפְנֵי־יְהוָה כִּי בָא לִשְׁפֹּט הָאָרֶץ יִשְׁפֹּט־תֵּבֵל בְּצֶדֶק וְעַמִּים בְּמֵישָׁרִים׃
englishText: Before the LORD, for He is come to judge the earth; He will judge the world with righteousness, And the peoples with equity.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה מָלָךְ יִרְגְּזוּ עַמִּים יֹשֵׁב כְּרוּבִים תָּנוּט הָאָרֶץ׃
englishText: The LORD reigneth; let the peoples tremble; He is enthroned upon the cherubim; let the earth quake.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה בְּצִיּוֹן גָּדוֹל וְרָם הוּא עַל־כָּל־הָעַמִּים׃
englishText: The LORD is great in Zion; And He is high above all the peoples.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יוֹדוּ שִׁמְךָ גָּדוֹל וְנוֹרָא קָדוֹשׁ הוּא׃
englishText: Let them praise Thy name as great and awful; Holy is He.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְעֹז מֶלֶךְ מִשְׁפָּט אָהֵב אַתָּה כּוֹנַנְתָּ מֵישָׁרִים מִשְׁפָּט וּצְדָקָה בְּיַעֲקֹב אַתָּה עָשִׂיתָ׃
englishText: The strength also of the king who loveth justice— Thou hast established equity, Thou hast executed justice and righteousness in Jacob.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רוֹמְמוּ יְהוָה אֱלֹהֵינוּ וְהִשְׁתַּחֲווּ לַהֲדֹם רַגְלָיו קָדוֹשׁ הוּא׃
englishText: Exalt ye the LORD our God, And prostrate yourselves at His footstool; Holy is He.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מֹשֶׁה וְאַהֲרֹן בְּכֹהֲנָיו וּשְׁמוּאֵל בְּקֹרְאֵי שְׁמוֹ קֹרִאים אֶל־יְהוָה וְהוּא יַעֲנֵם׃
englishText: Moses and Aaron among His priests, And Samuel among them that call upon His name, Did call upon the LORD, and He answered them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּעַמּוּד עָנָן יְדַבֵּר אֲלֵיהֶם שָׁמְרוּ עֵדֹתָיו וְחֹק נָתַן־לָמוֹ׃
englishText: He spoke unto them in the pillar of cloud; They kept His testimonies, and the statute that He gave them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה אֱלֹהֵינוּ אַתָּה עֲנִיתָם אֵל נֹשֵׂא הָיִיתָ לָהֶם וְנֹקֵם עַל־עֲלִילוֹתָם׃
englishText: O LORD our God, Thou didst answer them; A forgiving God wast Thou unto them, Though Thou tookest vengeance of their misdeeds.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רוֹמְמוּ יְהוָה אֱלֹהֵינוּ וְהִשְׁתַּחֲווּ לְהַר קָדְשׁוֹ כִּי־קָדוֹשׁ יְהוָה אֱלֹהֵינוּ׃
englishText: Exalt ye the LORD our God, And worship at His holy hill; For the LORD our God is holy.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִזְמוֹר לְתוֹדָה הָרִיעוּ לַיהוָה כָּל־הָאָרֶץ׃
englishText: A Psalm of thanksgiving. Shout unto the LORD, all the earth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עִבְדוּ אֶת־יְהוָה בְּשִׂמְחָה בֹּאוּ לְפָנָיו בִּרְנָנָה׃
englishText: Serve the LORD with gladness; come before His presence with singing.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: דְּעוּ כִּי־יְהוָה הוּא אֱלֹהִים הוּא־עָשָׂנוּ ולא [וְלוֹ] אֲנַחְנוּ עַמּוֹ וְצֹאן מַרְעִיתוֹ׃
englishText: Know ye that the LORD He is God; it is He that hath made us, and we are His, His people, and the flock of His pasture.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בֹּאוּ שְׁעָרָיו בְּתוֹדָה חֲצֵרֹתָיו בִּתְהִלָּה הוֹדוּ־לוֹ בָּרֲכוּ שְׁמוֹ׃
englishText: Enter into His gates with thanksgiving, and into His courts with praise; give thanks unto Him, and bless His name.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־טוֹב יְהֹוָה לְעוֹלָם חַסְדּוֹ וְעַד־דֹּר וָדֹר אֱמוּנָתוֹ׃
englishText: For the LORD is good; His mercy endureth for ever; and His faithfulness unto all generations.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְדָוִד מִזְמוֹר חֶסֶד־וּמִשְׁפָּט אָשִׁירָה לְךָ יְהוָה אֲזַמֵּרָה׃
englishText: A Psalm of David. I will sing of mercy and justice; unto Thee, O LORD, will I sing praises.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַשְׂכִּילָה בְּדֶרֶךְ תָּמִים מָתַי תָּבוֹא אֵלָי אֶתְהַלֵּךְ בְּתָם־לְבָבִי בְּקֶרֶב בֵּיתִי׃
englishText: I will give heed unto the way of integrity; oh when wilt Thou come unto me? I will walk within my house in the integrity of my heart.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא־אָשִׁית לְנֶגֶד עֵינַי דְּבַר־בְּלִיָּעַל עֲשֹׂה־סֵטִים שָׂנֵאתִי לֹא יִדְבַּק בִּי׃
englishText: I will set no base thing before mine eyes; I hate the doing of things crooked; it shall not cleave unto me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֵבָב עִקֵּשׁ יָסוּר מִמֶּנִּי רָע לֹא אֵדָע׃
englishText: A perverse heart shall depart from me; I will know no evil thing.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מלושני [מְלָשְׁנִי] בַסֵּתֶר רֵעֵהוּ אוֹתוֹ אַצְמִית גְּבַהּ־עֵינַיִם וּרְחַב לֵבָב אֹתוֹ לֹא אוּכָל׃
englishText: Whoso slandereth his neighbour in secret, him will I destroy; Whoso is haughty of eye and proud of heart, him will I not suffer.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֵינַי בְּנֶאֶמְנֵי־אֶרֶץ לָשֶׁבֶת עִמָּדִי הֹלֵךְ בְּדֶרֶךְ תָּמִים הוּא יְשָׁרְתֵנִי׃
englishText: Mine eyes are upon the faithful of the land, that they may dwell with me; he that walketh in a way of integrity, he shall minister unto me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא־יֵשֵׁב בְּקֶרֶב בֵּיתִי עֹשֵׂה רְמִיָּה דֹּבֵר שְׁקָרִים לֹא־יִכּוֹן לְנֶגֶד עֵינָי׃
englishText: He that worketh deceit shall not dwell within my house; he that speaketh falsehood shall not be established before mine eyes.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַבְּקָרִים אַצְמִית כָּל־רִשְׁעֵי־אָרֶץ לְהַכְרִית מֵעִיר־יְהוָה כָּל־פֹּעֲלֵי אָוֶן׃
englishText: Morning by morning will I destroy all the wicked of the land; to cut off all the workers of iniquity from the city of the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תְּפִלָּה לְעָנִי כִי־יַעֲטֹף וְלִפְנֵי יְהוָה יִשְׁפֹּךְ שִׂיחוֹ׃
englishText: A Prayer of the afflicted, when he fainteth, and poureth out his complaint before the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה שִׁמְעָה תְפִלָּתִי וְשַׁוְעָתִי אֵלֶיךָ תָבוֹא׃
englishText: O LORD, hear my prayer, and let my cry come unto Thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תַּסְתֵּר פָּנֶיךָ מִמֶּנִּי בְּיוֹם צַר לִי הַטֵּה־אֵלַי אָזְנֶךָ בְּיוֹם אֶקְרָא מַהֵר עֲנֵנִי׃
englishText: Hide not Thy face from me in the day of my distress; incline Thine ear unto me; in the day when I call answer me speedily.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־כָלוּ בְעָשָׁן יָמָי וְעַצְמוֹתַי כְּמוֹ־קֵד נִחָרוּ׃
englishText: For my days are consumed like smoke, and my bones are burned as a hearth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הוּכָּה־כָעֵשֶׂב וַיִּבַשׁ לִבִּי כִּי־שָׁכַחְתִּי מֵאֲכֹל לַחְמִי׃
englishText: My heart is smitten like grass, and withered; for I forget to eat my bread.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִקּוֹל אַנְחָתִי דָּבְקָה עַצְמִי לִבְשָׂרִי׃
englishText: By reason of the voice of my sighing My bones cleave to my flesh.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: דָּמִיתִי לִקְאַת מִדְבָּר הָיִיתִי כְּכוֹס חֳרָבוֹת׃
englishText: I am like a pelican of the wilderness; I am become as an owl of the waste places.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׁקַדְתִּי וָאֶהְיֶה כְּצִפּוֹר בּוֹדֵד עַל־גָּג׃
englishText: I watch, and am become like a sparrow that is alone upon the housetop.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כָּל־הַיּוֹם חֵרְפוּנִי אוֹיְבָי מְהוֹלָלַי בִּי נִשְׁבָּעוּ׃
englishText: Mine enemies taunt me all the day; they that are mad against me do curse by me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־אֵפֶר כַּלֶּחֶם אָכָלְתִּי וְשִׁקֻּוַי בִּבְכִי מָסָכְתִּי׃
englishText: For I have eaten ashes like bread, and mingled my drink with weeping,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִפְּנֵי־זַעַמְךָ וְקִצְפֶּךָ כִּי נְשָׂאתַנִי וַתַּשְׁלִיכֵנִי׃
englishText: Because of Thine indignation and Thy wrath; for Thou hast taken me up, and cast me away.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָמַי כְּצֵל נָטוּי וַאֲנִי כָּעֵשֶׂב אִיבָשׁ׃
englishText: My days are like a lengthening shadow; and I am withered like grass.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאַתָּה יְהוָה לְעוֹלָם תֵּשֵׁב וְזִכְרְךָ לְדֹר וָדֹר׃
englishText: But Thou, O LORD, sittest enthroned for ever; and Thy name is unto all generations.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַתָּה תָקוּם תְּרַחֵם צִיּוֹן כִּי־עֵת לְחֶנְנָהּ כִּי־בָא מוֹעֵד׃
englishText: Thou wilt arise, and have compassion upon Zion; for it is time to be gracious unto her, for the appointed time is come.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־רָצוּ עֲבָדֶיךָ אֶת־אֲבָנֶיהָ וְאֶת־עֲפָרָהּ יְחֹנֵנוּ׃
englishText: For Thy servants take pleasure in her stones, and love her dust.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְיִירְאוּ גוֹיִם אֶת־שֵׁם יְהוָה וְכָל־מַלְכֵי הָאָרֶץ אֶת־כְּבוֹדֶךָ׃
englishText: So the nations will fear the name of the LORD, and all the kings of the earth Thy glory;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־בָנָה יְהוָה צִיּוֹן נִרְאָה בִּכְבוֹדוֹ׃
englishText: When the LORD hath built up Zion, when He hath appeared in His glory;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פָּנָה אֶל־תְּפִלַּת הָעַרְעָר וְלֹא־בָזָה אֶת־תְּפִלָּתָם׃
englishText: When He hath regarded the prayer of the destitute, And hath not despised their prayer.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תִּכָּתֶב זֹאת לְדוֹר אַחֲרוֹן וְעַם נִבְרָא יְהַלֶּל־יָהּ׃
englishText: This shall be written for the generation to come; And a people which shall be created shall praise the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־הִשְׁקִיף מִמְּרוֹם קָדְשׁוֹ יְהוָה מִשָּׁמַיִם אֶל־אֶרֶץ הִבִּיט׃
englishText: For He hath looked down from the height of His sanctuary; From heaven did the LORD behold the earth;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לִשְׁמֹעַ אֶנְקַת אָסִיר לְפַתֵּחַ בְּנֵי תְמוּתָה׃
englishText: To hear the groaning of the prisoner; To loose those that are appointed to death;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְסַפֵּר בְּצִיּוֹן שֵׁם יְהוָה וּתְהִלָּתוֹ בִּירוּשָׁלִָם׃
englishText: That men may tell of the name of the LORD in Zion, And His praise in Jerusalem; .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּהִקָּבֵץ עַמִּים יַחְדָּו וּמַמְלָכוֹת לַעֲבֹד אֶת־יְהוָה׃
englishText: When the peoples are gathered together, And the kingdoms, to serve the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עִנָּה בַדֶּרֶךְ כחו [כֹּחִי] קִצַּר יָמָי׃
englishText: He weakened my strength in the way; He shortened my days.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֹמַר אֵלִי אַל־תַּעֲלֵנִי בַּחֲצִי יָמָי בְּדוֹר דּוֹרִים שְׁנוֹתֶיךָ׃
englishText: I say: 'O my God, take me not away in the midst of my days, Thou whose years endure throughout all generations.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְפָנִים הָאָרֶץ יָסַדְתָּ וּמַעֲשֵׂה יָדֶיךָ שָׁמָיִם׃
englishText: Of old Thou didst lay the foundation of the earth; And the heavens are the work of Thy hands.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֵמָּה יֹאבֵדוּ וְאַתָּה תַעֲמֹד וְכֻלָּם כַּבֶּגֶד יִבְלוּ כַּלְּבוּשׁ תַּחֲלִיפֵם וְיַחֲלֹפוּ׃
englishText: They shall perish, but Thou shalt endure; Yea, all of them shall wax old like a garment; As a vesture shalt Thou change them, and they shall pass away;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאַתָּה־הוּא וּשְׁנוֹתֶיךָ לֹא יִתָּמּוּ׃
englishText: But Thou art the selfsame, And Thy years shall have no end.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּנֵי־עֲבָדֶיךָ יִשְׁכּוֹנוּ וְזַרְעָם לְפָנֶיךָ יִכּוֹן׃
englishText: The children of Thy servants shall dwell securely, And their seed shall be established before Thee.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְדָוִד בָּרֲכִי נַפְשִׁי אֶת־יְהוָה וְכָל־קְרָבַי אֶת־שֵׁם קָדְשׁוֹ׃
englishText: [A Psalm] of David. Bless the LORD, O my soul; And all that is within me, bless His holy name.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בָּרֲכִי נַפְשִׁי אֶת־יְהוָה וְאַל־תִּשְׁכְּחִי כָּל־גְּמוּלָיו׃
englishText: Bless the LORD, O my soul, And forget not all His benefits;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַסֹּלֵחַ לְכָל־עֲוֺנֵכִי הָרֹפֵא לְכָל־תַּחֲלֻאָיְכִי׃
englishText: Who forgiveth all thine iniquity; Who healeth all Thy diseases;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַגּוֹאֵל מִשַּׁחַת חַיָּיְכִי הַמְעַטְּרֵכִי חֶסֶד וְרַחֲמִים׃
englishText: Who redeemeth Thy life from the pit; Who encompasseth thee with lovingkindness and tender mercies;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַמַּשְׂבִּיַע בַּטּוֹב עֶדְיֵךְ תִּתְחַדֵּשׁ כַּנֶּשֶׁר נְעוּרָיְכִי׃
englishText: Who satisfieth thine old age with good things; So that Thy youth is renewed like the eagle.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֹשֵׂה צְדָקוֹת יְהוָה וּמִשְׁפָּטִים לְכָל־עֲשׁוּקִים׃
englishText: The LORD executeth righteousness, And acts of justice for all that are oppressed.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יוֹדִיעַ דְּרָכָיו לְמֹשֶׁה לִבְנֵי יִשְׂרָאֵל עֲלִילוֹתָיו׃
englishText: He made known His ways unto Moses, His doings unto the children of Israel.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רַחוּם וְחַנּוּן יְהוָה אֶרֶךְ אַפַּיִם וְרַב־חָסֶד׃
englishText: The LORD is full of compassion and gracious, Slow to anger, and plenteous in mercy.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא־לָנֶצַח יָרִיב וְלֹא לְעוֹלָם יִטּוֹר׃
englishText: He will not always contend; Neither will He keep His anger for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא כַחֲטָאֵינוּ עָשָׂה לָנוּ וְלֹא כַעֲוֺנֹתֵינוּ גָּמַל עָלֵינוּ׃
englishText: He hath not dealt with us after our sins, Nor requited us according to our iniquities.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי כִגְבֹהַּ שָׁמַיִם עַל־הָאָרֶץ גָּבַר חַסְדּוֹ עַל־יְרֵאָיו׃
englishText: For as the heaven is high above the earth, So great is His mercy toward them that fear Him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּרְחֹק מִזְרָח מִמַּעֲרָב הִרְחִיק מִמֶּנּוּ אֶת־פְּשָׁעֵינוּ׃
englishText: As far as the east is from the west, So far hath He removed our transgressions from us.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כְּרַחֵם אָב עַל־בָּנִים רִחַם יְהוָה עַל־יְרֵאָיו׃
englishText: Like as a father hath compassion upon his children, So hath the LORD compassion upon them that fear Him. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־הוּא יָדַע יִצְרֵנוּ זָכוּר כִּי־עָפָר אֲנָחְנוּ׃
englishText: For He knoweth our frame; He remembereth that we are dust.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱנוֹשׁ כֶּחָצִיר יָמָיו כְּצִיץ הַשָּׂדֶה כֵּן יָצִיץ׃
englishText: As for man, his days are as grass; As a flower of the field, so he flourisheth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי רוּחַ עָבְרָה־בּוֹ וְאֵינֶנּוּ וְלֹא־יַכִּירֶנּוּ עוֹד מְקוֹמוֹ׃
englishText: For the wind passeth over it, and it is gone; And the place thereof knoweth it no more.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְחֶסֶד יְהוָה מֵעוֹלָם וְעַד־עוֹלָם עַל־יְרֵאָיו וְצִדְקָתוֹ לִבְנֵי בָנִים׃
englishText: But the mercy of the LORD is from everlasting to everlasting upon them that fear Him, And His righteousness unto children's children;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְשֹׁמְרֵי בְרִיתוֹ וּלְזֹכְרֵי פִקֻּדָיו לַעֲשׂוֹתָם׃
englishText: To such as keep His covenant, And to those that remember His precepts to do them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה בַּשָּׁמַיִם הֵכִין כִּסְאוֹ וּמַלְכוּתוֹ בַּכֹּל מָשָׁלָה׃
englishText: The LORD hath established His throne in the heavens; And His kingdom ruleth over all.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בָּרֲכוּ יְהוָה מַלְאָכָיו גִּבֹּרֵי כֹחַ עֹשֵׂי דְבָרוֹ לִשְׁמֹעַ בְּקוֹל דְּבָרוֹ׃
englishText: Bless the LORD, ye angels of His, Ye mighty in strength, that fulfil His word, Hearkening unto the voice of His word.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בָּרֲכוּ יְהוָה כָּל־צְבָאָיו מְשָׁרְתָיו עֹשֵׂי רְצוֹנוֹ׃
englishText: Bless the LORD, all ye His hosts; Ye ministers of His, that do His pleasure.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בָּרֲכוּ יְהוָה כָּל־מַעֲשָׂיו בְּכָל־מְקֹמוֹת מֶמְשַׁלְתּוֹ בָּרֲכִי נַפְשִׁי אֶת־יְהוָה׃
englishText: Bless the LORD, all ye His works, In all places of His dominion; Bless the LORD, O my soul.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בָּרֲכִי נַפְשִׁי אֶת־יְהוָה יְהוָה אֱלֹהַי גָּדַלְתָּ מְּאֹד הוֹד וְהָדָר לָבָשְׁתָּ׃
englishText: Bless the LORD, O my soul. O LORD my God, Thou art very great; Thou art clothed with glory and majesty.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֹטֶה־אוֹר כַּשַּׂלְמָה נוֹטֶה שָׁמַיִם כַּיְרִיעָה׃
englishText: Who coverest Thyself with light as with a garment, who stretchest out the heavens like a curtain;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַמְקָרֶה בַמַּיִם עֲ‍לִיּוֹתָיו הַשָּׂם־עָבִים רְכוּבוֹ הַמְהַלֵּךְ עַל־כַּנְפֵי־רוּחַ׃
englishText: Who layest the beams of Thine upper chambers in the waters, who makest the clouds Thy chariot, who walkest upon the wings of the wind;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֹשֶׂה מַלְאָכָיו רוּחוֹת מְשָׁרְתָיו אֵשׁ לֹהֵט׃
englishText: Who makest winds Thy messengers, the flaming fire Thy ministers.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָסַד־אֶרֶץ עַל־מְכוֹנֶיהָ בַּל־תִּמּוֹט עוֹלָם וָעֶד׃
englishText: Who didst establish the earth upon its foundations, that it should not be moved for ever and ever;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תְּהוֹם כַּלְּבוּשׁ כִּסִּיתוֹ עַל־הָרִים יַעַמְדוּ־מָיִם׃
englishText: Thou didst cover it with the deep as with a vesture; the waters stood above the mountains.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִן־גַּעֲרָתְךָ יְנוּסוּן מִן־קוֹל רַעַמְךָ יֵחָפֵזוּן׃
englishText: At Thy rebuke they fled, at the voice of Thy thunder they hasted away—
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יַעֲלוּ הָרִים יֵרְדוּ בְקָעוֹת אֶל־מְקוֹם זֶה יָסַדְתָּ לָהֶם׃
englishText: The mountains rose, the valleys sank down— Unto the place which Thou hadst founded for them;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גְּבוּל־שַׂמְתָּ בַּל־יַעֲבֹרוּן בַּל־יְשׁוּבוּן לְכַסּוֹת הָאָרֶץ׃
englishText: Thou didst set a bound which they should not pass over, That they might not return to cover the earth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַמְשַׁלֵּחַ מַעְיָנִים בַּנְּחָלִים בֵּין הָרִים יְהַלֵּכוּן׃
englishText: Who sendest forth springs into the valleys; They run between the mountains;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יַשְׁקוּ כָּל־חַיְתוֹ שָׂדָי יִשְׁבְּרוּ פְרָאִים צְמָאָם׃
englishText: They give drink to every beast of the field, The wild asses quench their thirst. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֲלֵיהֶם עוֹף־הַשָּׁמַיִם יִשְׁכּוֹן מִבֵּין עֳפָאיִם יִתְּנוּ־קוֹל׃
englishText: Beside them dwell the fowl of the heaven, From among the branches they sing.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַשְׁקֶה הָרִים מֵעֲלִיּוֹתָיו מִפְּרִי מַעֲשֶׂיךָ תִּשְׂבַּע הָאָרֶץ׃
englishText: Who waterest the mountains from Thine upper chambers; The earth is full of the fruit of Thy works.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַצְמִיחַ חָצִיר לַבְּהֵמָה וְעֵשֶׂב לַעֲבֹדַת הָאָדָם לְהוֹצִיא לֶחֶם מִן־הָאָרֶץ׃
englishText: Who causeth the grass to spring up for the cattle, And herb for the service of man; To bring forth bread out of the earth,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְיַיִן יְשַׂמַּח לְבַב־אֱנוֹשׁ לְהַצְהִיל פָּנִים מִשָּׁמֶן וְלֶחֶם לְבַב־אֱנוֹשׁ יִסְעָד׃
englishText: And wine that maketh glad the heart of man, Making the face brighter than oil, And bread that stayeth man's heart.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִשְׂבְּעוּ עֲצֵי יְהוָה אַרְזֵי לְבָנוֹן אֲשֶׁר נָטָע׃
englishText: The trees of the LORD have their fill, The cedars of Lebanon, which He hath planted;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲשֶׁר־שָׁם צִפֳּרִים יְקַנֵּנוּ חֲסִידָה בְּרוֹשִׁים בֵּיתָהּ׃
englishText: Wherein the birds make their nests; As for the stork, the fir-trees are her house.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הָרִים הַגְּבֹהִים לַיְּעֵלִים סְלָעִים מַחְסֶה לַשְׁפַנִּים׃
englishText: The high mountains are for the wild goats; The rocks are a refuge for the conies.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עָשָׂה יָרֵחַ לְמוֹעֲדִים שֶׁמֶשׁ יָדַע מְבוֹאוֹ׃
englishText: Who appointedst the moon for seasons; The sun knoweth his going down.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תָּשֶׁת־חֹשֶׁךְ וִיהִי לָיְלָה בּוֹ־תִרְמֹשׂ כָּל־חַיְתוֹ־יָעַר׃
englishText: Thou makest darkness, and it is night, Wherein all the beasts of the forest do creep forth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַכְּפִירִים שֹׁאֲגִים לַטָּרֶף וּלְבַקֵּשׁ מֵאֵל אָכְלָם׃
englishText: The young lions roar after their prey, And seek their food from God.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תִּזְרַח הַשֶּׁמֶשׁ יֵאָסֵפוּן וְאֶל־מְעוֹנֹתָם יִרְבָּצוּן׃
englishText: The sun ariseth, they slink away, And couch in their dens.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יֵצֵא אָדָם לְפָעֳלוֹ וְלַעֲבֹדָתוֹ עֲדֵי־עָרֶב׃
englishText: Man goeth forth unto his work And to his labour until the evening.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מָה־רַבּוּ מַעֲשֶׂיךָ יְהוָה כֻּלָּם בְּחָכְמָה עָשִׂיתָ מָלְאָה הָאָרֶץ קִנְיָנֶךָ׃
englishText: How manifold are Thy works, O LORD! In wisdom hast Thou made them all; The earth is full of Thy creatures.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זֶה הַיָּם גָּדוֹל וּרְחַב יָדָיִם שָׁם־רֶמֶשׂ וְאֵין מִסְפָּר חַיּוֹת קְטַנּוֹת עִם־גְּדֹלוֹת׃
englishText: Yonder sea, great and wide, Therein are creeping things innumerable, Living creatures, both small and great.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׁם אֳנִיּוֹת יְהַלֵּכוּן לִוְיָתָן זֶה־יָצַרְתָּ לְשַׂחֶק־בּוֹ׃
englishText: There go the ships; There is leviathan, whom Thou hast formed to sport therein.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כֻּלָּם אֵלֶיךָ יְשַׂבֵּרוּן לָתֵת אָכְלָם בְּעִתּוֹ׃
englishText: All of them wait for Thee, That Thou mayest give them their food in due season.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תִּתֵּן לָהֶם יִלְקֹטוּן תִּפְתַּח יָדְךָ יִשְׂבְּעוּן טוֹב׃
englishText: Thou givest it unto them, they gather it; Thou openest Thy hand, they are satisfied with good.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תַּסְתִּיר פָּנֶיךָ יִבָּהֵלוּן תֹּסֵף רוּחָם יִגְוָעוּן וְאֶל־עֲפָרָם יְשׁוּבוּן׃
englishText: Thou hidest Thy face, they vanish; Thou withdrawest their breath, they perish, And return to their dust.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תְּשַׁלַּח רוּחֲךָ יִבָּרֵאוּן וּתְחַדֵּשׁ פְּנֵי אֲדָמָה׃
englishText: Thou sendest forth Thy spirit, they are created; and Thou renewest the face of the earth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהִי כְבוֹד יְהוָה לְעוֹלָם יִשְׂמַח יְהוָה בְּמַעֲשָׂיו׃
englishText: May the glory of the LORD endure for ever; let the LORD rejoice in His works!
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַמַּבִּיט לָאָרֶץ וַתִּרְעָד יִגַּע בֶּהָרִים וְיֶעֱשָׁנוּ׃
englishText: Who looketh on the earth, and it trembleth; He toucheth the mountains, and they smoke.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָשִׁירָה לַיהוָה בְּחַיָּי אֲזַמְּרָה לֵאלֹהַי בְּעוֹדִי׃
englishText: I will sing unto the LORD as long as I live; I will sing praise to my God while I have any being.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יֶעֱרַב עָלָיו שִׂיחִי אָנֹכִי אֶשְׂמַח בַּיהוָה׃
englishText: Let my musing be sweet unto Him; as for me, I will rejoice in the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִתַּמּוּ חַטָּאִים מִן־הָאָרֶץ וּרְשָׁעִים עוֹד אֵינָם בָּרֲכִי נַפְשִׁי אֶת־יְהוָה הַלְלוּ־יָהּ׃
englishText: Let sinners cease out of the earth, and let the wicked be no more. Bless the LORD, O my soul. Hallelujah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הוֹדוּ לַיהוָה קִרְאוּ בִּשְׁמוֹ הוֹדִיעוּ בָעַמִּים עֲלִילוֹתָיו׃
englishText: O give thanks unto the LORD, call upon His name; Make known His doings among the peoples.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׁירוּ־לוֹ זַמְּרוּ־לוֹ שִׂיחוּ בְּכָל־נִפְלְאוֹתָיו׃
englishText: Sing unto Him, sing praises unto Him; Speak ye of all His marvellous works.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הִתְהַלְלוּ בְּשֵׁם קָדְשׁוֹ יִשְׂמַח לֵב מְבַקְשֵׁי יְהוָה׃
englishText: Glory ye in His holy name; Let the heart of them rejoice that seek the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: דִּרְשׁוּ יְהוָה וְעֻזּוֹ בַּקְּשׁוּ פָנָיו תָּמִיד׃
englishText: Seek ye the LORD and His strength; Seek His face continually.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זִכְרוּ נִפְלְאוֹתָיו אֲשֶׁר־עָשָׂה מֹפְתָיו וּמִשְׁפְּטֵי־פִיו׃
englishText: Remember His marvellous works that He hath done, His wonders, and the judgments of His mouth;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זֶרַע אַבְרָהָם עַבְדּוֹ בְּנֵי יַעֲקֹב בְּחִירָיו׃
englishText: O ye seed of Abraham His servant, Ye children of Jacob, His chosen ones.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הוּא יְהוָה אֱלֹהֵינוּ בְּכָל־הָאָרֶץ מִשְׁפָּטָיו׃
englishText: He is the LORD our God; His judgments are in all the earth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זָכַר לְעוֹלָם בְּרִיתוֹ דָּבָר צִוָּה לְאֶלֶף דּוֹר׃
englishText: He hath remembered His covenant for ever, The word which He commanded to a thousand generations;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲשֶׁר כָּרַת אֶת־אַבְרָהָם וּשְׁבוּעָתוֹ לְיִשְׂחָק׃
englishText: [The covenant] which He made with Abraham, And His oath unto Isaac;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּעֲמִידֶהָ לְיַעֲקֹב לְחֹק לְיִשְׂרָאֵל בְּרִית עוֹלָם׃
englishText: And He established it unto Jacob for a statute, To Israel for an everlasting covenant;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֵאמֹר לְךָ אֶתֵּן אֶת־אֶרֶץ־כְּנָעַן חֶבֶל נַחֲלַתְכֶם׃
englishText: Saying: 'Unto thee will I give the land of Canaan, The lot of your inheritance.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בִּהְיוֹתָם מְתֵי מִסְפָּר כִּמְעַט וְגָרִים בָּהּ׃
englishText: When they were but a few men in number. Yea, very few, and sojourners in it,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּתְהַלְּכוּ מִגּוֹי אֶל־גּוֹי מִמַּמְלָכָה אֶל־עַם אַחֵר׃
englishText: And when they went about from nation to nation, From one kingdom to another people,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא־הִנִּיחַ אָדָם לְעָשְׁקָם וַיּוֹכַח עֲלֵיהֶם מְלָכִים׃
englishText: He suffered no man to do them wrong, Yea, for their sake He reproved kings:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תִּגְּעוּ בִמְשִׁיחָי וְלִנְבִיאַי אַל־תָּרֵעוּ׃
englishText: 'Touch not Mine anointed ones, And do My prophets no harm.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּקְרָא רָעָב עַל־הָאָרֶץ כָּל־מַטֵּה־לֶחֶם שָׁבָר׃
englishText: And He called a famine upon the land; He broke the whole staff of bread.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׁלַח לִפְנֵיהֶם אִישׁ לְעֶבֶד נִמְכַּר יוֹסֵף׃
englishText: He sent a man before them; Joseph was sold for a servant;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עִנּוּ בַכֶּבֶל רגליו [רַגְלוֹ] בַּרְזֶל בָּאָה נַפְשׁוֹ׃
englishText: His feet they hurt with fetters, His person was laid in iron;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַד־עֵת בֹּא־דְבָרוֹ אִמְרַת יְהוָה צְרָפָתְהוּ׃
englishText: Until the time that his word came to pass, The word of the LORD tested him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׁלַח מֶלֶךְ וַיַּתִּירֵהוּ מֹשֵׁל עַמִּים וַיְפַתְּחֵהוּ׃
englishText: The king sent and loosed him; Even the ruler of the peoples, and set him free.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׂמוֹ אָדוֹן לְבֵיתוֹ וּמֹשֵׁל בְּכָל־קִנְיָנוֹ׃
englishText: He made him lord of his house, And ruler of all his possessions;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֶאְסֹר שָׂרָיו בְּנַפְשׁוֹ וּזְקֵנָיו יְחַכֵּם׃
englishText: To bind his princes at his pleasure, And teach his elders wisdom.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיָּבֹא יִשְׂרָאֵל מִצְרָיִם וְיַעֲקֹב גָּר בְּאֶרֶץ־חָם׃
englishText: Israel also came into Egypt; And Jacob sojourned in the land of Ham.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיֶּפֶר אֶת־עַמּוֹ מְאֹד וַיַּעֲצִמֵהוּ מִצָּרָיו׃
englishText: And He increased His people greatly, And made them too mighty for their adversaries.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הָפַךְ לִבָּם לִשְׂנֹא עַמּוֹ לְהִתְנַכֵּל בַּעֲבָדָיו׃
englishText: He turned their heart to hate His people, To deal craftily with His servants.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׁלַח מֹשֶׁה עַבְדּוֹ אַהֲרֹן אֲשֶׁר בָּחַר־בּוֹ׃
englishText: He sent Moses His servant, And Aaron whom He had chosen.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׂמוּ־בָם דִּבְרֵי אֹתוֹתָיו וּמֹפְתִים בְּאֶרֶץ חָם׃
englishText: They wrought among them His manifold signs, And wonders in the land of Ham.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׁלַח חֹשֶׁךְ וַיַּחְשִׁךְ וְלֹא־מָרוּ אֶת־דברוו [דְּבָרוֹ׃]
englishText: He sent darkness, and it was dark; And they rebelled not against His word.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הָפַךְ אֶת־מֵימֵיהֶם לְדָם וַיָּמֶת אֶת־דְּגָתָם׃
englishText: He turned their waters into blood, And slew their fish.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׁרַץ אַרְצָם צְפַרְדְּעִים בְּחַדְרֵי מַלְכֵיהֶם׃
englishText: Their land swarmed with frogs, In the chambers of their kings.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָמַר וַיָּבֹא עָרֹב כִּנִּים בְּכָל־גְּבוּלָם׃
englishText: He spoke, and there came swarms of flies, And gnats in all their borders.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נָתַן גִּשְׁמֵיהֶם בָּרָד אֵשׁ לֶהָבוֹת בְּאַרְצָם׃
englishText: He gave them hail for rain, And flaming fire in their land.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּךְ גַּפְנָם וּתְאֵנָתָם וַיְשַׁבֵּר עֵץ גְּבוּלָם׃
englishText: He smote their vines also and their fig-trees; And broke the trees of their borders.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָמַר וַיָּבֹא אַרְבֶּה וְיֶלֶק וְאֵין מִסְפָּר׃
englishText: He spoke, and the locust came, And the canker-worm without number,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיֹּאכַל כָּל־עֵשֶׂב בְּאַרְצָם וַיֹּאכַל פְּרִי אַדְמָתָם׃
englishText: And did eat up every herb in their land, And did eat up the fruit of their ground.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּךְ כָּל־בְּכוֹר בְּאַרְצָם רֵאשִׁית לְכָל־אוֹנָם׃
englishText: He smote also all the first-born in their land, The first-fruits of all their strength.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיּוֹצִיאֵם בְּכֶסֶף וְזָהָב וְאֵין בִּשְׁבָטָיו כּוֹשֵׁל׃
englishText: And He brought them forth with silver and gold; And there was none that stumbled among His tribes.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׂמַח מִצְרַיִם בְּצֵאתָם כִּי־נָפַל פַּחְדָּם עֲלֵיהֶם׃
englishText: Egypt was glad when they departed; For the fear of them had fallen upon them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פָּרַשׂ עָנָן לְמָסָךְ וְאֵשׁ לְהָאִיר לָיְלָה׃
englishText: He spread a cloud for a screen; And fire to give light in the night.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׁאַל וַיָּבֵא שְׂלָו וְלֶחֶם שָׁמַיִם יַשְׂבִּיעֵם׃
englishText: They asked, and He brought quails, And gave them in plenty the bread of heaven.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פָּתַח צוּר וַיָּזוּבוּ מָיִם הָלְכוּ בַּצִּיּוֹת נָהָר׃
englishText: He opened the rock, and waters gushed out; They ran, a river in the dry places.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־זָכַר אֶת־דְּבַר קָדְשׁוֹ אֶת־אַבְרָהָם עַבְדּוֹ׃
englishText: For He remembered His holy word Unto Abraham His servant;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיּוֹצִא עַמּוֹ בְשָׂשׂוֹן בְּרִנָּה אֶת־בְּחִירָיו׃
englishText: And He brought forth His people with joy, His chosen ones with singing.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּתֵּן לָהֶם אַרְצוֹת גּוֹיִם וַעֲמַל לְאֻמִּים יִירָשׁוּ׃
englishText: And He gave them the lands of the nations, And they took the labour of the peoples in possession;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בַּעֲבוּר יִשְׁמְרוּ חֻקָּיו וְתוֹרֹתָיו יִנְצֹרוּ הַלְלוּ־יָהּ׃
englishText: That they might keep His statutes, And observe His laws. Hallelujah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַלְלוּיָהּ הוֹדוּ לַיהוָה כִּי־טוֹב כִּי לְעוֹלָם חַסְדּוֹ׃
englishText: Hallelujah. O give thanks unto the LORD; for He is good; for His mercy endureth for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִי יְמַלֵּל גְּבוּרוֹת יְהוָה יַשְׁמִיעַ כָּל־תְּהִלָּתוֹ׃
englishText: Who can express the mighty acts of the LORD, or make all His praise to be heard?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַשְׁרֵי שֹׁמְרֵי מִשְׁפָּט עֹשֵׂה צְדָקָה בְכָל־עֵת׃
englishText: Happy are they that keep justice, that do righteousness at all times.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זָכְרֵנִי יְהוָה בִּרְצוֹן עַמֶּךָ פָּקְדֵנִי בִּישׁוּעָתֶךָ׃
englishText: Remember me, O LORD, when Thou favourest Thy people; O think of me at Thy salvation;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לִרְאוֹת בְּטוֹבַת בְּחִירֶיךָ לִשְׂמֹחַ בְּשִׂמְחַת גּוֹיֶךָ לְהִתְהַלֵּל עִם־נַחֲלָתֶךָ׃
englishText: That I may behold the prosperity of Thy chosen, that I may rejoice in the gladness of Thy nation, that I may glory with Thine inheritance.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חָטָאנוּ עִם־אֲבוֹתֵינוּ הֶעֱוִינוּ הִרְשָׁעְנוּ׃
englishText: We have sinned with our fathers, we have done iniquitously, we have dealt wickedly.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲבוֹתֵינוּ בְמִצְרַיִם לֹא־הִשְׂכִּילוּ נִפְלְאוֹתֶיךָ לֹא זָכְרוּ אֶת־רֹב חֲסָדֶיךָ וַיַּמְרוּ עַל־יָם בְּיַם־סוּף׃
englishText: Our fathers in Egypt gave no heed unto Thy wonders; they remembered not the multitude of Thy mercies; but were rebellious at the sea, even at the Red Sea.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיּוֹשִׁיעֵם לְמַעַן שְׁמוֹ לְהוֹדִיעַ אֶת־גְּבוּרָתוֹ׃
englishText: Nevertheless He saved them for His name's sake, that He might make His mighty power to be known.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּגְעַר בְּיַם־סוּף וַיֶּחֱרָב וַיּוֹלִיכֵם בַּתְּהֹמוֹת כַּמִּדְבָּר׃
englishText: And He rebuked the Red Sea, and it was dried up; and He led them through the depths, as through a wilderness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיּוֹשִׁיעֵם מִיַּד שׂוֹנֵא וַיִּגְאָלֵם מִיַּד אוֹיֵב׃
englishText: And He saved them from the hand of him that hated them, And redeemed them from the hand of the enemy.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיְכַסּוּ־מַיִם צָרֵיהֶם אֶחָד מֵהֶם לֹא נוֹתָר׃
englishText: And the waters covered their adversaries; There was not one of them left.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּאֲמִינוּ בִדְבָרָיו יָשִׁירוּ תְּהִלָּתוֹ׃
englishText: Then believed they His words; They sang His praise.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִהֲרוּ שָׁכְחוּ מַעֲשָׂיו לֹא־חִכּוּ לַעֲצָתוֹ׃
englishText: They soon forgot His works; They waited not for His counsel;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּתְאַוּוּ תַאֲוָה בַּמִּדְבָּר וַיְנַסּוּ־אֵל בִּישִׁימוֹן׃
englishText: But lusted exceedingly in the wilderness, And tried God in the desert.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּתֵּן לָהֶם שֶׁאֱלָתָם וַיְשַׁלַּח רָזוֹן בְּנַפְשָׁם׃
englishText: And He gave them their request; But sent leanness into their soul.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיְקַנְאוּ לְמֹשֶׁה בַּמַּחֲנֶה לְאַהֲרֹן קְדוֹשׁ יְהוָה׃
englishText: They were jealous also of Moses in the camp, And of Aaron the holy one of the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תִּפְתַּח־אֶרֶץ וַתִּבְלַע דָּתָן וַתְּכַס עַל־עֲדַת אֲבִירָם׃
englishText: The earth opened and swallowed up Dathan, And covered the company of Abiram.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַתִּבְעַר־אֵשׁ בַּעֲדָתָם לֶהָבָה תְּלַהֵט רְשָׁעִים׃
englishText: And a fire was kindled in their company; The flame burned up the wicked.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יַעֲשׂוּ־עֵגֶל בְּחֹרֵב וַיִּשְׁתַּחֲווּ לְמַסֵּכָה׃
englishText: They made a calf in Horeb, And worshipped a molten image.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיָּמִירוּ אֶת־כְּבוֹדָם בְּתַבְנִית שׁוֹר אֹכֵל עֵשֶׂב׃
englishText: Thus they exchanged their glory For the likeness of an ox that eateth grass.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׁכְחוּ אֵל מוֹשִׁיעָם עֹשֶׂה גְדֹלוֹת בְּמִצְרָיִם׃
englishText: They forgot God their saviour, Who had done great things in Egypt;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נִפְלָאוֹת בְּאֶרֶץ חָם נוֹרָאוֹת עַל־יַם־סוּף׃
englishText: Wondrous works in the land of Ham, Terrible things by the Red Sea.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיֹּאמֶר לְהַשְׁמִידָם לוּלֵי מֹשֶׁה בְחִירוֹ עָמַד בַּפֶּרֶץ לְפָנָיו לְהָשִׁיב חֲמָתוֹ מֵהַשְׁחִית׃
englishText: Therefore He said that He would destroy them, Had not Moses His chosen stood before Him in the breach, To turn back His wrath, lest He should destroy them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּמְאֲסוּ בְּאֶרֶץ חֶמְדָּה לֹא־הֶאֱמִינוּ לִדְבָרוֹ׃
englishText: Moreover, they scorned the desirable land, They believed not His word;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיֵּרָגְנוּ בְאָהֳלֵיהֶם לֹא שָׁמְעוּ בְּקוֹל יְהוָה׃
englishText: And they murmured in their tents, They hearkened not unto the voice of the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּשָּׂא יָדוֹ לָהֶם לְהַפִּיל אוֹתָם בַּמִּדְבָּר׃
englishText: Therefore He swore concerning them, That He would overthrow them in the wilderness;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּלְהַפִּיל זַרְעָם בַּגּוֹיִם וּלְזָרוֹתָם בָּאֲרָצוֹת׃
englishText: And that He would cast out their seed among the nations, And scatter them in the lands.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּצָּמְדוּ לְבַעַל פְּעוֹר וַיֹּאכְלוּ זִבְחֵי מֵתִים׃
englishText: They joined themselves also unto Baal of Peor, And ate the sacrifices of the dead.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּכְעִיסוּ בְּמַעַלְלֵיהֶם וַתִּפְרָץ־בָּם מַגֵּפָה׃
englishText: Thus they provoked Him with their doings, And the plague broke in upon them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּעֲמֹד פִּינְחָס וַיְפַלֵּל וַתֵּעָצַר הַמַּגֵּפָה׃
englishText: Then stood up Phinehas, and wrought judgment, And so the plague was stayed.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַתֵּחָשֶׁב לוֹ לִצְדָקָה לְדֹר וָדֹר עַד־עוֹלָם׃
englishText: And that was counted unto him for righteousness, Unto all generations for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּקְצִיפוּ עַל־מֵי מְרִיבָה וַיֵּרַע לְמֹשֶׁה בַּעֲבוּרָם׃
englishText: They angered Him also at the waters of Meribah, And it went ill with Moses because of them;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־הִמְרוּ אֶת־רוּחוֹ וַיְבַטֵּא בִּשְׂפָתָיו׃
englishText: For they embittered his spirit, And he spoke rashly with his lips.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא־הִשְׁמִידוּ אֶת־הָעַמִּים אֲשֶׁר אָמַר יְהוָה לָהֶם׃
englishText: They did not destroy the peoples, As the LORD commanded them;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּתְעָרְבוּ בַגּוֹיִם וַיִּלְמְדוּ מַעֲשֵׂיהֶם׃
englishText: But mingled themselves with the nations, And learned their works;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּעַבְדוּ אֶת־עֲצַבֵּיהֶם וַיִּהְיוּ לָהֶם לְמוֹקֵשׁ׃
englishText: And they served their idols, Which became a snare unto them;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּזְבְּחוּ אֶת־בְּנֵיהֶם וְאֶת־בְּנוֹתֵיהֶם לַשֵּׁדִים׃
englishText: Yea, they sacrificed their sons and their daughters unto demons,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּשְׁפְּכוּ דָם נָקִי דַּם־בְּנֵיהֶם וּבְנוֹתֵיהֶם אֲשֶׁר זִבְּחוּ לַעֲצַבֵּי כְנָעַן וַתֶּחֱנַף הָאָרֶץ בַּדָּמִים׃
englishText: And shed innocent blood, even the blood of their sons and of their daughters, Whom they sacrificed unto the idols of Canaan; And the land was polluted with blood.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּטְמְאוּ בְמַעֲשֵׂיהֶם וַיִּזְנוּ בְּמַעַלְלֵיהֶם׃
englishText: Thus were they defiled with their works, And went astray in their doings.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּחַר־אַף יְהוָה בְּעַמּוֹ וַיְתָעֵב אֶת־נַחֲלָתוֹ׃
englishText: Therefore was the wrath of the LORD kindled against His people, And He abhorred His inheritance.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּתְּנֵם בְּיַד־גּוֹיִם וַיִּמְשְׁלוּ בָהֶם שֹׂנְאֵיהֶם׃
englishText: And He gave them into the hand of the nations; And they that hated them ruled over them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּלְחָצוּם אוֹיְבֵיהֶם וַיִּכָּנְעוּ תַּחַת יָדָם׃
englishText: Their enemies also oppressed them, And they were subdued under their hand.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פְּעָמִים רַבּוֹת יַצִּילֵם וְהֵמָּה יַמְרוּ בַעֲצָתָם וַיָּמֹכּוּ בַּעֲוֺנָם׃
englishText: Many times did He deliver them; But they were rebellious in their counsel, And sank low through their iniquity.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּרְא בַּצַּר לָהֶם בְּשָׁמְעוֹ אֶת־רִנָּתָם׃
englishText: Nevertheless He looked upon their distress, When He heard their cry;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּזְכֹּר לָהֶם בְּרִיתוֹ וַיִּנָּחֵם כְּרֹב חסדו [חֲסָדָיו׃]
englishText: And He remembered for them His covenant, And repented according to the multitude of His mercies.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּתֵּן אוֹתָם לְרַחֲמִים לִפְנֵי כָּל־שׁוֹבֵיהֶם׃
englishText: He made them also to be pitied Of all those that carried them captive.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הוֹשִׁיעֵנוּ יְהוָה אֱלֹהֵינוּ וְקַבְּצֵנוּ מִן־הַגּוֹיִם לְהֹדוֹת לְשֵׁם קָדְשֶׁךָ לְהִשְׁתַּבֵּחַ בִּתְהִלָּתֶךָ׃
englishText: Save us, O LORD our God, And gather us from among the nations, That we may give thanks unto Thy holy name, That we may triumph in Thy praise.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בָּרוּךְ־יְהוָה אֱלֹהֵי יִשְׂרָאֵל מִן־הָעוֹלָם וְעַד הָעוֹלָם וְאָמַר כָּל־הָעָם אָמֵן הַלְלוּ־יָהּ׃
englishText: Blessed be the LORD, the God of Israel, from everlasting even to everlasting, and let all the people say: 'Amen.' Hallelujah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֹדוּ לַיהוָה כִּי־טוֹב כִּי לְעוֹלָם חַסְדּוֹ׃
englishText: 'O give thanks unto the LORD, for He is good, For His mercy endureth for ever.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יֹאמְרוּ גְּאוּלֵי יְהוָה אֲשֶׁר גְּאָלָם מִיַּד־צָר׃
englishText: So let the redeemed of the LORD say, Whom He hath redeemed from the hand of the adversary;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּמֵאֲרָצוֹת קִבְּצָם מִמִּזְרָח וּמִמַּעֲרָב מִצָּפוֹן וּמִיָּם׃
englishText: And gathered them out of the lands, From the east and from the west, From the north and from the sea.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תָּעוּ בַמִּדְבָּר בִּישִׁימוֹן דָּרֶךְ עִיר מוֹשָׁב לֹא מָצָאוּ׃
englishText: They wandered in the wilderness in a desert way; They found no city of habitation.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רְעֵבִים גַּם־צְמֵאִים נַפְשָׁם בָּהֶם תִּתְעַטָּף׃
englishText: Hungry and thirsty, Their soul fainted in them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּצְעֲקוּ אֶל־יְהוָה בַּצַּר לָהֶם מִמְּצוּקוֹתֵיהֶם יַצִּילֵם׃
englishText: Then they cried unto the LORD in their trouble, And He delivered them out of their distresses.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּדְרִיכֵם בְּדֶרֶךְ יְשָׁרָה לָלֶכֶת אֶל־עִיר מוֹשָׁב׃
englishText: And He led them by a straight way, That they might go to a city of habitation.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יוֹדוּ לַיהוָה חַסְדּוֹ וְנִפְלְאוֹתָיו לִבְנֵי אָדָם׃
englishText: Let them give thanks unto the LORD for His mercy, And for His wonderful works to the children of men!
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־הִשְׂבִּיעַ נֶפֶשׁ שֹׁקֵקָה וְנֶפֶשׁ רְעֵבָה מִלֵּא־טוֹב׃
englishText: For He hath satisfied the longing soul, And the hungry soul He hath filled with good.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יֹשְׁבֵי חֹשֶׁךְ וְצַלְמָוֶת אֲסִירֵי עֳנִי וּבַרְזֶל׃
englishText: Such as sat in darkness and in the shadow of death, Being bound in affliction and iron—
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־הִמְרוּ אִמְרֵי־אֵל וַעֲצַת עֶלְיוֹן נָאָצוּ׃
englishText: Because they rebelled against the words of God, And contemned the counsel of the Most High.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּכְנַע בֶּעָמָל לִבָּם כָּשְׁלוּ וְאֵין עֹזֵר׃
englishText: Therefore He humbled their heart with travail, They stumbled, and there was none to help—
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּזְעֲקוּ אֶל־יְהוָה בַּצַּר לָהֶם מִמְּצֻקוֹתֵיהֶם יוֹשִׁיעֵם׃
englishText: They cried unto the LORD in their trouble, And He saved them out of their distresses.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יוֹצִיאֵם מֵחֹשֶׁךְ וְצַלְמָוֶת וּמוֹסְרוֹתֵיהֶם יְנַתֵּק׃
englishText: He brought them out of darkness and the shadow of death, And broke their bands in sunder. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יוֹדוּ לַיהוָה חַסְדּוֹ וְנִפְלְאוֹתָיו לִבְנֵי אָדָם׃
englishText: Let them give thanks unto the LORD for His mercy, And for His wonderful works to the children of men!
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־שִׁבַּר דַּלְתוֹת נְחֹשֶׁת וּבְרִיחֵי בַרְזֶל גִּדֵּעַ׃
englishText: For He hath broken the gates of brass, And cut the bars of iron in sunder.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱוִלִים מִדֶּרֶךְ פִּשְׁעָם וּמֵעֲוֺנֹתֵיהֶם יִתְעַנּוּ׃
englishText: Crazed because of the way of their transgression, And afflicted because of their iniquities—
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כָּל־אֹכֶל תְּתַעֵב נַפְשָׁם וַיַּגִּיעוּ עַד־שַׁעֲרֵי מָוֶת׃
englishText: Their soul abhorred all manner of food, And they drew near unto the gates of death—
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּזְעֲקוּ אֶל־יְהוָה בַּצַּר לָהֶם מִמְּצֻקוֹתֵיהֶם יוֹשִׁיעֵם׃
englishText: They cried unto the LORD in their trouble, And He saved them out of their distresses;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִשְׁלַח דְּבָרוֹ וְיִרְפָּאֵם וִימַלֵּט מִשְּׁחִיתוֹתָם׃
englishText: He sent His word, and healed them, And delivered them from their graves.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יוֹדוּ לַיהוָה חַסְדּוֹ וְנִפְלְאוֹתָיו לִבְנֵי אָדָם׃
englishText: Let them give thanks unto the LORD for His mercy, And for His wonderful works to the children of men!
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְיִזְבְּחוּ זִבְחֵי תוֹדָה וִיסַפְּרוּ מַעֲשָׂיו בְּרִנָּה׃
englishText: And let them offer the sacrifices of thanksgiving, And declare His works with singing.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יוֹרְדֵי הַיָּם בָּאֳנִיּוֹת עֹשֵׂי מְלָאכָה בְּמַיִם רַבִּים׃
englishText: They that go down to the sea in ships, That do business in great waters—
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֵמָּה רָאוּ מַעֲשֵׂי יְהוָה וְנִפְלְאוֹתָיו בִּמְצוּלָה׃
englishText: These saw the works of the LORD, And His wonders in the deep;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיֹּאמֶר וַיַּעֲמֵד רוּחַ סְעָרָה וַתְּרוֹמֵם גַּלָּיו׃
englishText: For He commanded, and raised the stormy wind, Which lifted up the waves thereof;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יַעֲלוּ שָׁמַיִם יֵרְדוּ תְהוֹמוֹת נַפְשָׁם בְּרָעָה תִתְמוֹגָג׃
englishText: They mounted up to the heaven, they went down to the deeps; Their soul melted away because of trouble;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָחוֹגּוּ וְיָנוּעוּ כַּשִּׁכּוֹר וְכָל־חָכְמָתָם תִּתְבַּלָּע׃
englishText: They reeled to and fro, and staggered like a drunken man, And all their wisdom was swallowed up—
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּצְעֲקוּ אֶל־יְהוָה בַּצַּר לָהֶם וּמִמְּצוּקֹתֵיהֶם יוֹצִיאֵם׃
englishText: They cried unto the LORD in their trouble, And He brought them out of their distresses.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָקֵם סְעָרָה לִדְמָמָה וַיֶּחֱשׁוּ גַּלֵּיהֶם׃
englishText: He made the storm a calm, So that the waves thereof were still.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּשְׂמְחוּ כִי־יִשְׁתֹּקוּ וַיַּנְחֵם אֶל־מְחוֹז חֶפְצָם׃
englishText: Then were they glad because they were quiet, And He led them unto their desired haven.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יוֹדוּ לַיהוָה חַסְדּוֹ וְנִפְלְאוֹתָיו לִבְנֵי אָדָם׃
englishText: Let them give thanks unto the LORD for His mercy, And for His wonderful works to the children of men!
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וִירֹמְמוּהוּ בִּקְהַל־עָם וּבְמוֹשַׁב זְקֵנִים יְהַלְלוּהוּ׃
englishText: Let them exalt Him also in the assembly of the people, And praise Him in the seat of the elders.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָשֵׂם נְהָרוֹת לְמִדְבָּר וּמֹצָאֵי מַיִם לְצִמָּאוֹן׃
englishText: He turneth rivers into a wilderness, And watersprings into a thirsty ground;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֶרֶץ פְּרִי לִמְלֵחָה מֵרָעַת יֹשְׁבֵי בָהּ׃
englishText: A fruitful land into a salt waste, For the wickedness of them that dwell therein.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָשֵׂם מִדְבָּר לַאֲגַם־מַיִם וְאֶרֶץ צִיָּה לְמֹצָאֵי מָיִם׃
englishText: He turneth a wilderness into a pool of water, And a dry land into watersprings.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיּוֹשֶׁב שָׁם רְעֵבִים וַיְכוֹנְנוּ עִיר מוֹשָׁב׃
englishText: And there He maketh the hungry to dwell, And they establish a city of habitation;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּזְרְעוּ שָׂדוֹת וַיִּטְּעוּ כְרָמִים וַיַּעֲשׂוּ פְּרִי תְבוּאָה׃
englishText: And sow fields, and plant vineyards, Which yield fruits of increase.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיְבָרֲכֵם וַיִּרְבּוּ מְאֹד וּבְהֶמְתָּם לֹא יַמְעִיט׃
englishText: He blesseth them also, so that they are multiplied greatly, And suffereth not their cattle to decrease.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּמְעֲטוּ וַיָּשֹׁחוּ מֵעֹצֶר רָעָה וְיָגוֹן׃
englishText: Again, they are minished and dwindle away Through oppression of evil and sorrow.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שֹׁפֵךְ בּוּז עַל־נְדִיבִים וַיַּתְעֵם בְּתֹהוּ לֹא־דָרֶךְ׃
englishText: He poureth contempt upon princes, And causeth them to wander in the waste, where there is no way.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיְשַׂגֵּב אֶבְיוֹן מֵעוֹנִי וַיָּשֶׂם כַּצֹּאן מִשְׁפָּחוֹת׃
englishText: Yet setteth He the needy on high from affliction, And maketh his families like a flock.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִרְאוּ יְשָׁרִים וְיִשְׂמָחוּ וְכָל־עַוְלָה קָפְצָה פִּיהָ׃
englishText: The upright see it, and are glad; And all iniquity stoppeth her mouth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִי־חָכָם וְיִשְׁמָר־אֵלֶּה וְיִתְבּוֹנְנוּ חַסְדֵי יְהוָה׃
englishText: Whoso is wise, let him observe these things, And let them consider the mercies of the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׁיר מִזְמוֹר לְדָוִד׃
englishText: A Song, a Psalm of David.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נָכוֹן לִבִּי אֱלֹהִים אָשִׁירָה וַאֲזַמְּרָה אַף־כְּבוֹדִי׃
englishText: My heart is steadfast, O God; I will sing, yea, I will sing praises, even with my glory.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עוּרָה הַנֵּבֶל וְכִנּוֹר אָעִירָה שָּׁחַר׃
englishText: Awake, psaltery and harp; I will awake the dawn.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אוֹדְךָ בָעַמִּים יְהוָה וַאֲזַמֶּרְךָ בַּל־אֻמִּים׃
englishText: I will give thanks unto Thee, O LORD, among the peoples; And I will sing praises unto Thee among the nations.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־גָדוֹל מֵעַל־שָׁמַיִם חַסְדֶּךָ וְעַד־שְׁחָקִים אֲמִתֶּךָ׃
englishText: For Thy mercy is great above the heavens, And Thy truth reacheth unto the skies.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רוּמָה עַל־שָׁמַיִם אֱלֹהִים וְעַל כָּל־הָאָרֶץ כְּבוֹדֶךָ׃
englishText: Be Thou exalted, O God, above the heavens; And Thy glory be above all the earth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְמַעַן יֵחָלְצוּן יְדִידֶיךָ הוֹשִׁיעָה יְמִינְךָ וַעֲנֵנִי׃
englishText: That Thy beloved may be delivered, Save with Thy right hand, and answer me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱלֹהִים דִּבֶּר בְּקָדְשׁוֹ אֶעְלֹזָה אֲחַלְּקָה שְׁכֶם וְעֵמֶק סֻכּוֹת אֲמַדֵּד׃
englishText: God spoke in His holiness, that I would exult; That I would divide Shechem, and mete out the valley of Succoth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לִי גִלְעָד לִי מְנַשֶּׁה וְאֶפְרַיִם מָעוֹז רֹאשִׁי יְהוּדָה מְחֹקְקִי׃
englishText: Gilead is mine, Manasseh is mine; Ephraim also is the defence of my head; Judah is my sceptre.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מוֹאָב סִיר רַחְצִי עַל־אֱדוֹם אַשְׁלִיךְ נַעֲלִי עֲלֵי־פְלֶשֶׁת אֶתְרוֹעָע׃
englishText: Moab is my washpot; Upon Edom do I cast my shoe; Over Philistia do I cry aloud.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִי יֹבִלֵנִי עִיר מִבְצָר מִי נָחַנִי עַד־אֱדוֹם׃
englishText: Who will bring me into the fortified city? Who will lead me unto Edom?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲלֹא־אֱלֹהִים זְנַחְתָּנוּ וְלֹא־תֵצֵא אֱלֹהִים בְּצִבְאֹתֵינוּ׃
englishText: Hast not Thou cast us off, O God? And Thou goest not forth, O God, with our hosts?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הָבָה־לָּנוּ עֶזְרָת מִצָּר וְשָׁוְא תְּשׁוּעַת אָדָם׃
englishText: Give us help against the adversary; For vain is the help of man.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בֵּאלֹהִים נַעֲשֶׂה־חָיִל וְהוּא יָבוּס צָרֵינוּ׃
englishText: Through God we shall do valiantly; For He it is that will tread down our adversaries.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ לְדָוִד מִזְמוֹר אֱלֹהֵי תְהִלָּתִי אַל־תֶּחֱרַשׁ׃
englishText: For the Leader. A Psalm of David. O God of my praise, keep not silence;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי פִי רָשָׁע וּפִי־מִרְמָה עָלַי פָּתָחוּ דִּבְּרוּ אִתִּי לְשׁוֹן שָׁקֶר׃
englishText: For the mouth of the wicked and the mouth of deceit have they opened against me; They have spoken unto me with a lying tongue.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְדִבְרֵי שִׂנְאָה סְבָבוּנִי וַיִּלָּחֲמוּנִי חִנָּם׃
englishText: They compassed me about also with words of hatred, And fought against me without a cause.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תַּחַת־אַהֲבָתִי יִשְׂטְנוּנִי וַאֲנִי תְפִלָּה׃
englishText: In return for my love they are my adversaries; But I am all prayer.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיָּשִׂימוּ עָלַי רָעָה תַּחַת טוֹבָה וְשִׂנְאָה תַּחַת אַהֲבָתִי׃
englishText: And they have laid upon me evil for good, And hatred for my love:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַפְקֵד עָלָיו רָשָׁע וְשָׂטָן יַעֲמֹד עַל־יְמִינוֹ׃
englishText: ’Set Thou a wicked man over him; And let an adversary stand at his right hand.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּהִשָּׁפְטוֹ יֵצֵא רָשָׁע וּתְפִלָּתוֹ תִּהְיֶה לַחֲטָאָה׃
englishText: When he is judged, let him go forth condemned; And let his prayer be turned into sin.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִהְיוּ־יָמָיו מְעַטִּים פְּקֻדָּתוֹ יִקַּח אַחֵר׃
englishText: Let his days be few; Let another take his charge.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִהְיוּ־בָנָיו יְתוֹמִים וְאִשְׁתּוֹ אַלְמָנָה׃
englishText: Let his children be fatherless, And his wife a widow.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְנוֹעַ יָנוּעוּ בָנָיו וְשִׁאֵלוּ וְדָרְשׁוּ מֵחָרְבוֹתֵיהֶם׃
englishText: Let his children be vagabonds, and beg; And let them seek their bread out of their desolate places.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְנַקֵּשׁ נוֹשֶׁה לְכָל־אֲשֶׁר־לוֹ וְיָבֹזּוּ זָרִים יְגִיעוֹ׃
englishText: Let the creditor distrain all that he hath; And let strangers make spoil of his labour.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־יְהִי־לוֹ מֹשֵׁךְ חָסֶד וְאַל־יְהִי חוֹנֵן לִיתוֹמָיו׃
englishText: Let there be none to extend kindness unto him; Neither let there be any to be gracious unto his fatherless children.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהִי־אַחֲרִיתוֹ לְהַכְרִית בְּדוֹר אַחֵר יִמַּח שְׁמָם׃
englishText: Let his posterity be cut off; In the generation following let their name be blotted out.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִזָּכֵר עֲוֺן אֲבֹתָיו אֶל־יְהוָה וְחַטַּאת אִמּוֹ אַל־תִּמָּח׃
englishText: Let the iniquity of his fathers be brought to remembrance unto the LORD; And let not the sin of his mother be blotted out.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִהְיוּ נֶגֶד־יְהוָה תָּמִיד וְיַכְרֵת מֵאֶרֶץ זִכְרָם׃
englishText: Let them be before the LORD continually, That He may cut off the memory of them from the earth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יַעַן אֲשֶׁר לֹא זָכַר עֲשׂוֹת חָסֶד וַיִּרְדֹּף אִישׁ־עָנִי וְאֶבְיוֹן וְנִכְאֵה לֵבָב לְמוֹתֵת׃
englishText: Because that he remembered not to do kindness, But persecuted the poor and needy man, And the broken in heart he was ready to slay.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיֶּאֱהַב קְלָלָה וַתְּבוֹאֵהוּ וְלֹא־חָפֵץ בִּבְרָכָה וַתִּרְחַק מִמֶּנּוּ׃
englishText: Yea, he loved cursing, and it came unto him; And he delighted not in blessing, and it is far from him.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּלְבַּשׁ קְלָלָה כְּמַדּוֹ וַתָּבֹא כַמַּיִם בְּקִרְבּוֹ וְכַשֶּׁמֶן בְּעַצְמוֹתָיו׃
englishText: He clothed himself also with cursing as with his raiment, And it is come into his inward parts like water, And like oil into his bones.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תְּהִי־לוֹ כְּבֶגֶד יַעְטֶה וּלְמֵזַח תָּמִיד יַחְגְּרֶהָ׃
englishText: Let it be unto him as the garment which he putteth on, And for the girdle wherewith he is girded continually.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זֹאת פְּעֻלַּת שֹׂטְנַי מֵאֵת יְהוָה וְהַדֹּבְרִים רָע עַל־נַפְשִׁי׃
englishText: This would mine adversaries effect from the LORD, And they that speak evil against my soul.
