versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאַתָּה יְהוִה אֲדֹנָי עֲ‍שֵׂה־אִתִּי לְמַעַן שְׁמֶךָ כִּי־טוֹב חַסְדְּךָ הַצִּילֵנִי׃
englishText: But Thou, O GOD the Lord, deal with me for Thy name's sake; Because Thy mercy is good, deliver Thou me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־עָנִי וְאֶבְיוֹן אָנֹכִי וְלִבִּי חָלַל בְּקִרְבִּי׃
englishText: For I am poor and needy, And my heart is wounded within me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כְּצֵל־כִּנְטוֹתוֹ נֶהֱלָכְתִּי נִנְעַרְתִּי כָּאַרְבֶּה׃
englishText: I am gone like the shadow when it lengtheneth; I am shaken off as the locust.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בִּרְכַּי כָּשְׁלוּ מִצּוֹם וּבְשָׂרִי כָּחַשׁ מִשָּׁמֶן׃
englishText: My knees totter through fasting; And my flesh is lean, and hath no fatness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַאֲנִי הָיִיתִי חֶרְפָּה לָהֶם יִרְאוּנִי יְנִיעוּן רֹאשָׁם׃
englishText: I am become also a taunt unto them; When they see me, they shake their head.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עָזְרֵנִי יְהוָה אֱלֹהָי הוֹשִׁיעֵנִי כְחַסְדֶּךָ׃
englishText: Help me, O LORD my God; O save me according to Thy mercy;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְיֵדְעוּ כִּי־יָדְךָ זֹּאת אַתָּה יְהוָה עֲשִׂיתָהּ׃
englishText: That they may know that this is Thy hand; That Thou, LORD, hast done it.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְקַלְלוּ־הֵמָּה וְאַתָּה תְבָרֵךְ קָמוּ וַיֵּבֹשׁוּ וְעַבְדְּךָ יִשְׂמָח׃
englishText: Let them curse, but bless Thou; When they arise, they shall be put to shame, but Thy servant shall rejoice.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִלְבְּשׁוּ שׂוֹטְנַי כְּלִמָּה וְיַעֲטוּ כַמְעִיל בָּשְׁתָּם׃
englishText: Mine adversaries shall be clothed with confusion, And shall put on their own shame as a robe.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אוֹדֶה יְהוָה מְאֹד בְּפִי וּבְתוֹךְ רַבִּים אֲהַלְלֶנּוּ׃
englishText: I will give great thanks unto the LORD with my mouth; Yea, I will praise Him among the multitude;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־יַעֲמֹד לִימִין אֶבְיוֹן לְהוֹשִׁיעַ מִשֹּׁפְטֵי נַפְשׁוֹ׃
englishText: Because He standeth at the right hand of the needy, To save him from them that judge his soul.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְדָוִד מִזְמוֹר נְאֻם יְהוָה לַאדֹנִי שֵׁב לִימִינִי עַד־אָשִׁית אֹיְבֶיךָ הֲדֹם לְרַגְלֶיךָ׃
englishText: A Psalm of David. The LORD saith unto my lord: ‘Sit thou at My right hand, until I make thine enemies thy footstool.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַטֵּה־עֻזְּךָ יִשְׁלַח יְהוָה מִצִּיּוֹן רְדֵה בְּקֶרֶב אֹיְבֶיךָ׃
englishText: The rod of Thy strength the LORD will send out of Zion: 'Rule thou in the midst of thine enemies.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַמְּךָ נְדָבֹת בְּיוֹם חֵילֶךָ בְּהַדְרֵי־קֹדֶשׁ מֵרֶחֶם מִשְׁחָר לְךָ טַל יַלְדֻתֶיךָ׃
englishText: Thy people offer themselves willingly in the day of thy warfare; in adornments of holiness, from the womb of the dawn, Thine is the dew of thy youth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נִשְׁבַּע יְהוָה וְלֹא יִנָּחֵם אַתָּה־כֹהֵן לְעוֹלָם עַל־דִּבְרָתִי מַלְכִּי־צֶדֶק׃
englishText: The LORD hath sworn, and will not repent: 'Thou art a priest for ever After the manner of Melchizedek.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲדֹנָי עַל־יְמִינְךָ מָחַץ בְּיוֹם־אַפּוֹ מְלָכִים׃
englishText: The Lord at thy right hand Doth crush kings in the day of His wrath.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָדִין בַּגּוֹיִם מָלֵא גְוִיּוֹת מָחַץ רֹאשׁ עַל־אֶרֶץ רַבָּה׃
englishText: He will judge among the nations; He filleth it with the dead bodies, He crusheth the head over a wide land.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִנַּחַל בַּדֶּרֶךְ יִשְׁתֶּה עַל־כֵּן יָרִים רֹאשׁ׃
englishText: He will drink of the brook in the way; Therefore will he lift up the head.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַלְלוּ יָהּ אוֹדֶה יְהוָה בְּכָל־לֵבָב בְּסוֹד יְשָׁרִים וְעֵדָה׃
englishText: Hallelujah. I will give thanks unto the LORD with my whole heart, . In the council of the upright, and in the congregation.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גְּדֹלִים מַעֲשֵׂי יְהוָה דְּרוּשִׁים לְכָל־חֶפְצֵיהֶם׃
englishText: The works of the LORD are great, Sought out of all them that have delight therein.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הוֹד־וְהָדָר פָּעֳלוֹ וְצִדְקָתוֹ עֹמֶדֶת לָעַד׃
englishText: His work is glory and majesty; And His righteousness endureth for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זֵכֶר עָשָׂה לְנִפְלְאֹתָיו חַנּוּן וְרַחוּם יְהוָה׃
englishText: He hath made a memorial for His wonderful works; The LORD is gracious and full of compassion.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: טֶרֶף נָתַן לִירֵאָיו יִזְכֹּר לְעוֹלָם בְּרִיתוֹ׃
englishText: He hath given food unto them that fear Him; He will ever be mindful of His covenant.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כֹּחַ מַעֲשָׂיו הִגִּיד לְעַמּוֹ לָתֵת לָהֶם נַחֲלַת גּוֹיִם׃
englishText: He hath declared to His people the power of His works, In giving them the heritage of the nations.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַעֲשֵׂי יָדָיו אֱמֶת וּמִשְׁפָּט נֶאֱמָנִים כָּל־פִּקּוּדָיו׃
englishText: The works of His hands are truth and justice; All His precepts are sure.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: סְמוּכִים לָעַד לְעוֹלָם עֲשׂוּיִם בֶּאֱמֶת וְיָשָׁר׃
englishText: They are established for ever and ever, They are done in truth and uprightness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פְּדוּת שָׁלַח לְעַמּוֹ צִוָּה־לְעוֹלָם בְּרִיתוֹ קָדוֹשׁ וְנוֹרָא שְׁמוֹ׃
englishText: He hath sent redemption unto His people; He hath commanded His covenant for ever; Holy and awful is His name.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רֵאשִׁית חָכְמָה יִרְאַת יְהוָה שֵׂכֶל טוֹב לְכָל־עֹשֵׂיהֶם תְּהִלָּתוֹ עֹמֶדֶת לָעַד׃
englishText: The fear of the LORD is the beginning of wisdom; A good understanding have all they that do thereafter; His praise endureth for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַלְלוּ יָהּ אַשְׁרֵי־אִישׁ יָרֵא אֶת־יְהוָה בְּמִצְוֺתָיו חָפֵץ מְאֹד׃
englishText: Hallelujah. Happy is the man that feareth the LORD, That delighteth greatly in His commandments.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גִּבּוֹר בָּאָרֶץ יִהְיֶה זַרְעוֹ דּוֹר יְשָׁרִים יְבֹרָךְ׃
englishText: His seed shall be mighty upon earth; The generation of the upright shall be blessed.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הוֹן־וָעֹשֶׁר בְּבֵיתוֹ וְצִדְקָתוֹ עֹמֶדֶת לָעַד׃
englishText: Wealth and riches are in his house; And his merit endureth for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זָרַח בַּחֹשֶׁךְ אוֹר לַיְשָׁרִים חַנּוּן וְרַחוּם וְצַדִּיק׃
englishText: Unto the upright He shineth as a light in the darkness, Gracious, and full of compassion, and righteous.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: טוֹב־אִישׁ חוֹנֵן וּמַלְוֶה יְכַלְכֵּל דְּבָרָיו בְּמִשְׁפָּט׃
englishText: Well is it with the man that dealeth graciously and lendeth, That ordereth his affairs rightfully.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־לְעוֹלָם לֹא־יִמּוֹט לְזֵכֶר עוֹלָם יִהְיֶה צַדִּיק׃
englishText: For he shall never be moved; The righteous shall be had in everlasting remembrance.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִשְּׁמוּעָה רָעָה לֹא יִירָא נָכוֹן לִבּוֹ בָּטֻחַ בַּיהוָה׃
englishText: He shall not be afraid of evil tidings; His heart is stedfast, trusting in the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: סָמוּךְ לִבּוֹ לֹא יִירָא עַד אֲשֶׁר־יִרְאֶה בְצָרָיו׃
englishText: His heart is established, he shall not be afraid, Until he gaze upon his adversaries.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פִּזַּר נָתַן לָאֶבְיוֹנִים צִדְקָתוֹ עֹמֶדֶת לָעַד קַרְנוֹ תָּרוּם בְּכָבוֹד׃
englishText: He hath scattered abroad, he hath given to the needy; His righteousness endureth for ever; His horn shall be exalted in honour.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רָשָׁע יִרְאֶה וְכָעָס שִׁנָּיו יַחֲרֹק וְנָמָס תַּאֲוַת רְשָׁעִים תֹּאבֵד׃
englishText: The wicked shall see it, and be vexed; he shall gnash with his teeth, and melt away; the desire of the wicked shall perish.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַלְלוּ יָהּ הַלְלוּ עַבְדֵי יְהוָה הַלְלוּ אֶת־שֵׁם יְהוָה׃
englishText: Hallelujah. Praise, O ye servants of the LORD, Praise the name of the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהִי שֵׁם יְהוָה מְבֹרָךְ מֵעַתָּה וְעַד־עוֹלָם׃
englishText: Blessed be the name of the LORD From this time forth and for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִמִּזְרַח־שֶׁמֶשׁ עַד־מְבוֹאוֹ מְהֻלָּל שֵׁם יְהוָה׃
englishText: From the rising of the sun unto the going down thereof The LORD'S name is to be praised.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רָם עַל־כָּל־גּוֹיִם יְהוָה עַל הַשָּׁמַיִם כְּבוֹדוֹ׃
englishText: The LORD is high above all nations, His glory is above the heavens.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִי כַּיהוָה אֱלֹהֵינוּ הַמַּגְבִּיהִי לָשָׁבֶת׃
englishText: Who is like unto the LORD our God, That is enthroned on high,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַמַּשְׁפִּילִי לִרְאוֹת בַּשָּׁמַיִם וּבָאָרֶץ׃
englishText: That looketh down low Upon heaven and upon the earth?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מְקִימִי מֵעָפָר דָּל מֵאַשְׁפֹּת יָרִים אֶבְיוֹן׃
englishText: Who raiseth up the poor out of the dust, And lifteth up the needy out of the dunghill;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְהוֹשִׁיבִי עִם־נְדִיבִים עִם נְדִיבֵי עַמּוֹ׃
englishText: That He may set him with princes, Even with the princes of His people.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מוֹשִׁיבִי עֲקֶרֶת הַבַּיִת אֵם־הַבָּנִים שְׂמֵחָה הַלְלוּ־יָהּ׃
englishText: Who maketh the barren woman to dwell in her house As a joyful mother of children. Hallelujah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּצֵאת יִשְׂרָאֵל מִמִּצְרָיִם בֵּית יַעֲקֹב מֵעַם לֹעֵז׃
englishText: When Israel came forth out of Egypt, The house of Jacob from a people of strange language;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הָיְתָה יְהוּדָה לְקָדְשׁוֹ יִשְׂרָאֵל מַמְשְׁלוֹתָיו׃
englishText: Judah became His sanctuary, Israel His dominion.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַיָּם רָאָה וַיָּנֹס הַיַּרְדֵּן יִסֹּב לְאָחוֹר׃
englishText: The sea saw it, and fled; The Jordan turned backward.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֶהָרִים רָקְדוּ כְאֵילִים גְּבָעוֹת כִּבְנֵי־צֹאן׃
englishText: The mountains skipped like rams, The hills like young sheep.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַה־לְּךָ הַיָּם כִּי תָנוּס הַיַּרְדֵּן תִּסֹּב לְאָחוֹר׃
englishText: What aileth thee, O thou sea, that thou fleest? Thou Jordan, that thou turnest backward?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֶהָרִים תִּרְקְדוּ כְאֵילִים גְּבָעוֹת כִּבְנֵי־צֹאן׃
englishText: Ye mountains, that ye skip like rams; Ye hills, like young sheep?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִלִּפְנֵי אָדוֹן חוּלִי אָרֶץ מִלִּפְנֵי אֱלוֹהַּ יַעֲקֹב׃
englishText: Tremble, thou earth, at the presence of the Lord, At the presence of the God of Jacob;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַהֹפְכִי הַצּוּר אֲגַם־מָיִם חַלָּמִישׁ לְמַעְיְנוֹ־מָיִם׃
englishText: Who turned the rock into a pool of water, The flint into a fountain of waters.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא לָנוּ יְהוָה לֹא לָנוּ כִּי־לְשִׁמְךָ תֵּן כָּבוֹד עַל־חַסְדְּךָ עַל־אֲמִתֶּךָ׃
englishText: Not unto us, O LORD, not unto us, But unto Thy name give glory, For Thy mercy, and for Thy truth's sake.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לָמָּה יֹאמְרוּ הַגּוֹיִם אַיֵּה־נָא אֱלֹהֵיהֶם׃
englishText: Wherefore should the nations say: 'Where is now their God?'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וֵאלֹהֵינוּ בַשָּׁמָיִם כֹּל אֲשֶׁר־חָפֵץ עָשָׂה׃
englishText: But our God is in the heavens; Whatsoever pleased Him He hath done.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֲ‍צַבֵּיהֶם כֶּסֶף וְזָהָב מַעֲשֵׂה יְדֵי אָדָם׃
englishText: Their idols are silver and gold, The work of men's hands.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פֶּה־לָהֶם וְלֹא יְדַבֵּרוּ עֵינַיִם לָהֶם וְלֹא יִרְאוּ׃
englishText: They have mouths, but they speak not; Eyes have they, but they see not;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָזְנַיִם לָהֶם וְלֹא יִשְׁמָעוּ אַף לָהֶם וְלֹא יְרִיחוּן׃
englishText: They have ears, but they hear not; Noses have they, but they smell not;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְדֵיהֶם וְלֹא יְמִישׁוּן רַגְלֵיהֶם וְלֹא יְהַלֵּכוּ לֹא־יֶהְגּוּ בִּגְרוֹנָם׃
englishText: They have hands, but they handle not; Feet have they, but they walk not; Neither speak they with their throat. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כְּמוֹהֶם יִהְיוּ עֹשֵׂיהֶם כֹּל אֲשֶׁר־בֹּטֵחַ בָּהֶם׃
englishText: They that make them shall be like unto them; Yea, every one that trusteth in them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִשְׂרָאֵל בְּטַח בַּיהוָה עֶזְרָם וּמָגִנָּם הוּא׃
englishText: O Israel, trust thou in the LORD! He is their help and their shield!
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בֵּית אַהֲרֹן בִּטְחוּ בַיהוָה עֶזְרָם וּמָגִנָּם הוּא׃
englishText: O house of Aaron, trust ye in the LORD! He is their help and their shield!
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִרְאֵי יְהוָה בִּטְחוּ בַיהוָה עֶזְרָם וּמָגִנָּם הוּא׃
englishText: Ye that fear the LORD, trust in the LORD! He is their help and their shield.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה זְכָרָנוּ יְבָרֵךְ יְבָרֵךְ אֶת־בֵּית יִשְׂרָאֵל יְבָרֵךְ אֶת־בֵּית אַהֲרֹן׃
englishText: The LORD hath been mindful of us, He will bless— He will bless the house of Israel; He will bless the house of Aaron.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְבָרֵךְ יִרְאֵי יְהוָה הַקְּטַנִּים עִם־הַגְּדֹלִים׃
englishText: He will bless them that fear the LORD, Both small and great.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יֹסֵף יְהוָה עֲלֵיכֶם עֲלֵיכֶם וְעַל־בְּנֵיכֶם׃
englishText: The LORD increase you more and more, You and your children.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּרוּכִים אַתֶּם לַיהוָה עֹשֵׂה שָׁמַיִם וָאָרֶץ׃
englishText: Blessed be ye of the LORD Who made heaven and earth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַשָּׁמַיִם שָׁמַיִם לַיהוָה וְהָאָרֶץ נָתַן לִבְנֵי־אָדָם׃
englishText: The heavens are the heavens of the LORD; But the earth hath He given to the children of men.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא הַמֵּתִים יְהַלְלוּ־יָהּ וְלֹא כָּל־יֹרְדֵי דוּמָה׃
englishText: The dead praise not the LORD, Neither any that go down into silence;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַאֲנַחְנוּ נְבָרֵךְ יָהּ מֵעַתָּה וְעַד־עוֹלָם הַלְלוּ־יָהּ׃
englishText: But we will bless the LORD From this time forth and for ever. Hallelujah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָהַבְתִּי כִּי־יִשְׁמַע יְהוָה אֶת־קוֹלִי תַּחֲנוּנָי׃
englishText: I love that the LORD should hear my voice and my supplications.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־הִטָּה אָזְנוֹ לִי וּבְיָמַי אֶקְרָא׃
englishText: Because He hath inclined His ear unto me, Therefore will I call upon Him all my days.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲפָפוּנִי חֶבְלֵי־מָוֶת וּמְצָרֵי שְׁאוֹל מְצָאוּנִי צָרָה וְיָגוֹן אֶמְצָא׃
englishText: The cords of death compassed me, And the straits of the nether-world got hold upon me; I found trouble and sorrow.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְשֵׁם־יְהוָה אֶקְרָא אָנָּה יְהוָה מַלְּטָה נַפְשִׁי׃
englishText: But I called upon the name of the LORD: 'I beseech thee, O LORD, deliver my soul.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חַנּוּן יְהֹוָה וְצַדִּיק וֵאלֹהֵינוּ מְרַחֵם׃
englishText: Gracious is the LORD, and righteous; Yea, our God is compassionate.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שֹׁמֵר פְּתָאיִם יְהֹוָה דַּלּוֹתִי וְלִי יְהוֹשִׁיעַ׃
englishText: The LORD preserveth the simple; I was brought low, and He saved me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שׁוּבִי נַפְשִׁי לִמְנוּחָיְכִי כִּי־יְהוָה גָּמַל עָלָיְכִי׃
englishText: Return, O my soul, unto Thy rest; For the LORD hath dealt bountifully with thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי חִלַּצְתָּ נַפְשִׁי מִמָּוֶת אֶת־עֵינִי מִן־דִּמְעָה אֶת־רַגְלִי מִדֶּחִי׃
englishText: For thou hast delivered my soul from death, Mine eyes from tears, And my feet from stumbling.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֶתְהַלֵּךְ לִפְנֵי יְהוָה בְּאַרְצוֹת הַחַיִּים׃
englishText: I shall walk before the LORD In the lands of the living.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֶאֱמַנְתִּי כִּי אֲדַבֵּר אֲנִי עָנִיתִי מְאֹד׃
englishText: I trusted even when I spoke: 'I am greatly afflicted.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲנִי אָמַרְתִּי בְחָפְזִי כָּל־הָאָדָם כֹּזֵב׃
englishText: I said in my haste: 'All men are liars.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מָה־אָשִׁיב לַיהוָה כָּל־תַּגְמוּלוֹהִי עָלָי׃
englishText: How can I repay unto the LORD All His bountiful dealings toward me?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כּוֹס־יְשׁוּעוֹת אֶשָּׂא וּבְשֵׁם יְהוָה אֶקְרָא׃
englishText: I will lift up the cup of salvation, And call upon the name of the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נְדָרַי לַיהוָה אֲשַׁלֵּם נֶגְדָה־נָּא לְכָל־עַמּוֹ׃
englishText: My vows will I pay unto the LORD, Yea, in the presence of all His people.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָקָר בְּעֵינֵי יְהוָה הַמָּוְתָה לַחֲסִידָיו׃
englishText: Precious in the sight of the LORD Is the death of His saints.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָנָּה יְהוָה כִּי־אֲנִי עַבְדֶּךָ אֲ‍נִי־עַבְדְּךָ בֶּן־אֲמָתֶךָ פִּתַּחְתָּ לְמוֹסֵרָי׃
englishText: I beseech Thee, O LORD, for I am Thy servant; I am Thy servant, the son of Thy handmaid; Thou hast loosed my bands.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְךָ־אֶזְבַּח זֶבַח תּוֹדָה וּבְשֵׁם יְהוָה אֶקְרָא׃
englishText: I will offer to thee the sacrifice of thanksgiving, And will call upon the name of the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נְדָרַי לַיהוָה אֲשַׁלֵּם נֶגְדָה־נָּא לְכָל־עַמּוֹ׃
englishText: I will pay my vows unto the LORD, Yea, in the presence of all His people;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּחַצְרוֹת בֵּית יְהוָה בְּתוֹכֵכִי יְרוּשָׁלִָם הַלְלוּ־יָהּ׃
englishText: In the courts of the LORD’S house, In the midst of thee, O Jerusalem. Hallelujah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַלְלוּ אֶת־יְהוָה כָּל־גּוֹיִם שַׁבְּחוּהוּ כָּל־הָאֻמִּים׃
englishText: O praise the LORD, all ye nations; Laud Him, all ye peoples.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי גָבַר עָלֵינוּ חַסְדּוֹ וֶאֱמֶת־יְהוָה לְעוֹלָם הַלְלוּ־יָהּ׃
englishText: For His mercy is great toward us; And the truth of the LORD endureth for ever. Hallelujah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הוֹדוּ לַיהוָה כִּי־טוֹב כִּי לְעוֹלָם חַסְדּוֹ׃
englishText: 'O give thanks unto the LORD, for He is good, For His mercy endureth for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יֹאמַר־נָא יִשְׂרָאֵל כִּי לְעוֹלָם חַסְדּוֹ׃
englishText: So let Israel now say, For His mercy endureth for ever,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יֹאמְרוּ־נָא בֵית־אַהֲרֹן כִּי לְעוֹלָם חַסְדּוֹ׃
englishText: So let the house of Aaron now say, For His mercy endureth for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יֹאמְרוּ־נָא יִרְאֵי יְהוָה כִּי לְעוֹלָם חַסְדּוֹ׃
englishText: So let them now that fear the LORD say, For His mercy endureth for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִן־הַמֵּצַר קָרָאתִי יָּהּ עָנָנִי בַמֶּרְחָב יָהּ׃
englishText: Out of my straits I called upon the LORD; He answered me with great enlargement.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה לִי לֹא אִירָא מַה־יַּעֲשֶׂה לִי אָדָם׃
englishText: The LORD is for me; I will not fear; What can man do unto me?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה לִי בְּעֹזְרָי וַאֲנִי אֶרְאֶה בְשֹׂנְאָי׃
englishText: The LORD is for me as my helper; And I shall gaze upon them that hate me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: טוֹב לַחֲסוֹת בַּיהוָה מִבְּטֹחַ בָּאָדָם׃
englishText: It is better to take refuge in the LORD Than to trust in man.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: טוֹב לַחֲסוֹת בַּיהוָה מִבְּטֹחַ בִּנְדִיבִים׃
englishText: It is better to take refuge in the LORD Than to trust in princes.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כָּל־גּוֹיִם סְבָבוּנִי בְּשֵׁם יְהוָה כִּי אֲמִילַם׃
englishText: All nations compass me about; Verily, in the name of the LORD I will cut them off.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: סַבּוּנִי גַם־סְבָבוּנִי בְּשֵׁם יְהוָה כִּי אֲמִילַם׃
englishText: They compass me about, yea, they compass me about; Verily, in the name of the LORD I will cut them off.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: סַבּוּנִי כִדְבוֹרִים דֹּעֲכוּ כְּאֵשׁ קוֹצִים בְּשֵׁם יְהוָה כִּי אֲמִילַם׃
englishText: They compass me about like bees; They are quenched as the fire of thorns; Verily, in the name of the LORD I will cut them off.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: דַּחֹה דְחִיתַנִי לִנְפֹּל וַיהוָה עֲזָרָנִי׃
englishText: Thou didst thrust sore at me that I might fall; But the LORD helped me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עָזִּי וְזִמְרָת יָהּ וַיְהִי־לִי לִישׁוּעָה׃
englishText: The LORD is my strength and song; And He is become my salvation.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קוֹל רִנָּה וִישׁוּעָה בְּאָהֳלֵי צַדִּיקִים יְמִין יְהוָה עֹשָׂה חָיִל׃
englishText: The voice of rejoicing and salvation is in the tents of the righteous; The right hand of the LORD doeth valiantly.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְמִין יְהוָה רוֹמֵמָה יְמִין יְהוָה עֹשָׂה חָיִל׃
englishText: The right hand of the LORD is exalted; The right hand of the LORD doeth valiantly.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא אָמוּת כִּי־אֶחְיֶה וַאֲסַפֵּר מַעֲשֵׂי יָהּ׃
englishText: I shall not die, but live, And declare the works of the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יַסֹּר יִסְּרַנִּי יָּהּ וְלַמָּוֶת לֹא נְתָנָנִי׃
englishText: The LORD hath chastened me sore; But He hath not given me over unto death.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פִּתְחוּ־לִי שַׁעֲרֵי־צֶדֶק אָבֹא־בָם אוֹדֶה יָהּ׃
englishText: Open to me the gates of righteousness; I will enter into them, I will give thanks unto the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זֶה־הַשַּׁעַר לַיהוָה צַדִּיקִים יָבֹאוּ בוֹ׃
englishText: This is the gate of the LORD; The righteous shall enter into it.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אוֹדְךָ כִּי עֲנִיתָנִי וַתְּהִי־לִי לִישׁוּעָה׃
englishText: I will give thanks unto Thee, for Thou hast answered me, And art become my salvation.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֶבֶן מָאֲסוּ הַבּוֹנִים הָיְתָה לְרֹאשׁ פִּנָּה׃
englishText: The stone which the builders rejected Is become the chief corner-stone.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מֵאֵת יְהוָה הָיְתָה זֹּאת הִיא נִפְלָאת בְּעֵינֵינוּ׃
englishText: This is the LORD’S doing; It is marvellous in our eyes.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זֶה־הַיּוֹם עָשָׂה יְהוָה נָגִילָה וְנִשְׂמְחָה בוֹ׃
englishText: This is the day which the LORD hath made; We will rejoice and be glad in it.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָנָּא יְהוָה הוֹשִׁיעָה נָּא אָנָּא יְהוָה הַצְלִיחָה נָּא׃
englishText: We beseech Thee, O LORD, save now! We beseech Thee, O LORD, make us now to prosper!
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בָּרוּךְ הַבָּא בְּשֵׁם יְהוָה בֵּרַכְנוּכֶם מִבֵּית יְהוָה׃
englishText: Blessed be he that cometh in the name of the LORD; We bless you out of the house of the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֵל יְהוָה וַיָּאֶר לָנוּ אִסְרוּ־חַג בַּעֲבֹתִים עַד־קַרְנוֹת הַמִּזְבֵּחַ׃
englishText: The LORD is God, and hath given us light; Order the festival procession with boughs, even unto the horns of the altar.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֵלִי אַתָּה וְאוֹדֶךָּ אֱלֹהַי אֲרוֹמְמֶךָּ׃
englishText: Thou art my God, and I will give thanks unto Thee; Thou art my God, I will exalt Thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הוֹדוּ לַיהוָה כִּי־טוֹב כִּי לְעוֹלָם חַסְדּוֹ׃
englishText: O give thanks unto the LORD, for He is good, For His mercy endureth for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַשְׁרֵי תְמִימֵי־דָרֶךְ הַהֹלְכִים בְּתוֹרַת יְהוָה׃
englishText: ALEPH. Happy are they that are upright in the way, who walk in the law of the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַשְׁרֵי נֹצְרֵי עֵדֹתָיו בְּכָל־לֵב יִדְרְשׁוּהוּ׃
englishText: Happy are they that keep His testimonies, that seek Him with the whole heart.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַף לֹא־פָעֲלוּ עַוְלָה בִּדְרָכָיו הָלָכוּ׃
englishText: Yea, they do no unrighteousness; they walk in His ways.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַתָּה צִוִּיתָה פִקֻּדֶיךָ לִשְׁמֹר מְאֹד׃
englishText: Thou hast ordained Thy precepts, that we should observe them diligently.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַחֲלַי יִכֹּנוּ דְרָכָי לִשְׁמֹר חֻקֶּיךָ׃
englishText: Oh that my ways were directed to observe Thy statutes!
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָז לֹא־אֵבוֹשׁ בְּהַבִּיטִי אֶל־כָּל־מִצְוֺתֶיךָ׃
englishText: Then should I not be ashamed, when I have regard unto all Thy commandments.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אוֹדְךָ בְּיֹשֶׁר לֵבָב בְּלָמְדִי מִשְׁפְּטֵי צִדְקֶךָ׃
englishText: I will give thanks unto Thee with uprightness of heart, when I learn Thy righteous ordinances. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֶת־חֻקֶּיךָ אֶשְׁמֹר אַל־תַּעַזְבֵנִי עַד־מְאֹד׃
englishText: I will observe Thy statutes; O forsake me not utterly.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בַּמֶּה יְזַכֶּה־נַּעַר אֶת־אָרְחוֹ לִשְׁמֹר כִּדְבָרֶךָ׃
englishText: BETH. Wherewithal shall a young man keep his way pure? By taking heed thereto according to Thy word.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּכָל־לִבִּי דְרַשְׁתִּיךָ אַל־תַּשְׁגֵּנִי מִמִּצְוֺתֶיךָ׃
englishText: With my whole heart have I sought Thee; O let me not err from Thy commandments.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּלִבִּי צָפַנְתִּי אִמְרָתֶךָ לְמַעַן לֹא אֶחֱטָא־לָךְ׃
englishText: Thy word have I laid up in my heart, that I might not sin against Thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בָּרוּךְ אַתָּה יְהוָה לַמְּדֵנִי חֻקֶּיךָ׃
englishText: Blessed art Thou, O LORD; Teach me Thy statutes.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בִּשְׂפָתַי סִפַּרְתִּי כֹּל מִשְׁפְּטֵי־פִיךָ׃
englishText: With my lips have I told All the ordinances of Thy mouth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּדֶרֶךְ עֵדְוֺתֶיךָ שַׂשְׂתִּי כְּעַל כָּל־הוֹן׃
englishText: I have rejoiced in the way of Thy testimonies, As much as in all riches.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּפִקֻּדֶיךָ אָשִׂיחָה וְאַבִּיטָה אֹרְחֹתֶיךָ׃
englishText: I will meditate in Thy precepts, And have respect unto Thy ways.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּחֻקֹּתֶיךָ אֶשְׁתַּעֲשָׁע לֹא אֶשְׁכַּח דְּבָרֶךָ׃
englishText: I will delight myself in Thy statutes; I will not forget Thy word.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גְּמֹל עַל־עַבְדְּךָ אֶחְיֶה וְאֶשְׁמְרָה דְבָרֶךָ׃
englishText: GIMEL. Deal bountifully with Thy servant that I may live, and I will observe Thy word.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גַּל־עֵינַי וְאַבִּיטָה נִפְלָאוֹת מִתּוֹרָתֶךָ׃
englishText: Open Thou mine eyes, that I may behold wondrous things out of Thy law.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גֵּר אָנֹכִי בָאָרֶץ אַל־תַּסְתֵּר מִמֶּנִּי מִצְוֺתֶיךָ׃
englishText: I am a sojourner in the earth; hide not Thy commandments from me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גָּרְסָה נַפְשִׁי לְתַאֲבָה אֶל־מִשְׁפָּטֶיךָ בְכָל־עֵת׃
englishText: My soul breaketh for the longing that it hath unto Thine ordinances at all times.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גָּעַרְתָּ זֵדִים אֲרוּרִים הַשֹּׁגִים מִמִּצְוֺתֶיךָ׃
englishText: Thou hast rebuked the proud that are cursed, that do err from Thy commandments.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גַּל מֵעָלַי חֶרְפָּה וָבוּז כִּי עֵדֹתֶיךָ נָצָרְתִּי׃
englishText: Take away from me reproach and contempt; for I have kept Thy testimonies.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גַּם יָשְׁבוּ שָׂרִים בִּי נִדְבָּרוּ עַבְדְּךָ יָשִׂיחַ בְּחֻקֶּיךָ׃
englishText: Even though princes sit and talk against me, Thy servant doth meditate in Thy statutes.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גַּם־עֵדֹתֶיךָ שַׁעֲשֻׁעָי אַנְשֵׁי עֲצָתִי׃
englishText: Yea, Thy testimonies are my delight, they are my counsellors. DALETH.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: דָּבְקָה לֶעָפָר נַפְשִׁי חַיֵּנִי כִּדְבָרֶךָ׃
englishText: My soul cleaveth unto the dust; quicken Thou me according to Thy word.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: דְּרָכַי סִפַּרְתִּי וַתַּעֲנֵנִי לַמְּדֵנִי חֻקֶּיךָ׃
englishText: I told of my ways, and Thou didst answer me; teach me Thy statutes.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: דֶּרֶךְ־פִּקּוּדֶיךָ הֲבִינֵנִי וְאָשִׂיחָה בְּנִפְלְאוֹתֶיךָ׃
englishText: Make me to understand the way of Thy precepts, that I may talk of Thy wondrous works.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: דָּלְפָה נַפְשִׁי מִתּוּגָה קַיְּמֵנִי כִּדְבָרֶךָ׃
englishText: My soul melteth away for heaviness; sustain me according unto Thy word.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: דֶּרֶךְ־שֶׁקֶר הָסֵר מִמֶּנִּי וְתוֹרָתְךָ חָנֵּנִי׃
englishText: Remove from me the way of falsehood; and grant me Thy law graciously.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: דֶּרֶךְ־אֱמוּנָה בָחָרְתִּי מִשְׁפָּטֶיךָ שִׁוִּיתִי׃
englishText: I have chosen the way of faithfulness; Thine ordinances have I set [before me].
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: דָּבַקְתִּי בְעֵדְוֺתֶיךָ יְהוָה אַל־תְּבִישֵׁנִי׃
englishText: I cleave unto Thy testimonies; O LORD, put me not to shame.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: דֶּרֶךְ־מִצְוֺתֶיךָ אָרוּץ כִּי תַרְחִיב לִבִּי׃
englishText: I will run the way of Thy commandments, For Thou dost enlarge my heart.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הוֹרֵנִי יְהוָה דֶּרֶךְ חֻקֶּיךָ וְאֶצְּרֶנָּה עֵקֶב׃
englishText: HE. Teach me, O LORD, the way of Thy statutes; And I will keep it at every step.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲבִינֵנִי וְאֶצְּרָה תוֹרָתֶךָ וְאֶשְׁמְרֶנָּה בְכָל־לֵב׃
englishText: Give me understanding, that I keep Thy law and observe it with my whole heart.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַדְרִיכֵנִי בִּנְתִיב מִצְוֺתֶיךָ כִּי־בוֹ חָפָצְתִּי׃
englishText: Make me to tread in the path of Thy commandments; for therein do I delight.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַט־לִבִּי אֶל־עֵדְוֺתֶיךָ וְאַל אֶל־בָּצַע׃
englishText: Incline my heart unto Thy testimonies, and not to covetousness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַעֲבֵר עֵינַי מֵרְאוֹת שָׁוְא בִּדְרָכֶךָ חַיֵּנִי׃
englishText: Turn away mine eyes from beholding vanity, and quicken me in Thy ways.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הָקֵם לְעַבְדְּךָ אִמְרָתֶךָ אֲשֶׁר לְיִרְאָתֶךָ׃
englishText: Confirm Thy word unto Thy servant, which pertaineth unto the fear of Thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַעֲבֵר חֶרְפָּתִי אֲשֶׁר יָגֹרְתִּי כִּי מִשְׁפָּטֶיךָ טוֹבִים׃
englishText: Turn away my reproach which I dread; for Thine ordinances are good.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הִנֵּה תָּאַבְתִּי לְפִקֻּדֶיךָ בְּצִדְקָתְךָ חַיֵּנִי׃
englishText: Behold, I have longed after Thy precepts; quicken me in Thy righteousness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וִיבֹאֻנִי חֲסָדֶךָ יְהוָה תְּשׁוּעָתְךָ כְּאִמְרָתֶךָ׃
englishText: VAV. Let Thy mercies also come unto me, O LORD, even Thy salvation, according to Thy word;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֶעֱנֶה חֹרְפִי דָבָר כִּי־בָטַחְתִּי בִּדְבָרֶךָ׃
englishText: That I may have an answer for him that taunteth me; for I trust in Thy word.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאַל־תַּצֵּל מִפִּי דְבַר־אֱמֶת עַד־מְאֹד כִּי לְמִשְׁפָּטֶךָ יִחָלְתִּי׃
englishText: And take not the word of truth utterly out of my mouth; for I hope in Thine ordinances;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֶשְׁמְרָה תוֹרָתְךָ תָמִיד לְעוֹלָם וָעֶד׃
englishText: So shall I observe Thy law continually for ever and ever;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֶתְהַלְּכָה בָרְחָבָה כִּי פִקֻּדֶיךָ דָרָשְׁתִּי׃
englishText: And I will walk at ease, for I have sought Thy precepts;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַאֲדַבְּרָה בְעֵדֹתֶיךָ נֶגֶד מְלָכִים וְלֹא אֵבוֹשׁ׃
englishText: I will also speak of Thy testimonies before kings, and will not be ashamed.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֶשְׁתַּעֲשַׁע בְּמִצְוֺתֶיךָ אֲשֶׁר אָהָבְתִּי׃
englishText: And I will delight myself in Thy commandments, which I have loved.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאֶשָּׂא־כַפַּי אֶל־מִצְוֺתֶיךָ אֲשֶׁר אָהָבְתִּי וְאָשִׂיחָה בְחֻקֶּיךָ׃
englishText: I will lift up my hands also unto Thy commandments, which I have loved; And I will meditate in Thy statutes.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זְכֹר־דָּבָר לְעַבְדֶּךָ עַל אֲשֶׁר יִחַלְתָּנִי׃
englishText: ZAIN. Remember the word unto Thy servant, Because Thou hast made me to hope.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זֹאת נֶחָמָתִי בְעָנְיִי כִּי אִמְרָתְךָ חִיָּתְנִי׃
englishText: This is my comfort in my affliction, that Thy word hath quickened me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זֵדִים הֱלִיצֻנִי עַד־מְאֹד מִתּוֹרָתְךָ לֹא נָטִיתִי׃
englishText: The proud have had me greatly in derision; yet have I not turned aside from Thy law.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זָכַרְתִּי מִשְׁפָּטֶיךָ מֵעוֹלָם יְהוָה וָאֶתְנֶחָם׃
englishText: I have remembered Thine ordinances which are of old, O LORD, and have comforted myself. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זַלְעָפָה אֲחָזַתְנִי מֵרְשָׁעִים עֹזְבֵי תּוֹרָתֶךָ׃
englishText: Burning indignation hath taken hold upon me, because of the wicked that forsake Thy law.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זְמִרוֹת הָיוּ־לִי חֻקֶּיךָ בְּבֵית מְגוּרָי׃
englishText: Thy statutes have been my songs in the house of my pilgrimage.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זָכַרְתִּי בַלַּיְלָה שִׁמְךָ יְהוָה וָאֶשְׁמְרָה תּוֹרָתֶךָ׃
englishText: I have remembered Thy name, O LORD, in the night, and have observed Thy law.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זֹאת הָיְתָה־לִּי כִּי פִקֻּדֶיךָ נָצָרְתִּי׃
englishText: This I have had, that I have kept Thy precepts.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חֶלְקִי יְהוָה אָמַרְתִּי לִשְׁמֹר דְּבָרֶיךָ׃
englishText: HETH. My portion is the LORD, I have said that I would observe Thy words.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חִלִּיתִי פָנֶיךָ בְכָל־לֵב חָנֵּנִי כְּאִמְרָתֶךָ׃
englishText: I have entreated Thy favour with my whole heart; be gracious unto me according to Thy word.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חִשַּׁבְתִּי דְרָכָי וָאָשִׁיבָה רַגְלַי אֶל־עֵדֹתֶיךָ׃
englishText: I considered my ways, and turned my feet unto Thy testimonies.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חַשְׁתִּי וְלֹא הִתְמַהְמָהְתִּי לִשְׁמֹר מִצְוֺתֶיךָ׃
englishText: I made haste, and delayed not, to observe Thy commandments.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חֶבְלֵי רְשָׁעִים עִוְּדֻנִי תּוֹרָתְךָ לֹא שָׁכָחְתִּי׃
englishText: The bands of the wicked have enclosed me; but I have not forgotten Thy law.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חֲצוֹת־לַיְלָה אָקוּם לְהוֹדוֹת לָךְ עַל מִשְׁפְּטֵי צִדְקֶךָ׃
englishText: At midnight I will rise to give thanks unto Thee because of Thy righteous ordinances.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חָבֵר אָנִי לְכָל־אֲשֶׁר יְרֵאוּךָ וּלְשֹׁמְרֵי פִּקּוּדֶיךָ׃
englishText: I am a companion of all them that fear Thee, and of them that observe Thy precepts.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חַסְדְּךָ יְהוָה מָלְאָה הָאָרֶץ חֻקֶּיךָ לַמְּדֵנִי׃
englishText: The earth, O LORD, is full of Thy mercy; teach me Thy statutes.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: טוֹב עָשִׂיתָ עִם־עַבְדְּךָ יְהוָה כִּדְבָרֶךָ׃
englishText: TETH. Thou hast dealt well with Thy servant, O LORD, according unto Thy word.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: טוּב טַעַם וָדַעַת לַמְּדֵנִי כִּי בְמִצְוֺתֶיךָ הֶאֱמָנְתִּי׃
englishText: Teach me good discernment and knowledge; for I have believed in Thy commandments.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: טֶרֶם אֶעֱנֶה אֲנִי שֹׁגֵג וְעַתָּה אִמְרָתְךָ שָׁמָרְתִּי׃
englishText: Before I was afflicted, I did err; But now I observe Thy word.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: טוֹב־אַתָּה וּמֵטִיב לַמְּדֵנִי חֻקֶּיךָ׃
englishText: Thou art good, and doest good; Teach me Thy statutes.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: טָפְלוּ עָלַי שֶׁקֶר זֵדִים אֲנִי בְּכָל־לֵב אֱצֹּר פִּקּוּדֶיךָ׃
englishText: The proud have forged a lie against me; But I with my whole heart will keep Thy precepts.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: טָפַשׁ כַּחֵלֶב לִבָּם אֲנִי תּוֹרָתְךָ שִׁעֲשָׁעְתִּי׃
englishText: Their heart is gross like fat; But I delight in Thy law.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: טוֹב־לִי כִי־עֻנֵּיתִי לְמַעַן אֶלְמַד חֻקֶּיךָ׃
englishText: It is good for me that I have been afflicted, In order that I might learn Thy statutes.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: טוֹב־לִי תוֹרַת־פִּיךָ מֵאַלְפֵי זָהָב וָכָסֶף׃
englishText: The law of Thy mouth is better unto me Than thousands of gold and silver.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָדֶיךָ עָשׂוּנִי וַיְכוֹנְנוּנִי הֲבִינֵנִי וְאֶלְמְדָה מִצְוֺתֶיךָ׃
englishText: JOD. Thy hands have made me and fashioned me; Give me understanding, that I may learn Thy commandments.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְרֵאֶיךָ יִרְאוּנִי וְיִשְׂמָחוּ כִּי לִדְבָרְךָ יִחָלְתִּי׃
englishText: They that fear Thee shall see me and be glad, because I have hope in Thy word.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָדַעְתִּי יְהוָה כִּי־צֶדֶק מִשְׁפָּטֶיךָ וֶאֱמוּנָה עִנִּיתָנִי׃
englishText: I know, O LORD, that Thy judgments are righteous, and that in faithfulness Thou hast afflicted me. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהִי־נָא חַסְדְּךָ לְנַחֲמֵנִי כְּאִמְרָתְךָ לְעַבְדֶּךָ׃
englishText: Let, I pray Thee, Thy lovingkindness be ready to comfort me, According to Thy promise unto Thy servant.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְבֹאוּנִי רַחֲמֶיךָ וְאֶחְיֶה כִּי־תוֹרָתְךָ שַׁעֲשֻׁעָי׃
englishText: Let Thy tender mercies come unto me, that I may live; for Thy law is my delight.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יֵבֹשׁוּ זֵדִים כִּי־שֶׁקֶר עִוְּתוּנִי אֲנִי אָשִׂיחַ בְּפִקּוּדֶיךָ׃
englishText: Let the proud be put to shame, for they have distorted my cause with falsehood; but I will meditate in Thy precepts.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יָשׁוּבוּ לִי יְרֵאֶיךָ וידעו [וְיֹדְעֵי] עֵדֹתֶיךָ׃
englishText: Let those that fear Thee return unto me, and they that know Thy testimonies.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהִי־לִבִּי תָמִים בְּחֻקֶּיךָ לְמַעַן לֹא אֵבוֹשׁ׃
englishText: Let my heart be undivided in Thy statutes, in order that I may not be put to shame.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כָּלְתָה לִתְשׁוּעָתְךָ נַפְשִׁי לִדְבָרְךָ יִחָלְתִּי׃
englishText: CAPH. My soul pineth for Thy salvation; in Thy word do I hope.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כָּלוּ עֵינַי לְאִמְרָתֶךָ לֵאמֹר מָתַי תְּנַחֲמֵנִי׃
englishText: Mine eyes fail for Thy word, Saying: 'When wilt Thou comfort me?'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־הָיִיתִי כְּנֹאד בְּקִיטוֹר חֻקֶּיךָ לֹא שָׁכָחְתִּי׃
englishText: For I am become like a wine-skin in the smoke; yet do I not forget Thy statutes.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כַּמָּה יְמֵי־עַבְדֶּךָ מָתַי תַּעֲשֶׂה בְרֹדְפַי מִשְׁפָּט׃
englishText: How many are the days of Thy servant? When wilt Thou execute judgment on them that persecute me?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כָּרוּ־לִי זֵדִים שִׁיחוֹת אֲשֶׁר לֹא כְתוֹרָתֶךָ׃
englishText: The proud have digged pits for me, which is not according to Thy law.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כָּל־מִצְוֺתֶיךָ אֱמוּנָה שֶׁקֶר רְדָפוּנִי עָזְרֵנִי׃
englishText: All Thy commandments are faithful; they persecute me for nought; help Thou me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּמְעַט כִּלּוּנִי בָאָרֶץ וַאֲנִי לֹא־עָזַבְתִּי פִקֻּודֶיךָ׃
englishText: They had almost consumed me upon earth; but as for me, I forsook not Thy precepts.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כְּחַסְדְּךָ חַיֵּנִי וְאֶשְׁמְרָה עֵדוּת פִּיךָ׃
englishText: Quicken me after Thy lovingkindness, and I will observe the testimony of Thy mouth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְעוֹלָם יְהוָה דְּבָרְךָ נִצָּב בַּשָּׁמָיִם׃
englishText: LAMED. For ever, O LORD, Thy word standeth fast in heaven.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְדֹר וָדֹר אֱמוּנָתֶךָ כּוֹנַנְתָּ אֶרֶץ וַתַּעֲמֹד׃
englishText: Thy faithfulness is unto all generations; Thou hast established the earth, and it standeth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְמִשְׁפָּטֶיךָ עָמְדוּ הַיּוֹם כִּי הַכֹּל עֲבָדֶיךָ׃
englishText: They stand this day according to Thine ordinances; for all things are Thy servants.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לוּלֵי תוֹרָתְךָ שַׁעֲשֻׁעָי אָז אָבַדְתִּי בְעָנְיִי׃
englishText: Unless Thy law had been my delight, I should then have perished in mine affliction.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְעוֹלָם לֹא־אֶשְׁכַּח פִּקּוּדֶיךָ כִּי בָם חִיִּיתָנִי׃
englishText: I will never forget Thy precepts; for with them Thou hast quickened me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְךָ־אֲנִי הוֹשִׁיעֵנִי כִּי פִקּוּדֶיךָ דָרָשְׁתִּי׃
englishText: I am Thine, save me; for I have sought Thy precepts.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לִי קִוּוּ רְשָׁעִים לְאַבְּדֵנִי עֵדֹתֶיךָ אֶתְבּוֹנָן׃
englishText: The wicked have waited for me to destroy me; but I will consider Thy testimonies.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְכָל תִּכְלָה רָאִיתִי קֵץ רְחָבָה מִצְוָתְךָ מְאֹד׃
englishText: I have seen an end to every purpose; but Thy commandment is exceeding broad.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מָה־אָהַבְתִּי תוֹרָתֶךָ כָּל־הַיּוֹם הִיא שִׂיחָתִי׃
englishText: MEM. O how love I Thy law! It is my meditation all the day.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מֵאֹיְבַי תְּחַכְּמֵנִי מִצְוֺתֶךָ כִּי לְעוֹלָם הִיא־לִי׃
englishText: Thy commandments make me wiser than mine enemies: For they are ever with me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִכָּל־מְלַמְּדַי הִשְׂכַּלְתִּי כִּי עֵדְוֺתֶיךָ שִׂיחָה לִי׃
englishText: I have more understanding than all my teachers; For Thy testimonies are my meditation.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִזְּקֵנִים אֶתְבּוֹנָן כִּי פִקּוּדֶיךָ נָצָרְתִּי׃
englishText: I understand more than mine elders, because I have keep Thy precepts.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִכָּל־אֹרַח רָע כָּלִאתִי רַגְלָי לְמַעַן אֶשְׁמֹר דְּבָרֶךָ׃
englishText: I have refrained my feet from every evil way, in order that I might observe Thy word.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִמִּשְׁפָּטֶיךָ לֹא־סָרְתִּי כִּי־אַתָּה הוֹרֵתָנִי׃
englishText: I have not turned aside from Thine ordinances; For Thou hast instructed me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַה־נִּמְלְצוּ לְחִכִּי אִמְרָתֶךָ מִדְּבַשׁ לְפִי׃
englishText: How sweet are Thy words unto my palate! Yea, sweeter than honey to my mouth!
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִפִּקּוּדֶיךָ אֶתְבּוֹנָן עַל־כֵּן שָׂנֵאתִי כָּל־אֹרַח שָׁקֶר׃
englishText: From Thy precepts I get understanding; Therefore I hate every false way.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נֵר־לְרַגְלִי דְבָרֶךָ וְאוֹר לִנְתִיבָתִי׃
englishText: NUN. Thy word is a lamp unto my feet, And a light unto my path.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נִשְׁבַּעְתִּי וָאֲקַיֵּמָה לִשְׁמֹר מִשְׁפְּטֵי צִדְקֶךָ׃
englishText: I have sworn, and have confirmed it, To observe Thy righteous ordinances.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נַעֲנֵיתִי עַד־מְאֹד יְהוָה חַיֵּנִי כִדְבָרֶךָ׃
englishText: I am afflicted very much; Quicken me, O LORD, according unto Thy word.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נִדְבוֹת פִּי רְצֵה־נָא יְהוָה וּמִשְׁפָּטֶיךָ לַמְּדֵנִי׃
englishText: Accept, I beseech Thee, the freewill-offerings of my mouth, O LORD, And teach me Thine ordinances.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נַפְשִׁי בְכַפִּי תָמִיד וְתוֹרָתְךָ לֹא שָׁכָחְתִּי׃
englishText: My soul is continually in my hand; yet have I not forgotten Thy law.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נָתְנוּ רְשָׁעִים פַּח לִי וּמִפִּקּוּדֶיךָ לֹא תָעִיתִי׃
englishText: The wicked have laid a snare for me; yet went I not astray from Thy precepts.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נָחַלְתִּי עֵדְוֺתֶיךָ לְעוֹלָם כִּי־שְׂשׂוֹן לִבִּי הֵמָּה׃
englishText: Thy testimonies have I taken as a heritage for ever; for they are the rejoicing of my heart.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נָטִיתִי לִבִּי לַעֲשׂוֹת חֻקֶּיךָ לְעוֹלָם עֵקֶב׃
englishText: I have inclined my heart to perform Thy statutes, for ever, at every step.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: סֵעֲפִים שָׂנֵאתִי וְתוֹרָתְךָ אָהָבְתִּי׃
englishText: SAMECH. I hate them that are of a double mind; but Thy law do I love.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: סִתְרִי וּמָגִנִּי אָתָּה לִדְבָרְךָ יִחָלְתִּי׃
englishText: Thou art my covert and my shield; in Thy word do I hope.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: סוּרוּ־מִמֶּנִּי מְרֵעִים וְאֶצְּרָה מִצְוֺת אֱלֹהָי׃
englishText: Depart from me, ye evildoers; that I may keep the commandments of my God.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: סָמְכֵנִי כְאִמְרָתְךָ וְאֶחְיֶה וְאַל־תְּבִישֵׁנִי מִשִּׂבְרִי׃
englishText: Uphold me according unto Thy word, that I may live; and put me not to shame in my hope.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: סְעָדֵנִי וְאִוָּשֵׁעָה וְאֶשְׁעָה בְחֻקֶּיךָ תָמִיד׃
englishText: Support Thou me, and I shall be saved; and I will occupy myself with Thy statutes continually.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: סָלִיתָ כָּל־שׁוֹגִים מֵחֻקֶּיךָ כִּי־שֶׁקֶר תַּרְמִיתָם׃
englishText: Thou hast made light of all them that err from Thy statutes; for their deceit is vain.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: סִגִים הִשְׁבַּתָּ כָל־רִשְׁעֵי־אָרֶץ לָכֵן אָהַבְתִּי עֵדֹתֶיךָ׃
englishText: Thou puttest away all the wicked of the earth like dross; therefore I love Thy testimonies.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: סָמַר מִפַּחְדְּךָ בְשָׂרִי וּמִמִּשְׁפָּטֶיךָ יָרֵאתִי׃
englishText: My flesh shuddereth for fear of Thee; And I am afraid of Thy judgments.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עָשִׂיתִי מִשְׁפָּט וָצֶדֶק בַּל־תַּנִּיחֵנִי לְעֹשְׁקָי׃
englishText: AIN. I have done justice and righteousness; Leave me not to mine oppressors.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֲרֹב עַבְדְּךָ לְטוֹב אַל־יַעַשְׁקֻנִי זֵדִים׃
englishText: Be surety for Thy servant for good; Let not the proud oppress me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֵינַי כָּלוּ לִישׁוּעָתֶךָ וּלְאִמְרַת צִדְקֶךָ׃
englishText: Mine eyes fail for Thy salvation, and for Thy righteous word.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֲשֵׂה עִם־עַבְדְּךָ כְחַסְדֶּךָ וְחֻקֶּיךָ לַמְּדֵנִי׃
englishText: Deal with Thy servant according unto Thy mercy, and teach me Thy statutes.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַבְדְּךָ־אָנִי הֲבִינֵנִי וְאֵדְעָה עֵדֹתֶיךָ׃
englishText: I am Thy servant, give me understanding, that I may know Thy testimonies.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֵת לַעֲשׂוֹת לַיהוָה הֵפֵרוּ תּוֹרָתֶךָ׃
englishText: It is time for the LORD to work; They have made void Thy law.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַל־כֵּן אָהַבְתִּי מִצְוֺתֶיךָ מִזָּהָב וּמִפָּז׃
englishText: Therefore I love Thy commandments Above gold, yea, above fine gold.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַל־כֵּן כָּל־פִּקּוּדֵי כֹל יִשָּׁרְתִּי כָּל־אֹרַח שֶׁקֶר שָׂנֵאתִי׃
englishText: Therefore I esteem all [Thy] precepts concerning all things to be right; Every false way I hate.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פְּלָאוֹת עֵדְוֺתֶיךָ עַל־כֵּן נְצָרָתַם נַפְשִׁי׃
englishText: PE. Thy testimonies are wonderful; Therefore doth my soul keep them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פֵּתַח דְּבָרֶיךָ יָאִיר מֵבִין פְּתָיִים׃
englishText: The opening of Thy words giveth light; it giveth understanding unto the simple.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פִּי־פָעַרְתִּי וָאֶשְׁאָפָה כִּי לְמִצְוֺתֶיךָ יָאָבְתִּי׃
englishText: I opened wide my mouth, and panted; For I longed for Thy commandments.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פְּנֵה־אֵלַי וְחָנֵּנִי כְּמִשְׁפָּט לְאֹהֲבֵי שְׁמֶךָ׃
englishText: Turn Thee towards me, and be gracious unto me, As is Thy wont to do unto those that love Thy name.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פְּעָמַי הָכֵן בְּאִמְרָתֶךָ וְאַל־תַּשְׁלֶט־בִּי כָל־אָוֶן׃
englishText: Order my footsteps by Thy word; And let not any iniquity have dominion over me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פְּדֵנִי מֵעֹשֶׁק אָדָם וְאֶשְׁמְרָה פִּקּוּדֶיךָ׃
englishText: Redeem me from the oppression of man, And I will observe Thy precepts.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פָּנֶיךָ הָאֵר בְּעַבְדֶּךָ וְלַמְּדֵנִי אֶת־חֻקֶּיךָ׃
englishText: Make Thy face to shine upon Thy servant; And teach me Thy statutes.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פַּלְגֵי־מַיִם יָרְדוּ עֵינָי עַל לֹא־שָׁמְרוּ תוֹרָתֶךָ׃
englishText: Mine eyes run down with rivers of water, Because they observe not Thy law.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: צַדִּיק אַתָּה יְהוָה וְיָשָׁר מִשְׁפָּטֶיךָ׃
englishText: TZADE. Righteous art Thou, O LORD, And upright are Thy judgments.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: צִוִּיתָ צֶדֶק עֵדֹתֶיךָ וֶאֱמוּנָה מְאֹד׃
englishText: Thou hast commanded Thy testimonies in righteousness and exceeding faithfulness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: צִמְּתַתְנִי קִנְאָתִי כִּי־שָׁכְחוּ דְבָרֶיךָ צָרָי׃
englishText: My zeal hath undone me, because mine adversaries have forgotten Thy words.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: צְרוּפָה אִמְרָתְךָ מְאֹד וְעַבְדְּךָ אֲהֵבָהּ׃
englishText: Thy word is tried to the uttermost, and Thy servant loveth it.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: צָעִיר אָנֹכִי וְנִבְזֶה פִּקֻּדֶיךָ לֹא שָׁכָחְתִּי׃
englishText: I am small and despised; yet have I not forgotten Thy precepts.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: צִדְקָתְךָ צֶדֶק לְעוֹלָם וְתוֹרָתְךָ אֱמֶת׃
englishText: Thy righteousness is an everlasting righteousness, and Thy law is truth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: צַר־וּמָצוֹק מְצָאוּנִי מִצְוֺתֶיךָ שַׁעֲשֻׁעָי׃
englishText: Trouble and anguish have overtaken me; yet Thy commandments are my delight.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: צֶדֶק עֵדְוֺתֶיךָ לְעוֹלָם הֲבִינֵנִי וְאֶחְיֶה׃
englishText: Thy testimonies are righteous for ever; give me understanding, and I shall live.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קָרָאתִי בְכָל־לֵב עֲנֵנִי יְהוָה חֻקֶּיךָ אֶצֹּרָה׃
englishText: KOPH. I have called with my whole heart; answer me, O LORD; I will keep Thy statutes.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קְרָאתִיךָ הוֹשִׁיעֵנִי וְאֶשְׁמְרָה עֵדֹתֶיךָ׃
englishText: I have called Thee, save me, and I will observe Thy testimonies.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קִדַּמְתִּי בַנֶּשֶׁף וָאֲשַׁוֵּעָה לדבריך [לִדְבָרְךָ] יִחָלְתִּי׃
englishText: I rose early at dawn, and cried; I hoped in Thy word.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קִדְּמוּ עֵינַי אַשְׁמֻרוֹת לָשִׂיחַ בְּאִמְרָתֶךָ׃
englishText: Mine eyes forestalled the night-watches, that I might meditate in Thy word.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קוֹלִי שִׁמְעָה כְחַסְדֶּךָ יְהוָה כְּמִשְׁפָּטֶךָ חַיֵּנִי׃
englishText: Hear my voice according unto Thy lovingkindness; Quicken me, O LORD, as Thou art wont.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קָרְבוּ רֹדְפֵי זִמָּה מִתּוֹרָתְךָ רָחָקוּ׃
englishText: They draw nigh that follow after wickedness; they are far from Thy law.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קָרוֹב אַתָּה יְהוָה וְכָל־מִצְוֺתֶיךָ אֱמֶת׃
englishText: Thou art nigh, O LORD; and all Thy commandments are truth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קֶדֶם יָדַעְתִּי מֵעֵדֹתֶיךָ כִּי לְעוֹלָם יְסַדְתָּם׃
englishText: Of old have I known from Thy testimonies that Thou hast founded them for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רְאֵה־עָנְיִי וְחַלְּצֵנִי כִּי־תוֹרָתְךָ לֹא שָׁכָחְתִּי׃
englishText: RESH. O see mine affliction, and rescue me; For I do not forget Thy law.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רִיבָה רִיבִי וּגְאָלֵנִי לְאִמְרָתְךָ חַיֵּנִי׃
englishText: Plead Thou my cause, and redeem me; Quicken me according to Thy word.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רָחוֹק מֵרְשָׁעִים יְשׁוּעָה כִּי־חֻקֶּיךָ לֹא דָרָשׁוּ׃
englishText: Salvation is far from the wicked; For they seek not Thy statutes.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רַחֲמֶיךָ רַבִּים יְהוָה כְּמִשְׁפָּטֶיךָ חַיֵּנִי׃
englishText: Great are Thy compassions, O LORD; Quicken me as Thou art wont.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רַבִּים רֹדְפַי וְצָרָי מֵעֵדְוֺתֶיךָ לֹא נָטִיתִי׃
englishText: Many are my persecutors and mine adversaries; Yet have I not turned aside from Thy testimonies.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רָאִיתִי בֹגְדִים וָאֶתְקוֹטָטָה אֲשֶׁר אִמְרָתְךָ לֹא שָׁמָרוּ׃
englishText: I beheld them that were faithless, and strove with them; Because they observed not Thy word.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רְאֵה כִּי־פִקּוּדֶיךָ אָהָבְתִּי יְהוָה כְּחַסְדְּךָ חַיֵּנִי׃
englishText: O see how I love Thy precepts; Quicken me, O LORD, according to Thy lovingkindness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רֹאשׁ־דְּבָרְךָ אֱמֶת וּלְעוֹלָם כָּל־מִשְׁפַּט צִדְקֶךָ׃
englishText: The beginning of Thy word is truth; And all Thy righteous ordinance endureth for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׂרִים רְדָפוּנִי חִנָּם ומדבריך [וּמִדְּבָרְךָ] פָּחַד לִבִּי׃
englishText: SCHIN. Princes have persecuted me without a cause; But my heart standeth in awe of Thy words.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׂשׂ אָנֹכִי עַל־אִמְרָתֶךָ כְּמוֹצֵא שָׁלָל רָב׃
englishText: I rejoice at Thy word, As one that findeth great spoil.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שֶׁקֶר שָׂנֵאתִי וַאֲתַעֵבָה תּוֹרָתְךָ אָהָבְתִּי׃
englishText: I hate and abhor falsehood; Thy law do I love. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שֶׁבַע בַּיּוֹם הִלַּלְתִּיךָ עַל מִשְׁפְּטֵי צִדְקֶךָ׃
englishText: Seven times a day do I praise Thee, because of Thy righteous ordinances.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׁלוֹם רָב לְאֹהֲבֵי תוֹרָתֶךָ וְאֵין־לָמוֹ מִכְשׁוֹל׃
englishText: Great peace have they that love Thy law; And there is no stumbling for them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׂבַּרְתִּי לִישׁוּעָתְךָ יְהוָה וּמִצְוֺתֶיךָ עָשִׂיתִי׃
englishText: I have hoped for Thy salvation, O LORD, And have done Thy commandments.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׁמְרָה נַפְשִׁי עֵדֹתֶיךָ וָאֹהֲבֵם מְאֹד׃
englishText: My soul hath observed Thy testimonies; And I love them exceedingly.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׁמַרְתִּי פִקּוּדֶיךָ וְעֵדֹתֶיךָ כִּי כָל־דְּרָכַי נֶגְדֶּךָ׃
englishText: I have observed Thy precepts and Thy testimonies; For all my ways are before Thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תִּקְרַב רִנָּתִי לְפָנֶיךָ יְהוָה כִּדְבָרְךָ הֲבִינֵנִי׃
englishText: TAV. Let my cry come near before Thee, O LORD; Give me understanding according to Thy word.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תָּבוֹא תְּחִנָּתִי לְפָנֶיךָ כְּאִמְרָתְךָ הַצִּילֵנִי׃
englishText: Let my supplication come before Thee; deliver me according to Thy word.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תַּבַּעְנָה שְׂפָתַי תְּהִלָּה כִּי תְלַמְּדֵנִי חֻקֶּיךָ׃
englishText: Let my lips utter praise: Because Thou teachest me Thy statutes.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תַּעַן לְשׁוֹנִי אִמְרָתֶךָ כִּי כָל־מִצְוֺתֶיךָ צֶּדֶק׃
englishText: Let my tongue sing of Thy word; For all Thy commandments are righteousness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תְּהִי־יָדְךָ לְעָזְרֵנִי כִּי פִקּוּדֶיךָ בָחָרְתִּי׃
englishText: Let Thy hand be ready to help me; For I have chosen Thy precepts.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תָּאַבְתִּי לִישׁוּעָתְךָ יְהוָה וְתוֹרָתְךָ שַׁעֲשֻׁעָי׃
englishText: I have longed for Thy salvation, O LORD; And Thy law is my delight.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תְּחִי־נַפְשִׁי וּתְהַלְלֶךָּ וּמִשְׁפָּטֶךָ יַעֲזְרֻנִי׃
englishText: Let my soul live, and it shall praise Thee; And let Thine ordinances help me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תָּעִיתִי כְּשֶׂה אֹבֵד בַּקֵּשׁ עַבְדֶּךָ כִּי מִצְוֺתֶיךָ לֹא שָׁכָחְתִּי׃
englishText: I have gone astray like a lost sheep; seek Thy servant; For I have not forgotten Thy commandments.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׁיר הַמַּעֲלוֹת אֶל־יְהוָה בַּצָּרָתָה לִּי קָרָאתִי וַיַּעֲנֵנִי׃
englishText: A Song of Ascents. In my distress I called unto the LORD, And He answered me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה הַצִּילָה נַפְשִׁי מִשְּׂפַת־שֶׁקֶר מִלָּשׁוֹן רְמִיָּה׃
englishText: O LORD, deliver my soul from lying lips, From a deceitful tongue.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַה־יִּתֵּן לְךָ וּמַה־יֹּסִיף לָךְ לָשׁוֹן רְמִיָּה׃
englishText: What shall be given unto thee, and what shall be done more unto thee, Thou deceitful tongue?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חִצֵּי גִבּוֹר שְׁנוּנִים עִם גַּחֲלֵי רְתָמִים׃
englishText: Sharp arrows of the mighty, With coals of broom.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אוֹיָה־לִי כִּי־גַרְתִּי מֶשֶׁךְ שָׁכַנְתִּי עִם־אָהֳלֵי קֵדָר׃
englishText: Woe is me, that I sojourn with Meshech, That I dwell beside the tents of Kedar!
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רַבַּת שָׁכְנָה־לָּהּ נַפְשִׁי עִם שׂוֹנֵא שָׁלוֹם׃
englishText: My soul hath full long had her dwelling With him that hateth peace.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲ‍נִי־שָׁלוֹם וְכִי אֲדַבֵּר הֵמָּה לַמִּלְחָמָה׃
englishText: I am all peace; But when I speak, they are for war.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׁיר לַמַּעֲלוֹת אֶשָּׂא עֵינַי אֶל־הֶהָרִים מֵאַיִן יָבֹא עֶזְרִי׃
englishText: A Song of Ascents. I will lift up mine eyes unto the mountains: From whence shall my help come?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֶזְרִי מֵעִם יְהוָה עֹשֵׂה שָׁמַיִם וָאָרֶץ׃
englishText: My help cometh from the LORD, Who made heaven and earth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־יִתֵּן לַמּוֹט רַגְלֶךָ אַל־יָנוּם שֹׁמְרֶךָ׃
englishText: He will not suffer thy foot to be moved; He that keepeth thee will not slumber.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הִנֵּה לֹא־יָנוּם וְלֹא יִישָׁן שׁוֹמֵר יִשְׂרָאֵל׃
englishText: Behold, He that keepeth Israel Doth neither slumber nor sleep.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה שֹׁמְרֶךָ יְהוָה צִלְּךָ עַל־יַד יְמִינֶךָ׃
englishText: The LORD is thy keeper; The LORD is thy shade upon thy right hand.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יוֹמָם הַשֶּׁמֶשׁ לֹא־יַכֶּכָּה וְיָרֵחַ בַּלָּיְלָה׃
englishText: The sun shall not smite thee by day, Nor the moon by night.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה יִשְׁמָרְךָ מִכָּל־רָע יִשְׁמֹר אֶת־נַפְשֶׁךָ׃
englishText: The LORD shall keep thee from all evil; He shall keep thy soul.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה יִשְׁמָר־צֵאתְךָ וּבוֹאֶךָ מֵעַתָּה וְעַד־עוֹלָם׃
englishText: The LORD shall guard thy going out and thy coming in, From this time forth and for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׁיר הַמַּעֲלוֹת לְדָוִד שָׂמַחְתִּי בְּאֹמְרִים לִי בֵּית יְהוָה נֵלֵךְ׃
englishText: A Song of Ascents; of David. I rejoiced when they said unto me: 'Let us go unto the house of the LORD.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֹמְדוֹת הָיוּ רַגְלֵינוּ בִּשְׁעָרַיִךְ יְרוּשָׁלִָם׃
englishText: Our feet are standing within thy gates, O Jerusalem;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְרוּשָׁלִַם הַבְּנוּיָה כְּעִיר שֶׁחֻבְּרָה־לָּהּ יַחְדָּו׃
englishText: Jerusalem, that art builded as a city that is compact together;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שֶׁשָּׁם עָלוּ שְׁבָטִים שִׁבְטֵי־יָהּ עֵדוּת לְיִשְׂרָאֵל לְהֹדוֹת לְשֵׁם יְהוָה׃
englishText: Whither the tribes went up, even the tribes of the LORD, as a testimony unto Israel, to give thanks unto the name of the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי שָׁמָּה יָשְׁבוּ כִסְאוֹת לְמִשְׁפָּט כִּסְאוֹת לְבֵית דָּוִיד׃
englishText: For there were set thrones for judgment, the thrones of the house of David.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שַׁאֲלוּ שְׁלוֹם יְרוּשָׁלִָם יִשְׁלָיוּ אֹהֲבָיִךְ׃
englishText: Pray for the peace of Jerusalem; May they prosper that love thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהִי־שָׁלוֹם בְּחֵילֵךְ שַׁלְוָה בְּאַרְמְנוֹתָיִךְ׃
englishText: Peace be within thy walls, and prosperity within thy palaces.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְמַעַן אַחַי וְרֵעָי אֲדַבְּרָה־נָּא שָׁלוֹם בָּךְ׃
englishText: For my brethren and companions' sakes, I will now say: 'Peace be within thee.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְמַעַן בֵּית־יְהוָה אֱלֹהֵינוּ אֲבַקְשָׁה טוֹב לָךְ׃
englishText: For the sake of the house of the LORD our God I will seek thy good.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׁיר הַמַּעֲלוֹת אֵלֶיךָ נָשָׂאתִי אֶת־עֵינַי הַיֹּשְׁבִי בַּשָּׁמָיִם׃
englishText: A Song of Ascents. Unto Thee I lift up mine eyes, O Thou that art enthroned in the heavens.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הִנֵּה כְעֵינֵי עֲבָדִים אֶל־יַד אֲ‍דוֹנֵיהֶם כְּעֵינֵי שִׁפְחָה אֶל־יַד גְּבִרְתָּהּ כֵּן עֵינֵינוּ אֶל־יְהוָה אֱלֹהֵינוּ עַד שֶׁיְּחָנֵּנוּ׃
englishText: Behold, as the eyes of servants unto the hand of their master, As the eyes of a maiden unto the hand of her mistress; So our eyes look unto the LORD our God, Until He be gracious unto us.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חָנֵּנוּ יְהוָה חָנֵּנוּ כִּי־רַב שָׂבַעְנוּ בוּז׃
englishText: Be gracious unto us, O LORD, be gracious unto us; For we are full sated with contempt.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רַבַּת שָׂבְעָה־לָּהּ נַפְשֵׁנוּ הַלַּעַג הַשַּׁאֲנַנִּים הַבּוּז לִגְאֵיוֹנִים׃
englishText: Our soul is full sated With the scorning of those that are at ease, And with the contempt of the proud oppressors.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׁיר הַמַּעֲלוֹת לְדָוִד לוּלֵי יְהוָה שֶׁהָיָה לָנוּ יֹאמַר־נָא יִשְׂרָאֵל׃
englishText: A Song of Ascents; of David. 'If it had not been the LORD who was for us', Let Israel now say;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לוּלֵי יְהוָה שֶׁהָיָה לָנוּ בְּקוּם עָלֵינוּ אָדָם׃
englishText: 'If it had not been the LORD who was for us, When men rose up against us,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲזַי חַיִּים בְּלָעוּנוּ בַּחֲרוֹת אַפָּם בָּנוּ׃
englishText: Then they had swallowed us up alive, when their wrath was kindled against us;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲזַי הַמַּיִם שְׁטָפוּנוּ נַחְלָה עָבַר עַל־נַפְשֵׁנוּ׃
englishText: Then the waters had overwhelmed us, the stream had gone over our soul;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲזַי עָבַר עַל־נַפְשֵׁנוּ הַמַּיִם הַזֵּידוֹנִים׃
englishText: Then the proud waters Had gone over our soul.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בָּרוּךְ יְהוָה שֶׁלֹּא נְתָנָנוּ טֶרֶף לְשִׁנֵּיהֶם׃
englishText: Blessed be the LORD, who hath not given us as a prey to their teeth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נַפְשֵׁנוּ כְּצִפּוֹר נִמְלְטָה מִפַּח יוֹקְשִׁים הַפַּח נִשְׁבָּר וַאֲנַחְנוּ נִמְלָטְנוּ׃
englishText: Our soul is escaped as a bird out of the snare of the fowlers; The snare is broken, and we are escaped.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֶזְרֵנוּ בְּשֵׁם יְהוָה עֹשֵׂה שָׁמַיִם וָאָרֶץ׃
englishText: Our help is in the name of the LORD, Who made heaven and earth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׁיר הַמַּעֲלוֹת הַבֹּטְחִים בַּיהוָה כְּהַר־צִיּוֹן לֹא־יִמּוֹט לְעוֹלָם יֵשֵׁב׃
englishText: A Song of Ascents. They that trust in the LORD Are as mount Zion, which cannot be moved, but abideth for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְרוּשָׁלִַם הָרִים סָבִיב לָהּ וַיהוָה סָבִיב לְעַמּוֹ מֵעַתָּה וְעַד־עוֹלָם׃
englishText: As the mountains are round about Jerusalem, So the LORD is round about His people, From this time forth and for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי לֹא יָנוּחַ שֵׁבֶט הָרֶשַׁע עַל גּוֹרַל הַצַּדִּיקִים לְמַעַן לֹא־יִשְׁלְחוּ הַצַּדִּיקִים בְּעַוְלָתָה יְדֵיהֶם׃
englishText: For the rod of wickedness shall not rest upon the lot of the righteous; That the righteous put not forth their hands unto iniquity.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֵיטִיבָה יְהוָה לַטּוֹבִים וְלִישָׁרִים בְּלִבּוֹתָם׃
englishText: Do good, O LORD, unto the good, And to them that are upright in their hearts.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְהַמַּטִּים עַקַלְקַלּוֹתָם יוֹלִיכֵם יְהוָה אֶת־פֹּעֲלֵי הָאָוֶן שָׁלוֹם עַל־יִשְׂרָאֵל׃
englishText: But as for such as turn aside unto their crooked ways, The LORD will lead them away with the workers of iniquity. Peace be upon Israel.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׁיר הַמַּעֲלוֹת בְּשׁוּב יְהוָה אֶת־שִׁיבַת צִיּוֹן הָיִינוּ כְּחֹלְמִים׃
englishText: A Song of Ascents. When the LORD brought back those that returned to Zion, We were like unto them that dream.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָז יִמָּלֵא שְׂחוֹק פִּינוּ וּלְשׁוֹנֵנוּ רִנָּה אָז יֹאמְרוּ בַגּוֹיִם הִגְדִּיל יְהוָה לַעֲשׂוֹת עִם־אֵלֶּה׃
englishText: Then was our mouth filled with laughter, and our tongue with singing; then said they among the nations: 'The LORD hath done great things with these.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הִגְדִּיל יְהוָה לַעֲשׂוֹת עִמָּנוּ הָיִינוּ שְׂמֵחִים׃
englishText: The LORD hath done great things with us; we are rejoiced.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שׁוּבָה יְהוָה אֶת־שבותנו [שְׁבִיתֵנוּ] כַּאֲפִיקִים בַּנֶּגֶב׃
englishText: Turn our captivity, O LORD, as the streams in the dry land.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַזֹּרְעִים בְּדִמְעָה בְּרִנָּה יִקְצֹרוּ׃
englishText: They that sow in tears Shall reap in joy.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הָלוֹךְ יֵלֵךְ וּבָכֹה נֹשֵׂא מֶשֶׁךְ־הַזָּרַע בֹּא־יָבוֹא בְרִנָּה נֹשֵׂא אֲלֻמֹּתָיו׃
englishText: Though he goeth on his way weeping that beareth the measure of seed, He shall come home with joy, bearing his sheaves.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׁיר הַמַּעֲלוֹת לִשְׁלֹמֹה אִם־יְהוָה לֹא־יִבְנֶה בַיִת שָׁוְא עָמְלוּ בוֹנָיו בּוֹ אִם־יְהוָה לֹא־יִשְׁמָר־עִיר שָׁוְא שָׁקַד שׁוֹמֵר׃
englishText: A Song of Ascents; of Solomon. Except the LORD build the house, They labour in vain that build it; Except the LORD keep the city, The watchman waketh but in vain.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׁוְא לָכֶם מַשְׁכִּימֵי קוּם מְאַחֲרֵי־שֶׁבֶת אֹכְלֵי לֶחֶם הָעֲצָבִים כֵּן יִתֵּן לִידִידוֹ שֵׁנָא׃
englishText: It is vain for you that ye rise early, and sit up late, Ye that eat the bread of toil; So He giveth unto His beloved in sleep.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)
