originalText: הִנֵּה נַחֲלַת יְהוָה בָּנִים שָׂכָר פְּרִי הַבָּטֶן׃
englishText: Lo, children are a heritage of the LORD; The fruit of the womb is a reward.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כְּחִצִּים בְּיַד־גִּבּוֹר כֵּן בְּנֵי הַנְּעוּרִים׃
englishText: As arrows in the hand of a mighty man, So are the children of one's youth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַשְׁרֵי הַגֶּבֶר אֲשֶׁר מִלֵּא אֶת־אַשְׁפָּתוֹ מֵהֶם לֹא־יֵבֹשׁוּ כִּי־יְדַבְּרוּ אֶת־אוֹיְבִים בַּשָּׁעַר׃
englishText: Happy is the man that hath his quiver full of them; They shall not be put to shame, When they speak with their enemies in the gate.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׁיר הַמַּעֲלוֹת אַשְׁרֵי כָּל־יְרֵא יְהוָה הַהֹלֵךְ בִּדְרָכָיו׃
englishText: A Song of Ascents. Happy is every one that feareth the LORD, That walketh in His ways.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְגִיעַ כַּפֶּיךָ כִּי תֹאכֵל אַשְׁרֶיךָ וְטוֹב לָךְ׃
englishText: When thou eatest the labour of thy hands, Happy shalt thou be, and it shall be well with thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֶשְׁתְּךָ כְּגֶפֶן פֹּרִיָּה בְּיַרְכְּתֵי בֵיתֶךָ בָּנֶיךָ כִּשְׁתִלֵי זֵיתִים סָבִיב לְשֻׁלְחָנֶךָ׃
englishText: Thy wife shall be as a fruitful vine, in the innermost parts of thy house; Thy children like olive plants, round about thy table.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הִנֵּה כִי־כֵן יְבֹרַךְ גָּבֶר יְרֵא יְהוָה׃
englishText: Behold, surely thus shall the man be blessed That feareth the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְבָרֶכְךָ יְהוָה מִצִּיּוֹן וּרְאֵה בְּטוּב יְרוּשָׁלִָם כֹּל יְמֵי חַיֶּיךָ׃
englishText: The LORD bless thee out of Zion; And see thou the good of Jerusalem all the days of thy life;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּרְאֵה־בָנִים לְבָנֶיךָ שָׁלוֹם עַל־יִשְׂרָאֵל׃
englishText: And see thy children's children. Peace be upon Israel!
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׁיר הַמַּעֲלוֹת רַבַּת צְרָרוּנִי מִנְּעוּרַי יֹאמַר־נָא יִשְׂרָאֵל׃
englishText: A Song of Ascents. 'Much have they afflicted me from my youth up', Let Israel now say;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רַבַּת צְרָרוּנִי מִנְּעוּרָי גַּם לֹא־יָכְלוּ לִי׃
englishText: 'Much have they afflicted me from my youth up; But they have not prevailed against me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַל־גַּבִּי חָרְשׁוּ חֹרְשִׁים הֶאֱרִיכוּ למענותם [לְמַעֲנִיתָם׃]
englishText: The plowers plowed upon my back; They made long their furrows.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה צַדִּיק קִצֵּץ עֲבוֹת רְשָׁעִים׃
englishText: The LORD is righteous; He hath cut asunder the cords of the wicked.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יֵבֹשׁוּ וְיִסֹּגוּ אָחוֹר כֹּל שֹׂנְאֵי צִיּוֹן׃
englishText: Let them be ashamed and turned backward, All they that hate Zion.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִהְיוּ כַּחֲצִיר גַּגּוֹת שֶׁקַּדְמַת שָׁלַף יָבֵשׁ׃
englishText: Let them be as the grass upon the housetops, Which withereth afore it springeth up;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שֶׁלֹּא מִלֵּא כַפּוֹ קוֹצֵר וְחִצְנוֹ מְעַמֵּר׃
englishText: Wherewith the reaper filleth not his hand, Nor he that bindeth sheaves his bosom.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְלֹא אָמְרוּ הָעֹבְרִים בִּרְכַּת־יְהוָה אֲלֵיכֶם בֵּרַכְנוּ אֶתְכֶם בְּשֵׁם יְהוָה׃
englishText: Neither do they that go by say: ‘The blessing of the LORD be upon you; We bless you in the name of the LORD.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׁיר הַמַּעֲלוֹת מִמַּעֲמַקִּים קְרָאתִיךָ יְהוָה׃
englishText: A Song of Ascents. Out of the depths have I called Thee, O LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲדֹנָי שִׁמְעָה בְקוֹלִי תִּהְיֶינָה אָזְנֶיךָ קַשֻּׁבוֹת לְקוֹל תַּחֲנוּנָי׃
englishText: Lord, hearken unto my voice; let Thine ears be attentive to the voice of my supplications.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־עֲוֺנוֹת תִּשְׁמָר־יָהּ אֲדֹנָי מִי יַעֲמֹד׃
englishText: If Thou, LORD, shouldest mark iniquities, O Lord, who could stand?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־עִמְּךָ הַסְּלִיחָה לְמַעַן תִּוָּרֵא׃
englishText: For with Thee there is forgiveness, that Thou mayest be feared.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קִוִּיתִי יְהוָה קִוְּתָה נַפְשִׁי וְלִדְבָרוֹ הוֹחָלְתִּי׃
englishText: I wait for the LORD, my soul doth wait, and in His word do I hope.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נַפְשִׁי לַאדֹנָי מִשֹּׁמְרִים לַבֹּקֶר שֹׁמְרִים לַבֹּקֶר׃
englishText: My soul waiteth for the Lord, more than watchmen for the morning; yea, more than watchmen for the morning.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יַחֵל יִשְׂרָאֵל אֶל־יְהוָה כִּי־עִם־יְהוָה הַחֶסֶד וְהַרְבֵּה עִמּוֹ פְדוּת׃
englishText: O Israel, hope in the LORD; for with the LORD there is mercy, and with Him is plenteous redemption.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְהוּא יִפְדֶּה אֶת־יִשְׂרָאֵל מִכֹּל עֲוֺנֹתָיו׃
englishText: And He will redeem Israel from all his iniquities.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׁיר הַמַּעֲלוֹת לְדָוִד יְהוָה לֹא־גָבַהּ לִבִּי וְלֹא־רָמוּ עֵינַי וְלֹא־הִלַּכְתִּי בִּגְדֹלוֹת וּבְנִפְלָאוֹת מִמֶּנִּי׃
englishText: A Song of Ascents; of David. LORD, my heart is not haughty, nor mine eyes lofty; Neither do I exercise myself in things too great, or in things too wonderful for me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־לֹא שִׁוִּיתִי וְדוֹמַמְתִּי נַפְשִׁי כְּגָמֻל עֲלֵי אִמּוֹ כַּגָּמֻל עָלַי נַפְשִׁי׃
englishText: Surely I have stilled and quieted my soul; Like a weaned child with his mother; My soul is with me like a weaned child.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יַחֵל יִשְׂרָאֵל אֶל־יְהוָה מֵעַתָּה וְעַד־עוֹלָם׃
englishText: O Israel, hope in the LORD From this time forth and for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׁיר הַמַּעֲלוֹת זְכוֹר־יְהוָה לְדָוִד אֵת כָּל־עֻנּוֹתוֹ׃
englishText: A Song of Ascents. LORD, remember unto David All his affliction;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲשֶׁר נִשְׁבַּע לַיהוָה נָדַר לַאֲבִיר יַעֲקֹב׃
englishText: How he swore unto the LORD, And vowed unto the Mighty One of Jacob:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־אָבֹא בְּאֹהֶל בֵּיתִי אִם־אֶעֱלֶה עַל־עֶרֶשׂ יְצוּעָי׃
englishText: ‘Surely I will not come into the tent of my house, Nor go up into the bed that is spread for me;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־אֶתֵּן שְׁנַת לְעֵינָי לְעַפְעַפַּי תְּנוּמָה׃
englishText: I will not give sleep to mine eyes, Nor slumber to mine eyelids;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַד־אֶמְצָא מָקוֹם לַיהוָה מִשְׁכָּנוֹת לַאֲבִיר יַעֲקֹב׃
englishText: Until I find out a place for the LORD, A dwelling-place for the Mighty One of Jacob.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הִנֵּה־שְׁמַעֲנוּהָ בְאֶפְרָתָה מְצָאנוּהָ בִּשְׂדֵי־יָעַר׃
englishText: Lo, we heard of it as being in Ephrath; We found it in the field of athe wood.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נָבוֹאָה לְמִשְׁכְּנוֹתָיו נִשְׁתַּחֲוֶה לַהֲדֹם רַגְלָיו׃
englishText: Let us go into His dwelling-place; Let us worship at His footstool. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קוּמָה יְהוָה לִמְנוּחָתֶךָ אַתָּה וַאֲרוֹן עֻזֶּךָ׃
englishText: Arise, O LORD, unto Thy resting-place; Thou, and the ark of Thy strength.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כֹּהֲנֶיךָ יִלְבְּשׁוּ־צֶדֶק וַחֲסִידֶיךָ יְרַנֵּנוּ׃
englishText: Let Thy priests be clothed with righteousness; And let Thy saints shout for joy.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בַּעֲבוּר דָּוִד עַבְדֶּךָ אַל־תָּשֵׁב פְּנֵי מְשִׁיחֶךָ׃
englishText: For Thy servant David's sake Turn not away the face of Thine anointed.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נִשְׁבַּע־יְהוָה לְדָוִד אֱמֶת לֹא־יָשׁוּב מִמֶּנָּה מִפְּרִי בִטְנְךָ אָשִׁית לְכִסֵּא־לָךְ׃
englishText: The LORD swore unto David in truth; He will not turn back from it: 'Of the fruit of thy body will I set upon thy throne.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־יִשְׁמְרוּ בָנֶיךָ בְּרִיתִי וְעֵדֹתִי זוֹ אֲלַמְּדֵם גַּם־בְּנֵיהֶם עֲדֵי־עַד יֵשְׁבוּ לְכִסֵּא־לָךְ׃
englishText: If thy children keep My covenant And My testimony that I shall teach them, Their children also for ever shall sit upon thy throne.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־בָחַר יְהוָה בְּצִיּוֹן אִוָּהּ לְמוֹשָׁב לוֹ׃
englishText: For the LORD hath chosen Zion; He hath desired it for His habitation:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זֹאת־מְנוּחָתִי עֲדֵי־עַד פֹּה־אֵשֵׁב כִּי אִוִּתִיהָ׃
englishText: 'This is My resting-place for ever; Here will I dwell; for I have desired it.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: צֵידָהּ בָּרֵךְ אֲבָרֵךְ אֶבְיוֹנֶיהָ אַשְׂבִּיעַ לָחֶם׃
englishText: I will abundantly bless her provision; I will give her needy bread in plenty.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְכֹהֲנֶיהָ אַלְבִּישׁ יֶשַׁע וַחֲסִידֶיהָ רַנֵּן יְרַנֵּנוּ׃
englishText: Her priests also will I clothe with salvation; And her saints shall shout aloud for joy.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׁם אַצְמִיחַ קֶרֶן לְדָוִד עָרַכְתִּי נֵר לִמְשִׁיחִי׃
englishText: There will I make a horn to shoot up unto David, There have I ordered a lamp for Mine anointed.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אוֹיְבָיו אַלְבִּישׁ בֹּשֶׁת וְעָלָיו יָצִיץ נִזְרוֹ׃
englishText: His enemies will I clothe with shame; But upon himself shall his crown shine.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׁיר הַמַּעֲלוֹת לְדָוִד הִנֵּה מַה־טּוֹב וּמַה־נָּעִים שֶׁבֶת אַחִים גַּם־יָחַד׃
englishText: A Song of Ascents; of David. Behold, how good and how pleasant it is For brethren to dwell together in unity!
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כַּשֶּׁמֶן הַטּוֹב עַל־הָרֹאשׁ יֹרֵד עַל־הַזָּקָן זְקַן־אַהֲרֹן שֶׁיֹּרֵד עַל־פִּי מִדּוֹתָיו׃
englishText: It is like the precious oil upon the head, Coming down upon the beard; Even Aaron's beard, That cometh down upon the collar of his garments;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כְּטַל־חֶרְמוֹן שֶׁיֹּרֵד עַל־הַרְרֵי צִיּוֹן כִּי שָׁם צִוָּה יְהוָה אֶת־הַבְּרָכָה חַיִּים עַד־הָעוֹלָם׃
englishText: Like the dew of Hermon, That cometh down upon the mountains of Zion; For there the LORD commanded the blessing, Even life for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׁיר הַמַּעֲלוֹת הִנֵּה בָּרֲכוּ אֶת־יְהוָה כָּל־עַבְדֵי יְהוָה הָעֹמְדִים בְּבֵית־יְהוָה בַּלֵּילוֹת׃
englishText: A Song of Ascents. Behold, bless ye the LORD, all ye servants of the LORD, That stand in the house of the LORD in the night seasons.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שְׂאוּ־יְדֵכֶם קֹדֶשׁ וּבָרֲכוּ אֶת־יְהוָה׃
englishText: Lift up your hands to the sanctuary, And bless ye the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְבָרֶכְךָ יְהוָה מִצִּיּוֹן עֹשֵׂה שָׁמַיִם וָאָרֶץ׃
englishText: The LORD bless thee out of Zion; Even He that made heaven and earth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַלְלוּ יָהּ הַלְלוּ אֶת־שֵׁם יְהוָה הַלְלוּ עַבְדֵי יְהוָה׃
englishText: Hallelujah. Praise ye the name of the LORD; Give praise, O ye servants of the LORD,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שֶׁעֹמְדִים בְּבֵית יְהוָה בְּחַצְרוֹת בֵּית אֱלֹהֵינוּ׃
englishText: Ye that stand in the house of the LORD, In the courts of the house of our God.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַלְלוּ־יָהּ כִּי־טוֹב יְהוָה זַמְּרוּ לִשְׁמוֹ כִּי נָעִים׃
englishText: Praise ye the LORD, for the LORD is good; Sing praises unto His name, for it is pleasant.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־יַעֲקֹב בָּחַר לוֹ יָהּ יִשְׂרָאֵל לִסְגֻלָּתוֹ׃
englishText: For the LORD hath chosen Jacob unto Himself, And Israel for His own treasure.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי אֲנִי יָדַעְתִּי כִּי־גָדוֹל יְהוָה וַאֲדֹנֵינוּ מִכָּל־אֱלֹהִים׃
englishText: For I know that the LORD is great, And that our Lord is above all gods.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כֹּל אֲשֶׁר־חָפֵץ יְהוָה עָשָׂה בַּשָּׁמַיִם וּבָאָרֶץ בַּיַּמִּים וְכָל־תְּהוֹמוֹת׃
englishText: Whatsoever the LORD pleased, that hath He done, In heaven and in earth, in the seas and in all deeps;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַעֲלֶה נְשִׂאִים מִקְצֵה הָאָרֶץ בְּרָקִים לַמָּטָר עָשָׂה מוֹצֵא־רוּחַ מֵאוֹצְרוֹתָיו׃
englishText: Who causeth the vapours to ascend from the ends of the earth; He maketh lightnings for the rain; He bringeth forth the wind out of His treasuries.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שֶׁהִכָּה בְּכוֹרֵי מִצְרָיִם מֵאָדָם עַד־בְּהֵמָה׃
englishText: Who smote the first-born of Egypt, Both of man and beast.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׁלַח אֹתוֹת וּמֹפְתִים בְּתוֹכֵכִי מִצְרָיִם בְּפַרְעֹה וּבְכָל־עֲבָדָיו׃
englishText: He sent signs and wonders into the midst of thee, O Egypt, Upon Pharaoh, and upon all his servants.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שֶׁהִכָּה גּוֹיִם רַבִּים וְהָרַג מְלָכִים עֲצוּמִים׃
englishText: Who smote many nations, And slew mighty kings:
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְסִיחוֹן מֶלֶךְ הָאֱמֹרִי וּלְעוֹג מֶלֶךְ הַבָּשָׁן וּלְכֹל מַמְלְכוֹת כְּנָעַן׃
englishText: Sihon king of the Amorites, And Og king of Bashan, And all the kingdoms of Canaan;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְנָתַן אַרְצָם נַחֲלָה נַחֲלָה לְיִשְׂרָאֵל עַמּוֹ׃
englishText: And gave their land for a heritage, A heritage unto Israel His people.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה שִׁמְךָ לְעוֹלָם יְהוָה זִכְרְךָ לְדֹר־וָדֹר׃
englishText: O LORD, Thy name endureth for ever; Thy memorial, O LORD, throughout all generations.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־יָדִין יְהוָה עַמּוֹ וְעַל־עֲבָדָיו יִתְנֶחָם׃
englishText: For the LORD will judge His people, And repent Himself for His servants.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֲצַבֵּי הַגּוֹיִם כֶּסֶף וְזָהָב מַעֲשֵׂה יְדֵי אָדָם׃
englishText: The idols of the nations are silver and gold, The work of men's hands.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פֶּה־לָהֶם וְלֹא יְדַבֵּרוּ עֵינַיִם לָהֶם וְלֹא יִרְאוּ׃
englishText: They have mouths, but they speak not; Eyes have they, but they see not;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָזְנַיִם לָהֶם וְלֹא יַאֲזִינוּ אַף אֵין־יֶשׁ־רוּחַ בְּפִיהֶם׃
englishText: They have ears, but they hear not; Neither is there any breath in their mouths.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כְּמוֹהֶם יִהְיוּ עֹשֵׂיהֶם כֹּל אֲשֶׁר־בֹּטֵחַ בָּהֶם׃
englishText: They that make them shall be like unto them; Yea, every one that trusteth in them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בֵּית יִשְׂרָאֵל בָּרֲכוּ אֶת־יְהוָה בֵּית אַהֲרֹן בָּרֲכוּ אֶת־יְהוָה׃
englishText: O house of Israel, bless ye the LORD; O house of Aaron, bless ye the LORD;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בֵּית הַלֵּוִי בָּרֲכוּ אֶת־יְהוָה יִרְאֵי יְהוָה בָּרֲכוּ אֶת־יְהוָה׃
englishText: O house of Levi, bless ye the LORD; Ye that fear the LORD, bless ye the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בָּרוּךְ יְהוָה מִצִּיּוֹן שֹׁכֵן יְרוּשָׁלִָם הַלְלוּ־יָהּ׃
englishText: Blessed be the LORD out of Zion, Who dwelleth at Jerusalem. Hallelujah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הוֹדוּ לַיהוָה כִּי־טוֹב כִּי לְעוֹלָם חַסְדּוֹ׃
englishText: O give thanks unto the LORD, for He is good, For His mercy endureth for ever. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הוֹדוּ לֵאלֹהֵי הָאֱלֹהִים כִּי לְעוֹלָם חַסְדּוֹ׃
englishText: O give thanks unto the God of gods, For His mercy endureth for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הוֹדוּ לַאֲדֹנֵי הָאֲדֹנִים כִּי לְעֹלָם חַסְדּוֹ׃
englishText: O give thanks unto the Lord of lords, For His mercy endureth for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְעֹשֵׂה נִפְלָאוֹת גְּדֹלוֹת לְבַדּוֹ כִּי לְעוֹלָם חַסְדּוֹ׃
englishText: To Him who alone doeth great wonders, For His mercy endureth for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְעֹשֵׂה הַשָּׁמַיִם בִּתְבוּנָה כִּי לְעוֹלָם חַסְדּוֹ׃
englishText: To Him that by understanding made the heavens, for His mercy endureth for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְרֹקַע הָאָרֶץ עַל־הַמָּיִם כִּי לְעוֹלָם חַסְדּוֹ׃
englishText: To Him that spread forth the earth above the waters, For His mercy endureth for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְעֹשֵׂה אוֹרִים גְּדֹלִים כִּי לְעוֹלָם חַסְדּוֹ׃
englishText: To Him that made great lights, For His mercy endureth for ever;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֶת־הַשֶּׁמֶשׁ לְמֶמְשֶׁלֶת בַּיּוֹם כִּי לְעוֹלָם חַסְדּוֹ׃
englishText: The sun to rule by day, For His mercy endureth for ever;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֶת־הַיָּרֵחַ וְכוֹכָבִים לְמֶמְשְׁלוֹת בַּלָּיְלָה כִּי לְעוֹלָם חַסְדּוֹ׃
englishText: The moon and stars to rule by night, For His mercy endureth for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְמַכֵּה מִצְרַיִם בִּבְכוֹרֵיהֶם כִּי לְעוֹלָם חַסְדּוֹ׃
englishText: To Him that smote Egypt in their first-born, For His mercy endureth for ever;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיּוֹצֵא יִשְׂרָאֵל מִתּוֹכָם כִּי לְעוֹלָם חַסְדּוֹ׃
englishText: And brought out Israel from among them, For His mercy endureth for ever;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּיָד חֲזָקָה וּבִזְרוֹעַ נְטוּיָה כִּי לְעוֹלָם חַסְדּוֹ׃
englishText: With a strong hand, and with an outstretched arm, For His mercy endureth for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְגֹזֵר יַם־סוּף לִגְזָרִים כִּי לְעוֹלָם חַסְדּוֹ׃
englishText: To Him who divided the Red Sea in sunder, For His mercy endureth for ever;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְהֶעֱבִיר יִשְׂרָאֵל בְּתוֹכוֹ כִּי לְעוֹלָם חַסְדּוֹ׃
englishText: And made Israel to pass through the midst of it, For His mercy endureth for ever;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְנִעֵר פַּרְעֹה וְחֵילוֹ בְיַם־סוּף כִּי לְעוֹלָם חַסְדּוֹ׃
englishText: But overthrew Pharaoh and his host in the Red Sea, For His mercy endureth for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְמוֹלִיךְ עַמּוֹ בַּמִּדְבָּר כִּי לְעוֹלָם חַסְדּוֹ׃
englishText: To Him that led His people through the wilderness, For His mercy endureth for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְמַכֵּה מְלָכִים גְּדֹלִים כִּי לְעוֹלָם חַסְדּוֹ׃
englishText: To Him that smote great kings; For His mercy endureth for ever;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּהֲרֹג מְלָכִים אַדִּירִים כִּי לְעוֹלָם חַסְדּוֹ׃
englishText: And slew mighty kings, For His mercy endureth for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְסִיחוֹן מֶלֶךְ הָאֱמֹרִי כִּי לְעוֹלָם חַסְדּוֹ׃
englishText: Sihon king of the Amorites, For His mercy endureth for ever;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּלְעוֹג מֶלֶךְ הַבָּשָׁן כִּי לְעוֹלָם חַסְדּוֹ׃
englishText: And Og king of Bashan, For His mercy endureth for ever;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְנָתַן אַרְצָם לְנַחֲלָה כִּי לְעוֹלָם חַסְדּוֹ׃
englishText: And gave their land for a heritage, For His mercy endureth for ever;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נַחֲלָה לְיִשְׂרָאֵל עַבְדּוֹ כִּי לְעוֹלָם חַסְדּוֹ׃
englishText: Even a heritage unto Israel His servant, For His mercy endureth for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שֶׁבְּשִׁפְלֵנוּ זָכַר לָנוּ כִּי לְעוֹלָם חַסְדּוֹ׃
englishText: Who remembered us in our low estate, For His mercy endureth for ever;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיִּפְרְקֵנוּ מִצָּרֵינוּ כִּי לְעוֹלָם חַסְדּוֹ׃
englishText: And hath delivered us from our adversaries, For His mercy endureth for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נֹתֵן לֶחֶם לְכָל־בָּשָׂר כִּי לְעוֹלָם חַסְדּוֹ׃
englishText: Who giveth food to all flesh, For His mercy endureth for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הוֹדוּ לְאֵל הַשָּׁמָיִם כִּי לְעוֹלָם חַסְדּוֹ׃
englishText: O give thanks unto the God of heaven, For His mercy endureth for ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַל נַהֲרוֹת בָּבֶל שָׁם יָשַׁבְנוּ גַּם־בָּכִינוּ בְּזָכְרֵנוּ אֶת־צִיּוֹן׃
englishText: By the rivers of Babylon, There we sat down, yea, we wept, When we remembered Zion.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עַל־עֲרָבִים בְּתוֹכָהּ תָּלִינוּ כִּנֹּרוֹתֵינוּ׃
englishText: Upon the willows in the midst thereof We hanged up our harps.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי שָׁם שְׁאֵלוּנוּ שׁוֹבֵינוּ דִּבְרֵי־שִׁיר וְתוֹלָלֵינוּ שִׂמְחָה שִׁירוּ לָנוּ מִשִּׁיר צִיּוֹן׃
englishText: For there they that led us captive asked of us words of song, And our tormentors asked of us mirth: ‘Sing us one of the songs of Zion.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֵיךְ נָשִׁיר אֶת־שִׁיר־יְהוָה עַל אַדְמַת נֵכָר׃
englishText: How shall we sing the LORD’S song In a foreign land?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־אֶשְׁכָּחֵךְ יְרוּשָׁלִָם תִּשְׁכַּח יְמִינִי׃
englishText: If I forget thee, O Jerusalem, Let my right hand forget her cunning.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תִּדְבַּק־לְשׁוֹנִי לְחִכִּי אִם־לֹא אֶזְכְּרֵכִי אִם־לֹא אַעֲלֶה אֶת־יְרוּשָׁלִַם עַל רֹאשׁ שִׂמְחָתִי׃
englishText: Let my tongue cleave to the roof of my mouth, If I remember thee not; If I set not Jerusalem Above my chiefest joy.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זְכֹר יְהוָה לִבְנֵי אֱדוֹם אֵת יוֹם יְרוּשָׁלִָם הָאֹמְרִים עָרוּ עָרוּ עַד הַיְסוֹד בָּהּ׃
englishText: Remember, O LORD, against the children of Edom The day of Jerusalem; Who said: 'Rase it, rase it, Even to the foundation thereof.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בַּת־בָּבֶל הַשְּׁדוּדָה אַשְׁרֵי שֶׁיְשַׁלֶּם־לָךְ אֶת־גְּמוּלֵךְ שֶׁגָּמַלְתְּ לָנוּ׃
englishText: O daughter of Babylon, that art to be destroyed; Happy shall he be, that repayeth thee As thou hast served us.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַשְׁרֵי שֶׁיֹּאחֵז וְנִפֵּץ אֶת־עֹלָלַיִךְ אֶל־הַסָּלַע׃
englishText: Happy shall he be, that taketh and dasheth thy little ones Against the rock.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְדָוִד אוֹדְךָ בְכָל־לִבִּי נֶגֶד אֱלֹהִים אֲזַמְּרֶךָּ׃
englishText: [A Psalm] of David. I will give Thee thanks with my whole heart, In the presence of the mighty will I sing praises unto Thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֶשְׁתַּחֲוֶה אֶל־הֵיכַל קָדְשְׁךָ וְאוֹדֶה אֶת־שְׁמֶךָ עַל־חַסְדְּךָ וְעַל־אֲמִתֶּךָ כִּי־הִגְדַּלְתָּ עַל־כָּל־שִׁמְךָ אִמְרָתֶךָ׃
englishText: I will bow down toward Thy holy temple, And give thanks unto Thy name for Thy mercy and for Thy truth; For Thou hast magnified Thy word above all Thy name.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּיוֹם קָרָאתִי וַתַּעֲנֵנִי תַּרְהִבֵנִי בְנַפְשִׁי עֹז׃
englishText: In the day that I called, Thou didst answer me; Thou didst encourage me in my soul with strength.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יוֹדוּךָ יְהוָה כָּל־מַלְכֵי־אָרֶץ כִּי שָׁמְעוּ אִמְרֵי־פִיךָ׃
englishText: All the kings of the earth shall give Thee thanks, O LORD, For they have heard the words of Thy mouth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְיָשִׁירוּ בְּדַרְכֵי יְהוָה כִּי גָדוֹל כְּבוֹד יְהוָה׃
englishText: Yea, they shall sing of the ways of the LORD; For great is the glory of the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־רָם יְהוָה וְשָׁפָל יִרְאֶה וְגָבֹהַּ מִמֶּרְחָק יְיֵדָע׃
englishText: For though the LORD be high, yet regardeth He the lowly, And the haughty He knoweth from afar.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־אֵלֵךְ בְּקֶרֶב צָרָה תְּחַיֵּנִי עַל אַף אֹיְבַי תִּשְׁלַח יָדֶךָ וְתוֹשִׁיעֵנִי יְמִינֶךָ׃
englishText: Though I walk in the midst of trouble, Thou quickenest me; Thou stretchest forth Thy hand against the wrath of mine enemies, And Thy right hand doth save me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה יִגְמֹר בַּעֲדִי יְהוָה חַסְדְּךָ לְעוֹלָם מַעֲשֵׂי יָדֶיךָ אַל־תֶּרֶף׃
englishText: The LORD will accomplish that which concerneth me; Thy mercy, O LORD, endureth for ever; Forsake not the work of Thine own hands.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ לְדָוִד מִזְמוֹר יְהוָה חֲקַרְתַּנִי וַתֵּדָע׃
englishText: For the Leader. A Psalm of David. O LORD, Thou hast searched me, and known me. .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַתָּה יָדַעְתָּ שִׁבְתִּי וְקוּמִי בַּנְתָּה לְרֵעִי מֵרָחוֹק׃
englishText: Thou knowest my downsitting and mine uprising, Thou understandest my thought afar off.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָרְחִי וְרִבְעִי זֵרִיתָ וְכָל־דְּרָכַי הִסְכַּנְתָּה׃
englishText: Thou measurest my going about and my lying down, And art acquainted with all my ways.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי אֵין מִלָּה בִּלְשׁוֹנִי הֵן יְהוָה יָדַעְתָּ כֻלָּהּ׃
englishText: For there is not a word in my tongue, But, lo, O LORD, Thou knowest it altogether.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָחוֹר וָקֶדֶם צַרְתָּנִי וַתָּשֶׁת עָלַי כַּפֶּכָה׃
englishText: Thou hast hemmed me in behind and before, And laid Thy hand upon me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פלאיה [פְּלִיאָה] דַעַת מִמֶּנִּי נִשְׂגְּבָה לֹא־אוּכַל לָהּ׃
englishText: Such knowledge is too wonderful for me; Too high, I cannot attain unto it.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָנָה אֵלֵךְ מֵרוּחֶךָ וְאָנָה מִפָּנֶיךָ אֶבְרָח׃
englishText: Whither shall I go from Thy spirit? Or whither shall I flee from Thy presence?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־אֶסַּק שָׁמַיִם שָׁם אָתָּה וְאַצִּיעָה שְּׁאוֹל הִנֶּךָּ׃
englishText: If I ascend up into heaven, Thou art there; If I make my bed in the nether-world, behold, Thou art there.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֶשָּׂא כַנְפֵי־שָׁחַר אֶשְׁכְּנָה בְּאַחֲרִית יָם׃
englishText: If I take the wings of the morning, And dwell in the uttermost parts of the sea;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גַּם־שָׁם יָדְךָ תַנְחֵנִי וְתֹאחֲזֵנִי יְמִינֶךָ׃
englishText: Even there would Thy hand lead me, And Thy right hand would hold me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וָאֹמַר אַךְ־חֹשֶׁךְ יְשׁוּפֵנִי וְלַיְלָה אוֹר בַּעֲדֵנִי׃
englishText: And if I say: ‘Surely the darkness shall envelop me, And the light about me shall be night';
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גַּם־חֹשֶׁךְ לֹא־יַחְשִׁיךְ מִמֶּךָ וְלַיְלָה כַּיּוֹם יָאִיר כַּחֲשֵׁיכָה כָּאוֹרָה׃
englishText: Even the darkness is not too dark for Thee, But the night shineth as the day; The darkness is even as the light.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־אַתָּה קָנִיתָ כִלְיֹתָי תְּסֻכֵּנִי בְּבֶטֶן אִמִּי׃
englishText: For Thou hast made my reins; Thou hast knit me together in my mother's womb.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אוֹדְךָ עַל כִּי נוֹרָאוֹת נִפְלֵיתִי נִפְלָאִים מַעֲשֶׂיךָ וְנַפְשִׁי יֹדַעַת מְאֹד׃
englishText: I will give thanks unto Thee, for I am fearfully and wonderfully made; Wonderful are Thy works; and that my soul knoweth right well.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא־נִכְחַד עָצְמִי מִמֶּךָּ אֲשֶׁר־עֻשֵּׂיתִי בַסֵּתֶר רֻקַּמְתִּי בְּתַחְתִּיּוֹת אָרֶץ׃
englishText: My frame was not hidden from Thee, When I was made in secret, And curiously wrought in the lowest parts of the earth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גָּלְמִי רָאוּ עֵינֶיךָ וְעַל־סִפְרְךָ כֻּלָּם יִכָּתֵבוּ יָמִים יֻצָּרוּ ולא [וְלוֹ] אֶחָד בָּהֶם׃
englishText: Thine eyes did see mine unformed substance, And in Thy book they were all written— Even the days that were fashioned, When as yet there was none of them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְלִי מַה־יָּקְרוּ רֵעֶיךָ אֵל מֶה עָצְמוּ רָאשֵׁיהֶם׃
englishText: How weighty also are Thy thoughts unto me, O God! How great is the sum of them!
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֶסְפְּרֵם מֵחוֹל יִרְבּוּן הֱקִיצֹתִי וְעוֹדִי עִמָּךְ׃
englishText: If I would count them, they are more in number than the sand; Were I to come to the end of them, I would still be with Thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִם־תִּקְטֹל אֱלוֹהַּ רָשָׁע וְאַנְשֵׁי דָמִים סוּרוּ מֶנִּי׃
englishText: If Thou but wouldest slay the wicked, O God— Depart from me therefore, ye men of blood;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲשֶׁר יֹאמְרֻךָ לִמְזִמָּה נָשֻׂא לַשָּׁוְא עָרֶיךָ׃
englishText: Who utter Thy name with wicked thought, They take it for falsehood, even Thine enemies— .
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲלוֹא־מְשַׂנְאֶיךָ יְהוָה אֶשְׂנָא וּבִתְקוֹמְמֶיךָ אֶתְקוֹטָט׃
englishText: Do not I hate them, O LORD, that hate Thee? And do not I strive with those that rise up against Thee?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תַּכְלִית שִׂנְאָה שְׂנֵאתִים לְאוֹיְבִים הָיוּ לִי׃
englishText: I hate them with utmost hatred; I count them mine enemies.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חָקְרֵנִי אֵל וְדַע לְבָבִי בְּחָנֵנִי וְדַע שַׂרְעַפָּי׃
englishText: Search me, O God, and know my heart, Try me, and know my thoughts;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּרְאֵה אִם־דֶּרֶךְ־עֹצֶב בִּי וּנְחֵנִי בְּדֶרֶךְ עוֹלָם׃
englishText: And see if there be any way in me that is grievous, And lead me in the way everlasting.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְנַצֵּחַ מִזְמוֹר לְדָוִד׃
englishText: For the Leader. A Psalm of David.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חַלְּצֵנִי יְהוָה מֵאָדָם רָע מֵאִישׁ חֲמָסִים תִּנְצְרֵנִי׃
englishText: Deliver me, O LORD, from the evil man; Preserve me from the violent man;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲשֶׁר חָשְׁבוּ רָעוֹת בְּלֵב כָּל־יוֹם יָגוּרוּ מִלְחָמוֹת׃
englishText: Who devise evil things in their heart; Every day do they stir up wars.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׁנֲנוּ לְשׁוֹנָם כְּמוֹ־נָחָשׁ חֲמַת עַכְשׁוּב תַּחַת שְׂפָתֵימוֹ סֶלָה׃
englishText: They have sharpened their tongue like a serpent; Vipers' venom is under their lips. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׁמְרֵנִי יְהוָה מִידֵי רָשָׁע מֵאִישׁ חֲמָסִים תִּנְצְרֵנִי אֲשֶׁר חָשְׁבוּ לִדְחוֹת פְּעָמָי׃
englishText: Keep me, O LORD, from the hands of the wicked; Preserve me from the violent man; Who have purposed to make my steps slip.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: טָמְנוּ־גֵאִים פַּח לִי וַחֲבָלִים פָּרְשׂוּ רֶשֶׁת לְיַד־מַעְגָּל מֹקְשִׁים שָׁתוּ־לִי סֶלָה׃
englishText: The proud have hid a snare for me, and cords; They have spread a net by the wayside; They have set gins for me. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָמַרְתִּי לַיהוָה אֵלִי אָתָּה הַאֲזִינָה יְהוָה קוֹל תַּחֲנוּנָי׃
englishText: I have said unto the LORD: 'Thou art my God'; Give ear, O LORD, unto the voice of my supplications.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהֹוִה אֲדֹנָי עֹז יְשׁוּעָתִי סַכֹּתָה לְרֹאשִׁי בְּיוֹם נָשֶׁק׃
englishText: O GOD the Lord, the strength of my salvation, Who hast screened my head in the day of battle,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תִּתֵּן יְהוָה מַאֲוַיֵּי רָשָׁע זְמָמוֹ אַל־תָּפֵק יָרוּמוּ סֶלָה׃
englishText: Grant not, O LORD, the desires of the wicked; Further not his evil device, so that they exalt themselves. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רֹאשׁ מְסִבָּי עֲמַל שְׂפָתֵימוֹ יכסומו [יְכַסֵּמוֹ׃]
englishText: As for the head of those that compass me about, Let the mischief of their own lips cover them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: ימיטו [יִמּוֹטוּ] עֲלֵיהֶם גֶּחָלִים בָּאֵשׁ יַפִּלֵם בְּמַהֲמֹרוֹת בַּל־יָקוּמוּ׃
englishText: Let burning coals fall upon them; Let them be cast into the fire, Into deep pits, that they rise not up again.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אִישׁ לָשׁוֹן בַּל־יִכּוֹן בָּאָרֶץ אִישׁ־חָמָס רָע יְצוּדֶנּוּ לְמַדְחֵפֹת׃
englishText: A slanderer shall not be established in the earth; The violent and evil man shall be hunted with thrust upon thrust.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: ידעת [יָדַעְתִּי] כִּי־יַעֲשֶׂה יְהוָה דִּין עָנִי מִשְׁפַּט אֶבְיֹנִים׃
englishText: I know that the LORD will maintain the cause of the poor, And the right of the needy.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַךְ צַדִּיקִים יוֹדוּ לִשְׁמֶךָ יֵשְׁבוּ יְשָׁרִים אֶת־פָּנֶיךָ׃
englishText: Surely the righteous shall give thanks unto Thy name; The upright shall dwell in Thy presence.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִזְמוֹר לְדָוִד יְהוָה קְרָאתִיךָ חוּשָׁה לִּי הַאֲזִינָה קוֹלִי בְּקָרְאִי־לָךְ׃
englishText: A Psalm of David. LORD, I have called Thee; make haste unto me; Give ear unto my voice, when I call unto Thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תִּכּוֹן תְּפִלָּתִי קְטֹרֶת לְפָנֶיךָ מַשְׂאַת כַּפַּי מִנְחַת־עָרֶב׃
englishText: Let my prayer be set forth as incense before Thee, The lifting up of my hands as the evening sacrifice.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שִׁיתָה יְהוָה שָׁמְרָה לְפִי נִצְּרָה עַל־דַּל שְׂפָתָי׃
englishText: Set a guard, O LORD, to my mouth; Keep watch at the door of my lips.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תַּט־לִבִּי לְדָבָר רָע לְהִתְעוֹלֵל עֲלִלוֹת בְּרֶשַׁע אֶת־אִישִׁים פֹּעֲלֵי־אָוֶן וּבַל־אֶלְחַם בְּמַנְעַמֵּיהֶם׃
englishText: Incline not my heart to any evil thing, To be occupied in deeds of wickedness With men that work iniquity; And let me not eat of their dainties.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יֶהֶלְמֵנִי־צַדִּיק חֶסֶד וְיוֹכִיחֵנִי שֶׁמֶן רֹאשׁ אַל־יָנִי רֹאשִׁי כִּי־עוֹד וּתְפִלָּתִי בְּרָעוֹתֵיהֶם׃
englishText: Let the righteous smite me in kindness, and correct me; Oil so choice let not my head refuse; For still is my prayer because of their wickedness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נִשְׁמְטוּ בִידֵי־סֶלַע שֹׁפְטֵיהֶם וְשָׁמְעוּ אֲמָרַי כִּי נָעֵמוּ׃
englishText: Their judges are thrown down by the sides of the rock; And they shall hear my words, that they are sweet.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כְּמוֹ פֹלֵחַ וּבֹקֵעַ בָּאָרֶץ נִפְזְרוּ עֲצָמֵינוּ לְפִי שְׁאוֹל׃
englishText: As when one cleaveth and breaketh up the earth, Our bones are scattered at the grave's mouth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי אֵלֶיךָ יְהֹוִה אֲדֹנָי עֵינָי בְּכָה חָסִיתִי אַל־תְּעַר נַפְשִׁי׃
englishText: For mine eyes are unto Thee, O GOD the Lord; In Thee have I taken refuge, O pour not out my soul.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שָׁמְרֵנִי מִידֵי פַח יָקְשׁוּ לִי וּמֹקְשׁוֹת פֹּעֲלֵי אָוֶן׃
englishText: Keep me from the snare which they have laid for me, And from the gins of the workers of iniquity.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִפְּלוּ בְמַכְמֹרָיו רְשָׁעִים יַחַד אָנֹכִי עַד־אֶעֱבוֹר׃
englishText: Let the wicked fall into their own nets, Whilst I withal escape.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַשְׂכִּיל לְדָוִד בִּהְיוֹתוֹ בַמְּעָרָה תְפִלָּה׃
englishText: Maschil of David, when he was in the cave; a Prayer.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קוֹלִי אֶל־יְהוָה אֶזְעָק קוֹלִי אֶל־יְהוָה אֶתְחַנָּן׃
englishText: With my voice I cry unto the LORD; With my voice I make supplication unto the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֶשְׁפֹּךְ לְפָנָיו שִׂיחִי צָרָתִי לְפָנָיו אַגִּיד׃
englishText: I pour out my complaint before Him, I declare before Him my trouble;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּהִתְעַטֵּף עָלַי רוּחִי וְאַתָּה יָדַעְתָּ נְתִיבָתִי בְּאֹרַח־זוּ אֲהַלֵּךְ טָמְנוּ פַח לִי׃
englishText: When my spirit fainteth within me— Thou knowest my path— In the way wherein I walk Have they hidden a snare for me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַבֵּיט יָמִין וּרְאֵה וְאֵין־לִי מַכִּיר אָבַד מָנוֹס מִמֶּנִּי אֵין דּוֹרֵשׁ לְנַפְשִׁי׃
englishText: Look on my right hand, and see, For there is no man that knoweth me; I have no way to flee; No man careth for my soul.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זָעַקְתִּי אֵלֶיךָ יְהוָה אָמַרְתִּי אַתָּה מַחְסִי חֶלְקִי בְּאֶרֶץ הַחַיִּים׃
englishText: I have cried unto Thee, O LORD; I have said: 'Thou art my refuge, My portion in the land of the living.'
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַקְשִׁיבָה אֶל־רִנָּתִי כִּי־דַלּוֹתִי מְאֹד הַצִּילֵנִי מֵרֹדְפַי כִּי אָמְצוּ מִמֶּנִּי׃
englishText: Attend unto my cry; For I am brought very low; Deliver me from my persecutors; For they are too strong for me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הוֹצִיאָה מִמַּסְגֵּר נַפְשִׁי לְהוֹדוֹת אֶת־שְׁמֶךָ בִּי יַכְתִּרוּ צַדִּיקִים כִּי תִגְמֹל עָלָי׃
englishText: Bring my soul out of prison, That I may give thanks unto Thy name; The righteous shall crown themselves because of me; For Thou wilt deal bountifully with me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מִזְמוֹר לְדָוִד יְהוָה שְׁמַע תְּפִלָּתִי הַאֲזִינָה אֶל־תַּחֲנוּנַי בֶּאֱמֻנָתְךָ עֲנֵנִי בְּצִדְקָתֶךָ׃
englishText: A Psalm of David. O LORD, hear my prayer, give ear to my supplications; In Thy faithfulness answer me, and in Thy righteousness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וְאַל־תָּבוֹא בְמִשְׁפָּט אֶת־עַבְדֶּךָ כִּי לֹא־יִצְדַּק לְפָנֶיךָ כָל־חָי׃
englishText: And enter not into judgment with Thy servant; For in Thy sight shall no man living be justified.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי רָדַף אוֹיֵב נַפְשִׁי דִּכָּא לָאָרֶץ חַיָּתִי הוֹשִׁיבַנִי בְמַחֲשַׁכִּים כְּמֵתֵי עוֹלָם׃
englishText: For the enemy hath persecuted my soul; He hath crushed my life down to the ground; He hath made me to dwell in darkness, as those that have been long dead.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַתִּתְעַטֵּף עָלַי רוּחִי בְּתוֹכִי יִשְׁתּוֹמֵם לִבִּי׃
englishText: And my spirit fainteth within me; My heart within me is appalled.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זָכַרְתִּי יָמִים מִקֶּדֶם הָגִיתִי בְכָל־פָּעֳלֶךָ בְּמַעֲשֵׂה יָדֶיךָ אֲשׂוֹחֵחַ׃
englishText: I remember the days of old; I meditate on all Thy doing; I muse on the work of Thy hands.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פֵּרַשְׂתִּי יָדַי אֵלֶיךָ נַפְשִׁי כְּאֶרֶץ־עֲיֵפָה לְךָ סֶלָה׃
englishText: I spread forth my hands unto Thee; My soul [thirsteth] after Thee, as a weary land. Selah
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַהֵר עֲנֵנִי יְהוָה כָּלְתָה רוּחִי אַל־תַּסְתֵּר פָּנֶיךָ מִמֶּנִּי וְנִמְשַׁלְתִּי עִם־יֹרְדֵי בוֹר׃
englishText: Answer me speedily, O LORD, My spirit faileth; Hide not Thy face from me; Lest I become like them that go down into the pit.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַשְׁמִיעֵנִי בַבֹּקֶר חַסְדֶּךָ כִּי־בְךָ בָטָחְתִּי הוֹדִיעֵנִי דֶּרֶךְ־זוּ אֵלֵךְ כִּי־אֵלֶיךָ נָשָׂאתִי נַפְשִׁי׃
englishText: Cause me to hear Thy lovingkindness in the morning, For in Thee do I trust; Cause me to know the way wherein I should walk, For unto Thee have I lifted up my soul.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַצִּילֵנִי מֵאֹיְבַי יְהוָה אֵלֶיךָ כִסִּתִי׃
englishText: Deliver me from mine enemies, O LORD; With Thee have I hidden myself.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַמְּדֵנִי לַעֲשׂוֹת רְצוֹנֶךָ כִּי־אַתָּה אֱלוֹהָי רוּחֲךָ טוֹבָה תַּנְחֵנִי בְּאֶרֶץ מִישׁוֹר׃
englishText: Teach me to do Thy will, For Thou art my God; Let Thy good spirit Lead me in an even land.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְמַעַן־שִׁמְךָ יְהוָה תְּחַיֵּנִי בְּצִדְקָתְךָ תוֹצִיא מִצָּרָה נַפְשִׁי׃
englishText: For Thy name's sake, O LORD, quicken me; In Thy righteousness bring my soul out of trouble.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וּבְחַסְדְּךָ תַּצְמִית אֹיְבָי וְהַאֲבַדְתָּ כָּל־צֹרֲרֵי נַפְשִׁי כִּי אֲנִי עַבְדֶּךָ׃
englishText: And in Thy mercy cut off mine enemies, And destroy all them that harass my soul; For I am Thy servant.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְדָוִד בָּרוּךְ יְהוָה צוּרִי הַמְלַמֵּד יָדַי לַקְרָב אֶצְבְּעוֹתַי לַמִּלְחָמָה׃
englishText: [A Psalm] of David. Blessed be the LORD my Rock, Who traineth my hands for war, And my fingers for battle;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חַסְדִּי וּמְצוּדָתִי מִשְׂגַּבִּי וּמְפַלְטִי לִי מָגִנִּי וּבוֹ חָסִיתִי הָרוֹדֵד עַמִּי תַחְתָּי׃
englishText: My lovingkindness, and my fortress, My high tower, and my deliverer; My shield, and He in whom I take refuge; Who subdueth my people under me.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה מָה־אָדָם וַתֵּדָעֵהוּ בֶּן־אֱנוֹשׁ וַתְּחַשְּׁבֵהוּ׃
englishText: LORD, what is man, that Thou takest knowledge of him? Or the son of man, that Thou makest account of him?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אָדָם לַהֶבֶל דָּמָה יָמָיו כְּצֵל עוֹבֵר׃
englishText: Man is like unto a breath; His days are as a shadow that passeth away.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה הַט־שָׁמֶיךָ וְתֵרֵד גַּע בֶּהָרִים וְיֶעֱשָׁנוּ׃
englishText: O LORD, bow Thy heavens, and come down; Touch the mountains, that they may smoke.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּרוֹק בָּרָק וּתְפִיצֵם שְׁלַח חִצֶּיךָ וּתְהֻמֵּם׃
englishText: Cast forth lightning, and scatter them; Send out Thine arrows, and discomfit them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שְׁלַח יָדֶיךָ מִמָּרוֹם פְּצֵנִי וְהַצִּילֵנִי מִמַּיִם רַבִּים מִיַּד בְּנֵי נֵכָר׃
englishText: Stretch forth Thy hands from on high; Rescue me, and deliver me out of many waters, Out of the hand of strangers;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲשֶׁר פִּיהֶם דִּבֶּר־שָׁוְא וִימִינָם יְמִין שָׁקֶר׃
englishText: Whose mouth speaketh falsehood, And their right hand is a right hand of lying.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֱ‍לֹהִים שִׁיר חָדָשׁ אָשִׁירָה לָּךְ בְּנֵבֶל עָשׂוֹר אֲזַמְּרָה־לָּךְ׃
englishText: O God, I will sing a new song unto Thee, Upon a psaltery of ten strings will I sing praises unto Thee;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַנּוֹתֵן תְּשׁוּעָה לַמְּלָכִים הַפּוֹצֶה אֶת־דָּוִד עַבְדּוֹ מֵחֶרֶב רָעָה׃
englishText: Who givest salvation unto kings, Who rescuest David Thy servant from the hurtful sword.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פְּצֵנִי וְהַצִּילֵנִי מִיַּד בְּנֵי־נֵכָר אֲשֶׁר פִּיהֶם דִּבֶּר־שָׁוְא וִימִינָם יְמִין שָׁקֶר׃
englishText: Rescue me, and deliver me out of the hand of strangers, Whose mouth speaketh falsehood, And their right hand is a right hand of lying.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲשֶׁר בָּנֵינוּ כִּנְטִעִים מְגֻדָּלִים בִּנְעוּרֵיהֶם בְּנוֹתֵינוּ כְזָוִיֹּת מְחֻטָּבוֹת תַּבְנִית הֵיכָל׃
englishText: We whose sons are as plants grown up in their youth; Whose daughters are as corner-pillars carved after the fashion of a palace;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מְזָוֵינוּ מְלֵאִים מְפִיקִים מִזַּן אֶל־זַן צֹאונֵנוּ מַאֲלִיפוֹת מְרֻבָּבוֹת בְּחוּצוֹתֵינוּ׃
englishText: Whose garners are full, affording all manner of store; Whose sheep increase by thousands and ten thousands in our fields;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַלּוּפֵינוּ מְסֻבָּלִים אֵין־פֶּרֶץ וְאֵין יוֹצֵאת וְאֵין צְוָחָה בִּרְחֹבֹתֵינוּ׃
englishText: Whose oxen are well laden; With no breach, and no going forth, And no outcry in our broad places;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַשְׁרֵי הָעָם שֶׁכָּכָה לּוֹ אַשְׁרֵי הָעָם שֶׁיֲהוָה אֱלֹהָיו׃
englishText: Happy is the people that is in such a case. Yea, happy is the people whose God is the LORD.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תְּהִלָּה לְדָוִד אֲרוֹמִמְךָ אֱלוֹהַי הַמֶּלֶךְ וַאֲבָרֲכָה שִׁמְךָ לְעוֹלָם וָעֶד׃
englishText: [A Psalm of] praise; of David. I will extol Thee, my God, O King; And I will bless Thy name for ever and ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בְּכָל־יוֹם אֲבָרֲכֶךָּ וַאֲהַלְלָה שִׁמְךָ לְעוֹלָם וָעֶד׃
englishText: Every day will I bless Thee; And I will praise Thy name for ever and ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גָּדוֹל יְהוָה וּמְהֻלָּל מְאֹד וְלִגְדֻלָּתוֹ אֵין חֵקֶר׃
englishText: Great is the LORD, and highly to be praised; And His greatness is unsearchable.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: דּוֹר לְדוֹר יְשַׁבַּח מַעֲשֶׂיךָ וּגְבוּרֹתֶיךָ יַגִּידוּ׃
englishText: One generation shall laud Thy works to another, And shall declare Thy mighty acts.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֲדַר כְּבוֹד הוֹדֶךָ וְדִבְרֵי נִפְלְאוֹתֶיךָ אָשִׂיחָה׃
englishText: The glorious splendour of Thy majesty, And Thy wondrous works, will I rehearse.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וֶעֱזוּז נוֹרְאֹתֶיךָ יֹאמֵרוּ וגדולתיך [וּגְדוּלָּתְךָ] אֲסַפְּרֶנָּה׃
englishText: And men shall speak of the might of Thy tremendous acts; And I will tell of Thy greatness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: זֵכֶר רַב־טוּבְךָ יַבִּיעוּ וְצִדְקָתְךָ יְרַנֵּנוּ׃
englishText: They shall utter the fame of Thy great goodness, And shall sing of Thy righteousness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: חַנּוּן וְרַחוּם יְהוָה אֶרֶךְ אַפַּיִם וּגְדָל־חָסֶד׃
englishText: The LORD is gracious, and full of compassion; Slow to anger, and of great mercy.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: טוֹב־יְהוָה לַכֹּל וְרַחֲמָיו עַל־כָּל־מַעֲשָׂיו׃
englishText: The LORD is good to all; And His tender mercies are over all His works.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יוֹדוּךָ יְהוָה כָּל־מַעֲשֶׂיךָ וַחֲסִידֶיךָ יְבָרֲכוּכָה׃
englishText: All Thy works shall praise Thee, O LORD; And Thy saints shall bless Thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כְּבוֹד מַלְכוּתְךָ יֹאמֵרוּ וּגְבוּרָתְךָ יְדַבֵּרוּ׃
englishText: They shall speak of the glory of Thy kingdom, And talk of Thy might;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לְהוֹדִיעַ לִבְנֵי הָאָדָם גְּבוּרֹתָיו וּכְבוֹד הֲדַר מַלְכוּתוֹ׃
englishText: To make known to the sons of men His mighty acts, And the glory of the majesty of His kingdom.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַלְכוּתְךָ מַלְכוּת כָּל־עֹלָמִים וּמֶמְשֶׁלְתְּךָ בְּכָל־דּוֹר וָדוֹר׃
englishText: Thy kingdom is a kingdom for all ages, And Thy dominion endureth throughout all generations.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: סוֹמֵךְ יְהוָה לְכָל־הַנֹּפְלִים וְזוֹקֵף לְכָל־הַכְּפוּפִים׃
englishText: The LORD upholdeth all that fall, And raiseth up all those that are bowed down.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֵינֵי־כֹל אֵלֶיךָ יְשַׂבֵּרוּ וְאַתָּה נוֹתֵן־לָהֶם אֶת־אָכְלָם בְּעִתּוֹ׃
englishText: The eyes of all wait for Thee, And Thou givest them their food in due season.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: פּוֹתֵחַ אֶת־יָדֶךָ וּמַשְׂבִּיעַ לְכָל־חַי רָצוֹן׃
englishText: Thou openest Thy hand, And satisfiest every living thing with favour.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: צַדִּיק יְהוָה בְּכָל־דְּרָכָיו וְחָסִיד בְּכָל־מַעֲשָׂיו׃
englishText: The LORD is righteous in all His ways, And gracious in all His works.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: קָרוֹב יְהוָה לְכָל־קֹרְאָיו לְכֹל אֲשֶׁר יִקְרָאֻהוּ בֶאֱמֶת׃
englishText: The LORD is nigh unto all them that call upon Him, To all that call upon Him in truth.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רְצוֹן־יְרֵאָיו יַעֲשֶׂה וְאֶת־שַׁוְעָתָם יִשְׁמַע וְיוֹשִׁיעֵם׃
englishText: He will fulfil the desire of them that fear Him; He also will hear their cry, and will save them.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שׁוֹמֵר יְהוָה אֶת־כָּל־אֹהֲבָיו וְאֵת כָּל־הָרְשָׁעִים יַשְׁמִיד׃
englishText: The LORD preserveth all them that love Him; But all the wicked will He destroy.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תְּהִלַּת יְהוָה יְדַבֶּר־פִּי וִיבָרֵךְ כָּל־בָּשָׂר שֵׁם קָדְשׁוֹ לְעוֹלָם וָעֶד׃
englishText: My mouth shall speak the praise of the LORD; And let all flesh bless His holy name for ever and ever.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַלְלוּ־יָהּ הַלְלִי נַפְשִׁי אֶת־יְהוָה׃
englishText: Hallelujah. Praise the LORD, O my soul.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֲהַלְלָה יְהוָה בְּחַיָּי אֲזַמְּרָה לֵאלֹהַי בְּעוֹדִי׃
englishText: I will praise the LORD while I live; I will sing praises unto my God while I have my being.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַל־תִּבְטְחוּ בִנְדִיבִים בְּבֶן־אָדָם שֶׁאֵין לוֹ תְשׁוּעָה׃
englishText: Put not your trust in princes, Nor in the son of man, in whom there is no help.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: תֵּצֵא רוּחוֹ יָשֻׁב לְאַדְמָתוֹ בַּיּוֹם הַהוּא אָבְדוּ עֶשְׁתֹּנֹתָיו׃
englishText: His breath goeth forth, he returneth to his dust; In that very day his thoughts perish.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אַשְׁרֵי שֶׁאֵל יַעֲקֹב בְּעֶזְרוֹ שִׂבְרוֹ עַל־יְהוָה אֱלֹהָיו׃
englishText: Happy is he whose help is the God of Jacob, Whose hope is in the LORD his God,
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֹשֶׂה שָׁמַיִם וָאָרֶץ אֶת־הַיָּם וְאֶת־כָּל־אֲשֶׁר־בָּם הַשֹּׁמֵר אֱמֶת לְעוֹלָם׃
englishText: Who made heaven and earth, The sea, and all that in them is; Who keepeth truth for ever;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֹשֶׂה מִשְׁפָּט לָעֲשׁוּקִים נֹתֵן לֶחֶם לָרְעֵבִים יְהוָה מַתִּיר אֲסוּרִים׃
englishText: Who executeth justice for the oppressed; Who giveth bread to the hungry. The LORD looseth the prisoners;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה פֹּקֵחַ עִוְרִים יְהוָה זֹקֵף כְּפוּפִים יְהוָה אֹהֵב צַדִּיקִים׃
englishText: The LORD openeth the eyes of the blind; The LORD raiseth up them that are bowed down; The LORD loveth the righteous;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהוָה שֹׁמֵר אֶת־גֵּרִים יָתוֹם וְאַלְמָנָה יְעוֹדֵד וְדֶרֶךְ רְשָׁעִים יְעַוֵּת׃
englishText: The LORD preserveth the strangers; He upholdeth the fatherless and the widow; But the way of the wicked He maketh crooked.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִמְלֹךְ יְהוָה לְעוֹלָם אֱלֹהַיִךְ צִיּוֹן לְדֹר וָדֹר הַלְלוּ־יָהּ׃
englishText: The LORD will reign for ever, Thy God, O Zion, unto all generations. Hallelujah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַלְלוּ יָהּ כִּי־טוֹב זַמְּרָה אֱלֹהֵינוּ כִּי־נָעִים נָאוָה תְהִלָּה׃
englishText: Hallelujah; For it is good to sing praises unto our God; For it is pleasant, and praise is comely.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בּוֹנֵה יְרוּשָׁלִַם יְהוָה נִדְחֵי יִשְׂרָאֵל יְכַנֵּס׃
englishText: The LORD doth build up Jerusalem, He gathereth together the dispersed of Israel;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הָרֹפֵא לִשְׁבוּרֵי לֵב וּמְחַבֵּשׁ לְעַצְּבוֹתָם׃
englishText: Who healeth the broken in heart, And bindeth up their wounds.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מוֹנֶה מִסְפָּר לַכּוֹכָבִים לְכֻלָּם שֵׁמוֹת יִקְרָא׃
englishText: He counteth the number of the stars; He giveth them all their names.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: גָּדוֹל אֲדוֹנֵינוּ וְרַב־כֹּחַ לִתְבוּנָתוֹ אֵין מִסְפָּר׃
englishText: Great is our Lord, and mighty in power; His understanding is infinite.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מְעוֹדֵד עֲנָוִים יְהוָה מַשְׁפִּיל רְשָׁעִים עֲדֵי־אָרֶץ׃
englishText: The LORD upholdeth the humble; He bringeth the wicked down to the ground.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: עֱנוּ לַיהוָה בְּתוֹדָה זַמְּרוּ לֵאלֹהֵינוּ בְכִנּוֹר׃
englishText: Sing unto the LORD with thanksgiving, Sing praises upon the harp unto our God;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַמְכַסֶּה שָׁמַיִם בְּעָבִים הַמֵּכִין לָאָרֶץ מָטָר הַמַּצְמִיחַ הָרִים חָצִיר׃
englishText: Who covereth the heaven with clouds, Who prepareth rain for the earth, Who maketh the mountains to spring with grass.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: נוֹתֵן לִבְהֵמָה לַחְמָהּ לִבְנֵי עֹרֵב אֲשֶׁר יִקְרָאוּ׃
englishText: He giveth to the beast his food, And to the young ravens which cry.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא בִגְבוּרַת הַסּוּס יֶחְפָּץ לֹא־בְשׁוֹקֵי הָאִישׁ יִרְצֶה׃
englishText: He delighteth not in the strength of the horse; He taketh no pleasure in the legs of a man.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רוֹצֶה יְהוָה אֶת־יְרֵאָיו אֶת־הַמְיַחֲלִים לְחַסְדּוֹ׃
englishText: The LORD taketh pleasure in them that fear Him, In those that wait for His mercy.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: שַׁבְּחִי יְרוּשָׁלִַם אֶת־יְהוָה הַלְלִי אֱלֹהַיִךְ צִיּוֹן׃
englishText: Glorify the LORD, O Jerusalem; Praise thy God, O Zion.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־חִזַּק בְּרִיחֵי שְׁעָרָיִךְ בֵּרַךְ בָּנַיִךְ בְּקִרְבֵּךְ׃
englishText: For He hath made strong the bars of thy gates; He hath blessed thy children within thee.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַשָּׂם־גְּבוּלֵךְ שָׁלוֹם חֵלֶב חִטִּים יַשְׂבִּיעֵךְ׃
englishText: He maketh thy borders peace; He giveth thee in plenty the fat of wheat.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַשֹּׁלֵחַ אִמְרָתוֹ אָרֶץ עַד־מְהֵרָה יָרוּץ דְּבָרוֹ׃
englishText: He sendeth out His commandment upon earth; His word runneth very swiftly.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַנֹּתֵן שֶׁלֶג כַּצָּמֶר כְּפוֹר כָּאֵפֶר יְפַזֵּר׃
englishText: He giveth snow like wool; He scattereth the hoar-frost like ashes.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַשְׁלִיךְ קַרְחוֹ כְפִתִּים לִפְנֵי קָרָתוֹ מִי יַעֲמֹד׃
englishText: He casteth forth His ice like crumbs; Who can stand before His cold?
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִשְׁלַח דְּבָרוֹ וְיַמְסֵם יַשֵּׁב רוּחוֹ יִזְּלוּ־מָיִם׃
englishText: He sendeth forth His word, and melteth them; He causeth His wind to blow, and the waters flow.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַגִּיד דברו [דְּבָרָיו] לְיַעֲקֹב חֻקָּיו וּמִשְׁפָּטָיו לְיִשְׂרָאֵל׃
englishText: He declareth His word unto Jacob, His statutes and His ordinances unto Israel.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֹא עָשָׂה כֵן לְכָל־גּוֹי וּמִשְׁפָּטִים בַּל־יְדָעוּם הַלְלוּ־יָהּ׃
englishText: He hath not dealt so with any nation; And as for His ordinances, they have not known them. Hallelujah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַלְלוּ יָהּ הַלְלוּ אֶת־יְהוָה מִן־הַשָּׁמַיִם הַלְלוּהוּ בַּמְּרוֹמִים׃
englishText: Hallelujah. Praise ye the LORD from the heavens; Praise Him in the heights.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַלְלוּהוּ כָל־מַלְאָכָיו הַלְלוּהוּ כָּל־צבאו [צְבָאָיו׃]
englishText: Praise ye Him, all His angels; Praise ye Him, all His hosts.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַלְלוּהוּ שֶׁמֶשׁ וְיָרֵחַ הַלְלוּהוּ כָּל־כּוֹכְבֵי אוֹר׃
englishText: Praise ye Him, sun and moon; Praise Him, all ye stars of light.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַלְלוּהוּ שְׁמֵי הַשָּׁמָיִם וְהַמַּיִם אֲשֶׁר מֵעַל הַשָּׁמָיִם׃
englishText: Praise Him, ye heavens of heavens, And ye waters that are above the heavens.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהַלְלוּ אֶת־שֵׁם יְהוָה כִּי הוּא צִוָּה וְנִבְרָאוּ׃
englishText: Let them praise the name of the LORD; For He commanded, and they were created.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיַּעֲמִידֵם לָעַד לְעוֹלָם חָק־נָתַן וְלֹא יַעֲבוֹר׃
englishText: He hath also established them for ever and ever; He hath made a decree which shall not be transgressed.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַלְלוּ אֶת־יְהוָה מִן־הָאָרֶץ תַּנִּינִים וְכָל־תְּהֹמוֹת׃
englishText: Praise the LORD from the earth, Ye sea-monsters, and all deeps;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: אֵשׁ וּבָרָד שֶׁלֶג וְקִיטוֹר רוּחַ סְעָרָה עֹשָׂה דְבָרוֹ׃
englishText: Fire and hail, snow and vapour, Stormy wind, fulfilling His word;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הֶהָרִים וְכָל־גְּבָעוֹת עֵץ פְּרִי וְכָל־אֲרָזִים׃
englishText: Mountains and all hills, Fruitful trees and all cedars;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַחַיָּה וְכָל־בְּהֵמָה רֶמֶשׂ וְצִפּוֹר כָּנָף׃
englishText: Beasts and all cattle, Creeping things and winged fowl;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: מַלְכֵי־אֶרֶץ וְכָל־לְאֻמִּים שָׂרִים וְכָל־שֹׁפְטֵי אָרֶץ׃
englishText: Kings of the earth and all peoples, Princes and all judges of the earth;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: בַּחוּרִים וְגַם־בְּתוּלוֹת זְקֵנִים עִם־נְעָרִים׃
englishText: Both young men and maidens, Old men and children;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהַלְלוּ אֶת־שֵׁם יְהוָה כִּי־נִשְׂגָּב שְׁמוֹ לְבַדּוֹ הוֹדוֹ עַל־אֶרֶץ וְשָׁמָיִם׃
englishText: Let them praise the name of the LORD, For His name alone is exalted; His glory is above the earth and heaven.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: וַיָּרֶם קֶרֶן לְעַמּוֹ תְּהִלָּה לְכָל־חֲסִידָיו לִבְנֵי יִשְׂרָאֵל עַם־קְרֹבוֹ הַלְלוּ־יָהּ׃
englishText: And He hath lifted up a horn for His people, A praise for all His saints, Even for the children of Israel, a people near unto Him. Hallelujah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַלְלוּ יָהּ שִׁירוּ לַיהוָה שִׁיר חָדָשׁ תְּהִלָּתוֹ בִּקְהַל חֲסִידִים׃
englishText: Hallelujah. Sing unto the LORD a new song, And His praise in the assembly of the saints.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יִשְׂמַח יִשְׂרָאֵל בְּעֹשָׂיו בְּנֵי־צִיּוֹן יָגִילוּ בְמַלְכָּם׃
englishText: Let Israel rejoice in his Maker; Let the children of Zion be joyful in their King.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יְהַלְלוּ שְׁמוֹ בְמָחוֹל בְּתֹף וְכִנּוֹר יְזַמְּרוּ־לוֹ׃
englishText: Let them praise His name in the dance; Let them sing praises unto Him with the timbrel and harp.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כִּי־רוֹצֶה יְהוָה בְּעַמּוֹ יְפָאֵר עֲנָוִים בִּישׁוּעָה׃
englishText: For the LORD taketh pleasure in His people; He adorneth the humble with salvation.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: יַעְלְזוּ חֲסִידִים בְּכָבוֹד יְרַנְּנוּ עַל־מִשְׁכְּבוֹתָם׃
englishText: Let the saints exult in glory; Let them sing for joy upon their beds.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: רוֹמְמוֹת אֵל בִּגְרוֹנָם וְחֶרֶב פִּיפִיּוֹת בְּיָדָם׃
englishText: Let the high praises of God be in their mouth, And a two-edged sword in their hand;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַעֲשׂוֹת נְקָמָה בַּגּוֹיִם תּוֹכֵחֹת בַּל־אֻמִּים׃
englishText: To execute vengeance upon the nations, And chastisements upon the peoples;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לֶאְסֹר מַלְכֵיהֶם בְּזִקִּים וְנִכְבְּדֵיהֶם בְּכַבְלֵי בַרְזֶל׃
englishText: To bind their kings with chains, And their nobles with fetters of iron;
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: לַעֲשׂוֹת בָּהֶם מִשְׁפָּט כָּתוּב הָדָר הוּא לְכָל־חֲסִידָיו הַלְלוּ־יָהּ׃
englishText: To execute upon them the judgment written; He is the glory of all His saints. Hallelujah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַלְלוּ יָהּ הַלְלוּ־אֵל בְּקָדְשׁוֹ הַלְלוּהוּ בִּרְקִיעַ עֻזּוֹ׃
englishText: Hallelujah. Praise God in His sanctuary; Praise Him in the firmament of His power.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַלְלוּהוּ בִגְבוּרֹתָיו הַלְלוּהוּ כְּרֹב גֻּדְלוֹ׃
englishText: Praise Him for His mighty acts; Praise Him according to His abundant greatness.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַלְלוּהוּ בְּתֵקַע שׁוֹפָר הַלְלוּהוּ בְּנֵבֶל וְכִנּוֹר׃
englishText: Praise Him with the blast of the horn; Praise Him with the psaltery and harp.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַלְלוּהוּ בְתֹף וּמָחוֹל הַלְלוּהוּ בְּמִנִּים וְעוּגָב׃
englishText: Praise Him with the timbrel and dance; Praise Him with stringed instruments and the pipe.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: הַלְלוּהוּ בְצִלְצְלֵי־שָׁמַע הַלְלוּהוּ בְּצִלְצְלֵי תְרוּעָה׃
englishText: Praise Him with the loud-sounding cymbals; Praise Him with the clanging cymbals.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)

originalText: כֹּל הַנְּשָׁמָה תְּהַלֵּל יָהּ הַלְלוּ־יָהּ׃
englishText: Let every thing that hath breath praise the LORD. Hallelujah.
versionTitle: The Holy Scriptures: A New Translation (JPS 1917)
